  23: 
  24: ## System Overview
  25: 
  26: System ini terdiri dari **4 agen yang bekerja secara pipeline** untuk menganalisis codebase dari berbagai framework/bahasa, mendeteksi transaksi, mengukur konsumsi energi (carbon), dan menghasilkan laporan refactoring.
  27: 
  28: ```
  29: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  30: │                     MULTI-AGENT PIPELINE                        │
  31: │                                                                 │
  32: │  [Repo/Local]  →  [Repomix]  →  [Gemini AI]  →  [Code Carbon] │
  33: │      Agent 1         ↓             Agent 2         Agent 3      │
  34: │                  flat_pack                              ↓        │
  35: │                  .txt file      transactions        energy_data  │
  36: │                                      ↓                  ↓       │
  37: │                               ┌──────────────────────────┐      │
  38: │                               │    Agent 4 — Refactor    │      │
  39: │                               │         Report           │      │
  40: │                               └──────────────────────────┘      │
  41: └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
  42: ```
  43: 
  44: ### Supported Languages / Frameworks
  45: 
  46: | Framework | Language | CSRF Support | Unit Test |
  47: |-----------|----------|--------------|-----------|
  48: | Laravel | PHP | ✅ Auto-detect `@csrf` | PHPUnit |
  49: | Django | Python | ✅ `{% csrf_token %}` | pytest |
  50: | Express.js | JavaScript/TypeScript | ✅ `csurf` middleware | Jest |
  51: | Spring Boot | Java | ✅ `CsrfToken` | JUnit |
  52: | Rails | Ruby | ✅ `authenticity_token` | RSpec |
  53: | FastAPI | Python | ✅ Custom CSRF | pytest |
  54: | NestJS | TypeScript | ✅ `@nestjs/csrf` | Jest |
  55: | Go (Gin/Echo) | Go | ✅ `gorilla/csrf` | go test |
  56: | ASP.NET Core | C# | ✅ `[ValidateAntiForgeryToken]` | xUnit |
  57: 
  58: ---
  59: 
  60: ## Architecture Diagram
  61: 
  62: ```
  63:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
  64:                          ║   AGENT 1            ║
  65:                          ║   Repo Ingestion     ║
  66:                          ║                      ║
  67:                          ║  Input:              ║
  68:                          ║  • Local filepath    ║
  69:                          ║  • Git URL           ║
  70:                          ║  • ZIP upload        ║
  71:                          ║                      ║
  72:                          ║  Process:            ║
  73:                          ║  repomix → flat .txt ║
  74:                          ╚══════════╦═══════════╝
  75:                                     ║ flat_codebase.txt
  76:                                     ▼
  77:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
  78:                          ║   AGENT 2            ║
  79:                          ║   Gemini Identifier  ║
  80:                          ║                      ║
  81:                          ║  • Detect routes     ║
  82:                          ║  • Detect CSRF fields║
  83:                          ║  • Detect POST/PUT   ║
  84:                          ║  • Form fields map   ║
  85:                          ║  • Auth endpoints    ║
  86:                          ╚══════════╦═══════════╝
  87:                                     ║ transactions.json
  88:                                     ▼
  89:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
  90:                          ║   AGENT 3            ║
  91:                          ║   Code Carbon        ║
  92:                          ║                      ║
  93:                          ║  • Run live requests ║
  94:                          ║  • Measure energy    ║
  95:                          ║  • Track CO₂ per req ║
  96:                          ║  • Perf profiling    ║
  97:                          ╚══════════╦═══════════╝
  98:                                     ║ carbon_report.json
  99:                                     ▼
 100:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
 101:                          ║   AGENT 4            ║
 102:                          ║   Refactor Report    ║
 103:                          ║                      ║
 104:                          ║  • Combine all data  ║
 105:                          ║  • Suggest fixes     ║
 106:                          ║  • Generate tests    ║
 107:                          ║  • Send MD report    ║
 108:                          ╚══════════════════════╝
 109: ```
 110: 
 111: ---
 112: 
 113: ## Prerequisites
 114: 
 115: ### System Requirements
 116: 
 117: ```bash
 118: # Node.js >= 18
 119: node --version
 120: 
 121: # Python >= 3.9
 122: python3 --version
 123: 
 124: # Git
 125: git --version
 126: 
 127: # repomix (Agent 1)
 128: npm install -g repomix
 129: 
 130: # codecarbon (Agent 3)
 131: pip install codecarbon requests python-dotenv
 132: 
 133: # Optional: jq (untuk parsing JSON di terminal)
 134: # Ubuntu/Debian
 135: sudo apt install jq
 136: # macOS
 137: brew install jq
 138: ```
 139: 
 140: ### API Keys
 141: 
 142: ```bash
 143: # .env
 144: GEMINI_API_KEY=your_gemini_api_key_here
 145: TARGET_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000   # URL app yang sedang running
 146: REPOMIX_OUTPUT_DIR=./output
 147: REPORT_OUTPUT_DIR=./reports
 148: ```
 149: 
 150: ---
 151: 
 152: ## Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
 153: 
 154: ### Konsep
 155: 
 156: Agent 1 bertanggung jawab untuk **mengkonversi codebase** (baik dari path lokal maupun Git URL) menjadi satu file teks flat menggunakan **repomix**. Format flat ini kemudian dikirim ke Agent 2.
 157: 
 158: > **Kenapa repomix?** Repomix menghasilkan satu file `.txt` yang merepresentasikan seluruh struktur folder + isi file, sehingga Gemini AI dapat memahami konteks penuh codebase tanpa harus dikirim file per file.
 159: 
 160: ### File: `agent1_ingestion.py`
 161: 
 162: ```python
 163: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 164: """
 165: Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
 166: Converts local path or Git URL to a flat repomix bundle.
 167: """
 168: 
 169: import subprocess
 170: import os
 171: import sys
 172: import shutil
 173: import tempfile
 174: import json
 175: from pathlib import Path
 176: from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
 177: from typing import Optional
 178: 
 179: 
 180: @dataclass
 181: class IngestionResult:
 182:     success: bool
 183:     flat_file_path: str
 184:     source_type: str          # "local" | "git"
 185:     source_path: str
 186:     file_size_bytes: int
 187:     detected_language: str
 188:     detected_framework: str
 189:     error: Optional[str] = None
 190: 
 191: 
 192: FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES = {
 193:     "laravel":     ["artisan", "composer.json", "app/Http/Controllers"],
 194:     "django":      ["manage.py", "settings.py", "wsgi.py"],
 195:     "express":     ["package.json", "app.js", "routes/"],
 196:     "nestjs":      ["nest-cli.json", "src/main.ts"],
 197:     "springboot":  ["pom.xml", "src/main/java", "Application.java"],
 198:     "rails":       ["Gemfile", "config/routes.rb", "app/controllers"],
 199:     "fastapi":     ["main.py", "requirements.txt"],  # + fastapi in requirements
 200:     "gin":         ["go.mod", "main.go"],
 201:     "aspnet":      ["*.csproj", "Program.cs", "Startup.cs"],
 202: }
 203: 
 204: LANGUAGE_MAP = {
 205:     "laravel": "PHP",
 206:     "django": "Python",
 207:     "fastapi": "Python",
 208:     "express": "JavaScript",
 209:     "nestjs": "TypeScript",
 210:     "springboot": "Java",
 211:     "rails": "Ruby",
 212:     "gin": "Go",
 213:     "aspnet": "C#",
 214: }
 215: 
 216: 
 217: def detect_framework(path: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
 218:     """Detect framework and language from directory structure."""
 219:     for framework, signatures in FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES.items():
 220:         for sig in signatures:
 221:             check = Path(path) / sig
 222:             # Check direct file/dir
 223:             if check.exists():
 224:                 return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
 225:             # Glob pattern
 226:             if "*" in sig:
 227:                 matches = list(Path(path).glob(sig))
 228:                 if matches:
 229:                     return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
 230:     return "unknown", "Unknown"
 231: 
 232: 
 233: def clone_repo(git_url: str, target_dir: str) -> str:
 234:     """Clone a git repository to target_dir."""
 235:     print(f"[Agent 1] Cloning {git_url}...")
 236:     result = subprocess.run(
 237:         ["git", "clone", "--depth=1", git_url, target_dir],
 238:         capture_output=True, text=True
 239:     )
 240:     if result.returncode != 0:
 241:         raise RuntimeError(f"Git clone failed: {result.stderr}")
 242:     return target_dir
 243: 
 244: 
 245: def run_repomix(source_dir: str, output_path: str) -> None:
 246:     """Run repomix to create flat bundle from source_dir."""
 247:     print(f"[Agent 1] Running repomix on {source_dir}...")
 248: 
 249:     # repomix config — exclude common non-essential files
 250:     repomix_config = {
 251:         "output": {
 252:             "filePath": output_path,
 253:             "style": "plain",
 254:             "removeComments": False,
 255:             "removeEmptyLines": False,
 256:             "showLineNumbers": True,
 257:             "copyToClipboard": False,
 258:         },
 259:         "ignore": {
 260:             "useGitignore": True,
 261:             "useDefaultPatterns": True,
 262:             "customPatterns": [
 263:                 "node_modules/**",
 264:                 "vendor/**",
 265:                 ".git/**",
 266:                 "*.lock",
 267:                 "*.log",
 268:                 "dist/**",
 269:                 "build/**",
 270:                 "__pycache__/**",
 271:                 "*.pyc",
 272:                 ".env",
 273:                 "storage/**",
 274:                 "public/storage/**",
 275:             ]
 276:         }
 277:     }
 278: 
 279:     config_path = Path(source_dir) / ".repomix-config.json"
 280:     with open(config_path, "w") as f:
 281:         json.dump(repomix_config, f, indent=2)
 282: 
 283:     result = subprocess.run(
 284:         ["repomix", "--config", str(config_path), "--output", output_path, source_dir],
 285:         capture_output=True, text=True
 286:     )
 287: 
 288:     # Cleanup config
 289:     config_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
 290: 
 291:     if result.returncode != 0:
 292:         raise RuntimeError(f"repomix failed: {result.stderr}")
 293: 
 294:     print(f"[Agent 1] ✅ repomix output: {output_path}")
 295: 
 296: 
 297: def run(source: str, output_dir: str = "./output") -> IngestionResult:
 298:     """
 299:     Main entry point for Agent 1.
 300:     
 301:     Args:
 302:         source: Local directory path OR Git URL
 303:         output_dir: Where to save the flat bundle
 304:     
 305:     Returns:
 306:         IngestionResult with flat_file_path pointing to repomix output
 307:     """
 308:     os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
 309:     output_path = str(Path(output_dir) / "flat_codebase.txt")
 310:     temp_dir = None
 311: 
 312:     try:
 313:         # Determine source type
 314:         if source.startswith("http") or source.startswith("git@"):
 315:             source_type = "git"
 316:             temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="agent1_repo_")
 317:             working_dir = clone_repo(source, temp_dir)
 318:         else:
 319:             source_type = "local"
 320:             working_dir = os.path.abspath(source)
 321:             if not os.path.isdir(working_dir):
 322:                 raise ValueError(f"Directory not found: {working_dir}")
 323: 
 324:         # Detect framework
 325:         framework, language = detect_framework(working_dir)
 326:         print(f"[Agent 1] Detected: {framework} / {language}")
 327: 
 328:         # Run repomix
 329:         run_repomix(working_dir, output_path)
 330: 
 331:         file_size = Path(output_path).stat().st_size
 332: 
 333:         return IngestionResult(
 334:             success=True,
 335:             flat_file_path=output_path,
 336:             source_type=source_type,
 337:             source_path=source,
 338:             file_size_bytes=file_size,
 339:             detected_language=language,
 340:             detected_framework=framework,
 341:         )
 342: 
 343:     except Exception as e:
 344:         return IngestionResult(
 345:             success=False,
 346:             flat_file_path="",
 347:             source_type="unknown",
 348:             source_path=source,
 349:             file_size_bytes=0,
 350:             detected_language="Unknown",
 351:             detected_framework="unknown",
 352:             error=str(e),
 353:         )
 354:     finally:
 355:         if temp_dir and os.path.exists(temp_dir):
 356:             shutil.rmtree(temp_dir, ignore_errors=True)
 357: 
 358: 
 359: if __name__ == "__main__":
 360:     source = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
 361:     result = run(source)
 362:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 363: ```
 364: 
 365: ---
 366: 
 367: ## Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
 368: 
 369: ### Konsep
 370: 
 371: Agent 2 menerima file flat dari Agent 1, lalu mengirimkannya ke **Gemini AI** untuk dianalisis. Gemini akan:
 372: 
 373: - Mendeteksi semua **route/endpoint** (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH)
 374: - Mengidentifikasi **field yang wajib diisi** untuk setiap endpoint
 375: - Mendeteksi kebutuhan **CSRF token** secara otomatis per framework
 376: - Mengidentifikasi endpoint yang membutuhkan **autentikasi**
 377: - Menghasilkan **unit test skeleton** untuk transaksi POST/PUT/DELETE
 378: 
 379: ### File: `agent2_gemini_identifier.py`
 380: 
 381: ```python
 382: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 383: """
 384: Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
 385: Sends repomix bundle to Gemini AI for transaction analysis.
 386: """
 387: 
 388: import os
 389: import json
 390: import time
 391: import requests
 392: from pathlib import Path
 393: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
 394: from typing import Optional
 395: from dotenv import load_dotenv
 396: 
 397: load_dotenv()
 398: 
 399: GEMINI_API_KEY = os.getenv("GEMINI_API_KEY")
 400: GEMINI_ENDPOINT = (
 401:     f"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/"
 402:     f"gemini-1.5-pro:generateContent?key={GEMINI_API_KEY}"
 403: )
 404: 
 405: # Max chars to send to Gemini (stay under token limit)
 406: MAX_CONTENT_CHARS = 800_000
 407: 
 408: 
 409: @dataclass
 410: class TransactionField:
 411:     name: str
 412:     type: str            # "string" | "email" | "password" | "integer" | "boolean" | "file"
 413:     required: bool
 414:     description: str
 415:     validation_rules: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 416: 
 417: 
 418: @dataclass
 419: class Transaction:
 420:     id: str
 421:     method: str          # GET | POST | PUT | PATCH | DELETE
 422:     endpoint: str
 423:     description: str
 424:     requires_auth: bool
 425:     requires_csrf: bool
 426:     csrf_field_name: str  # e.g. "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "X-CSRF-Token"
 427:     fields: list[TransactionField]
 428:     framework: str
 429:     unit_test_skeleton: str = ""
 430:     tags: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 431: 
 432: 
 433: @dataclass
 434: class IdentificationResult:
 435:     success: bool
 436:     framework: str
 437:     language: str
 438:     transactions: list[Transaction]
 439:     total_routes: int
 440:     post_routes: int
 441:     csrf_protected_routes: int
 442:     auth_required_routes: int
 443:     error: Optional[str] = None
 444: 
 445: 
 446: SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
 447: You are an expert code analyzer. You will receive a flat bundle of a web application codebase.
 448: 
 449: Your task is to analyze ALL routes/endpoints and return a STRICT JSON response.
 450: 
 451: ## What to extract per endpoint:
 452: 1. HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)
 453: 2. URL path / route
 454: 3. Description of what the endpoint does
 455: 4. Whether it requires authentication (JWT, session, Bearer token, etc.)
 456: 5. Whether it requires CSRF protection — detect automatically by framework:
 457:    - Laravel: look for @csrf, csrf_field(), VerifyCsrfToken middleware, X-CSRF-TOKEN header
 458:    - Django: look for {% csrf_token %}, CsrfViewMiddleware, csrf_protect decorator
 459:    - Express.js: look for csurf, csrf(), csrfToken()
 460:    - Rails: look for authenticity_token, protect_from_forgery
 461:    - Spring Boot: look for CsrfToken, .csrf(), SecurityConfig
 462:    - FastAPI: look for custom CSRF implementations or fastapi-csrf-protect
 463:    - NestJS: look for @nestjs/csrf, CsrfGuard
 464:    - Go (Gin/Echo): look for gorilla/csrf, nosurf
 465:    - ASP.NET: look for [ValidateAntiForgeryToken], AntiForgeryToken()
 466: 6. The exact CSRF field name used (e.g., "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "authenticity_token")
 467: 7. ALL form fields/request body fields with: name, type, required status, and any validation rules
 468: 8. For POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE: generate a unit test skeleton in the framework's native test style
 469: 
 470: ## Response format — return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation:
 471: 
 472: {
 473:   "framework": "laravel",
 474:   "language": "PHP",
 475:   "transactions": [
 476:     {
 477:       "id": "txn_001",
 478:       "method": "POST",
 479:       "endpoint": "/api/login",
 480:       "description": "User authentication endpoint",
 481:       "requires_auth": false,
 482:       "requires_csrf": true,
 483:       "csrf_field_name": "_token",
 484:       "fields": [
 485:         {
 486:           "name": "email",
 487:           "type": "email",
 488:           "required": true,
 489:           "description": "User email address",
 490:           "validation_rules": ["required", "email", "max:255"]
 491:         },
 492:         {
 493:           "name": "password",
 494:           "type": "password",
 495:           "required": true,
 496:           "description": "User password",
 497:           "validation_rules": ["required", "min:8"]
 498:         }
 499:       ],
 500:       "unit_test_skeleton": "/** @test */\\npublic function test_user_can_login()\\n{\\n    $response = $this->post('/api/login', [\\n        'email' => 'test@example.com',\\n        'password' => 'password123',\\n    ]);\\n    $response->assertStatus(200);\\n}",
 501:       "tags": ["auth", "csrf"]
 502:     }
 503:   ]
 504: }
 505: """
 506: 
 507: 
 508: def chunk_content(content: str, max_chars: int) -> str:
 509:     """Truncate content if too large, prioritizing route/controller files."""
 510:     if len(content) <= max_chars:
 511:         return content
 512: 
 513:     # Try to keep the most important parts
 514:     lines = content.split("\n")
 515:     priority_keywords = [
 516:         "route", "controller", "middleware", "csrf", "request",
 517:         "form", "validate", "auth", "login", "register", "api",
 518:         "POST", "GET", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"
 519:     ]
 520: 
 521:     priority_lines = []
 522:     other_lines = []
 523: 
 524:     for line in lines:
 525:         if any(kw.lower() in line.lower() for kw in priority_keywords):
 526:             priority_lines.append(line)
 527:         else:
 528:             other_lines.append(line)
 529: 
 530:     result = "\n".join(priority_lines)
 531:     if len(result) < max_chars:
 532:         remaining = max_chars - len(result)
 533:         result += "\n" + "\n".join(other_lines)[:remaining]
 534: 
 535:     return result[:max_chars]
 536: 
 537: 
 538: def call_gemini(content: str) -> dict:
 539:     """Call Gemini API with the codebase content."""
 540:     print("[Agent 2] Sending codebase to Gemini AI...")
 541: 
 542:     payload = {
 543:         "system_instruction": {
 544:             "parts": [{"text": SYSTEM_PROMPT}]
 545:         },
 546:         "contents": [{
 547:             "parts": [{
 548:                 "text": f"Analyze this codebase and return the JSON:\n\n{content}"
 549:             }]
 550:         }],
 551:         "generationConfig": {
 552:             "temperature": 0.1,
 553:             "maxOutputTokens": 8192,
 554:             "responseMimeType": "application/json"
 555:         }
 556:     }
 557: 
 558:     for attempt in range(3):
 559:         try:
 560:             response = requests.post(
 561:                 GEMINI_ENDPOINT,
 562:                 json=payload,
 563:                 headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
 564:                 timeout=120
 565:             )
 566:             response.raise_for_status()
 567:             data = response.json()
 568: 
 569:             raw_text = data["candidates"][0]["content"]["parts"][0]["text"]
 570:             # Strip possible markdown fences
 571:             raw_text = raw_text.strip()
 572:             if raw_text.startswith("```"):
 573:                 raw_text = "\n".join(raw_text.split("\n")[1:-1])
 574: 
 575:             return json.loads(raw_text)
 576: 
 577:         except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
 578:             print(f"[Agent 2] Timeout on attempt {attempt + 1}, retrying...")
 579:             time.sleep(5 * (attempt + 1))
 580:         except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
 581:             raise ValueError(f"Gemini returned invalid JSON: {e}")
 582: 
 583:     raise RuntimeError("Gemini API failed after 3 attempts")
 584: 
 585: 
 586: def parse_result(raw: dict, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
 587:     """Parse Gemini response into typed IdentificationResult."""
 588:     transactions = []
 589: 
 590:     for t in raw.get("transactions", []):
 591:         fields = [
 592:             TransactionField(
 593:                 name=f["name"],
 594:                 type=f.get("type", "string"),
 595:                 required=f.get("required", False),
 596:                 description=f.get("description", ""),
 597:                 validation_rules=f.get("validation_rules", []),
 598:             )
 599:             for f in t.get("fields", [])
 600:         ]
 601: 
 602:         transactions.append(Transaction(
 603:             id=t.get("id", f"txn_{len(transactions):03d}"),
 604:             method=t["method"].upper(),
 605:             endpoint=t["endpoint"],
 606:             description=t.get("description", ""),
 607:             requires_auth=t.get("requires_auth", False),
 608:             requires_csrf=t.get("requires_csrf", False),
 609:             csrf_field_name=t.get("csrf_field_name", ""),
 610:             fields=fields,
 611:             framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
 612:             unit_test_skeleton=t.get("unit_test_skeleton", ""),
 613:             tags=t.get("tags", []),
 614:         ))
 615: 
 616:     mutating_methods = {"POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"}
 617:     return IdentificationResult(
 618:         success=True,
 619:         framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
 620:         language=raw.get("language", "Unknown"),
 621:         transactions=transactions,
 622:         total_routes=len(transactions),
 623:         post_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.method in mutating_methods),
 624:         csrf_protected_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_csrf),
 625:         auth_required_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_auth),
 626:     )
 627: 
 628: 
 629: def run(flat_file_path: str, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
 630:     """
 631:     Main entry point for Agent 2.
 632:     
 633:     Args:
 634:         flat_file_path: Path to repomix output file
 635:         framework_hint: Optional hint from Agent 1
 636:     
 637:     Returns:
 638:         IdentificationResult with all transactions
 639:     """
 640:     try:
 641:         content = Path(flat_file_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
 642:         content = chunk_content(content, MAX_CONTENT_CHARS)
 643: 
 644:         raw = call_gemini(content)
 645:         result = parse_result(raw, framework_hint)
 646: 
 647:         print(f"[Agent 2] ✅ Found {result.total_routes} routes")
 648:         print(f"[Agent 2]    POST/mutating: {result.post_routes}")
 649:         print(f"[Agent 2]    CSRF protected: {result.csrf_protected_routes}")
 650:         print(f"[Agent 2]    Auth required: {result.auth_required_routes}")
 651: 
 652:         # Save transactions to file
 653:         output_path = Path(flat_file_path).parent / "transactions.json"
 654:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
 655:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
 656:         print(f"[Agent 2] Saved: {output_path}")
 657: 
 658:         return result
 659: 
 660:     except Exception as e:
 661:         return IdentificationResult(
 662:             success=False,
 663:             framework=framework_hint,
 664:             language="Unknown",
 665:             transactions=[],
 666:             total_routes=0,
 667:             post_routes=0,
 668:             csrf_protected_routes=0,
 669:             auth_required_routes=0,
 670:             error=str(e),
 671:         )
 672: 
 673: 
 674: if __name__ == "__main__":
 675:     import sys
 676:     flat_file = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/flat_codebase.txt"
 677:     result = run(flat_file)
 678:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 679: ```
 680: 
 681: ---
 682: 
 683: ## Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent (Live Runner)
 684: 
 685: ### Konsep
 686: 
 687: Agent 3 menerima `transactions.json` dari Agent 2 dan mengeksekusi **HTTP requests nyata** ke aplikasi yang sedang berjalan. Setiap request diukur menggunakan **CodeCarbon** untuk melacak konsumsi energi dan emisi CO₂.
 688: 
 689: Untuk endpoint yang membutuhkan CSRF, agent ini secara otomatis:
 690: 1. Melakukan GET request ke halaman login/form terlebih dahulu
 691: 2. Mengekstrak CSRF token dari response (cookie, header, atau HTML hidden input)
 692: 3. Menyertakan token tersebut di request POST
 693: 
 694: ### File: `agent3_carbon.py`
 695: 
 696: ```python
 697: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 698: """
 699: Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent
 700: Runs live HTTP requests to the target app and measures CO2 emissions.
 701: """
 702: 
 703: import os
 704: import json
 705: import time
 706: import re
 707: import requests
 708: from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
 709: from codecarbon import EmissionsTracker
 710: from pathlib import Path
 711: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
 712: from typing import Optional, Any
 713: from dotenv import load_dotenv
 714: 
 715: load_dotenv()
 716: 
 717: BASE_URL = os.getenv("TARGET_BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
 718: REQUEST_TIMEOUT = int(os.getenv("REQUEST_TIMEOUT", "30"))
 719: DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS = float(os.getenv("DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS", "0.5"))
 720: 
 721: 
 722: @dataclass
 723: class RequestMeasurement:
 724:     transaction_id: str
 725:     method: str
 726:     endpoint: str
 727:     full_url: str
 728:     status_code: int
 729:     response_time_ms: float
 730:     energy_consumed_kwh: float
 731:     co2_emissions_kg: float
 732:     success: bool
 733:     csrf_obtained: bool
 734:     fields_sent: list[str]
 735:     error: Optional[str] = None
 736:     response_preview: str = ""
 737: 
 738: 
 739: @dataclass
 740: class CarbonResult:
 741:     success: bool
 742:     base_url: str
 743:     total_requests: int
 744:     successful_requests: int
 745:     failed_requests: int
 746:     total_energy_kwh: float
 747:     total_co2_kg: float
 748:     avg_response_time_ms: float
 749:     measurements: list[RequestMeasurement]
 750:     error: Optional[str] = None
 751: 
 752: 
 753: # ─── CSRF Token Extractors ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
 754: 
 755: def extract_csrf_from_html(html: str, field_name: str) -> Optional[str]:
 756:     """Extract CSRF token from HTML hidden input."""
 757:     soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "html.parser")
 758: 
 759:     # Try direct name match
 760:     token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": field_name})
 761:     if token_input:
 762:         return token_input.get("value")
 763: 
 764:     # Try meta tag (common in SPAs)
 765:     meta = soup.find("meta", {"name": field_name})
 766:     if meta:
 767:         return meta.get("content")
 768: 
 769:     # Generic CSRF patterns
 770:     for pattern in ["csrf", "token", "_token", "xsrf"]:
 771:         token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": re.compile(pattern, re.I)})
 772:         if token_input:
 773:             return token_input.get("value")
 774: 
 775:     return None
 776: 
 777: 
 778: def get_csrf_token(
 779:     session: requests.Session,
 780:     transaction_endpoint: str,
 781:     csrf_field_name: str,
 782:     framework: str
 783: ) -> tuple[Optional[str], bool]:
 784:     """
 785:     Attempt to retrieve CSRF token before a mutating request.
 786:     Returns (token_value, success).
 787:     """
 788:     # Guess the form/GET page that provides the CSRF token
 789:     # Strip /api/ prefix for web form pages
 790:     form_endpoint = transaction_endpoint.replace("/api/", "/")
 791:     candidates = [
 792:         f"{BASE_URL}{form_endpoint}",
 793:         f"{BASE_URL}/",
 794:         f"{BASE_URL}/login",
 795:         f"{BASE_URL}/home",
 796:     ]
 797: 
 798:     for url in candidates:
 799:         try:
 800:             r = session.get(url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 801:             if r.status_code == 200:
 802:                 # 1. Check HTML for hidden input
 803:                 token = extract_csrf_from_html(r.text, csrf_field_name)
 804:                 if token:
 805:                     return token, True
 806: 
 807:                 # 2. Check cookies (XSRF-TOKEN style, e.g., Laravel Sanctum)
 808:                 for cookie_name in ["XSRF-TOKEN", "csrftoken", "csrf_token"]:
 809:                     if cookie_name in session.cookies:
 810:                         import urllib.parse
 811:                         return urllib.parse.unquote(session.cookies[cookie_name]), True
 812: 
 813:                 # 3. Check response headers
 814:                 for header_name in ["X-CSRF-Token", "X-XSRF-Token", "CSRF-Token"]:
 815:                     if header_name in r.headers:
 816:                         return r.headers[header_name], True
 817: 
 818:         except Exception:
 819:             continue
 820: 
 821:     return None, False
 822: 
 823: 
 824: # ─── Dummy Data Generator ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 825: 
 826: DUMMY_VALUES: dict[str, Any] = {
 827:     "email":    "test@example.com",
 828:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
 829:     "name":     "Test User",
 830:     "username": "testuser",
 831:     "phone":    "+1234567890",
 832:     "address":  "123 Test Street",
 833:     "title":    "Test Title",
 834:     "body":     "Test body content for automated testing",
 835:     "content":  "Test content",
 836:     "message":  "Test message",
 837:     "amount":   "100.00",
 838:     "price":    "99.99",
 839:     "quantity": "1",
 840:     "date":     "2024-01-01",
 841:     "token":    "dummy_token_for_testing",
 842:     "code":     "TEST123",
 843:     "url":      "https://example.com",
 844:     "file":     None,  # Skip file uploads
 845: }
 846: 
 847: TYPE_DEFAULTS: dict[str, Any] = {
 848:     "email":    "test@example.com",
 849:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
 850:     "string":   "test_value",
 851:     "integer":  "1",
 852:     "number":   "1",
 853:     "boolean":  "true",
 854:     "text":     "Test text content",
 855:     "file":     None,
 856: }
 857: 
 858: 
 859: def generate_dummy_payload(fields: list[dict]) -> dict:
 860:     """Generate dummy payload from field definitions."""
 861:     payload = {}
 862:     for f in fields:
 863:         name = f["name"].lower()
 864:         ftype = f.get("type", "string").lower()
 865: 
 866:         if ftype == "file":
 867:             continue  # Skip file fields in automated testing
 868: 
 869:         # Try name match first
 870:         value = DUMMY_VALUES.get(name)
 871:         if value is None:
 872:             # Try partial match
 873:             for key, val in DUMMY_VALUES.items():
 874:                 if key in name:
 875:                     value = val
 876:                     break
 877: 
 878:         # Fallback to type default
 879:         if value is None:
 880:             value = TYPE_DEFAULTS.get(ftype, "test_value")
 881: 
 882:         if value is not None:
 883:             payload[f["name"]] = value
 884: 
 885:     return payload
 886: 
 887: 
 888: # ─── Main Runner ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 889: 
 890: def run_transaction(
 891:     session: requests.Session,
 892:     transaction: dict,
 893:     framework: str,
 894:     tracker: EmissionsTracker
 895: ) -> RequestMeasurement:
 896:     """Execute a single transaction with carbon tracking."""
 897:     method = transaction["method"].upper()
 898:     endpoint = transaction["endpoint"]
 899:     full_url = f"{BASE_URL}{endpoint}"
 900: 
 901:     csrf_obtained = False
 902:     csrf_token = None
 903: 
 904:     # Get CSRF token if required
 905:     if transaction.get("requires_csrf") and method in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
 906:         csrf_field = transaction.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
 907:         csrf_token, csrf_obtained = get_csrf_token(session, endpoint, csrf_field, framework)
 908: 
 909:         if csrf_token:
 910:             # Set in headers too (SPA pattern)
 911:             session.headers.update({
 912:                 "X-CSRF-Token": csrf_token,
 913:                 "X-XSRF-Token": csrf_token,
 914:             })
 915: 
 916:     # Build payload
 917:     payload = generate_dummy_payload(transaction.get("fields", []))
 918: 
 919:     # Add CSRF to payload if token found
 920:     if csrf_token and transaction.get("csrf_field_name"):
 921:         payload[transaction["csrf_field_name"]] = csrf_token
 922: 
 923:     # Track energy for this request
 924:     tracker.start_task(transaction["id"])
 925:     start_time = time.time()
 926: 
 927:     try:
 928:         if method == "GET":
 929:             response = session.get(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 930:         elif method == "POST":
 931:             response = session.post(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 932:         elif method == "PUT":
 933:             response = session.put(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 934:         elif method == "PATCH":
 935:             response = session.patch(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 936:         elif method == "DELETE":
 937:             response = session.delete(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 938:         else:
 939:             raise ValueError(f"Unsupported method: {method}")
 940: 
 941:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
 942:         emissions_data = tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
 943: 
 944:         return RequestMeasurement(
 945:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
 946:             method=method,
 947:             endpoint=endpoint,
 948:             full_url=full_url,
 949:             status_code=response.status_code,
 950:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
 951:             energy_consumed_kwh=emissions_data.energy_consumed if emissions_data else 0.0,
 952:             co2_emissions_kg=emissions_data.emissions if emissions_data else 0.0,
 953:             success=200 <= response.status_code < 400,
 954:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
 955:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
 956:             response_preview=response.text[:200],
 957:         )
 958: 
 959:     except Exception as e:
 960:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
 961:         try:
 962:             tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
 963:         except Exception:
 964:             pass
 965: 
 966:         return RequestMeasurement(
 967:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
 968:             method=method,
 969:             endpoint=endpoint,
 970:             full_url=full_url,
 971:             status_code=0,
 972:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
 973:             energy_consumed_kwh=0.0,
 974:             co2_emissions_kg=0.0,
 975:             success=False,
 976:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
 977:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
 978:             error=str(e),
 979:         )
 980: 
 981: 
 982: def run(transactions_path: str) -> CarbonResult:
 983:     """
 984:     Main entry point for Agent 3.
 985:     
 986:     Args:
 987:         transactions_path: Path to transactions.json from Agent 2
 988:     
 989:     Returns:
 990:         CarbonResult with per-request energy measurements
 991:     """
 992:     try:
 993:         with open(transactions_path) as f:
 994:             data = json.load(f)
 995: 
 996:         transactions = data.get("transactions", [])
 997:         framework = data.get("framework", "unknown")
 998: 
 999:         print(f"[Agent 3] Running {len(transactions)} transactions against {BASE_URL}")
1000: 
1001:         session = requests.Session()
1002:         session.headers.update({
1003:             "Accept": "application/json, text/html",
1004:             "User-Agent": "CodeCarbonAgent/1.0",
1005:         })
1006: 
1007:         # Initialize CodeCarbon tracker
1008:         tracker = EmissionsTracker(
1009:             project_name="code_carbon_agent",
1010:             output_dir=str(Path(transactions_path).parent),
1011:             log_level="warning",
1012:             save_to_file=False,
1013:             tracking_mode="process",
1014:         )
1015:         tracker.start()
1016: 
1017:         measurements = []
1018: 
1019:         for txn in transactions:
1020:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {txn['method']} {txn['endpoint']}")
1021:             measurement = run_transaction(session, txn, framework, tracker)
1022:             measurements.append(measurement)
1023: 
1024:             status_icon = "✅" if measurement.success else "❌"
1025:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {status_icon} {measurement.status_code} "
1026:                   f"({measurement.response_time_ms:.0f}ms, "
1027:                   f"{measurement.co2_emissions_kg*1000:.4f}g CO₂)")
1028: 
1029:             time.sleep(DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS)
1030: 
1031:         tracker.stop()
1032: 
1033:         successful = sum(1 for m in measurements if m.success)
1034:         total_energy = sum(m.energy_consumed_kwh for m in measurements)
1035:         total_co2 = sum(m.co2_emissions_kg for m in measurements)
1036:         avg_time = (sum(m.response_time_ms for m in measurements) / len(measurements)
1037:                     if measurements else 0)
1038: 
1039:         result = CarbonResult(
1040:             success=True,
1041:             base_url=BASE_URL,
1042:             total_requests=len(measurements),
1043:             successful_requests=successful,
1044:             failed_requests=len(measurements) - successful,
1045:             total_energy_kwh=round(total_energy, 8),
1046:             total_co2_kg=round(total_co2, 8),
1047:             avg_response_time_ms=round(avg_time, 2),
1048:             measurements=measurements,
1049:         )
1050: 
1051:         # Save carbon report
1052:         output_path = Path(transactions_path).parent / "carbon_report.json"
1053:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
1054:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
1055:         print(f"[Agent 3] ✅ Saved: {output_path}")
1056: 
1057:         return result
1058: 
1059:     except Exception as e:
1060:         return CarbonResult(
1061:             success=False,
1062:             base_url=BASE_URL,
1063:             total_requests=0,
1064:             successful_requests=0,
1065:             failed_requests=0,
1066:             total_energy_kwh=0.0,
1067:             total_co2_kg=0.0,
1068:             avg_response_time_ms=0.0,
1069:             measurements=[],
1070:             error=str(e),
1071:         )
1072: 
1073: 
1074: if __name__ == "__main__":
1075:     import sys
1076:     txn_path = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/transactions.json"
1077:     result = run(txn_path)
1078:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
1079: ```
1080: 
1081: ---
1082: 
1083: ## Agent 4 — Refactor Report Agent
1084: 
1085: ### Konsep
1086: 
1087: Agent 4 mengambil semua hasil dari Agent 1–3 dan menghasilkan:
1088: 
1089: - **Laporan refactoring lengkap** dalam format Markdown
1090: - **Unit test files** untuk setiap transaksi POST/mutating
1091: - **Ringkasan carbon footprint** dengan rekomendasi optimasi
1092: 
1093: ### File: `agent4_report.py`
1094: 
1095: ```python
1096: #!/usr/bin/env python3
1097: """
1098: Agent 4 — Refactor Report Agent
1099: Combines all data and generates comprehensive Markdown report + unit tests.
1100: """
1101: 
1102: import os
1103: import json
1104: from pathlib import Path
1105: from datetime import datetime
1106: from dataclasses import asdict
1107: from typing import Any
1108: from dotenv import load_dotenv
1109: 
1110: load_dotenv()
1111: 
1112: REPORT_DIR = os.getenv("REPORT_OUTPUT_DIR", "./reports")
1113: 
1114: 
1115: # ─── Unit Test Generators ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1116: 
1117: UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES = {
1118:     "laravel": {
1119:         "ext": "php",
1120:         "header": """<?php
1121: 
1122: namespace Tests\\Feature;
1123: 
1124: use Illuminate\\Foundation\\Testing\\RefreshDatabase;
1125: use Illuminate\\Foundation\\Testing\\WithFaker;
1126: use Tests\\TestCase;
1127: 
1128: class GeneratedTransactionTest extends TestCase
1129: {{
1130:     use RefreshDatabase, WithFaker;
1131: """,
1132:         "footer": "}\n",
1133:         "test_case": """
1134:     /** @test */
1135:     public function test_{method_lower}_{endpoint_slug}()
1136:     {{
1137:         // Transaction: {description}
1138:         {auth_setup}
1139:         $response = $this->{method_lower}('{endpoint}', [
1140: {fields}
1141:         {csrf_field}]);
1142: 
1143:         $response->assertStatus({expected_status});
1144:     }}
1145: """,
1146:     },
1147:     "django": {
1148:         "ext": "py",
1149:         "header": """import pytest
1150: from django.test import TestCase, Client
1151: from django.urls import reverse
1152: 
1153: 
1154: class GeneratedTransactionTests(TestCase):
1155:     def setUp(self):
1156:         self.client = Client()
1157: """,
1158:         "footer": "\n",
1159:         "test_case": """
1160:     def test_{method_lower}_{endpoint_slug}(self):
1161:         \"\"\"Transaction: {description}\"\"\"
1162:         {auth_setup}
1163:         data = {{
1164: {fields}
1165:         }}
1166:         url = '{endpoint}'
1167:         response = self.client.{method_lower}(url, data{csrf_kwarg})
1168:         self.assertIn(response.status_code, [{expected_status}])
1169: """,
1170:     },
1171:     "express": {
1172:         "ext": "test.js",
1173:         "header": """const request = require('supertest');
1174: const app = require('../app');
1175: 
1176: describe('Generated Transaction Tests', () => {
1177: """,
1178:         "footer": "});\n",
1179:         "test_case": """
1180:   it('{method} {endpoint} - {description}', async () => {{
1181:     {auth_setup}
1182:     const response = await request(app)
1183:       .{method_lower}('{endpoint}')
1184:       .set('Content-Type', 'application/json')
1185:       {csrf_header}
1186:       .send({{
1187: {fields}
1188:       }});
1189: 
1190:     expect(response.statusCode).toBe({expected_status});
1191:   }});
1192: """,
1193:     },
1194:     "springboot": {
1195:         "ext": "java",
1196:         "header": """package com.example.tests;
1197: 
1198: import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
1199: import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
1200: import org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.AutoConfigureMockMvc;
1201: import org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTest;
1202: import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
1203: import org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc;
1204: import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.request.MockMvcRequestBuilders.*;
1205: import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.*;
1206: 
1207: @SpringBootTest
1208: @AutoConfigureMockMvc
1209: public class GeneratedTransactionTest {{
1210: 
1211:     @Autowired
1212:     private MockMvc mockMvc;
1213: """,
1214:         "footer": "}\n",
1215:         "test_case": """
1216:     @Test
1217:     public void test{method}{EndpointCamel}() throws Exception {{
1218:         // {description}
1219:         {auth_setup}
1220:         mockMvc.perform({method_lower}("{endpoint}")
1221:             .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
1222:             {csrf_header}
1223:             .content("{{\\"test\\": \\"value\\"}}"))
1224:             .andExpect(status().is{expected_status_name}());
1225:     }}
1226: """,
1227:     },
1228: }
1229: 
1230: 
1231: def slugify(text: str) -> str:
1232:     """Convert endpoint path to test function name."""
1233:     return re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]", "_", text.lower()).strip("_")
1234: 
1235: 
1236: def generate_unit_tests(transactions: list[dict], framework: str) -> str:
1237:     """Generate unit test file content for the given framework."""
1238:     import re
1239: 
1240:     template = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])
1241:     lines = [template["header"]]
1242: 
1243:     mutating = ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]
1244:     test_transactions = [t for t in transactions if t["method"] in mutating]
1245: 
1246:     if not test_transactions:
1247:         test_transactions = transactions  # Include all if no mutating found
1248: 
1249:     for txn in test_transactions:
1250:         method = txn["method"].upper()
1251:         endpoint = txn["endpoint"]
1252:         slug = slugify(endpoint)
1253:         fields = txn.get("fields", [])
1254:         requires_csrf = txn.get("requires_csrf", False)
1255:         requires_auth = txn.get("requires_auth", False)
1256:         description = txn.get("description", "Auto-generated test")
1257: 
1258:         # Format fields
1259:         field_lines = []
1260:         for f in fields[:10]:  # Max 10 fields
1261:             name = f["name"]
1262:             ftype = f.get("type", "string")
1263:             if framework in ("laravel", "django"):
1264:                 if ftype == "email":
1265:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'test@example.com',")
1266:                 elif ftype == "password":
1267:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'TestPassword123!',")
1268:                 else:
1269:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'test_value',")
1270:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
1271:                 if ftype == "email":
1272:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "test@example.com",')
1273:                 elif ftype == "password":
1274:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "TestPassword123!",')
1275:                 else:
1276:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "test_value",')
1277: 
1278:         fields_str = "\n".join(field_lines)
1279: 
1280:         # Auth setup
1281:         if requires_auth:
1282:             if framework == "laravel":
1283:                 auth_setup = "$this->actingAs(User::factory()->create());"
1284:             elif framework == "django":
1285:                 auth_setup = "self.client.force_login(User.objects.create_user('testuser', 'test@test.com', 'pass'))"
1286:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
1287:                 auth_setup = "// TODO: Set Authorization header with valid JWT token"
1288:             else:
1289:                 auth_setup = "// TODO: Setup authentication"
1290:         else:
1291:             auth_setup = ""
1292: 
1293:         # CSRF setup
1294:         if requires_csrf:
1295:             csrf_field_name = txn.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
1296:             if framework == "laravel":
1297:                 csrf_field = f"'{csrf_field_name}' => csrf_token(),"
1298:                 csrf_kwarg = ""
1299:                 csrf_header = ""
1300:             elif framework == "django":
1301:                 csrf_field = ""
1302:                 csrf_kwarg = ", enforce_csrf_checks=False"
1303:                 csrf_header = ""
1304:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
1305:                 csrf_field = ""
1306:                 csrf_kwarg = ""
1307:                 csrf_header = f'.set("X-CSRF-Token", "test-csrf-token")'
1308:             else:
1309:                 csrf_field = ""
1310:                 csrf_kwarg = ""
1311:                 csrf_header = ""
1312:         else:
1313:             csrf_field = ""
1314:             csrf_kwarg = ""
1315:             csrf_header = ""
1316: 
1317:         expected_status = 201 if method == "POST" else 200
1318: 
1319:         test_case = template["test_case"].format(
1320:             method=method,
1321:             method_lower=method.lower(),
1322:             endpoint=endpoint,
1323:             endpoint_slug=slug,
1324:             EndpointCamel="".join(w.capitalize() for w in slug.split("_")),
1325:             description=description,
1326:             auth_setup=auth_setup,
1327:             fields=fields_str,
1328:             csrf_field=csrf_field,
1329:             csrf_kwarg=csrf_kwarg,
1330:             csrf_header=csrf_header,
1331:             expected_status=expected_status,
1332:             expected_status_name="Ok" if expected_status == 200 else "Created",
1333:         )
1334: 
1335:         lines.append(test_case)
1336: 
1337:     lines.append(template["footer"])
1338:     return "".join(lines)
1339: 
1340: 
1341: # ─── Markdown Report Builder ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
1342: 
1343: def build_report(
1344:     ingestion: dict,
1345:     identification: dict,
1346:     carbon: dict,
1347:     output_dir: str,
1348: ) -> str:
1349:     """Build full Markdown report."""
1350: 
1351:     now = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
1352:     framework = identification.get("framework", "unknown")
1353:     language = identification.get("language", "Unknown")
1354:     transactions = identification.get("transactions", [])
1355:     measurements = {m["transaction_id"]: m for m in carbon.get("measurements", [])}
1356: 
1357:     lines = [
1358:         f"# 🤖 Code Carbon Report",
1359:         f"",
1360:         f"> Generated: `{now}`",
1361:         f"> Source: `{ingestion.get('source_path', 'N/A')}`",
1362:         f"> Framework: `{framework}` · Language: `{language}`",
1363:         f"",
1364:         f"---",
1365:         f"",
1366:         f"## 📊 Executive Summary",
1367:         f"",
1368:         f"| Metric | Value |",
1369:         f"|--------|-------|",
1370:         f"| Total Routes | `{identification.get('total_routes', 0)}` |",
1371:         f"| POST/Mutating | `{identification.get('post_routes', 0)}` |",
1372:         f"| CSRF Protected | `{identification.get('csrf_protected_routes', 0)}` |",
1373:         f"| Auth Required | `{identification.get('auth_required_routes', 0)}` |",
1374:         f"| Successful Requests | `{carbon.get('successful_requests', 0)}/{carbon.get('total_requests', 0)}` |",
1375:         f"| Total Energy | `{carbon.get('total_energy_kwh', 0):.8f} kWh` |",
1376:         f"| Total CO₂ | `{carbon.get('total_co2_kg', 0)*1000:.4f} g` |",
1377:         f"| Avg Response Time | `{carbon.get('avg_response_time_ms', 0):.1f} ms` |",
1378:         f"",
1379:         f"---",
1380:         f"",
1381:         f"## 🔍 Transaction Analysis",
1382:         f"",
1383:     ]
1384: 
1385:     # Group by method
1386:     for method in ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
1387:         method_txns = [t for t in transactions if t["method"] == method]
1388:         if not method_txns:
1389:             continue
1390: 
1391:         icon = {"GET": "🔵", "POST": "🟢", "PUT": "🟡", "PATCH": "🟠", "DELETE": "🔴"}.get(method, "⚪")
1392:         lines.append(f"### {icon} {method} Endpoints ({len(method_txns)})")
1393:         lines.append("")
1394: 
1395:         for txn in method_txns:
1396:             m = measurements.get(txn["id"], {})
1397:             status = m.get("status_code", "—")
1398:             rtime = m.get("response_time_ms", 0)
1399:             co2 = m.get("co2_emissions_kg", 0) * 1000
1400:             success = "✅" if m.get("success") else "❌"
1401: 
1402:             lines.append(f"#### `{txn['endpoint']}`")
1403:             lines.append(f"")
1404:             lines.append(f"- **Description:** {txn.get('description', 'N/A')}")
1405:             lines.append(f"- **Auth Required:** {'✅ Yes' if txn.get('requires_auth') else '❌ No'}")
1406:             lines.append(f"- **CSRF Protected:** {'✅ Yes' if txn.get('requires_csrf') else '❌ No'}")
1407:             if txn.get("csrf_field_name"):
1408:                 lines.append(f"- **CSRF Field:** `{txn['csrf_field_name']}`")
1409:             lines.append(f"- **Live Result:** {success} `HTTP {status}` · `{rtime:.0f}ms` · `{co2:.4f}g CO₂`")
1410: 
1411:             if txn.get("fields"):
1412:                 lines.append(f"")
1413:                 lines.append(f"**Required Fields:**")
1414:                 lines.append(f"")
1415:                 lines.append(f"| Field | Type | Required | Validation |")
1416:                 lines.append(f"|-------|------|----------|------------|")
1417:                 for f in txn["fields"]:
1418:                     req = "✅" if f.get("required") else "⬜"
1419:                     rules = ", ".join(f.get("validation_rules", [])) or "—"
1420:                     lines.append(f"| `{f['name']}` | `{f['type']}` | {req} | `{rules}` |")
1421: 
1422:             lines.append(f"")
1423: 
1424:     # CSRF Summary
1425:     lines += [
1426:         f"---",
1427:         f"",
1428:         f"## 🔐 CSRF Analysis",
1429:         f"",
1430:         f"Framework `{framework}` uses the following CSRF pattern:",
1431:         f"",
1432:     ]
1433: 
1434:     csrf_txns = [t for t in transactions if t.get("requires_csrf")]
1435:     if csrf_txns:
1436:         csrf_fields = list(set(t.get("csrf_field_name", "") for t in csrf_txns if t.get("csrf_field_name")))
1437:         for cf in csrf_fields:
1438:             lines.append(f"- CSRF field name: **`{cf}`**")
1439:         lines.append("")
1440:         lines.append("Endpoints with CSRF protection:")
1441:         for t in csrf_txns:
1442:             lines.append(f"- `{t['method']} {t['endpoint']}`")
1443:     else:
1444:         lines.append("_No CSRF-protected endpoints detected._")
1445: 
1446:     lines += [
1447:         f"",
1448:         f"---",
1449:         f"",
1450:         f"## 🌱 Carbon Footprint Analysis",
1451:         f"",
1452:         f"| Endpoint | Method | Status | Energy (kWh) | CO₂ (g) | Time (ms) |",
1453:         f"|----------|--------|--------|-------------|---------|-----------|",
1454:     ]
1455: 
1456:     for m in carbon.get("measurements", []):
1457:         co2_g = m["co2_emissions_kg"] * 1000
1458:         icon = "✅" if m["success"] else "❌"
1459:         lines.append(
1460:             f"| `{m['endpoint']}` | `{m['method']}` | {icon} `{m['status_code']}` "
1461:             f"| `{m['energy_consumed_kwh']:.8f}` | `{co2_g:.4f}` | `{m['response_time_ms']:.0f}` |"
1462:         )
1463: 
1464:     lines += [
1465:         f"",
1466:         f"---",
1467:         f"",
1468:         f"## 🔧 Refactoring Recommendations",
1469:         f"",
1470:     ]
1471: 
1472:     # Auto recommendations
1473:     recs = []
1474: 
1475:     slow_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if m["response_time_ms"] > 1000]
1476:     if slow_txns:
1477:         recs.append(f"**⚠️ Slow endpoints detected** ({len(slow_txns)} endpoint > 1000ms):")
1478:         for m in slow_txns:
1479:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` ({m['response_time_ms']:.0f}ms) — consider caching or query optimization")
1480: 
1481:     failed_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if not m["success"]]
1482:     if failed_txns:
1483:         recs.append(f"**❌ Failed requests** ({len(failed_txns)} endpoints returned error):")
1484:         for m in failed_txns:
1485:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` → HTTP {m['status_code']}")
1486: 
1487:     unprotected_mutating = [
1488:         t for t in transactions
1489:         if t["method"] in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]
1490:         and not t.get("requires_csrf")
1491:         and not t.get("requires_auth")
1492:     ]
1493:     if unprotected_mutating:
1494:         recs.append(f"**🔓 Unprotected mutating endpoints** — no CSRF or auth:")
1495:         for t in unprotected_mutating:
1496:             recs.append(f"  - `{t['method']} {t['endpoint']}`")
1497: 
1498:     if not recs:
1499:         recs.append("✅ No critical issues detected. Code looks clean!")
1500: 
1501:     for rec in recs:
1502:         lines.append(rec)
1503:         lines.append("")
1504: 
1505:     lines += [
1506:         f"---",
1507:         f"",
1508:         f"## 🧪 Generated Unit Tests",
1509:         f"",
1510:         f"Unit test files have been saved to `{output_dir}/tests/`",
1511:         f"",
1512:         f"| File | Framework | Test Count |",
1513:         f"|------|-----------|------------|",
1514:         f"| `GeneratedTransactionTest.{UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES['express'])['ext']}` | `{framework}` | `{identification.get('post_routes', 0)}` |",
1515:         f"",
1516:         f"---",
1517:         f"",
1518:         f"_Report generated by Multi-Agent Code Carbon System_",
1519:     ]
1520: 
1521:     return "\n".join(lines)
1522: 
1523: 
1524: def run(output_dir: str = "./output") -> str:
1525:     """
1526:     Main entry point for Agent 4.
1527:     
1528:     Args:
1529:         output_dir: Directory containing all agent outputs
1530:     
1531:     Returns:
1532:         Path to the generated report
1533:     """
1534:     os.makedirs(REPORT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
1535:     os.makedirs(f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests", exist_ok=True)
1536: 
1537:     # Load all agent outputs
1538:     with open(f"{output_dir}/transactions.json") as f:
1539:         identification = json.load(f)
1540: 
1541:     with open(f"{output_dir}/carbon_report.json") as f:
1542:         carbon = json.load(f)
1543: 
1544:     # Agent 1 result may or may not exist
1545:     ingestion_path = Path(output_dir) / "ingestion_result.json"
1546:     if ingestion_path.exists():
1547:         with open(ingestion_path) as f:
1548:             ingestion = json.load(f)
1549:     else:
1550:         ingestion = {"source_path": output_dir}
1551: 
1552:     framework = identification.get("framework", "express")
1553: 
1554:     # Generate unit tests
1555:     print("[Agent 4] Generating unit tests...")
1556:     test_content = generate_unit_tests(identification.get("transactions", []), framework)
1557:     test_ext = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])["ext"]
1558:     test_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests/GeneratedTransactionTest.{test_ext}"
1559:     with open(test_path, "w") as f:
1560:         f.write(test_content)
1561:     print(f"[Agent 4] Unit tests saved: {test_path}")
1562: 
1563:     # Generate markdown report
1564:     print("[Agent 4] Building report...")
1565:     report_md = build_report(ingestion, identification, carbon, REPORT_DIR)
1566:     report_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/code_carbon_report.md"
1567:     with open(report_path, "w") as f:
1568:         f.write(report_md)
1569: 
1570:     print(f"[Agent 4] ✅ Report saved: {report_path}")
1571:     return report_path
1572: 
1573: 
1574: if __name__ == "__main__":
1575:     import sys
1576:     out_dir = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output"
1577:     run(out_dir)
1578: ```
1579: 
1580: ---
1581: 
1582: ## Pipeline Orchestrator
1583: 
1584: ### File: `pipeline.py`
1585: 
1586: ```python
1587: #!/usr/bin/env python3
1588: """
1589: Pipeline Orchestrator
1590: Runs all 4 agents in sequence.
1591: """
1592: 
1593: import sys
1594: import json
1595: import argparse
1596: from dataclasses import asdict
1597: from pathlib import Path
1598: 
1599: import agent1_ingestion
1600: import agent2_gemini_identifier
1601: import agent3_carbon
1602: import agent4_report
1603: 
1604: 
1605: def main():
1606:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
1607:         description="Multi-Agent Code Carbon Pipeline",
1608:         formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
1609:         epilog="""
1610: Examples:
1611:   # Local directory
1612:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-laravel-app
1613: 
1614:   # Git repository
1615:   python pipeline.py --source https://github.com/user/repo
1616: 
1617:   # Skip carbon testing (no live app running)
1618:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --skip-carbon
1619: 
1620:   # Specify output directory
1621:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --output ./my-analysis
1622:         """
1623:     )
1624:     parser.add_argument("--source", required=True, help="Local path or Git URL")
1625:     parser.add_argument("--output", default="./output", help="Output directory")
1626:     parser.add_argument("--skip-carbon", action="store_true",
1627:                         help="Skip Agent 3 (no live app required)")
1628:     parser.add_argument("--base-url", default=None,
1629:                         help="Override TARGET_BASE_URL for Agent 3")
1630: 
1631:     args = parser.parse_args()
1632: 
1633:     if args.base_url:
1634:         import os
1635:         os.environ["TARGET_BASE_URL"] = args.base_url
1636: 
1637:     print("=" * 60)
1638:     print("🤖 MULTI-AGENT CODE CARBON PIPELINE")
1639:     print("=" * 60)
1640: 
1641:     # ── Agent 1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
1642:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion")
1643:     ingestion = agent1_ingestion.run(args.source, args.output)
1644:     if not ingestion.success:
1645:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 1 failed: {ingestion.error}")
1646:         sys.exit(1)
1647: 
1648:     # Save ingestion result
1649:     with open(f"{args.output}/ingestion_result.json", "w") as f:
1650:         json.dump(asdict(ingestion), f, indent=2)
1651: 
1652:     # ── Agent 2 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
1653:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier")
1654:     identification = agent2_gemini_identifier.run(
1655:         ingestion.flat_file_path,
1656:         ingestion.detected_framework
1657:     )
1658:     if not identification.success:
1659:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 2 failed: {identification.error}")
1660:         sys.exit(1)
1661: 
1662:     # ── Agent 3 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
1663:     if args.skip_carbon:
1664:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ⏭  Agent 3 — Skipped (--skip-carbon)")
1665:         # Create empty carbon result
1666:         empty_carbon = {
1667:             "success": True, "base_url": "", "total_requests": 0,
1668:             "successful_requests": 0, "failed_requests": 0,
1669:             "total_energy_kwh": 0.0, "total_co2_kg": 0.0,
1670:             "avg_response_time_ms": 0.0, "measurements": []
1671:         }
1672:         with open(f"{args.output}/carbon_report.json", "w") as f:
1673:             json.dump(empty_carbon, f, indent=2)
1674:     else:
1675:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 3 — Code Carbon")
1676:         carbon = agent3_carbon.run(f"{args.output}/transactions.json")
1677:         if not carbon.success:
1678:             print(f"[PIPELINE] ⚠️  Agent 3 warning: {carbon.error}")
1679: 
1680:     # ── Agent 4 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
1681:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 4 — Refactor Report")
1682:     report_path = agent4_report.run(args.output)
1683: 
1684:     print("\n" + "=" * 60)
1685:     print("✅ PIPELINE COMPLETE")
1686:     print(f"📄 Report: {report_path}")
1687:     print(f"🧪 Tests:  ./reports/tests/")
1688:     print("=" * 60)
1689: 
1690: 
1691: if __name__ == "__main__":
1692:     main()
1693: ```
1694: 
1695: ---
1696: 
1697: ## Web UI — CSRF & Form Field Handler
1698: 
1699: File ini adalah **web interface** yang menampilkan form dari hasil Gemini, lengkap dengan field yang harus diisi, label, dan CSRF token secara otomatis.
1700: 
1701: ### File: `web_ui/index.html`
1702: 
1703: ```html
1704: <!DOCTYPE html>
1705: <html lang="id">
1706: <head>
1707:   <meta charset="UTF-8">
1708:   <title>Code Carbon — Transaction Tester</title>
1709:   <style>
1710:     body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 0 1rem; }
1711:     .card { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.5rem; margin: 1rem 0; }
1712:     .method-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 4px;
1713:                     font-weight: bold; font-size: 0.8rem; color: white; }
1714:     .POST   { background: #2ecc71; }
1715:     .GET    { background: #3498db; }
1716:     .PUT    { background: #f39c12; }
1717:     .PATCH  { background: #e67e22; }
1718:     .DELETE { background: #e74c3c; }
1719:     .form-group { margin: 0.75rem 0; }
1720:     label { display: block; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 4px; }
1721:     input, select { width: 100%; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;
1722:                     box-sizing: border-box; }
1723:     input[type=password] { font-family: monospace; }
1724:     .csrf-badge { font-size: 0.75rem; background: #fff3cd; padding: 2px 6px;
1725:                   border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #ffc107; }
1726:     .auth-badge { font-size: 0.75rem; background: #cce5ff; padding: 2px 6px;
1727:                   border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #004085; }
1728:     button[type=submit] { background: #2c3e50; color: white; border: none;
1729:                           padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; }
1730:     .response-box { background: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px;
1731:                     padding: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem; font-family: monospace;
1732:                     white-space: pre-wrap; max-height: 300px; overflow-y: auto; }
1733:     .required-mark { color: #e74c3c; }
1734:   </style>
1735: </head>
1736: <body>
1737:   <h1>🤖 Code Carbon — Transaction Tester</h1>
1738:   <p>Load <code>transactions.json</code> to auto-generate forms for each endpoint.</p>
1739: 
1740:   <input type="file" id="txnFile" accept=".json">
1741:   <div id="app"></div>
1742: 
1743:   <script>
1744:     const BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:8000';  // Change this!
1745: 
1746:     document.getElementById('txnFile').addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
1747:       const file = e.target.files[0];
1748:       if (!file) return;
1749:       const data = JSON.parse(await file.text());
1750:       renderTransactions(data.transactions || [], data.framework || 'unknown');
1751:     });
1752: 
1753:     function renderTransactions(transactions, framework) {
1754:       const app = document.getElementById('app');
1755:       app.innerHTML = '';
1756: 
1757:       transactions.forEach((txn, i) => {
1758:         const card = document.createElement('div');
1759:         card.className = 'card';
1760:         card.id = `txn-${txn.id}`;
1761: 
1762:         const badges = [
1763:           `<span class="method-badge ${txn.method}">${txn.method}</span>`,
1764:           txn.requires_csrf ? '<span class="csrf-badge">🔐 CSRF</span>' : '',
1765:           txn.requires_auth ? '<span class="auth-badge">🔑 Auth</span>' : '',
1766:         ].filter(Boolean).join(' ');
1767: 
1768:         let fieldsHtml = '';
1769:         (txn.fields || []).forEach(f => {
1770:           const inputType = {
1771:             'email': 'email', 'password': 'password',
1772:             'integer': 'number', 'number': 'number', 'file': 'file',
1773:           }[f.type] || 'text';
1774: 
1775:           const req = f.required ? '<span class="required-mark">*</span>' : '';
1776:           const rules = (f.validation_rules || []).join(', ');
1777:           const placeholder = f.description || f.name;
1778: 
1779:           fieldsHtml += `
1780:             <div class="form-group">
1781:               <label for="${txn.id}_${f.name}">${f.name} ${req}
1782:                 <small style="color:#888;">(${f.type}${rules ? ' · ' + rules : ''})</small>
1783:               </label>
1784:               <input type="${inputType}"
1785:                      id="${txn.id}_${f.name}"
1786:                      name="${f.name}"
1787:                      placeholder="${placeholder}"
1788:                      ${f.required ? 'required' : ''}>
1789:             </div>`;
1790:         });
1791: 
1792:         // CSRF hidden field
1793:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
1794:           fieldsHtml += `
1795:             <div class="form-group" style="opacity:0.5">
1796:               <label>CSRF Token (auto-fetched: <code>${txn.csrf_field_name}</code>)</label>
1797:               <input type="text" id="${txn.id}_csrf" name="${txn.csrf_field_name}"
1798:                      placeholder="Will be fetched automatically" readonly>
1799:             </div>`;
1800:         }
1801: 
1802:         card.innerHTML = `
1803:           <h3>${badges} <code>${txn.endpoint}</code></h3>
1804:           <p style="color:#666;">${txn.description || ''}</p>
1805:           <form id="form-${txn.id}">
1806:             ${fieldsHtml}
1807:             <button type="submit">Send ${txn.method} Request</button>
1808:           </form>
1809:           <div id="response-${txn.id}" class="response-box" style="display:none;"></div>
1810:         `;
1811: 
1812:         app.appendChild(card);
1813: 
1814:         // Auto-fetch CSRF if needed
1815:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
1816:           fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework);
1817:         }
1818: 
1819:         // Form submit
1820:         document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`).addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
1821:           e.preventDefault();
1822:           await submitTransaction(txn);
1823:         });
1824:       });
1825:     }
1826: 
1827:     async function fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework) {
1828:       try {
1829:         // Try to get CSRF from the same page
1830:         const endpoints = [txn.endpoint.replace('/api/', '/'), '/', '/login'];
1831:         for (const ep of endpoints) {
1832:           const r = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${ep}`, { credentials: 'include' });
1833:           if (r.ok) {
1834:             const html = await r.text();
1835:             const match = html.match(
1836:               new RegExp(`name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']\\s+value=["']([^"']+)["']`)
1837:             ) || html.match(
1838:               new RegExp(`value=["']([^"']+)["']\\s+name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']`)
1839:             );
1840:             if (match) {
1841:               const csrfInput = document.getElementById(`${txn.id}_csrf`);
1842:               if (csrfInput) csrfInput.value = match[1];
1843:               return;
1844:             }
1845:           }
1846:         }
1847:       } catch (e) {
1848:         console.warn('Could not auto-fetch CSRF:', e.message);
1849:       }
1850:     }
1851: 
1852:     async function submitTransaction(txn) {
1853:       const form = document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`);
1854:       const responseBox = document.getElementById(`response-${txn.id}`);
1855:       const formData = new FormData(form);
1856:       const payload = Object.fromEntries(formData);
1857: 
1858:       responseBox.style.display = 'block';
1859:       responseBox.textContent = '⏳ Sending...';
1860: 
1861:       try {
1862:         const options = {
1863:           method: txn.method,
1864:           credentials: 'include',
1865:           headers: {},
1866:         };
1867: 
1868:         if (txn.method !== 'GET') {
1869:           options.headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
1870:           options.body = JSON.stringify(payload);
1871: 
1872:           if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
1873:             options.headers['X-CSRF-Token'] = payload[txn.csrf_field_name] || '';
1874:           }
1875:         }
1876: 
1877:         const start = performance.now();
1878:         const r = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${txn.endpoint}`, options);
1879:         const elapsed = (performance.now() - start).toFixed(0);
1880:         const text = await r.text();
1881: 
1882:         let display;
1883:         try {
1884:           display = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2);
1885:         } catch {
1886:           display = text.substring(0, 1000);
1887:         }
1888: 
1889:         responseBox.textContent =
1890:           `HTTP ${r.status} (${elapsed}ms)\n\n${display}`;
1891: 
1892:       } catch (err) {
1893:         responseBox.textContent = `❌ Error: ${err.message}`;
1894:       }
1895:     }
1896:   </script>
1897: </body>
1898: </html>
1899: ```
1900: 
1901: ---

1903: ## Unit Test Generator
1904: 
1905: Contoh output unit test untuk **Laravel** dari Agent 4:
1906: 
1907: ```php
1908: <?php
1909: // reports/tests/GeneratedTransactionTest.php
1910: 
1911: namespace Tests\Feature;
1912: 
1913: use Illuminate\Foundation\Testing\RefreshDatabase;
1914: use Tests\TestCase;
1915: use App\Models\User;
1916: 
1917: class GeneratedTransactionTest extends TestCase
1918: {
1919:     use RefreshDatabase;
1920: 
1921:     /** @test */
1922:     public function test_post_api_login()
1923:     {
1924:         $response = $this->post('/api/login', [
1925:             'email'    => 'test@example.com',
1926:             'password' => 'TestPassword123!',
1927:             '_token'   => csrf_token(),
1928:         ]);
1929:         $response->assertStatus(200);
1930:         $response->assertJsonStructure(['token']);
1931:     }
1932: 
1933:     /** @test */
1934:     public function test_post_api_register()
1935:     {
1936:         $response = $this->post('/api/register', [
1937:             'name'                  => 'Test User',
1938:             'email'                 => 'newuser@example.com',
1939:             'password'              => 'TestPassword123!',
1940:             'password_confirmation' => 'TestPassword123!',
1941:             '_token'                => csrf_token(),
1942:         ]);
1943:         $response->assertStatus(201);
1944:     }
1945: 
1946:     /** @test */
1947:     public function test_post_api_transactions_requires_auth()
1948:     {
1949:         $response = $this->post('/api/transactions', [
1950:             'amount'      => '100.00',
1951:             'description' => 'Test transaction',
1952:             '_token'      => csrf_token(),
1953:         ]);
1954:         // Should redirect to login or return 401
1955:         $response->assertStatus(401);
1956:     }
1957: 
1958:     /** @test */
1959:     public function test_post_api_transactions_authenticated()
1960:     {
1961:         $user = User::factory()->create();
1962:         $this->actingAs($user);
1963: 
1964:         $response = $this->post('/api/transactions', [
1965:             'amount'      => '100.00',
1966:             'description' => 'Test transaction',
1967:             '_token'      => csrf_token(),
1968:         ]);
1969:         $response->assertStatus(201);
1970:     }
1971: }
1972: ```

1975: 
1976: ## Configuration & Environment
1977: 
1978: ### File: `.env`
1979: 
1980: ```dotenv
1981: # Required
1982: GEMINI_API_KEY=your_gemini_api_key_here
1983: 
1984: # Agent 3 — Target app URL (must be running)
1985: TARGET_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000
1986: 
1987: # Optional tuning
1988: REQUEST_TIMEOUT=30
1989: DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS=0.5
1990: 
1991: # Output paths
1992: REPOMIX_OUTPUT_DIR=./output
1993: REPORT_OUTPUT_DIR=./reports
1994: ```
1995: 
1996: ### File: `requirements.txt`
1997: 
1998: ```
1999: codecarbon>=2.3.0
2000: requests>=2.31.0
2001: beautifulsoup4>=4.12.0
2002: python-dotenv>=1.0.0
2003: lxml>=4.9.0
2004: ```
2005: 
2006: ### Installation
2007: 
2008: ```bash
2009: # Install Python deps
2010: pip install -r requirements.txt
2011: 
2012: # Install repomix (Node.js required)
2013: npm install -g repomix
2014: 
2015: # Verify
2016: repomix --version
2017: python -c "import codecarbon; print('CodeCarbon OK')"
2018: ```
2019: 
2020: ---
2021: 
2022: ## Running the Full Pipeline
2023: 
2024: ```bash
2025: # 1. Analyze local Laravel project (app must be running)
2026: python pipeline.py \
2027:   --source /path/to/my-laravel-app \
2028:   --base-url http://localhost:8000
2029: 
2030: # 2. Analyze from Git URL, skip live testing
2031: python pipeline.py \
2032:   --source https://github.com/user/my-express-api \
2033:   --skip-carbon
2034: 
2035: # 3. Analyze Django app
2036: python pipeline.py \
2037:   --source /path/to/my-django-app \
2038:   --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8000
2039: 
2040: # 4. Run only Agent 2 (already have repomix output)
2041: python agent2_gemini_identifier.py ./output/flat_codebase.txt
2042: 
2043: # 5. Open Web UI
2044: # Open web_ui/index.html in browser
2045: # Load transactions.json
2046: # Fill required fields → Send request
2047: ```
2048: 
2049: ---

2052: 
2053: ### Directory Structure After Run
2054: 
2055: ```
2056: output/
2057: ├── flat_codebase.txt          ← Agent 1: repomix bundle
2058: ├── ingestion_result.json      ← Agent 1: metadata
2059: ├── transactions.json          ← Agent 2: all transactions + fields
2060: └── carbon_report.json         ← Agent 3: per-request energy data
2061: 
2062: reports/
2063: ├── code_carbon_report.md      ← Agent 4: full report
2064: └── tests/
2065:     └── GeneratedTransactionTest.php  ← Agent 4: unit tests
2066: ```

2109: ---
2110: 
2111: ## Troubleshooting
2112: 
2113: | Problem | Cause | Fix |
2114: |---------|-------|-----|
2115: | `repomix: command not found` | Not installed | `npm install -g repomix` |
2116: | `Gemini API 429 Too Many Requests` | Rate limit hit | Add `GEMINI_DELAY=10` to .env |
2117: | `Connection refused` in Agent 3 | App not running | Start app or use `--skip-carbon` |
2118: | `CSRF token mismatch` in Agent 3 | Wrong field name | Gemini will detect correct name; check `transactions.json` |
2119: | `CodeCarbon ImportError` | Not installed | `pip install codecarbon` |
2120: | `repomix output too large` | Big codebase | Add exclusions in `FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES` |
2121: 
2122: ---
2123: 
2124: _Dibuat dengan ❤️ untuk semua framework — Laravel, Django, Express, Spring, Rails, FastAPI, NestJS, Go, ASP.NET_
