 2481:  149: 
 2482:  150: ---
 2483:  151: 
 2484:  152: ## Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
 2485:  153: 
 2486:  154: ### Konsep
 2487:  155: 
 2488:  156: Agent 1 bertanggung jawab untuk **mengkonversi codebase** (baik dari path lokal maupun Git URL) menjadi satu file teks flat menggunakan **repomix**. Format flat ini kemudian dikirim ke Agent 2.
 2489:  157: 
 2490:  158: > **Kenapa repomix?** Repomix menghasilkan satu file `.txt` yang merepresentasikan seluruh struktur folder + isi file, sehingga Gemini AI dapat memahami konteks penuh codebase tanpa harus dikirim file per file.
 2491:  159: 
 2492:  160: ### File: `agent1_ingestion.py`
 2493:  161: 
 2494:  162: ```python
 2495:  163: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 2496:  164: """
 2497:  165: Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
 2498:  166: Converts local path or Git URL to a flat repomix bundle.
 2499:  167: """
 2500:  168: 
 2501:  169: import subprocess
 2502:  170: import os
 2503:  171: import sys
 2504:  172: import shutil
 2505:  173: import tempfile
 2506:  174: import json
 2507:  175: from pathlib import Path
 2508:  176: from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
 2509:  177: from typing import Optional
 2510:  178: 
 2511:  179: 
 2512:  180: @dataclass
 2513:  181: class IngestionResult:
 2514:  182:     success: bool
 2515:  183:     flat_file_path: str
 2516:  184:     source_type: str          # "local" | "git"
 2517:  185:     source_path: str
 2518:  186:     file_size_bytes: int
 2519:  187:     detected_language: str
 2520:  188:     detected_framework: str
 2521:  189:     error: Optional[str] = None
 2522:  190: 
 2523:  191: 
 2524:  192: FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES = {
 2525:  193:     "laravel":     ["artisan", "composer.json", "app/Http/Controllers"],
 2526:  194:     "django":      ["manage.py", "settings.py", "wsgi.py"],
 2527:  195:     "express":     ["package.json", "app.js", "routes/"],
 2528:  196:     "nestjs":      ["nest-cli.json", "src/main.ts"],
 2529:  197:     "springboot":  ["pom.xml", "src/main/java", "Application.java"],
 2530:  198:     "rails":       ["Gemfile", "config/routes.rb", "app/controllers"],
 2531:  199:     "fastapi":     ["main.py", "requirements.txt"],  # + fastapi in requirements
 2532:  200:     "gin":         ["go.mod", "main.go"],
 2533:  201:     "aspnet":      ["*.csproj", "Program.cs", "Startup.cs"],
 2534:  202: }
 2535:  203: 
 2536:  204: LANGUAGE_MAP = {
 2537:  205:     "laravel": "PHP",
 2538:  206:     "django": "Python",
 2539:  207:     "fastapi": "Python",
 2540:  208:     "express": "JavaScript",
 2541:  209:     "nestjs": "TypeScript",
 2542:  210:     "springboot": "Java",
 2543:  211:     "rails": "Ruby",
 2544:  212:     "gin": "Go",
 2545:  213:     "aspnet": "C#",
 2546:  214: }
 2547:  215: 
 2548:  216: 
 2549:  217: def detect_framework(path: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
 2550:  218:     """Detect framework and language from directory structure."""
 2551:  219:     for framework, signatures in FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES.items():
 2552:  220:         for sig in signatures:
 2553:  221:             check = Path(path) / sig
 2554:  222:             # Check direct file/dir
 2555:  223:             if check.exists():
 2556:  224:                 return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
 2557:  225:             # Glob pattern
 2558:  226:             if "*" in sig:
 2559:  227:                 matches = list(Path(path).glob(sig))
 2560:  228:                 if matches:
 2561:  229:                     return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
 2562:  230:     return "unknown", "Unknown"
 2563:  231: 
 2564:  232: 
 2565:  233: def clone_repo(git_url: str, target_dir: str) -> str:
 2566:  234:     """Clone a git repository to target_dir."""
 2567:  235:     print(f"[Agent 1] Cloning {git_url}...")
 2568:  236:     result = subprocess.run(
 2569:  237:         ["git", "clone", "--depth=1", git_url, target_dir],
 2570:  238:         capture_output=True, text=True
 2571:  239:     )
 2572:  240:     if result.returncode != 0:
 2573:  241:         raise RuntimeError(f"Git clone failed: {result.stderr}")
 2574:  242:     return target_dir
 2575:  243: 
 2576:  244: 
 2577:  245: def run_repomix(source_dir: str, output_path: str) -> None:
 2578:  246:     """Run repomix to create flat bundle from source_dir."""
 2579:  247:     print(f"[Agent 1] Running repomix on {source_dir}...")
 2580:  248: 
 2581:  249:     # repomix config — exclude common non-essential files
 2582:  250:     repomix_config = {
 2583:  251:         "output": {
 2584:  252:             "filePath": output_path,
 2585:  253:             "style": "plain",
 2586:  254:             "removeComments": False,
 2587:  255:             "removeEmptyLines": False,
 2588:  256:             "showLineNumbers": True,
 2589:  257:             "copyToClipboard": False,
 2590:  258:         },
 2591:  259:         "ignore": {
 2592:  260:             "useGitignore": True,
 2593:  261:             "useDefaultPatterns": True,
 2594:  262:             "customPatterns": [
 2595:  263:                 "node_modules/**",
 2596:  264:                 "vendor/**",
 2597:  265:                 ".git/**",
 2598:  266:                 "*.lock",
 2599:  267:                 "*.log",
 2600:  268:                 "dist/**",
 2601:  269:                 "build/**",
 2602:  270:                 "__pycache__/**",
 2603:  271:                 "*.pyc",
 2604:  272:                 ".env",
 2605:  273:                 "storage/**",
 2606:  274:                 "public/storage/**",
 2607:  275:             ]
 2608:  276:         }
 2609:  277:     }
 2610:  278: 
 2611:  279:     config_path = Path(source_dir) / ".repomix-config.json"
 2612:  280:     with open(config_path, "w") as f:
 2613:  281:         json.dump(repomix_config, f, indent=2)
 2614:  282: 
 2615:  283:     result = subprocess.run(
 2616:  284:         ["repomix", "--config", str(config_path), "--output", output_path, source_dir],
 2617:  285:         capture_output=True, text=True
 2618:  286:     )
 2619:  287: 
 2620:  288:     # Cleanup config
 2621:  289:     config_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
 2622:  290: 
 2623:  291:     if result.returncode != 0:
 2624:  292:         raise RuntimeError(f"repomix failed: {result.stderr}")
 2625:  293: 
 2626:  294:     print(f"[Agent 1] ✅ repomix output: {output_path}")
 2627:  295: 
 2628:  296: 
 2629:  297: def run(source: str, output_dir: str = "./output") -> IngestionResult:
 2630:  298:     """
 2631:  299:     Main entry point for Agent 1.
 2632:  300:     
 2633:  301:     Args:
 2634:  302:         source: Local directory path OR Git URL
 2635:  303:         output_dir: Where to save the flat bundle
 2636:  304:     
 2637:  305:     Returns:
 2638:  306:         IngestionResult with flat_file_path pointing to repomix output
 2639:  307:     """
 2640:  308:     os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
 2641:  309:     output_path = str(Path(output_dir) / "flat_codebase.txt")
 2642:  310:     temp_dir = None
 2643:  311: 
 2644:  312:     try:
 2645:  313:         # Determine source type
 2646:  314:         if source.startswith("http") or source.startswith("git@"):
 2647:  315:             source_type = "git"
 2648:  316:             temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="agent1_repo_")
 2649:  317:             working_dir = clone_repo(source, temp_dir)
 2650:  318:         else:
 2651:  319:             source_type = "local"
 2652:  320:             working_dir = os.path.abspath(source)
 2653:  321:             if not os.path.isdir(working_dir):
 2654:  322:                 raise ValueError(f"Directory not found: {working_dir}")
 2655:  323: 
 2656:  324:         # Detect framework
 2657:  325:         framework, language = detect_framework(working_dir)
 2658:  326:         print(f"[Agent 1] Detected: {framework} / {language}")
 2659:  327: 
 2660:  328:         # Run repomix
 2661:  329:         run_repomix(working_dir, output_path)
 2662:  330: 
 2663:  331:         file_size = Path(output_path).stat().st_size
 2664:  332: 
 2665:  333:         return IngestionResult(
 2666:  334:             success=True,
 2667:  335:             flat_file_path=output_path,
 2668:  336:             source_type=source_type,
 2669:  337:             source_path=source,
 2670:  338:             file_size_bytes=file_size,
 2671:  339:             detected_language=language,
 2672:  340:             detected_framework=framework,
 2673:  341:         )
 2674:  342: 
 2675:  343:     except Exception as e:
 2676:  344:         return IngestionResult(
 2677:  345:             success=False,
 2678:  346:             flat_file_path="",
 2679:  347:             source_type="unknown",
 2680:  348:             source_path=source,
 2681:  349:             file_size_bytes=0,
 2682:  350:             detected_language="Unknown",
 2683:  351:             detected_framework="unknown",
 2684:  352:             error=str(e),
 2685:  353:         )
 2686:  354:     finally:
 2687:  355:         if temp_dir and os.path.exists(temp_dir):
 2688:  356:             shutil.rmtree(temp_dir, ignore_errors=True)
 2689:  357: 
 2690:  358: 
 2691:  359: if __name__ == "__main__":
 2692:  360:     source = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
 2693:  361:     result = run(source)
 2694:  362:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 2695:  363: ```
 2696:  364: 
 2697:  365: ---
 2698:  366: 
 2699:  367: ## Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
 2700:  368: 
 2701:  369: ### Konsep
 2702:  370: 
 2703:  371: Agent 2 menerima file flat dari Agent 1, lalu mengirimkannya ke **Gemini AI** untuk dianalisis. Gemini akan:
 2704:  372: 
 2705:  373: - Mendeteksi semua **route/endpoint** (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH)
 2706:  374: - Mengidentifikasi **field yang wajib diisi** untuk setiap endpoint
 2707:  375: - Mendeteksi kebutuhan **CSRF token** secara otomatis per framework
 2708:  376: - Mengidentifikasi endpoint yang membutuhkan **autentikasi**
 2709:  377: - Menghasilkan **unit test skeleton** untuk transaksi POST/PUT/DELETE
 2710:  378: 
 2711:  379: ### File: `agent2_gemini_identifier.py`
 2712:  380: 
 2713:  381: ```python
 2714:  382: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 2715:  383: """
 2716:  384: Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
 2717:  385: Sends repomix bundle to Gemini AI for transaction analysis.
 2718:  386: """
 2719:  387: 
 2720:  388: import os
 2721:  389: import json
 2722:  390: import time
 2723:  391: import requests
 2724:  392: from pathlib import Path
 2725:  393: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
 2726:  394: from typing import Optional
 2727:  395: from dotenv import load_dotenv
 2728:  396: 
 2729:  397: load_dotenv()
 2730:  398: 
 2731:  399: GEMINI_API_KEY = os.getenv("GEMINI_API_KEY")
 2732:  400: GEMINI_ENDPOINT = (
 2733:  401:     f"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/"
 2734:  402:     f"gemini-1.5-pro:generateContent?key={GEMINI_API_KEY}"
 2735:  403: )
 2736:  404: 
 2737:  405: # Max chars to send to Gemini (stay under token limit)
 2738:  406: MAX_CONTENT_CHARS = 800_000
 2739:  407: 
 2740:  408: 
 2741:  409: @dataclass
 2742:  410: class TransactionField:
 2743:  411:     name: str
 2744:  412:     type: str            # "string" | "email" | "password" | "integer" | "boolean" | "file"
 2745:  413:     required: bool
 2746:  414:     description: str
 2747:  415:     validation_rules: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 2748:  416: 
 2749:  417: 
 2750:  418: @dataclass
 2751:  419: class Transaction:
 2752:  420:     id: str
 2753:  421:     method: str          # GET | POST | PUT | PATCH | DELETE
 2754:  422:     endpoint: str
 2755:  423:     description: str
 2756:  424:     requires_auth: bool
 2757:  425:     requires_csrf: bool
 2758:  426:     csrf_field_name: str  # e.g. "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "X-CSRF-Token"
 2759:  427:     fields: list[TransactionField]
 2760:  428:     framework: str
 2761:  429:     unit_test_skeleton: str = ""
 2762:  430:     tags: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 2763:  431: 
 2764:  432: 
 2765:  433: @dataclass
 2766:  434: class IdentificationResult:
 2767:  435:     success: bool
 2768:  436:     framework: str
 2769:  437:     language: str
 2770:  438:     transactions: list[Transaction]
 2771:  439:     total_routes: int
 2772:  440:     post_routes: int
 2773:  441:     csrf_protected_routes: int
 2774:  442:     auth_required_routes: int
 2775:  443:     error: Optional[str] = None
 2776:  444: 
 2777:  445: 
 2778:  446: SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
 2779:  447: You are an expert code analyzer. You will receive a flat bundle of a web application codebase.
 2780:  448: 
 2781:  449: Your task is to analyze ALL routes/endpoints and return a STRICT JSON response.
 2782:  450: 
 2783:  451: ## What to extract per endpoint:
 2784:  452: 1. HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)
 2785:  453: 2. URL path / route
 2786:  454: 3. Description of what the endpoint does
 2787:  455: 4. Whether it requires authentication (JWT, session, Bearer token, etc.)
 2788:  456: 5. Whether it requires CSRF protection — detect automatically by framework:
 2789:  457:    - Laravel: look for @csrf, csrf_field(), VerifyCsrfToken middleware, X-CSRF-TOKEN header
 2790:  458:    - Django: look for {% csrf_token %}, CsrfViewMiddleware, csrf_protect decorator
 2791:  459:    - Express.js: look for csurf, csrf(), csrfToken()
 2792:  460:    - Rails: look for authenticity_token, protect_from_forgery
 2793:  461:    - Spring Boot: look for CsrfToken, .csrf(), SecurityConfig
 2794:  462:    - FastAPI: look for custom CSRF implementations or fastapi-csrf-protect
 2795:  463:    - NestJS: look for @nestjs/csrf, CsrfGuard
 2796:  464:    - Go (Gin/Echo): look for gorilla/csrf, nosurf
 2797:  465:    - ASP.NET: look for [ValidateAntiForgeryToken], AntiForgeryToken()
 2798:  466: 6. The exact CSRF field name used (e.g., "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "authenticity_token")
 2799:  467: 7. ALL form fields/request body fields with: name, type, required status, and any validation rules
 2800:  468: 8. For POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE: generate a unit test skeleton in the framework's native test style
 2801:  469: 
 2802:  470: ## Response format — return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation:
 2803:  471: 
 2804:  472: {
 2805:  473:   "framework": "laravel",
 2806:  474:   "language": "PHP",
 2807:  475:   "transactions": [
 2808:  476:     {
 2809:  477:       "id": "txn_001",
 2810:  478:       "method": "POST",
 2811:  479:       "endpoint": "/api/login",
 2812:  480:       "description": "User authentication endpoint",
 2813:  481:       "requires_auth": false,
 2814:  482:       "requires_csrf": true,
 2815:  483:       "csrf_field_name": "_token",
 2816:  484:       "fields": [
 2817:  485:         {
 2818:  486:           "name": "email",
 2819:  487:           "type": "email",
 2820:  488:           "required": true,
 2821:  489:           "description": "User email address",
 2822:  490:           "validation_rules": ["required", "email", "max:255"]
 2823:  491:         },
 2824:  492:         {
 2825:  493:           "name": "password",
 2826:  494:           "type": "password",
 2827:  495:           "required": true,
 2828:  496:           "description": "User password",
 2829:  497:           "validation_rules": ["required", "min:8"]
 2830:  498:         }
 2831:  499:       ],
 2832:  500:       "unit_test_skeleton": "/** @test */\\npublic function test_user_can_login()\\n{\\n    $response = $this->post('/api/login', [\\n        'email' => 'test@example.com',\\n        'password' => 'password123',\\n    ]);\\n    $response->assertStatus(200);\\n}",
 2833:  501:       "tags": ["auth", "csrf"]
 2834:  502:     }
 2835:  503:   ]
 2836:  504: }
 2837:  505: """
 2838:  506: 
 2839:  507: 
 2840:  508: def chunk_content(content: str, max_chars: int) -> str:
 2841:  509:     """Truncate content if too large, prioritizing route/controller files."""
 2842:  510:     if len(content) <= max_chars:
 2843:  511:         return content
 2844:  512: 
 2845:  513:     # Try to keep the most important parts
 2846:  514:     lines = content.split("\n")
 2847:  515:     priority_keywords = [
 2848:  516:         "route", "controller", "middleware", "csrf", "request",
 2849:  517:         "form", "validate", "auth", "login", "register", "api",
 2850:  518:         "POST", "GET", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"
 2851:  519:     ]
 2852:  520: 
 2853:  521:     priority_lines = []
 2854:  522:     other_lines = []
 2855:  523: 
 2856:  524:     for line in lines:
 2857:  525:         if any(kw.lower() in line.lower() for kw in priority_keywords):
 2858:  526:             priority_lines.append(line)
 2859:  527:         else:
 2860:  528:             other_lines.append(line)
 2861:  529: 
 2862:  530:     result = "\n".join(priority_lines)
 2863:  531:     if len(result) < max_chars:
 2864:  532:         remaining = max_chars - len(result)
 2865:  533:         result += "\n" + "\n".join(other_lines)[:remaining]
 2866:  534: 
 2867:  535:     return result[:max_chars]
 2868:  536: 
 2869:  537: 
 2870:  538: def call_gemini(content: str) -> dict:
 2871:  539:     """Call Gemini API with the codebase content."""
 2872:  540:     print("[Agent 2] Sending codebase to Gemini AI...")
 2873:  541: 
 2874:  542:     payload = {
 2875:  543:         "system_instruction": {
 2876:  544:             "parts": [{"text": SYSTEM_PROMPT}]
 2877:  545:         },
 2878:  546:         "contents": [{
 2879:  547:             "parts": [{
 2880:  548:                 "text": f"Analyze this codebase and return the JSON:\n\n{content}"
 2881:  549:             }]
 2882:  550:         }],
 2883:  551:         "generationConfig": {
 2884:  552:             "temperature": 0.1,
 2885:  553:             "maxOutputTokens": 8192,
 2886:  554:             "responseMimeType": "application/json"
 2887:  555:         }
 2888:  556:     }
 2889:  557: 
 2890:  558:     for attempt in range(3):
 2891:  559:         try:
 2892:  560:             response = requests.post(
 2893:  561:                 GEMINI_ENDPOINT,
 2894:  562:                 json=payload,
 2895:  563:                 headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
 2896:  564:                 timeout=120
 2897:  565:             )
 2898:  566:             response.raise_for_status()
 2899:  567:             data = response.json()
 2900:  568: 
 2901:  569:             raw_text = data["candidates"][0]["content"]["parts"][0]["text"]
 2902:  570:             # Strip possible markdown fences
 2903:  571:             raw_text = raw_text.strip()
 2904:  572:             if raw_text.startswith("```"):
 2905:  573:                 raw_text = "\n".join(raw_text.split("\n")[1:-1])
 2906:  574: 
 2907:  575:             return json.loads(raw_text)
 2908:  576: 
 2909:  577:         except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
 2910:  578:             print(f"[Agent 2] Timeout on attempt {attempt + 1}, retrying...")
 2911:  579:             time.sleep(5 * (attempt + 1))
 2912:  580:         except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
 2913:  581:             raise ValueError(f"Gemini returned invalid JSON: {e}")
 2914:  582: 
 2915:  583:     raise RuntimeError("Gemini API failed after 3 attempts")
 2916:  584: 
 2917:  585: 
 2918:  586: def parse_result(raw: dict, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
 2919:  587:     """Parse Gemini response into typed IdentificationResult."""
 2920:  588:     transactions = []
 2921:  589: 
 2922:  590:     for t in raw.get("transactions", []):
 2923:  591:         fields = [
 2924:  592:             TransactionField(
 2925:  593:                 name=f["name"],
 2926:  594:                 type=f.get("type", "string"),
 2927:  595:                 required=f.get("required", False),
 2928:  596:                 description=f.get("description", ""),
 2929:  597:                 validation_rules=f.get("validation_rules", []),
 2930:  598:             )
 2931:  599:             for f in t.get("fields", [])
 2932:  600:         ]
 2933:  601: 
 2934:  602:         transactions.append(Transaction(
 2935:  603:             id=t.get("id", f"txn_{len(transactions):03d}"),
 2936:  604:             method=t["method"].upper(),
 2937:  605:             endpoint=t["endpoint"],
 2938:  606:             description=t.get("description", ""),
 2939:  607:             requires_auth=t.get("requires_auth", False),
 2940:  608:             requires_csrf=t.get("requires_csrf", False),
 2941:  609:             csrf_field_name=t.get("csrf_field_name", ""),
 2942:  610:             fields=fields,
 2943:  611:             framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
 2944:  612:             unit_test_skeleton=t.get("unit_test_skeleton", ""),
 2945:  613:             tags=t.get("tags", []),
 2946:  614:         ))
 2947:  615: 
 2948:  616:     mutating_methods = {"POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"}
 2949:  617:     return IdentificationResult(
 2950:  618:         success=True,
 2951:  619:         framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
 2952:  620:         language=raw.get("language", "Unknown"),
 2953:  621:         transactions=transactions,
 2954:  622:         total_routes=len(transactions),
 2955:  623:         post_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.method in mutating_methods),
 2956:  624:         csrf_protected_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_csrf),
 2957:  625:         auth_required_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_auth),
 2958:  626:     )
 2959:  627: 
 2960:  628: 
 2961:  629: def run(flat_file_path: str, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
 2962:  630:     """
 2963:  631:     Main entry point for Agent 2.
 2964:  632:     
 2965:  633:     Args:
 2966:  634:         flat_file_path: Path to repomix output file
 2967:  635:         framework_hint: Optional hint from Agent 1
 2968:  636:     
 2969:  637:     Returns:
 2970:  638:         IdentificationResult with all transactions
 2971:  639:     """
 2972:  640:     try:
 2973:  641:         content = Path(flat_file_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
 2974:  642:         content = chunk_content(content, MAX_CONTENT_CHARS)
 2975:  643: 
 2976:  644:         raw = call_gemini(content)
 2977:  645:         result = parse_result(raw, framework_hint)
 2978:  646: 
 2979:  647:         print(f"[Agent 2] ✅ Found {result.total_routes} routes")
 2980:  648:         print(f"[Agent 2]    POST/mutating: {result.post_routes}")
 2981:  649:         print(f"[Agent 2]    CSRF protected: {result.csrf_protected_routes}")
 2982:  650:         print(f"[Agent 2]    Auth required: {result.auth_required_routes}")
 2983:  651: 
 2984:  652:         # Save transactions to file
 2985:  653:         output_path = Path(flat_file_path).parent / "transactions.json"
 2986:  654:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
 2987:  655:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
 2988:  656:         print(f"[Agent 2] Saved: {output_path}")
 2989:  657: 
 2990:  658:         return result
 2991:  659: 
 2992:  660:     except Exception as e:
 2993:  661:         return IdentificationResult(
 2994:  662:             success=False,
 2995:  663:             framework=framework_hint,
 2996:  664:             language="Unknown",
 2997:  665:             transactions=[],
 2998:  666:             total_routes=0,
 2999:  667:             post_routes=0,
 3000:  668:             csrf_protected_routes=0,
 3001:  669:             auth_required_routes=0,
 3002:  670:             error=str(e),
 3003:  671:         )
 3004:  672: 
 3005:  673: 
 3006:  674: if __name__ == "__main__":
 3007:  675:     import sys
 3008:  676:     flat_file = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/flat_codebase.txt"
 3009:  677:     result = run(flat_file)
 3010:  678:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 3011:  679: ```
 3012:  680: 
 3013:  681: ---
 3014:  682: 
 3015:  683: ## Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent (Live Runner)
 3016:  684: 
 3017:  685: ### Konsep
 3018:  686: 
 3019:  687: Agent 3 menerima `transactions.json` dari Agent 2 dan mengeksekusi **HTTP requests nyata** ke aplikasi yang sedang berjalan. Setiap request diukur menggunakan **CodeCarbon** untuk melacak konsumsi energi dan emisi CO₂.
 3020:  688: 
 3021:  689: Untuk endpoint yang membutuhkan CSRF, agent ini secara otomatis:
 3022:  690: 1. Melakukan GET request ke halaman login/form terlebih dahulu
 3023:  691: 2. Mengekstrak CSRF token dari response (cookie, header, atau HTML hidden input)
 3024:  692: 3. Menyertakan token tersebut di request POST
 3025:  693: 
 3026:  694: ### File: `agent3_carbon.py`
 3027:  695: 
 3028:  696: ```python
 3029:  697: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 3030:  698: """
 3031:  699: Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent
 3032:  700: Runs live HTTP requests to the target app and measures CO2 emissions.
 3033:  701: """
 3034:  702: 
 3035:  703: import os
 3036:  704: import json
 3037:  705: import time
 3038:  706: import re
 3039:  707: import requests
 3040:  708: from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
 3041:  709: from codecarbon import EmissionsTracker
 3042:  710: from pathlib import Path
 3043:  711: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
 3044:  712: from typing import Optional, Any
 3045:  713: from dotenv import load_dotenv
 3046:  714: 
 3047:  715: load_dotenv()
 3048:  716: 
 3049:  717: BASE_URL = os.getenv("TARGET_BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
 3050:  718: REQUEST_TIMEOUT = int(os.getenv("REQUEST_TIMEOUT", "30"))
 3051:  719: DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS = float(os.getenv("DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS", "0.5"))
 3052:  720: 
 3053:  721: 
 3054:  722: @dataclass
 3055:  723: class RequestMeasurement:
 3056:  724:     transaction_id: str
 3057:  725:     method: str
 3058:  726:     endpoint: str
 3059:  727:     full_url: str
 3060:  728:     status_code: int
 3061:  729:     response_time_ms: float
 3062:  730:     energy_consumed_kwh: float
 3063:  731:     co2_emissions_kg: float
 3064:  732:     success: bool
 3065:  733:     csrf_obtained: bool
 3066:  734:     fields_sent: list[str]
 3067:  735:     error: Optional[str] = None
 3068:  736:     response_preview: str = ""
 3069:  737: 
 3070:  738: 
 3071:  739: @dataclass
 3072:  740: class CarbonResult:
 3073:  741:     success: bool
 3074:  742:     base_url: str
 3075:  743:     total_requests: int
 3076:  744:     successful_requests: int
 3077:  745:     failed_requests: int
 3078:  746:     total_energy_kwh: float
 3079:  747:     total_co2_kg: float
 3080:  748:     avg_response_time_ms: float
 3081:  749:     measurements: list[RequestMeasurement]
 3082:  750:     error: Optional[str] = None
 3083:  751: 
 3084:  752: 
 3085:  753: # ─── CSRF Token Extractors ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
 3086:  754: 
 3087:  755: def extract_csrf_from_html(html: str, field_name: str) -> Optional[str]:
 3088:  756:     """Extract CSRF token from HTML hidden input."""
 3089:  757:     soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "html.parser")
 3090:  758: 
 3091:  759:     # Try direct name match
 3092:  760:     token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": field_name})
 3093:  761:     if token_input:
 3094:  762:         return token_input.get("value")
 3095:  763: 
 3096:  764:     # Try meta tag (common in SPAs)
 3097:  765:     meta = soup.find("meta", {"name": field_name})
 3098:  766:     if meta:
 3099:  767:         return meta.get("content")
 3100:  768: 
 3101:  769:     # Generic CSRF patterns
 3102:  770:     for pattern in ["csrf", "token", "_token", "xsrf"]:
 3103:  771:         token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": re.compile(pattern, re.I)})
 3104:  772:         if token_input:
 3105:  773:             return token_input.get("value")
 3106:  774: 
 3107:  775:     return None
 3108:  776: 
 3109:  777: 
 3110:  778: def get_csrf_token(
 3111:  779:     session: requests.Session,
 3112:  780:     transaction_endpoint: str,
 3113:  781:     csrf_field_name: str,
 3114:  782:     framework: str
 3115:  783: ) -> tuple[Optional[str], bool]:
 3116:  784:     """
 3117:  785:     Attempt to retrieve CSRF token before a mutating request.
 3118:  786:     Returns (token_value, success).
 3119:  787:     """
 3120:  788:     # Guess the form/GET page that provides the CSRF token
 3121:  789:     # Strip /api/ prefix for web form pages
 3122:  790:     form_endpoint = transaction_endpoint.replace("/api/", "/")
 3123:  791:     candidates = [
 3124:  792:         f"{BASE_URL}{form_endpoint}",
 3125:  793:         f"{BASE_URL}/",
 3126:  794:         f"{BASE_URL}/login",
 3127:  795:         f"{BASE_URL}/home",
 3128:  796:     ]
 3129:  797: 
 3130:  798:     for url in candidates:
 3131:  799:         try:
 3132:  800:             r = session.get(url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 3133:  801:             if r.status_code == 200:
 3134:  802:                 # 1. Check HTML for hidden input
 3135:  803:                 token = extract_csrf_from_html(r.text, csrf_field_name)
 3136:  804:                 if token:
 3137:  805:                     return token, True
 3138:  806: 
 3139:  807:                 # 2. Check cookies (XSRF-TOKEN style, e.g., Laravel Sanctum)
 3140:  808:                 for cookie_name in ["XSRF-TOKEN", "csrftoken", "csrf_token"]:
 3141:  809:                     if cookie_name in session.cookies:
 3142:  810:                         import urllib.parse
 3143:  811:                         return urllib.parse.unquote(session.cookies[cookie_name]), True
 3144:  812: 
 3145:  813:                 # 3. Check response headers
 3146:  814:                 for header_name in ["X-CSRF-Token", "X-XSRF-Token", "CSRF-Token"]:
 3147:  815:                     if header_name in r.headers:
 3148:  816:                         return r.headers[header_name], True
 3149:  817: 
 3150:  818:         except Exception:
 3151:  819:             continue
 3152:  820: 
 3153:  821:     return None, False
 3154:  822: 
 3155:  823: 
 3156:  824: # ─── Dummy Data Generator ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 3157:  825: 
 3158:  826: DUMMY_VALUES: dict[str, Any] = {
 3159:  827:     "email":    "test@example.com",
 3160:  828:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
 3161:  829:     "name":     "Test User",
 3162:  830:     "username": "testuser",
 3163:  831:     "phone":    "+1234567890",
 3164:  832:     "address":  "123 Test Street",
 3165:  833:     "title":    "Test Title",
 3166:  834:     "body":     "Test body content for automated testing",
 3167:  835:     "content":  "Test content",
 3168:  836:     "message":  "Test message",
 3169:  837:     "amount":   "100.00",
 3170:  838:     "price":    "99.99",
 3171:  839:     "quantity": "1",
 3172:  840:     "date":     "2024-01-01",
 3173:  841:     "token":    "dummy_token_for_testing",
 3174:  842:     "code":     "TEST123",
 3175:  843:     "url":      "https://example.com",
 3176:  844:     "file":     None,  # Skip file uploads
 3177:  845: }
 3178:  846: 
 3179:  847: TYPE_DEFAULTS: dict[str, Any] = {
 3180:  848:     "email":    "test@example.com",
 3181:  849:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
 3182:  850:     "string":   "test_value",
 3183:  851:     "integer":  "1",
 3184:  852:     "number":   "1",
 3185:  853:     "boolean":  "true",
 3186:  854:     "text":     "Test text content",
 3187:  855:     "file":     None,
 3188:  856: }
 3189:  857: 
 3190:  858: 
 3191:  859: def generate_dummy_payload(fields: list[dict]) -> dict:
 3192:  860:     """Generate dummy payload from field definitions."""
 3193:  861:     payload = {}
 3194:  862:     for f in fields:
 3195:  863:         name = f["name"].lower()
 3196:  864:         ftype = f.get("type", "string").lower()
 3197:  865: 
 3198:  866:         if ftype == "file":
 3199:  867:             continue  # Skip file fields in automated testing
 3200:  868: 
 3201:  869:         # Try name match first
 3202:  870:         value = DUMMY_VALUES.get(name)
 3203:  871:         if value is None:
 3204:  872:             # Try partial match
 3205:  873:             for key, val in DUMMY_VALUES.items():
 3206:  874:                 if key in name:
 3207:  875:                     value = val
 3208:  876:                     break
 3209:  877: 
 3210:  878:         # Fallback to type default
 3211:  879:         if value is None:
 3212:  880:             value = TYPE_DEFAULTS.get(ftype, "test_value")
 3213:  881: 
 3214:  882:         if value is not None:
 3215:  883:             payload[f["name"]] = value
 3216:  884: 
 3217:  885:     return payload
 3218:  886: 
 3219:  887: 
 3220:  888: # ─── Main Runner ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 3221:  889: 
 3222:  890: def run_transaction(
 3223:  891:     session: requests.Session,
 3224:  892:     transaction: dict,
 3225:  893:     framework: str,
 3226:  894:     tracker: EmissionsTracker
 3227:  895: ) -> RequestMeasurement:
 3228:  896:     """Execute a single transaction with carbon tracking."""
 3229:  897:     method = transaction["method"].upper()
 3230:  898:     endpoint = transaction["endpoint"]
 3231:  899:     full_url = f"{BASE_URL}{endpoint}"
 3232:  900: 
 3233:  901:     csrf_obtained = False
 3234:  902:     csrf_token = None
 3235:  903: 
 3236:  904:     # Get CSRF token if required
 3237:  905:     if transaction.get("requires_csrf") and method in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
 3238:  906:         csrf_field = transaction.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
 3239:  907:         csrf_token, csrf_obtained = get_csrf_token(session, endpoint, csrf_field, framework)
 3240:  908: 
 3241:  909:         if csrf_token:
 3242:  910:             # Set in headers too (SPA pattern)
 3243:  911:             session.headers.update({
 3244:  912:                 "X-CSRF-Token": csrf_token,
 3245:  913:                 "X-XSRF-Token": csrf_token,
 3246:  914:             })
 3247:  915: 
 3248:  916:     # Build payload
 3249:  917:     payload = generate_dummy_payload(transaction.get("fields", []))
 3250:  918: 
 3251:  919:     # Add CSRF to payload if token found
 3252:  920:     if csrf_token and transaction.get("csrf_field_name"):
 3253:  921:         payload[transaction["csrf_field_name"]] = csrf_token
 3254:  922: 
 3255:  923:     # Track energy for this request
 3256:  924:     tracker.start_task(transaction["id"])
 3257:  925:     start_time = time.time()
 3258:  926: 
 3259:  927:     try:
 3260:  928:         if method == "GET":
 3261:  929:             response = session.get(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 3262:  930:         elif method == "POST":
 3263:  931:             response = session.post(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 3264:  932:         elif method == "PUT":
 3265:  933:             response = session.put(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 3266:  934:         elif method == "PATCH":
 3267:  935:             response = session.patch(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 3268:  936:         elif method == "DELETE":
 3269:  937:             response = session.delete(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 3270:  938:         else:
 3271:  939:             raise ValueError(f"Unsupported method: {method}")
 3272:  940: 
 3273:  941:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
 3274:  942:         emissions_data = tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
 3275:  943: 
 3276:  944:         return RequestMeasurement(
 3277:  945:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
 3278:  946:             method=method,
 3279:  947:             endpoint=endpoint,
 3280:  948:             full_url=full_url,
 3281:  949:             status_code=response.status_code,
 3282:  950:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
 3283:  951:             energy_consumed_kwh=emissions_data.energy_consumed if emissions_data else 0.0,
 3284:  952:             co2_emissions_kg=emissions_data.emissions if emissions_data else 0.0,
 3285:  953:             success=200 <= response.status_code < 400,
 3286:  954:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
 3287:  955:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
 3288:  956:             response_preview=response.text[:200],
 3289:  957:         )
 3290:  958: 
 3291:  959:     except Exception as e:
 3292:  960:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
 3293:  961:         try:
 3294:  962:             tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
 3295:  963:         except Exception:
 3296:  964:             pass
 3297:  965: 
 3298:  966:         return RequestMeasurement(
 3299:  967:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
 3300:  968:             method=method,
 3301:  969:             endpoint=endpoint,
 3302:  970:             full_url=full_url,
 3303:  971:             status_code=0,
 3304:  972:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
 3305:  973:             energy_consumed_kwh=0.0,
 3306:  974:             co2_emissions_kg=0.0,
 3307:  975:             success=False,
 3308:  976:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
 3309:  977:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
 3310:  978:             error=str(e),
 3311:  979:         )
 3312:  980: 
 3313:  981: 
 3314:  982: def run(transactions_path: str) -> CarbonResult:
 3315:  983:     """
 3316:  984:     Main entry point for Agent 3.
 3317:  985:     
 3318:  986:     Args:
 3319:  987:         transactions_path: Path to transactions.json from Agent 2
 3320:  988:     
 3321:  989:     Returns:
 3322:  990:         CarbonResult with per-request energy measurements
 3323:  991:     """
 3324:  992:     try:
 3325:  993:         with open(transactions_path) as f:
 3326:  994:             data = json.load(f)
 3327:  995: 
 3328:  996:         transactions = data.get("transactions", [])
 3329:  997:         framework = data.get("framework", "unknown")
 3330:  998: 
 3331:  999:         print(f"[Agent 3] Running {len(transactions)} transactions against {BASE_URL}")
 3332: 1000: 
 3333: 1001:         session = requests.Session()
 3334: 1002:         session.headers.update({
 3335: 1003:             "Accept": "application/json, text/html",
 3336: 1004:             "User-Agent": "CodeCarbonAgent/1.0",
 3337: 1005:         })
 3338: 1006: 
 3339: 1007:         # Initialize CodeCarbon tracker
 3340: 1008:         tracker = EmissionsTracker(
 3341: 1009:             project_name="code_carbon_agent",
 3342: 1010:             output_dir=str(Path(transactions_path).parent),
 3343: 1011:             log_level="warning",
 3344: 1012:             save_to_file=False,
 3345: 1013:             tracking_mode="process",
 3346: 1014:         )
 3347: 1015:         tracker.start()
 3348: 1016: 
 3349: 1017:         measurements = []
 3350: 1018: 
 3351: 1019:         for txn in transactions:
 3352: 1020:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {txn['method']} {txn['endpoint']}")
 3353: 1021:             measurement = run_transaction(session, txn, framework, tracker)
 3354: 1022:             measurements.append(measurement)
 3355: 1023: 
 3356: 1024:             status_icon = "✅" if measurement.success else "❌"
 3357: 1025:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {status_icon} {measurement.status_code} "
 3358: 1026:                   f"({measurement.response_time_ms:.0f}ms, "
 3359: 1027:                   f"{measurement.co2_emissions_kg*1000:.4f}g CO₂)")
 3360: 1028: 
 3361: 1029:             time.sleep(DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS)
 3362: 1030: 
 3363: 1031:         tracker.stop()
 3364: 1032: 
 3365: 1033:         successful = sum(1 for m in measurements if m.success)
 3366: 1034:         total_energy = sum(m.energy_consumed_kwh for m in measurements)
 3367: 1035:         total_co2 = sum(m.co2_emissions_kg for m in measurements)
 3368: 1036:         avg_time = (sum(m.response_time_ms for m in measurements) / len(measurements)
 3369: 1037:                     if measurements else 0)
 3370: 1038: 
 3371: 1039:         result = CarbonResult(
 3372: 1040:             success=True,
 3373: 1041:             base_url=BASE_URL,
 3374: 1042:             total_requests=len(measurements),
 3375: 1043:             successful_requests=successful,
 3376: 1044:             failed_requests=len(measurements) - successful,
 3377: 1045:             total_energy_kwh=round(total_energy, 8),
 3378: 1046:             total_co2_kg=round(total_co2, 8),
 3379: 1047:             avg_response_time_ms=round(avg_time, 2),
 3380: 1048:             measurements=measurements,
 3381: 1049:         )
 3382: 1050: 
 3383: 1051:         # Save carbon report
 3384: 1052:         output_path = Path(transactions_path).parent / "carbon_report.json"
 3385: 1053:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
 3386: 1054:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
 3387: 1055:         print(f"[Agent 3] ✅ Saved: {output_path}")
 3388: 1056: 
 3389: 1057:         return result
 3390: 1058: 
 3391: 1059:     except Exception as e:
 3392: 1060:         return CarbonResult(
 3393: 1061:             success=False,
 3394: 1062:             base_url=BASE_URL,
 3395: 1063:             total_requests=0,
 3396: 1064:             successful_requests=0,
 3397: 1065:             failed_requests=0,
 3398: 1066:             total_energy_kwh=0.0,
 3399: 1067:             total_co2_kg=0.0,
 3400: 1068:             avg_response_time_ms=0.0,
 3401: 1069:             measurements=[],
 3402: 1070:             error=str(e),
 3403: 1071:         )
 3404: 1072: 
 3405: 1073: 
 3406: 1074: if __name__ == "__main__":
 3407: 1075:     import sys
 3408: 1076:     txn_path = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/transactions.json"
 3409: 1077:     result = run(txn_path)
 3410: 1078:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 3411: 1079: ```
 3412: 1080: 
 3413: 1081: ---
 3414: 1082: 
 3415: 1083: ## Agent 4 — Refactor Report Agent
 3416: 1084: 
 3417: 1085: ### Konsep
 3418: 1086: 
 3419: 1087: Agent 4 mengambil semua hasil dari Agent 1–3 dan menghasilkan:
 3420: 1088: 
 3421: 1089: - **Laporan refactoring lengkap** dalam format Markdown
 3422: 1090: - **Unit test files** untuk setiap transaksi POST/mutating
 3423: 1091: - **Ringkasan carbon footprint** dengan rekomendasi optimasi
 3424: 1092: 
 3425: 1093: ### File: `agent4_report.py`
 3426: 1094: 
 3427: 1095: ```python
 3428: 1096: #!/usr/bin/env python3

 3430: 1098: Agent 4 — Refactor Report Agent
 3431: 1099: Combines all data and generates comprehensive Markdown report + unit tests.
 3432: 1100: """
 3433: 1101: 
 3434: 1102: import os
 3435: 1103: import json

 3437: 1105: from datetime import datetime
 3438: 1106: from dataclasses import asdict
 3439: 1107: from typing import Any
 3440: 1108: from dotenv import load_dotenv
 3441: 1109:

 3443: 1111: 
 3444: 1112: REPORT_DIR = os.getenv("REPORT_OUTPUT_DIR", "./reports")
 3445: 1113: 
 3446: 1114: 
 3447: 1115: # ─── Unit Test Generators ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 3448: 1116: 
 3449: 1117: UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES = {
 3450: 1118:     "laravel": {
 3451: 1119:         "ext": "php",
 3452: 1120:         "header": """<?php
 3453: 1121: 
 3454: 1122: namespace Tests\\Feature;
 3455: 1123: 
 3456: 1124: use Illuminate\\Foundation\\Testing\\RefreshDatabase;
 3457: 1125: use Illuminate\\Foundation\\Testing\\WithFaker;
 3458: 1126: use Tests\\TestCase;

 3495: 1163:         data = {{

 3497: 1165:         }}

 3500: 1168:         self.assertIn(response.status_code, [{expected_status}])
 3501: 1169: """,
 3502: 1170:     },
 3503: 1171:     "express": {

 3507: 1175: 
 3508: 1176: describe('Generated Transaction Tests', () => {

 3513: 1181:     {auth_setup}

 3523: 1191:   }});

 3531: 1199: import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;

 3533: 1201: import org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTest;

 3538: 1206:

 3553: 1221:             .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
 3554: 1222:             {csrf_header}
 3555: 1223:             .content("{{\\"test\\": \\"value\\"}}"))
 3556: 1224:             .andExpect(status().is{expected_status_name}());
 3557: 1225:     }}
 3558: 1226: """,
 3559: 1227:     },
 3560: 1228: }
 3561: 1229: 
 3562: 1230: 
 3563: 1231: def slugify(text: str) -> str:
 3564: 1232:     """Convert endpoint path to test function name."""
 3565: 1233:     return re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]", "_", text.lower()).strip("_")
 3566: 1234: 
 3567: 1235: 
 3568: 1236: def generate_unit_tests(transactions: list[dict], framework: str) -> str:
 3569: 1237:     """Generate unit test file content for the given framework."""
 3570: 1238:     import re
 3571: 1239: 
 3572: 1240:     template = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])
 3573: 1241:     lines = [template["header"]]
 3574: 1242: 
 3575: 1243:     mutating = ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]
 3576: 1244:     test_transactions = [t for t in transactions if t["method"] in mutating]
 3577: 1245: 
 3578: 1246:     if not test_transactions:
 3579: 1247:         test_transactions = transactions  # Include all if no mutating found
 3580: 1248: 
 3581: 1249:     for txn in test_transactions:
 3582: 1250:         method = txn["method"].upper()
 3583: 1251:         endpoint = txn["endpoint"]
 3584: 1252:         slug = slugify(endpoint)
 3585: 1253:         fields = txn.get("fields", [])
 3586: 1254:         requires_csrf = txn.get("requires_csrf", False)
 3587: 1255:         requires_auth = txn.get("requires_auth", False)
 3588: 1256:         description = txn.get("description", "Auto-generated test")
 3589: 1257: 
 3590: 1258:         # Format fields
 3591: 1259:         field_lines = []
 3592: 1260:         for f in fields[:10]:  # Max 10 fields
 3593: 1261:             name = f["name"]
 3594: 1262:             ftype = f.get("type", "string")
 3595: 1263:             if framework in ("laravel", "django"):
 3596: 1264:                 if ftype == "email":
 3597: 1265:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'test@example.com',")
 3598: 1266:                 elif ftype == "password":
 3599: 1267:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'TestPassword123!',")
 3600: 1268:                 else:
 3601: 1269:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'test_value',")
 3602: 1270:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
 3603: 1271:                 if ftype == "email":
 3604: 1272:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "test@example.com",')
 3605: 1273:                 elif ftype == "password":
 3606: 1274:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "TestPassword123!",')
 3607: 1275:                 else:
 3608: 1276:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "test_value",')
 3609: 1277: 
 3610: 1278:         fields_str = "\n".join(field_lines)
 3611: 1279: 
 3612: 1280:         # Auth setup
 3613: 1281:         if requires_auth:
 3614: 1282:             if framework == "laravel":
 3615: 1283:                 auth_setup = "$this->actingAs(User::factory()->create());"
 3616: 1284:             elif framework == "django":
 3617: 1285:                 auth_setup = "self.client.force_login(User.objects.create_user('testuser', 'test@test.com', 'pass'))"
 3618: 1286:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
 3619: 1287:                 auth_setup = "// TODO: Set Authorization header with valid JWT token"
 3620: 1288:             else:
 3621: 1289:                 auth_setup = "// TODO: Setup authentication"
 3622: 1290:         else:
 3623: 1291:             auth_setup = ""
 3624: 1292: 
 3625: 1293:         # CSRF setup
 3626: 1294:         if requires_csrf:
 3627: 1295:             csrf_field_name = txn.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
 3628: 1296:             if framework == "laravel":
 3629: 1297:                 csrf_field = f"'{csrf_field_name}' => csrf_token(),"
 3630: 1298:                 csrf_kwarg = ""
 3631: 1299:                 csrf_header = ""
 3632: 1300:             elif framework == "django":
 3633: 1301:                 csrf_field = ""
 3634: 1302:                 csrf_kwarg = ", enforce_csrf_checks=False"
 3635: 1303:                 csrf_header = ""
 3636: 1304:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
 3637: 1305:                 csrf_field = ""
 3638: 1306:                 csrf_kwarg = ""
 3639: 1307:                 csrf_header = f'.set("X-CSRF-Token", "test-csrf-token")'
 3640: 1308:             else:
 3641: 1309:                 csrf_field = ""
 3642: 1310:                 csrf_kwarg = ""
 3643: 1311:                 csrf_header = ""
 3644: 1312:         else:
 3645: 1313:             csrf_field = ""
 3646: 1314:             csrf_kwarg = ""
 3647: 1315:             csrf_header = ""
 3648: 1316: 
 3649: 1317:         expected_status = 201 if method == "POST" else 200
 3650: 1318: 
 3651: 1319:         test_case = template["test_case"].format(
 3652: 1320:             method=method,
 3653: 1321:             method_lower=method.lower(),
 3654: 1322:             endpoint=endpoint,
 3655: 1323:             endpoint_slug=slug,
 3656: 1324:             EndpointCamel="".join(w.capitalize() for w in slug.split("_")),
 3657: 1325:             description=description,
 3658: 1326:             auth_setup=auth_setup,
 3659: 1327:             fields=fields_str,
 3660: 1328:             csrf_field=csrf_field,
 3661: 1329:             csrf_kwarg=csrf_kwarg,
 3662: 1330:             csrf_header=csrf_header,
 3663: 1331:             expected_status=expected_status,
 3664: 1332:             expected_status_name="Ok" if expected_status == 200 else "Created",
 3665: 1333:         )
 3666: 1334: 
 3667: 1335:         lines.append(test_case)
 3668: 1336: 
 3669: 1337:     lines.append(template["footer"])
 3670: 1338:     return "".join(lines)
 3671: 1339: 
 3672: 1340: 
 3673: 1341: # ─── Markdown Report Builder ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
 3674: 1342: 
 3675: 1343: def build_report(
 3676: 1344:     ingestion: dict,
 3677: 1345:     identification: dict,
 3678: 1346:     carbon: dict,
 3679: 1347:     output_dir: str,
 3680: 1348: ) -> str:
 3681: 1349:     """Build full Markdown report."""
 3682: 1350: 
 3683: 1351:     now = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
 3684: 1352:     framework = identification.get("framework", "unknown")
 3685: 1353:     language = identification.get("language", "Unknown")
 3686: 1354:     transactions = identification.get("transactions", [])
 3687: 1355:     measurements = {m["transaction_id"]: m for m in carbon.get("measurements", [])}
 3688: 1356: 
 3689: 1357:     lines = [
 3690: 1358:         f"# 🤖 Code Carbon Report",
 3691: 1359:         f"",
 3692: 1360:         f"> Generated: `{now}`",
 3693: 1361:         f"> Source: `{ingestion.get('source_path', 'N/A')}`",
 3694: 1362:         f"> Framework: `{framework}` · Language: `{language}`",
 3695: 1363:         f"",
 3696: 1364:         f"---",
 3697: 1365:         f"",
 3698: 1366:         f"## 📊 Executive Summary",
 3699: 1367:         f"",
 3700: 1368:         f"| Metric | Value |",
 3701: 1369:         f"|--------|-------|",
 3702: 1370:         f"| Total Routes | `{identification.get('total_routes', 0)}` |",
 3703: 1371:         f"| POST/Mutating | `{identification.get('post_routes', 0)}` |",
 3704: 1372:         f"| CSRF Protected | `{identification.get('csrf_protected_routes', 0)}` |",
 3705: 1373:         f"| Auth Required | `{identification.get('auth_required_routes', 0)}` |",
 3706: 1374:         f"| Successful Requests | `{carbon.get('successful_requests', 0)}/{carbon.get('total_requests', 0)}` |",
 3707: 1375:         f"| Total Energy | `{carbon.get('total_energy_kwh', 0):.8f} kWh` |",
 3708: 1376:         f"| Total CO₂ | `{carbon.get('total_co2_kg', 0)*1000:.4f} g` |",
 3709: 1377:         f"| Avg Response Time | `{carbon.get('avg_response_time_ms', 0):.1f} ms` |",
 3710: 1378:         f"",
 3711: 1379:         f"---",
 3712: 1380:         f"",
 3713: 1381:         f"## 🔍 Transaction Analysis",
 3714: 1382:         f"",
 3715: 1383:     ]
 3716: 1384: 
 3717: 1385:     # Group by method
 3718: 1386:     for method in ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
 3719: 1387:         method_txns = [t for t in transactions if t["method"] == method]
 3720: 1388:         if not method_txns:
 3721: 1389:             continue
 3722: 1390: 
 3723: 1391:         icon = {"GET": "🔵", "POST": "🟢", "PUT": "🟡", "PATCH": "🟠", "DELETE": "🔴"}.get(method, "⚪")
 3724: 1392:         lines.append(f"### {icon} {method} Endpoints ({len(method_txns)})")
 3725: 1393:         lines.append("")
 3726: 1394: 
 3727: 1395:         for txn in method_txns:
 3728: 1396:             m = measurements.get(txn["id"], {})
 3729: 1397:             status = m.get("status_code", "—")
 3730: 1398:             rtime = m.get("response_time_ms", 0)
 3731: 1399:             co2 = m.get("co2_emissions_kg", 0) * 1000
 3732: 1400:             success = "✅" if m.get("success") else "❌"
 3733: 1401: 
 3734: 1402:             lines.append(f"#### `{txn['endpoint']}`")
 3735: 1403:             lines.append(f"")
 3736: 1404:             lines.append(f"- **Description:** {txn.get('description', 'N/A')}")
 3737: 1405:             lines.append(f"- **Auth Required:** {'✅ Yes' if txn.get('requires_auth') else '❌ No'}")
 3738: 1406:             lines.append(f"- **CSRF Protected:** {'✅ Yes' if txn.get('requires_csrf') else '❌ No'}")
 3739: 1407:             if txn.get("csrf_field_name"):
 3740: 1408:                 lines.append(f"- **CSRF Field:** `{txn['csrf_field_name']}`")
 3741: 1409:             lines.append(f"- **Live Result:** {success} `HTTP {status}` · `{rtime:.0f}ms` · `{co2:.4f}g CO₂`")
 3742: 1410: 
 3743: 1411:             if txn.get("fields"):
 3744: 1412:                 lines.append(f"")
 3745: 1413:                 lines.append(f"**Required Fields:**")
 3746: 1414:                 lines.append(f"")
 3747: 1415:                 lines.append(f"| Field | Type | Required | Validation |")
 3748: 1416:                 lines.append(f"|-------|------|----------|------------|")
 3749: 1417:                 for f in txn["fields"]:
 3750: 1418:                     req = "✅" if f.get("required") else "⬜"
 3751: 1419:                     rules = ", ".join(f.get("validation_rules", [])) or "—"
 3752: 1420:                     lines.append(f"| `{f['name']}` | `{f['type']}` | {req} | `{rules}` |")
 3753: 1421: 
 3754: 1422:             lines.append(f"")
 3755: 1423: 
 3756: 1424:     # CSRF Summary
 3757: 1425:     lines += [
 3758: 1426:         f"---",
 3759: 1427:         f"",
 3760: 1428:         f"## 🔐 CSRF Analysis",
 3761: 1429:         f"",
 3762: 1430:         f"Framework `{framework}` uses the following CSRF pattern:",
 3763: 1431:         f"",
 3764: 1432:     ]
 3765: 1433: 
 3766: 1434:     csrf_txns = [t for t in transactions if t.get("requires_csrf")]
 3767: 1435:     if csrf_txns:
 3768: 1436:         csrf_fields = list(set(t.get("csrf_field_name", "") for t in csrf_txns if t.get("csrf_field_name")))
 3769: 1437:         for cf in csrf_fields:
 3770: 1438:             lines.append(f"- CSRF field name: **`{cf}`**")
 3771: 1439:         lines.append("")
 3772: 1440:         lines.append("Endpoints with CSRF protection:")
 3773: 1441:         for t in csrf_txns:
 3774: 1442:             lines.append(f"- `{t['method']} {t['endpoint']}`")
 3775: 1443:     else:
 3776: 1444:         lines.append("_No CSRF-protected endpoints detected._")
 3777: 1445: 
 3778: 1446:     lines += [
 3779: 1447:         f"",
 3780: 1448:         f"---",
 3781: 1449:         f"",
 3782: 1450:         f"## 🌱 Carbon Footprint Analysis",
 3783: 1451:         f"",
 3784: 1452:         f"| Endpoint | Method | Status | Energy (kWh) | CO₂ (g) | Time (ms) |",
 3785: 1453:         f"|----------|--------|--------|-------------|---------|-----------|",
 3786: 1454:     ]
 3787: 1455: 
 3788: 1456:     for m in carbon.get("measurements", []):
 3789: 1457:         co2_g = m["co2_emissions_kg"] * 1000
 3790: 1458:         icon = "✅" if m["success"] else "❌"
 3791: 1459:         lines.append(
 3792: 1460:             f"| `{m['endpoint']}` | `{m['method']}` | {icon} `{m['status_code']}` "
 3793: 1461:             f"| `{m['energy_consumed_kwh']:.8f}` | `{co2_g:.4f}` | `{m['response_time_ms']:.0f}` |"
 3794: 1462:         )
 3795: 1463: 
 3796: 1464:     lines += [
 3797: 1465:         f"",
 3798: 1466:         f"---",
 3799: 1467:         f"",
 3800: 1468:         f"## 🔧 Refactoring Recommendations",
 3801: 1469:         f"",
 3802: 1470:     ]
 3803: 1471: 
 3804: 1472:     # Auto recommendations
 3805: 1473:     recs = []
 3806: 1474: 
 3807: 1475:     slow_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if m["response_time_ms"] > 1000]
 3808: 1476:     if slow_txns:
 3809: 1477:         recs.append(f"**⚠️ Slow endpoints detected** ({len(slow_txns)} endpoint > 1000ms):")
 3810: 1478:         for m in slow_txns:
 3811: 1479:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` ({m['response_time_ms']:.0f}ms) — consider caching or query optimization")
 3812: 1480: 
 3813: 1481:     failed_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if not m["success"]]
 3814: 1482:     if failed_txns:
 3815: 1483:         recs.append(f"**❌ Failed requests** ({len(failed_txns)} endpoints returned error):")
 3816: 1484:         for m in failed_txns:
 3817: 1485:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` → HTTP {m['status_code']}")
 3818: 1486: 
 3819: 1487:     unprotected_mutating = [
 3820: 1488:         t for t in transactions
 3821: 1489:         if t["method"] in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]
 3822: 1490:         and not t.get("requires_csrf")
 3823: 1491:         and not t.get("requires_auth")
 3824: 1492:     ]
 3825: 1493:     if unprotected_mutating:
 3826: 1494:         recs.append(f"**🔓 Unprotected mutating endpoints** — no CSRF or auth:")
 3827: 1495:         for t in unprotected_mutating:
 3828: 1496:             recs.append(f"  - `{t['method']} {t['endpoint']}`")
 3829: 1497: 
 3830: 1498:     if not recs:
 3831: 1499:         recs.append("✅ No critical issues detected. Code looks clean!")
 3832: 1500: 
 3833: 1501:     for rec in recs:
 3834: 1502:         lines.append(rec)
 3835: 1503:         lines.append("")
 3836: 1504: 
 3837: 1505:     lines += [
 3838: 1506:         f"---",
 3839: 1507:         f"",
 3840: 1508:         f"## 🧪 Generated Unit Tests",
 3841: 1509:         f"",
 3842: 1510:         f"Unit test files have been saved to `{output_dir}/tests/`",
 3843: 1511:         f"",
 3844: 1512:         f"| File | Framework | Test Count |",
 3845: 1513:         f"|------|-----------|------------|",
 3846: 1514:         f"| `GeneratedTransactionTest.{UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES['express'])['ext']}` | `{framework}` | `{identification.get('post_routes', 0)}` |",
 3847: 1515:         f"",
 3848: 1516:         f"---",
 3849: 1517:         f"",
 3850: 1518:         f"_Report generated by Multi-Agent Code Carbon System_",
 3851: 1519:     ]
 3852: 1520: 
 3853: 1521:     return "\n".join(lines)
 3854: 1522: 
 3855: 1523: 
 3856: 1524: def run(output_dir: str = "./output") -> str:
 3857: 1525:     """
 3858: 1526:     Main entry point for Agent 4.
 3859: 1527:     
 3860: 1528:     Args:
 3861: 1529:         output_dir: Directory containing all agent outputs
 3862: 1530:     
 3863: 1531:     Returns:
 3864: 1532:         Path to the generated report
 3865: 1533:     """
 3866: 1534:     os.makedirs(REPORT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
 3867: 1535:     os.makedirs(f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests", exist_ok=True)
 3868: 1536: 
 3869: 1537:     # Load all agent outputs
 3870: 1538:     with open(f"{output_dir}/transactions.json") as f:
 3871: 1539:         identification = json.load(f)
 3872: 1540: 
 3873: 1541:     with open(f"{output_dir}/carbon_report.json") as f:
 3874: 1542:         carbon = json.load(f)
 3875: 1543: 
 3876: 1544:     # Agent 1 result may or may not exist
 3877: 1545:     ingestion_path = Path(output_dir) / "ingestion_result.json"
 3878: 1546:     if ingestion_path.exists():
 3879: 1547:         with open(ingestion_path) as f:
 3880: 1548:             ingestion = json.load(f)
 3881: 1549:     else:
 3882: 1550:         ingestion = {"source_path": output_dir}
 3883: 1551: 
 3884: 1552:     framework = identification.get("framework", "express")
 3885: 1553: 
 3886: 1554:     # Generate unit tests
 3887: 1555:     print("[Agent 4] Generating unit tests...")
 3888: 1556:     test_content = generate_unit_tests(identification.get("transactions", []), framework)
 3889: 1557:     test_ext = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])["ext"]
 3890: 1558:     test_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests/GeneratedTransactionTest.{test_ext}"
 3891: 1559:     with open(test_path, "w") as f:
 3892: 1560:         f.write(test_content)
 3893: 1561:     print(f"[Agent 4] Unit tests saved: {test_path}")
 3894: 1562: 
 3895: 1563:     # Generate markdown report
 3896: 1564:     print("[Agent 4] Building report...")
 3897: 1565:     report_md = build_report(ingestion, identification, carbon, REPORT_DIR)
 3898: 1566:     report_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/code_carbon_report.md"
 3899: 1567:     with open(report_path, "w") as f:
 3900: 1568:         f.write(report_md)
 3901: 1569: 
 3902: 1570:     print(f"[Agent 4] ✅ Report saved: {report_path}")
 3903: 1571:     return report_path
 3904: 1572: 
 3905: 1573: 
 3906: 1574: if __name__ == "__main__":
 3907: 1575:     import sys
 3908: 1576:     out_dir = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output"
 3909: 1577:     run(out_dir)
 3910: 1578: ```
 3911: 1579: 
 3912: 1580: ---
 3913: 1581: 
 3914: 1582: ## Pipeline Orchestrator
 3915: 1583: 
 3916: 1584: ### File: `pipeline.py`
 3917: 1585: 
 3918: 1586: ```python
 3919: 1587: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 3920: 1588: """
 3921: 1589: Pipeline Orchestrator
 3922: 1590: Runs all 4 agents in sequence.
 3923: 1591: """
 3924: 1592: 
 3925: 1593: import sys
 3926: 1594: import json
 3927: 1595: import argparse
 3928: 1596: from dataclasses import asdict
 3929: 1597: from pathlib import Path
 3930: 1598: 
 3931: 1599: import agent1_ingestion
 3932: 1600: import agent2_gemini_identifier
 3933: 1601: import agent3_carbon
 3934: 1602: import agent4_report
 3935: 1603: 
 3936: 1604: 
 3937: 1605: def main():
 3938: 1606:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
 3939: 1607:         description="Multi-Agent Code Carbon Pipeline",
 3940: 1608:         formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
 3941: 1609:         epilog="""
 3942: 1610: Examples:
 3943: 1611:   # Local directory
 3944: 1612:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-laravel-app
 3945: 1613: 
 3946: 1614:   # Git repository
 3947: 1615:   python pipeline.py --source https://github.com/user/repo
 3948: 1616: 
 3949: 1617:   # Skip carbon testing (no live app running)
 3950: 1618:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --skip-carbon
 3951: 1619: 
 3952: 1620:   # Specify output directory
 3953: 1621:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --output ./my-analysis
 3954: 1622:         """
 3955: 1623:     )
 3956: 1624:     parser.add_argument("--source", required=True, help="Local path or Git URL")
 3957: 1625:     parser.add_argument("--output", default="./output", help="Output directory")
 3958: 1626:     parser.add_argument("--skip-carbon", action="store_true",
 3959: 1627:                         help="Skip Agent 3 (no live app required)")
 3960: 1628:     parser.add_argument("--base-url", default=None,
 3961: 1629:                         help="Override TARGET_BASE_URL for Agent 3")
 3962: 1630: 
 3963: 1631:     args = parser.parse_args()
 3964: 1632: 
 3965: 1633:     if args.base_url:
 3966: 1634:         import os
 3967: 1635:         os.environ["TARGET_BASE_URL"] = args.base_url
 3968: 1636: 
 3969: 1637:     print("=" * 60)
 3970: 1638:     print("🤖 MULTI-AGENT CODE CARBON PIPELINE")
 3971: 1639:     print("=" * 60)
 3972: 1640: 
 3973: 1641:     # ── Agent 1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 3974: 1642:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion")
 3975: 1643:     ingestion = agent1_ingestion.run(args.source, args.output)
 3976: 1644:     if not ingestion.success:
 3977: 1645:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 1 failed: {ingestion.error}")
 3978: 1646:         sys.exit(1)
 3979: 1647: 
 3980: 1648:     # Save ingestion result
 3981: 1649:     with open(f"{args.output}/ingestion_result.json", "w") as f:
 3982: 1650:         json.dump(asdict(ingestion), f, indent=2)
 3983: 1651: 
 3984: 1652:     # ── Agent 2 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 3985: 1653:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier")
 3986: 1654:     identification = agent2_gemini_identifier.run(
 3987: 1655:         ingestion.flat_file_path,
 3988: 1656:         ingestion.detected_framework
 3989: 1657:     )
 3990: 1658:     if not identification.success:
 3991: 1659:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 2 failed: {identification.error}")
 3992: 1660:         sys.exit(1)
 3993: 1661: 
 3994: 1662:     # ── Agent 3 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 3995: 1663:     if args.skip_carbon:
 3996: 1664:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ⏭  Agent 3 — Skipped (--skip-carbon)")
 3997: 1665:         # Create empty carbon result
 3998: 1666:         empty_carbon = {
 3999: 1667:             "success": True, "base_url": "", "total_requests": 0,
 4000: 1668:             "successful_requests": 0, "failed_requests": 0,
 4001: 1669:             "total_energy_kwh": 0.0, "total_co2_kg": 0.0,
 4002: 1670:             "avg_response_time_ms": 0.0, "measurements": []
 4003: 1671:         }
 4004: 1672:         with open(f"{args.output}/carbon_report.json", "w") as f:
 4005: 1673:             json.dump(empty_carbon, f, indent=2)
 4006: 1674:     else:
 4007: 1675:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 3 — Code Carbon")
 4008: 1676:         carbon = agent3_carbon.run(f"{args.output}/transactions.json")
 4009: 1677:         if not carbon.success:
 4010: 1678:             print(f"[PIPELINE] ⚠️  Agent 3 warning: {carbon.error}")
 4011: 1679: 
 4012: 1680:     # ── Agent 4 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 4013: 1681:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 4 — Refactor Report")
 4014: 1682:     report_path = agent4_report.run(args.output)
 4015: 1683: 
 4016: 1684:     print("\n" + "=" * 60)
 4017: 1685:     print("✅ PIPELINE COMPLETE")
 4018: 1686:     print(f"📄 Report: {report_path}")
 4019: 1687:     print(f"🧪 Tests:  ./reports/tests/")
 4020: 1688:     print("=" * 60)
 4021: 1689: 
 4022: 1690: 
 4023: 1691: if __name__ == "__main__":
 4024: 1692:     main()
 4025: 1693: ```
 4026: 1694: 
 4027: 1695: ---
 4028: 1696: 
 4029: 1697: ## Web UI — CSRF & Form Field Handler
 4030: 1698: 
 4031: 1699: File ini adalah **web interface** yang menampilkan form dari hasil Gemini, lengkap dengan field yang harus diisi, label, dan CSRF token secara otomatis.
 4032: 1700: 
 4033: 1701: ### File: `web_ui/index.html`
 4034: 1702: 
 4035: 1703: ```html
 4036: 1704: <!DOCTYPE html>
 4037: 1705: <html lang="id">
 4038: 1706: <head>
 4039: 1707:   <meta charset="UTF-8">
 4040: 1708:   <title>Code Carbon — Transaction Tester</title>
 4041: 1709:   <style>
 4042: 1710:     body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 0 1rem; }
 4043: 1711:     .card { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.5rem; margin: 1rem 0; }
 4044: 1712:     .method-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 4px;
 4045: 1713:                     font-weight: bold; font-size: 0.8rem; color: white; }
 4046: 1714:     .POST   { background: #2ecc71; }
 4047: 1715:     .GET    { background: #3498db; }
 4048: 1716:     .PUT    { background: #f39c12; }
 4049: 1717:     .PATCH  { background: #e67e22; }
 4050: 1718:     .DELETE { background: #e74c3c; }
 4051: 1719:     .form-group { margin: 0.75rem 0; }
 4052: 1720:     label { display: block; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 4px; }
 4053: 1721:     input, select { width: 100%; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;
 4054: 1722:                     box-sizing: border-box; }
 4055: 1723:     input[type=password] { font-family: monospace; }
 4056: 1724:     .csrf-badge { font-size: 0.75rem; background: #fff3cd; padding: 2px 6px;
 4057: 1725:                   border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #ffc107; }
 4058: 1726:     .auth-badge { font-size: 0.75rem; background: #cce5ff; padding: 2px 6px;
 4059: 1727:                   border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #004085; }
 4060: 1728:     button[type=submit] { background: #2c3e50; color: white; border: none;
 4061: 1729:                           padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; }
 4062: 1730:     .response-box { background: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px;
 4063: 1731:                     padding: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem; font-family: monospace;
 4064: 1732:                     white-space: pre-wrap; max-height: 300px; overflow-y: auto; }
 4065: 1733:     .required-mark { color: #e74c3c; }
 4066: 1734:   </style>
 4067: 1735: </head>
 4068: 1736: <body>
 4069: 1737:   <h1>🤖 Code Carbon — Transaction Tester</h1>
 4070: 1738:   <p>Load <code>transactions.json</code> to auto-generate forms for each endpoint.</p>
 4071: 1739: 
 4072: 1740:   <input type="file" id="txnFile" accept=".json">
 4073: 1741:   <div id="app"></div>
 4074: 1742: 
 4075: 1743:   <script>
 4076: 1744:     const BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:8000';  // Change this!
 4077: 1745: 
 4078: 1746:     document.getElementById('txnFile').addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
 4079: 1747:       const file = e.target.files[0];
 4080: 1748:       if (!file) return;
 4081: 1749:       const data = JSON.parse(await file.text());
 4082: 1750:       renderTransactions(data.transactions || [], data.framework || 'unknown');
 4083: 1751:     });
 4084: 1752: 
 4085: 1753:     function renderTransactions(transactions, framework) {
 4086: 1754:       const app = document.getElementById('app');
 4087: 1755:       app.innerHTML = '';
 4088: 1756: 
 4089: 1757:       transactions.forEach((txn, i) => {
 4090: 1758:         const card = document.createElement('div');
 4091: 1759:         card.className = 'card';
 4092: 1760:         card.id = `txn-${txn.id}`;
 4093: 1761: 
 4094: 1762:         const badges = [
 4095: 1763:           `<span class="method-badge ${txn.method}">${txn.method}</span>`,
 4096: 1764:           txn.requires_csrf ? '<span class="csrf-badge">🔐 CSRF</span>' : '',
 4097: 1765:           txn.requires_auth ? '<span class="auth-badge">🔑 Auth</span>' : '',
 4098: 1766:         ].filter(Boolean).join(' ');
 4099: 1767: 
 4100: 1768:         let fieldsHtml = '';
 4101: 1769:         (txn.fields || []).forEach(f => {
 4102: 1770:           const inputType = {
 4103: 1771:             'email': 'email', 'password': 'password',
 4104: 1772:             'integer': 'number', 'number': 'number', 'file': 'file',
 4105: 1773:           }[f.type] || 'text';
 4106: 1774: 
 4107: 1775:           const req = f.required ? '<span class="required-mark">*</span>' : '';
 4108: 1776:           const rules = (f.validation_rules || []).join(', ');
 4109: 1777:           const placeholder = f.description || f.name;
 4110: 1778: 
 4111: 1779:           fieldsHtml += `
 4112: 1780:             <div class="form-group">
 4113: 1781:               <label for="${txn.id}_${f.name}">${f.name} ${req}
 4114: 1782:                 <small style="color:#888;">(${f.type}${rules ? ' · ' + rules : ''})</small>
 4115: 1783:               </label>
 4116: 1784:               <input type="${inputType}"
 4117: 1785:                      id="${txn.id}_${f.name}"
 4118: 1786:                      name="${f.name}"
 4119: 1787:                      placeholder="${placeholder}"
 4120: 1788:                      ${f.required ? 'required' : ''}>
 4121: 1789:             </div>`;
 4122: 1790:         });
 4123: 1791: 
 4124: 1792:         // CSRF hidden field
 4125: 1793:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
 4126: 1794:           fieldsHtml += `
 4127: 1795:             <div class="form-group" style="opacity:0.5">
 4128: 1796:               <label>CSRF Token (auto-fetched: <code>${txn.csrf_field_name}</code>)</label>
 4129: 1797:               <input type="text" id="${txn.id}_csrf" name="${txn.csrf_field_name}"
 4130: 1798:                      placeholder="Will be fetched automatically" readonly>
 4131: 1799:             </div>`;
 4132: 1800:         }
 4133: 1801: 
 4134: 1802:         card.innerHTML = `
 4135: 1803:           <h3>${badges} <code>${txn.endpoint}</code></h3>
 4136: 1804:           <p style="color:#666;">${txn.description || ''}</p>
 4137: 1805:           <form id="form-${txn.id}">
 4138: 1806:             ${fieldsHtml}
 4139: 1807:             <button type="submit">Send ${txn.method} Request</button>
 4140: 1808:           </form>
 4141: 1809:           <div id="response-${txn.id}" class="response-box" style="display:none;"></div>
 4142: 1810:         `;
 4143: 1811: 
 4144: 1812:         app.appendChild(card);
 4145: 1813: 
 4146: 1814:         // Auto-fetch CSRF if needed
 4147: 1815:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
 4148: 1816:           fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework);
 4149: 1817:         }
 4150: 1818: 
 4151: 1819:         // Form submit
 4152: 1820:         document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`).addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
 4153: 1821:           e.preventDefault();
 4154: 1822:           await submitTransaction(txn);
 4155: 1823:         });
 4156: 1824:       });
 4157: 1825:     }
 4158: 1826: 
 4159: 1827:     async function fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework) {
 4160: 1828:       try {
 4161: 1829:         // Try to get CSRF from the same page
 4162: 1830:         const endpoints = [txn.endpoint.replace('/api/', '/'), '/', '/login'];
 4163: 1831:         for (const ep of endpoints) {
 4164: 1832:           const r = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${ep}`, { credentials: 'include' });
 4165: 1833:           if (r.ok) {
 4166: 1834:             const html = await r.text();
 4167: 1835:             const match = html.match(
 4168: 1836:               new RegExp(`name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']\\s+value=["']([^"']+)["']`)
 4169: 1837:             ) || html.match(
 4170: 1838:               new RegExp(`value=["']([^"']+)["']\\s+name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']`)
 4171: 1839:             );
 4172: 1840:             if (match) {
 4173: 1841:               const csrfInput = document.getElementById(`${txn.id}_csrf`);
 4174: 1842:               if (csrfInput) csrfInput.value = match[1];
 4175: 1843:               return;
 4176: 1844:             }
 4177: 1845:           }
 4178: 1846:         }
 4179: 1847:       } catch (e) {
 4180: 1848:         console.warn('Could not auto-fetch CSRF:', e.message);
 4181: 1849:       }
 4182: 1850:     }
 4183: 1851: 
 4184: 1852:     async function submitTransaction(txn) {
 4185: 1853:       const form = document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`);
 4186: 1854:       const responseBox = document.getElementById(`response-${txn.id}`);
 4187: 1855:       const formData = new FormData(form);
 4188: 1856:       const payload = Object.fromEntries(formData);
 4189: 1857: 
 4190: 1858:       responseBox.style.display = 'block';
 4191: 1859:       responseBox.textContent = '⏳ Sending...';
 4192: 1860: 
 4193: 1861:       try {
 4194: 1862:         const options = {
 4195: 1863:           method: txn.method,
 4196: 1864:           credentials: 'include',
 4197: 1865:           headers: {},
 4198: 1866:         };
 4199: 1867: 
 4200: 1868:         if (txn.method !== 'GET') {
 4201: 1869:           options.headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
 4202: 1870:           options.body = JSON.stringify(payload);
 4203: 1871: 
 4204: 1872:           if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
 4205: 1873:             options.headers['X-CSRF-Token'] = payload[txn.csrf_field_name] || '';
 4206: 1874:           }
 4207: 1875:         }
 4208: 1876: 
 4209: 1877:         const start = performance.now();
 4210: 1878:         const r = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${txn.endpoint}`, options);
 4211: 1879:         const elapsed = (performance.now() - start).toFixed(0);
 4212: 1880:         const text = await r.text();
 4213: 1881: 
 4214: 1882:         let display;
 4215: 1883:         try {
 4216: 1884:           display = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2);
 4217: 1885:         } catch {
 4218: 1886:           display = text.substring(0, 1000);
 4219: 1887:         }
 4220: 1888: 
 4221: 1889:         responseBox.textContent =
 4222: 1890:           `HTTP ${r.status} (${elapsed}ms)\n\n${display}`;
 4223: 1891: 
 4224: 1892:       } catch (err) {
 4225: 1893:         responseBox.textContent = `❌ Error: ${err.message}`;
 4226: 1894:       }
 4227: 1895:     }
 4228: 1896:   </script>
 4229: 1897: </body>
 4230: 1898: </html>
 4231: 1899: ```
 4232: 1900:

 4240: 1908: <?php
 4241: 1909: // reports/tests/GeneratedTransactionTest.php
 4242: 1910: 
 4243: 1911: namespace Tests\Feature;
 4244: 1912: 
 4245: 1913: use Illuminate\Foundation\Testing\RefreshDatabase;
 4246: 1914: use Tests\TestCase;
 4247: 1915: use App\Models\User;
 4248: 1916: 
 4249: 1917: class GeneratedTransactionTest extends TestCase
 4250: 1918: {
 4251: 1919:     use RefreshDatabase;
 4252: 1920:

 4254: 1922:     public function test_post_api_login()
 4255: 1923:     {
 4256: 1924:         $response = $this->post('/api/login', [
 4257: 1925:             'email'    => 'test@example.com',
 4258: 1926:             'password' => 'TestPassword123!',
 4259: 1927:             '_token'   => csrf_token(),
 4260: 1928:         ]);

 4263: 1931:     }
 4264: 1932:

 4276: 1944:     }

 4281: 1949:         $response = $this->post('/api/transactions', [
