 4307: 1975: 
 4308: 1976: ## Configuration & Environment
 4309: 1977: 
 4310: 1978: ### File: `.env`
 4311: 1979: 
 4312: 1980: ```dotenv
 4313: 1981: # Required
 4314: 1982: GEMINI_API_KEY=your_gemini_api_key_here
 4315: 1983: 
 4316: 1984: # Agent 3 — Target app URL (must be running)
 4317: 1985: TARGET_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000
 4318: 1986: 
 4319: 1987: # Optional tuning
 4320: 1988: REQUEST_TIMEOUT=30
 4321: 1989: DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS=0.5
 4322: 1990: 
 4323: 1991: # Output paths
 4324: 1992: REPOMIX_OUTPUT_DIR=./output
 4325: 1993: REPORT_OUTPUT_DIR=./reports
 4326: 1994: ```
 4327: 1995: 
 4328: 1996: ### File: `requirements.txt`
 4329: 1997: 
 4330: 1998: ```
 4331: 1999: codecarbon>=2.3.0
 4332: 2000: requests>=2.31.0
 4333: 2001: beautifulsoup4>=4.12.0
 4334: 2002: python-dotenv>=1.0.0
 4335: 2003: lxml>=4.9.0
 4336: 2004: ```
 4337: 2005: 
 4338: 2006: ### Installation
 4339: 2007: 
 4340: 2008: ```bash
 4341: 2009: # Install Python deps
 4342: 2010: pip install -r requirements.txt
 4343: 2011: 
 4344: 2012: # Install repomix (Node.js required)
 4345: 2013: npm install -g repomix
 4346: 2014: 
 4347: 2015: # Verify
 4348: 2016: repomix --version
 4349: 2017: python -c "import codecarbon; print('CodeCarbon OK')"
 4350: 2018: ```
 4351: 2019: 
 4352: 2020: ---
 4353: 2021: 
 4354: 2022: ## Running the Full Pipeline
 4355: 2023: 
 4356: 2024: ```bash
 4357: 2025: # 1. Analyze local Laravel project (app must be running)
 4358: 2026: python pipeline.py \
 4359: 2027:   --source /path/to/my-laravel-app \
 4360: 2028:   --base-url http://localhost:8000
 4361: 2029: 
 4362: 2030: # 2. Analyze from Git URL, skip live testing
 4363: 2031: python pipeline.py \
 4364: 2032:   --source https://github.com/user/my-express-api \
 4365: 2033:   --skip-carbon
 4366: 2034: 
 4367: 2035: # 3. Analyze Django app
 4368: 2036: python pipeline.py \
 4369: 2037:   --source /path/to/my-django-app \
 4370: 2038:   --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8000
 4371: 2039: 
 4372: 2040: # 4. Run only Agent 2 (already have repomix output)
 4373: 2041: python agent2_gemini_identifier.py ./output/flat_codebase.txt
 4374: 2042: 
 4375: 2043: # 5. Open Web UI
 4376: 2044: # Open web_ui/index.html in browser
 4377: 2045: # Load transactions.json
 4378: 2046: # Fill required fields → Send request
 4379: 2047: ```
 4380: 2048:

 4385: 2053: ### Directory Structure After Run
 4386: 2054: 
 4387: 2055: ```
 4388: 2056: output/
 4389: 2057: ├── flat_codebase.txt          ← Agent 1: repomix bundle
 4390: 2058: ├── ingestion_result.json      ← Agent 1: metadata
 4391: 2059: ├── transactions.json          ← Agent 2: all transactions + fields
 4392: 2060: └── carbon_report.json         ← Agent 3: per-request energy data
 4393: 2061: 
 4394: 2062: reports/
 4395: 2063: ├── code_carbon_report.md      ← Agent 4: full report
 4396: 2064: └── tests/
 4397: 2065:     └── GeneratedTransactionTest.php  ← Agent 4: unit tests
 4398: 2066: ```

 4415: 2083:       "description": "Authenticate user and return token",
 4416: 2084:       "requires_auth": false,

 4441: 2109: ---
 4442: 2110: 
 4443: 2111: ## Troubleshooting
 4444: 2112: 
 4445: 2113: | Problem | Cause | Fix |
 4446: 2114: |---------|-------|-----|
 4447: 2115: | `repomix: command not found` | Not installed | `npm install -g repomix` |
 4448: 2116: | `Gemini API 429 Too Many Requests` | Rate limit hit | Add `GEMINI_DELAY=10` to .env |
 4449: 2117: | `Connection refused` in Agent 3 | App not running | Start app or use `--skip-carbon` |
 4450: 2118: | `CSRF token mismatch` in Agent 3 | Wrong field name | Gemini will detect correct name; check `transactions.json` |
 4451: 2119: | `CodeCarbon ImportError` | Not installed | `pip install codecarbon` |
 4452: 2120: | `repomix output too large` | Big codebase | Add exclusions in `FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES` |
 4453: 2121: 
 4454: 2122: ---
 4455: 2123: 
 4456: 2124: _Dibuat dengan ❤️ untuk semua framework — Laravel, Django, Express, Spring, Rails, FastAPI, NestJS, Go, ASP.NET_

 4473: ================
 4474: File: output/flat_codebase.txt
 4475: ================
 4476:     1: This file is a merged representation of a subset of the codebase, containing files not matching ignore patterns, combined into a single document by Repomix.
 4477:     2: The content has been processed where line numbers have been added.
 4478:     3: 
 4479:     4: ================================================================
 4480:     5: File Summary
 4481:     6: ================================================================
 4482:     7: 
 4483:     8: Purpose:
 4484:     9: --------
 4485:    10: This file contains a packed representation of a subset of the repository's contents that is considered the most important context.
 4486:    11: It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
 4487:    12: or other automated processes.
 4488:    13: 
 4489:    14: File Format:
 4490:    15: ------------
 4491:    16: The content is organized as follows:
 4492:    17: 1. This summary section
 4493:    18: 2. Repository information
 4494:    19: 3. Directory structure
 4495:    20: 4. Repository files (if enabled)
 4496:    21: 5. Multiple file entries, each consisting of:
 4497:    22:   a. A separator line (================)
 4498:    23:   b. The file path (File: path/to/file)
 4499:    24:   c. Another separator line
 4500:    25:   d. The full contents of the file
 4501:    26:   e. A blank line
 4502:    27: 
 4503:    28: Usage Guidelines:
 4504:    29: -----------------
 4505:    30: - This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
 4506:    31:   original repository files, not this packed version.
 4507:    32: - When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
 4508:    33:   between different files in the repository.
 4509:    34: - Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with
 4510:    35:   the same level of security as you would the original repository.
 4511:    36: 
 4512:    37: Notes:
 4513:    38: ------
 4514:    39: - Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
 4515:    40: - Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
 4516:    41: - Files matching these patterns are excluded: node_modules/**, vendor/**, .git/**, storage/**, tests/**, public/**, resources/assets/**, *.min.js, *.css, *.scss, *.json, *.lock, *.log
 4517:    42: - Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded
 4518:    43: - Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded
 4519:    44: - Line numbers have been added to the beginning of each line
 4520:    45: - Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)
 4521:    46: 
 4522:    47: 
 4523:    48: ================================================================
 4524:    49: Directory Structure
 4525:    50: ================================================================
 4526:    51: agent1_ingestion.py

 4548:    73: ================
 4549:    74: File: agent1_ingestion.py
 4550:    75: ================
 4551:    76:   1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 4552:    77:   2: """
 4553:    78:   3: Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
 4554:    79:   4: Converts local path or Git URL to a flat repomix bundle.
 4555:    80:   5: """
 4556:    81:   6: 
 4557:    82:   7: import subprocess
 4558:    83:   8: import os
 4559:    84:   9: import sys
 4560:    85:  10: import shutil
 4561:    86:  11: import tempfile
 4562:    87:  12: import json
 4563:    88:  13: from pathlib import Path
 4564:    89:  14: from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
 4565:    90:  15: from typing import Optional
 4566:    91:  16: 
 4567:    92:  17: 
 4568:    93:  18: @dataclass
 4569:    94:  19: class IngestionResult:
 4570:    95:  20:     success: bool
 4571:    96:  21:     flat_file_path: str
 4572:    97:  22:     source_type: str          # "local" | "git"
 4573:    98:  23:     source_path: str
 4574:    99:  24:     file_size_bytes: int
 4575:   100:  25:     detected_language: str
 4576:   101:  26:     detected_framework: str
 4577:   102:  27:     error: Optional[str] = None
 4578:   103:  28: 
 4579:   104:  29: 
 4580:   105:  30: FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES = {
 4581:   106:  31:     "laravel":     ["artisan", "composer.json", "app/Http/Controllers"],
 4582:   107:  32:     "django":      ["manage.py", "settings.py", "wsgi.py"],
 4583:   108:  33:     "express":     ["package.json", "app.js", "routes/"],
 4584:   109:  34:     "nestjs":      ["nest-cli.json", "src/main.ts"],
 4585:   110:  35:     "springboot":  ["pom.xml", "src/main/java", "Application.java"],
 4586:   111:  36:     "rails":       ["Gemfile", "config/routes.rb", "app/controllers"],
 4587:   112:  37:     "fastapi":     ["main.py", "requirements.txt"],  # + fastapi in requirements
 4588:   113:  38:     "gin":         ["go.mod", "main.go"],
 4589:   114:  39:     "aspnet":      ["*.csproj", "Program.cs", "Startup.cs"],
 4590:   115:  40: }
 4591:   116:  41: 
 4592:   117:  42: LANGUAGE_MAP = {
 4593:   118:  43:     "laravel": "PHP",
 4594:   119:  44:     "django": "Python",
 4595:   120:  45:     "fastapi": "Python",
 4596:   121:  46:     "express": "JavaScript",
 4597:   122:  47:     "nestjs": "TypeScript",
 4598:   123:  48:     "springboot": "Java",
 4599:   124:  49:     "rails": "Ruby",
 4600:   125:  50:     "gin": "Go",
 4601:   126:  51:     "aspnet": "C#",
 4602:   127:  52: }
 4603:   128:  53: 
 4604:   129:  54: 
 4605:   130:  55: def detect_framework(path: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
 4606:   131:  56:     """Detect framework and language from directory structure."""
 4607:   132:  57:     for framework, signatures in FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES.items():
 4608:   133:  58:         for sig in signatures:
 4609:   134:  59:             check = Path(path) / sig
 4610:   135:  60:             # Check direct file/dir
 4611:   136:  61:             if check.exists():
 4612:   137:  62:                 return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
 4613:   138:  63:             # Glob pattern
 4614:   139:  64:             if "*" in sig:
 4615:   140:  65:                 matches = list(Path(path).glob(sig))
 4616:   141:  66:                 if matches:
 4617:   142:  67:                     return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
 4618:   143:  68:     return "unknown", "Unknown"
 4619:   144:  69: 
 4620:   145:  70: 
 4621:   146:  71: def clone_repo(git_url: str, target_dir: str) -> str:
 4622:   147:  72:     """Clone a git repository to target_dir."""
 4623:   148:  73:     print(f"[Agent 1] Cloning {git_url}...")
 4624:   149:  74:     result = subprocess.run(
 4625:   150:  75:         ["git", "clone", "--depth=1", git_url, target_dir],
 4626:   151:  76:         capture_output=True, text=True
 4627:   152:  77:     )
 4628:   153:  78:     if result.returncode != 0:
 4629:   154:  79:         raise RuntimeError(f"Git clone failed: {result.stderr}")
 4630:   155:  80:     return target_dir
 4631:   156:  81: 
 4632:   157:  82: 
 4633:   158:  83: def run_repomix(source_dir: str, output_path: str) -> None:
 4634:   159:  84:     """Run repomix to create flat bundle from source_dir."""
 4635:   160:  85:     print(f"[Agent 1] Running repomix on {source_dir}...")
 4636:   161:  86: 
 4637:   162:  87:     # repomix config — exclude common non-essential files
 4638:   163:  88:     repomix_config = {
 4639:   164:  89:         "output": {
 4640:   165:  90:             "filePath": output_path,
 4641:   166:  91:             "style": "plain",
 4642:   167:  92:             "removeComments": False,
 4643:   168:  93:             "removeEmptyLines": False,
 4644:   169:  94:             "showLineNumbers": True,
 4645:   170:  95:             "copyToClipboard": False,
 4646:   171:  96:         },
 4647:   172:  97:         "ignore": {
 4648:   173:  98:             "useGitignore": True,
 4649:   174:  99:             "useDefaultPatterns": True,
 4650:   175: 100:             "customPatterns": [
 4651:   176: 101:                 "node_modules/**",
 4652:   177: 102:                 "vendor/**",
 4653:   178: 103:                 ".git/**",
 4654:   179: 104:                 "storage/**",
 4655:   180: 105:                 "tests/**",               # File test bisa dibuang untuk analisis logika utama
 4656:   181: 106:                 "public/**",              # Gambar, CSS, Minified JS di sini dibuang saja
 4657:   182: 107:                 "resources/assets/**",    # Assets mentah
 4658:   183: 108:                 "*.min.js",
 4659:   184: 109:                 "*.css",
 4660:   185: 110:                 "*.scss",
 4661:   186: 111:                 "*.json",                 # File JSON besar (seperti package-lock) sering ikut terbawa
 4662:   187: 112:                 "*.lock",
 4663:   188: 113:                 "*.log"
 4664:   189: 114:             ]
 4665:   190: 115:         }
 4666:   191: 116:     }
 4667:   192: 117: 
 4668:   193: 118:     config_path = Path(source_dir) / ".repomix-config.json"
 4669:   194: 119:     with open(config_path, "w") as f:
 4670:   195: 120:         json.dump(repomix_config, f, indent=2)
 4671:   196: 121: 
 4672:   197: 122:     result = subprocess.run(
 4673:   198: 123:         ["repomix", "--config", str(config_path), "--output", output_path, source_dir],
 4674:   199: 124:         capture_output=True, text=True, shell=True, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"
 4675:   200: 125:     )
 4676:   201: 126: 
 4677:   202: 127:     # Cleanup config
 4678:   203: 128:     config_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
 4679:   204: 129: 
 4680:   205: 130:     if result.returncode != 0:
 4681:   206: 131:         raise RuntimeError(f"repomix failed: {result.stderr}")
 4682:   207: 132: 
 4683:   208: 133:     print(f"[Agent 1] ✅ repomix output: {output_path}")
 4684:   209: 134: 
 4685:   210: 135: 
 4686:   211: 136: def run(source: str, output_dir: str = "./output") -> IngestionResult:
 4687:   212: 137:     """
 4688:   213: 138:     Main entry point for Agent 1.
 4689:   214: 139:     
 4690:   215: 140:     Args:
 4691:   216: 141:         source: Local directory path OR Git URL
 4692:   217: 142:         output_dir: Where to save the flat bundle
 4693:   218: 143:     
 4694:   219: 144:     Returns:
 4695:   220: 145:         IngestionResult with flat_file_path pointing to repomix output
 4696:   221: 146:     """
 4697:   222: 147:     os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
 4698:   223: 148:     output_path = str(Path(output_dir) / "flat_codebase.txt")
 4699:   224: 149:     temp_dir = None
 4700:   225: 150: 
 4701:   226: 151:     try:
 4702:   227: 152:         # Determine source type
 4703:   228: 153:         if source.startswith("http") or source.startswith("git@"):
 4704:   229: 154:             source_type = "git"
 4705:   230: 155:             temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="agent1_repo_")
 4706:   231: 156:             working_dir = clone_repo(source, temp_dir)
 4707:   232: 157:         else:
 4708:   233: 158:             source_type = "local"
 4709:   234: 159:             working_dir = os.path.abspath(source)
 4710:   235: 160:             if not os.path.isdir(working_dir):
 4711:   236: 161:                 raise ValueError(f"Directory not found: {working_dir}")
 4712:   237: 162: 
 4713:   238: 163:         # Detect framework
 4714:   239: 164:         framework, language = detect_framework(working_dir)
 4715:   240: 165:         print(f"[Agent 1] Detected: {framework} / {language}")
 4716:   241: 166: 
 4717:   242: 167:         # Run repomix
 4718:   243: 168:         run_repomix(working_dir, output_path)
 4719:   244: 169: 
 4720:   245: 170:         file_size = Path(output_path).stat().st_size
 4721:   246: 171: 
 4722:   247: 172:         return IngestionResult(
 4723:   248: 173:             success=True,
 4724:   249: 174:             flat_file_path=output_path,
 4725:   250: 175:             source_type=source_type,
 4726:   251: 176:             source_path=source,
 4727:   252: 177:             file_size_bytes=file_size,
 4728:   253: 178:             detected_language=language,
 4729:   254: 179:             detected_framework=framework,
 4730:   255: 180:         )
 4731:   256: 181: 
 4732:   257: 182:     except Exception as e:
 4733:   258: 183:         return IngestionResult(
 4734:   259: 184:             success=False,
 4735:   260: 185:             flat_file_path="",
 4736:   261: 186:             source_type="unknown",
 4737:   262: 187:             source_path=source,
 4738:   263: 188:             file_size_bytes=0,
 4739:   264: 189:             detected_language="Unknown",
 4740:   265: 190:             detected_framework="unknown",
 4741:   266: 191:             error=str(e),
 4742:   267: 192:         )
 4743:   268: 193:     finally:
 4744:   269: 194:         if temp_dir and os.path.exists(temp_dir):
 4745:   270: 195:             shutil.rmtree(temp_dir, ignore_errors=True)
 4746:   271: 196: 
 4747:   272: 197: 
 4748:   273: 198: if __name__ == "__main__":
 4749:   274: 199:     source = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
 4750:   275: 200:     result = run(source)
 4751:   276: 201:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 4752:   277: 
 4753:   278: ================
 4754:   279: File: agent2_gemini_identifier.py
 4755:   280: ================
 4756:   281:   1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 4757:   282:   2: """
 4758:   283:   3: Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
 4759:   284:   4: Sends repomix bundle to Gemini AI for transaction analysis.
 4760:   285:   5: """
 4761:   286:   6: 
 4762:   287:   7: import os
 4763:   288:   8: import json
 4764:   289:   9: import time
 4765:   290:  10: import requests
 4766:   291:  11: from pathlib import Path
 4767:   292:  12: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
 4768:   293:  13: from typing import Optional
 4769:   294:  14: from dotenv import load_dotenv
 4770:   295:  15: 
 4771:   296:  16: load_dotenv()
 4772:   297:  17: 
 4773:   298:  18: GEMINI_API_KEY = os.getenv("GEMINI_API_KEY")
 4774:   299:  19: GEMINI_ENDPOINT = (
 4775:   300:  20:     f"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/"
 4776:   301:  21:     f"gemini-2.5-flash:generateContent?key={GEMINI_API_KEY}"
 4777:   302:  22: )
 4778:   303:  23: 
 4779:   304:  24: MAX_CONTENT_CHARS = 900_000
 4780:   305:  25: 
 4781:   306:  26: 
 4782:   307:  27: @dataclass
 4783:   308:  28: class TransactionField:
 4784:   309:  29:     name: str
 4785:   310:  30:     type: str
 4786:   311:  31:     required: bool
 4787:   312:  32:     description: str
 4788:   313:  33:     validation_rules: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 4789:   314:  34: 
 4790:   315:  35: 
 4791:   316:  36: @dataclass
 4792:   317:  37: class Transaction:
 4793:   318:  38:     id: str
 4794:   319:  39:     method: str
 4795:   320:  40:     endpoint: str
 4796:   321:  41:     description: str
 4797:   322:  42:     requires_auth: bool
 4798:   323:  43:     requires_csrf: bool
 4799:   324:  44:     csrf_field_name: str
 4800:   325:  45:     fields: list[TransactionField]
 4801:   326:  46:     framework: str
 4802:   327:  47:     tags: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 4803:   328:  48: 
 4804:   329:  49: 
 4805:   330:  50: @dataclass
 4806:   331:  51: class IdentificationResult:
 4807:   332:  52:     success: bool
 4808:   333:  53:     framework: str
 4809:   334:  54:     language: str
 4810:   335:  55:     transactions: list[Transaction]
 4811:   336:  56:     total_routes: int
 4812:   337:  57:     post_routes: int
 4813:   338:  58:     csrf_protected_routes: int
 4814:   339:  59:     auth_required_routes: int
 4815:   340:  60:     error: Optional[str] = None
 4816:   341:  61: 
 4817:   342:  62: 
 4818:   343:  63: SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
 4819:   344:  64: You are an expert code analyzer. You will receive a flat bundle of a web application codebase.
 4820:   345:  65: 
 4821:   346:  66: Your task is to analyze ALL routes/endpoints and return a STRICT JSON response.
 4822:   347:  67: 
 4823:   348:  68: ## What to extract per endpoint:
 4824:   349:  69: 1. HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)
 4825:   350:  70: 2. URL path / route
 4826:   351:  71: 3. Description of what the endpoint does
 4827:   352:  72: 4. Whether it requires authentication (JWT, session, Bearer token, etc.)
 4828:   353:  73: 5. Whether it requires CSRF protection — detect automatically by framework:
 4829:   354:  74:    - Laravel: look for @csrf, csrf_field(), VerifyCsrfToken middleware, X-CSRF-TOKEN header
 4830:   355:  75:    - Django: look for {% csrf_token %}, CsrfViewMiddleware, csrf_protect decorator
 4831:   356:  76:    - Express.js: look for csurf, csrf(), csrfToken()
 4832:   357:  77:    - Rails: look for authenticity_token, protect_from_forgery
 4833:   358:  78:    - Spring Boot: look for CsrfToken, .csrf(), SecurityConfig
 4834:   359:  79:    - FastAPI: look for custom CSRF implementations or fastapi-csrf-protect
 4835:   360:  80:    - NestJS: look for @nestjs/csrf, CsrfGuard
 4836:   361:  81:    - Go (Gin/Echo): look for gorilla/csrf, nosurf
 4837:   362:  82:    - ASP.NET: look for [ValidateAntiForgeryToken], AntiForgeryToken()
 4838:   363:  83: 6. The exact CSRF field name used (e.g., "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "authenticity_token")
 4839:   364:  84: 7. ALL form fields/request body fields with: name, type, required status, and any validation rules
 4840:   365:  85: 8. Return ONLY valid JSON
 4841:   366:  86: 
 4842:   367:  87: ## Response format — return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation:
 4843:   368:  88: 
 4844:   369:  89: {
 4845:   370:  90:   "framework": "laravel",
 4846:   371:  91:   "language": "PHP",
 4847:   372:  92:   "transactions": [
 4848:   373:  93:     {
 4849:   374:  94:       "id": "txn_001",
 4850:   375:  95:       "method": "POST",
 4851:   376:  96:       "endpoint": "/api/login",
 4852:   377:  97:       "description": "User authentication endpoint",
 4853:   378:  98:       "requires_auth": false,
 4854:   379:  99:       "requires_csrf": true,
 4855:   380: 100:       "csrf_field_name": "_token",
 4856:   381: 101:       "fields": [
 4857:   382: 102:         {
 4858:   383: 103:           "name": "email",
 4859:   384: 104:           "type": "email",
 4860:   385: 105:           "required": true,
 4861:   386: 106:           "description": "User email address",
 4862:   387: 107:           "validation_rules": ["required", "email", "max:255"]
 4863:   388: 108:         }
 4864:   389: 109:       ],
 4865:   390: 110:       "tags": ["auth", "csrf"]
 4866:   391: 111:     }
 4867:   392: 112:   ]
 4868:   393: 113: }
 4869:   394: 114: """
 4870:   395: 115: 
 4871:   396: 116: 
 4872:   397: 117: def chunk_content(content: str, max_chars: int) -> str:
 4873:   398: 118:     """Truncate content if too large, prioritizing route/controller files."""
 4874:   399: 119:     if len(content) <= max_chars:
 4875:   400: 120:         return content
 4876:   401: 121: 
 4877:   402: 122:     lines = content.split("\n")
 4878:   403: 123:     priority_keywords = [
 4879:   404: 124:         "route", "controller", "middleware", "csrf", "request",
 4880:   405: 125:         "form", "validate", "auth", "login", "register", "api",
 4881:   406: 126:         "POST", "GET", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"
 4882:   407: 127:     ]
 4883:   408: 128: 
 4884:   409: 129:     priority_lines = []
 4885:   410: 130:     other_lines = []
 4886:   411: 131: 
 4887:   412: 132:     for line in lines:
 4888:   413: 133:         if any(kw.lower() in line.lower() for kw in priority_keywords):
 4889:   414: 134:             priority_lines.append(line)
 4890:   415: 135:         else:
 4891:   416: 136:             other_lines.append(line)
 4892:   417: 137: 
 4893:   418: 138:     result = "\n".join(priority_lines)
 4894:   419: 139:     if len(result) < max_chars:
 4895:   420: 140:         remaining = max_chars - len(result)
 4896:   421: 141:         result += "\n" + "\n".join(other_lines)[:remaining]
 4897:   422: 142: 
 4898:   423: 143:     return result[:max_chars]
 4899:   424: 144: 
 4900:   425: 145: 
 4901:   426: 146: def call_gemini(content: str) -> dict:
 4902:   427: 147:     """Call Gemini API with the codebase content."""
 4903:   428: 148:     print(f"[Agent 2] Sending {len(content)} chars (~{len(content)//4} tokens) to Gemini AI...")
 4904:   429: 149:     start_time = time.time()
 4905:   430: 150:     
 4906:   431: 151:     payload = {
 4907:   432: 152:         "system_instruction": {
 4908:   433: 153:             "parts": [{"text": SYSTEM_PROMPT}]
 4909:   434: 154:         },
 4910:   435: 155:         "contents": [{
 4911:   436: 156:             "parts": [{
 4912:   437: 157:                 "text": f"Analyze this codebase and return the JSON:\n\n{content}"
 4913:   438: 158:             }]
 4914:   439: 159:         }],
 4915:   440: 160:         "generationConfig": {
 4916:   441: 161:             "temperature": 0.1,
 4917:   442: 162:             "maxOutputTokens": 8192,
 4918:   443: 163:             "responseMimeType": "application/json"
 4919:   444: 164:         }
 4920:   445: 165:     }
 4921:   446: 166: 
 4922:   447: 167:     for attempt in range(5):
 4923:   448: 168:         try:
 4924:   449: 169:             response = requests.post(
 4925:   450: 170:                 GEMINI_ENDPOINT,
 4926:   451: 171:                 json=payload,
 4927:   452: 172:                 headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
 4928:   453: 173:                 timeout=120
 4929:   454: 174:             )
 4930:   455: 175: 
 4931:   456: 176:             # Retry on rate limit (429) or server errors (5xx)
 4932:   457: 177:             if response.status_code in (429, 500, 502, 503):
 4933:   458: 178:                 wait_time = 30 * (attempt + 1)
 4934:   459: 179:                 print(f"[Agent 2] HTTP {response.status_code} on attempt {attempt + 1}/5.")
 4935:   460: 180:                 print(f"[Agent 2] Response: {response.text}")
 4936:   461: 181:                 print(f"[Agent 2] Waiting {wait_time}s before retry...")
 4937:   462: 182:                 time.sleep(wait_time)
 4938:   463: 183:                 continue
 4939:   464: 184: 
 4940:   465: 185:             response.raise_for_status()
 4941:   466: 186:             data = response.json()
 4942:   467: 187: 
 4943:   468: 188:             raw_text = data["candidates"][0]["content"]["parts"][0]["text"]
 4944:   469: 189:             raw_text = raw_text.strip()
 4945:   470: 190:             if raw_text.startswith("```"):
 4946:   471: 191:                 raw_text = "\n".join(raw_text.split("\n")[1:-1])
 4947:   472: 192: 
 4948:   473: 193:             elapsed = time.time() - start_time
 4949:   474: 194:             print(f"[Agent 2] Response received in {elapsed:.1f}s")
 4950:   475: 195:             return json.loads(raw_text)
 4951:   476: 196: 
 4952:   477: 197:         except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
 4953:   478: 198:             print(f"[Agent 2] Timeout on attempt {attempt + 1}/5, retrying...")
 4954:   479: 199:             time.sleep(10 * (attempt + 1))
 4955:   480: 200:         except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
 4956:   481: 201:             raise ValueError(f"Gemini returned invalid JSON: {e}")
 4957:   482: 202: 
 4958:   483: 203:     raise RuntimeError("Gemini API failed after 5 attempts")
 4959:   484: 204: 
 4960:   485: 205: 
 4961:   486: 206: def parse_result(raw: dict, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
 4962:   487: 207:     """Parse Gemini response into typed IdentificationResult."""
 4963:   488: 208:     transactions = []
 4964:   489: 209: 
 4965:   490: 210:     for t in raw.get("transactions", []):
 4966:   491: 211:         fields = [
 4967:   492: 212:             TransactionField(
 4968:   493: 213:                 name=f["name"],
 4969:   494: 214:                 type=f.get("type", "string"),
 4970:   495: 215:                 required=f.get("required", False),
 4971:   496: 216:                 description=f.get("description", ""),
 4972:   497: 217:                 validation_rules=f.get("validation_rules", []),
 4973:   498: 218:             )
 4974:   499: 219:             for f in t.get("fields", [])
 4975:   500: 220:         ]
 4976:   501: 221: 
 4977:   502: 222:         transactions.append(Transaction(
 4978:   503: 223:             id=t.get("id", f"txn_{len(transactions):03d}"),
 4979:   504: 224:             method=t["method"].upper(),
 4980:   505: 225:             endpoint=t["endpoint"],
 4981:   506: 226:             description=t.get("description", ""),
 4982:   507: 227:             requires_auth=t.get("requires_auth", False),
 4983:   508: 228:             requires_csrf=t.get("requires_csrf", False),
 4984:   509: 229:             csrf_field_name=t.get("csrf_field_name", ""),
 4985:   510: 230:             fields=fields,
 4986:   511: 231:             framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
 4987:   512: 232:             tags=t.get("tags", []),
 4988:   513: 233:         ))
 4989:   514: 234: 
 4990:   515: 235:     mutating_methods = {"POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"}
 4991:   516: 236:     return IdentificationResult(
 4992:   517: 237:         success=True,
 4993:   518: 238:         framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
 4994:   519: 239:         language=raw.get("language", "Unknown"),
 4995:   520: 240:         transactions=transactions,
 4996:   521: 241:         total_routes=len(transactions),
 4997:   522: 242:         post_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.method in mutating_methods),
 4998:   523: 243:         csrf_protected_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_csrf),
 4999:   524: 244:         auth_required_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_auth),
 5000:   525: 245:     )
 5001:   526: 246: 
 5002:   527: 247: 
 5003:   528: 248: def run(flat_file_path: str, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
 5004:   529: 249:     """
 5005:   530: 250:     Main entry point for Agent 2.
 5006:   531: 251:     
 5007:   532: 252:     Args:
 5008:   533: 253:         flat_file_path: Path to repomix output file
 5009:   534: 254:         framework_hint: Optional hint from Agent 1
 5010:   535: 255:     
 5011:   536: 256:     Returns:
 5012:   537: 257:         IdentificationResult with all transactions
 5013:   538: 258:     """
 5014:   539: 259:     try:
 5015:   540: 260:         print(f"[Agent 2] Reading: {flat_file_path}")
 5016:   541: 261:         content = Path(flat_file_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
 5017:   542: 262:         
 5018:   543: 263:         print(f"[Agent 2] Preparing context (limit: {MAX_CONTENT_CHARS} chars)...")
 5019:   544: 264:         content = chunk_content(content, MAX_CONTENT_CHARS)
 5020:   545: 265: 
 5021:   546: 266:         raw = call_gemini(content)
 5022:   547: 267:         print("[Agent 2] Parsing results...")
 5023:   548: 268:         result = parse_result(raw, framework_hint)
 5024:   549: 269: 
 5025:   550: 270:         print(f"[Agent 2] Discovering endpoints...")
 5026:   551: 271:         for txn in result.transactions:
 5027:   552: 272:             auth_icon = "🔑" if txn.requires_auth else "🔓"
 5028:   553: 273:             csrf_icon = "🔐" if txn.requires_csrf else ""
 5029:   554: 274:             print(f"[Agent 2]   ✅ {txn.method.ljust(6)} {txn.endpoint} {auth_icon} {csrf_icon}")
 5030:   555: 275:             time.sleep(0.2)  # Delay to simulate processing and make the SSE stream visible
 5031:   556: 276: 
 5032:   557: 277:         print(f"[Agent 2] ✅ Found {result.total_routes} routes total")
 5033:   558: 278:         print(f"[Agent 2]    POST/mutating: {result.post_routes}")
 5034:   559: 279:         print(f"[Agent 2]    CSRF protected: {result.csrf_protected_routes}")
 5035:   560: 280:         print(f"[Agent 2]    Auth required: {result.auth_required_routes}")
 5036:   561: 281: 
 5037:   562: 282:         # Save transactions to file
 5038:   563: 283:         output_path = Path(flat_file_path).parent / "transactions.json"
 5039:   564: 284:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
 5040:   565: 285:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
 5041:   566: 286:         print(f"[Agent 2] Saved: {output_path}")
 5042:   567: 287: 
 5043:   568: 288:         return result
 5044:   569: 289: 
 5045:   570: 290:     except Exception as e:
 5046:   571: 291:         print(f"[Agent 2] ❌ Error: {str(e)}")
 5047:   572: 292:         return IdentificationResult(
 5048:   573: 293:             success=False,
 5049:   574: 294:             framework=framework_hint,
 5050:   575: 295:             language="Unknown",
 5051:   576: 296:             transactions=[],
 5052:   577: 297:             total_routes=0,
 5053:   578: 298:             post_routes=0,
 5054:   579: 299:             csrf_protected_routes=0,
 5055:   580: 300:             auth_required_routes=0,
 5056:   581: 301:             error=str(e),
 5057:   582: 302:         )
 5058:   583: 303: 
 5059:   584: 304: 
 5060:   585: 305: if __name__ == "__main__":
 5061:   586: 306:     import sys
 5062:   587: 307:     flat_file = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/flat_codebase.txt"
 5063:   588: 308:     result = run(flat_file)
 5064:   589: 309:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 5065:   590:

 5070:   595:   2: """
 5071:   596:   3: Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent
 5072:   597:   4: Runs live HTTP requests to the target app and measures CO2 emissions.
 5073:   598:   5: """
 5074:   599:   6:

 5081:   606:  13: from codecarbon import EmissionsTracker
 5082:   607:  14: from pathlib import Path

 5084:   609:  16: from typing import Optional, Any

 5090:   615:  22: REQUEST_TIMEOUT = int(os.getenv("REQUEST_TIMEOUT", "30"))
 5091:   616:  23: DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS = float(os.getenv("DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS", "0.5"))
 5092:   617:  24:

 5116:   641:  48:     successful_requests: int
 5117:   642:  49:     failed_requests: int
 5118:   643:  50:     total_energy_kwh: float
 5119:   644:  51:     total_co2_kg: float

 5123:   648:  55: 
 5124:   649:  56: 
 5125:   650:  57: # ─── CSRF Token Extractors ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
 5126:   651:  58: 
 5127:   652:  59: def extract_csrf_from_html(html: str, field_name: str) -> Optional[str]:
 5128:   653:  60:     """Extract CSRF token from HTML hidden input."""
 5129:   654:  61:     soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "html.parser")
 5130:   655:  62: 
 5131:   656:  63:     # Try direct name match
 5132:   657:  64:     token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": field_name})
 5133:   658:  65:     if token_input:
 5134:   659:  66:         return token_input.get("value")
 5135:   660:  67: 
 5136:   661:  68:     # Try meta tag (common in SPAs)
 5137:   662:  69:     meta = soup.find("meta", {"name": field_name})
 5138:   663:  70:     if meta:
 5139:   664:  71:         return meta.get("content")
 5140:   665:  72: 
 5141:   666:  73:     # Generic CSRF patterns
 5142:   667:  74:     for pattern in ["csrf", "token", "_token", "xsrf"]:
 5143:   668:  75:         token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": re.compile(pattern, re.I)})
 5144:   669:  76:         if token_input:
 5145:   670:  77:             return token_input.get("value")
 5146:   671:  78: 
 5147:   672:  79:     return None
 5148:   673:  80: 
 5149:   674:  81: 
 5150:   675:  82: def get_csrf_token(
 5151:   676:  83:     session: requests.Session,
 5152:   677:  84:     transaction_endpoint: str,
 5153:   678:  85:     csrf_field_name: str,
 5154:   679:  86:     framework: str
 5155:   680:  87: ) -> tuple[Optional[str], bool]:
 5156:   681:  88:     """
 5157:   682:  89:     Attempt to retrieve CSRF token before a mutating request.
 5158:   683:  90:     Returns (token_value, success).
 5159:   684:  91:     """
 5160:   685:  92:     form_endpoint = transaction_endpoint.replace("/api/", "/")
 5161:   686:  93:     candidates = [
 5162:   687:  94:         f"{BASE_URL}{form_endpoint}",
 5163:   688:  95:         f"{BASE_URL}/",
 5164:   689:  96:         f"{BASE_URL}/login",
 5165:   690:  97:         f"{BASE_URL}/home",
 5166:   691:  98:     ]
 5167:   692:  99: 
 5168:   693: 100:     for url in candidates:
 5169:   694: 101:         try:
 5170:   695: 102:             r = session.get(url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 5171:   696: 103:             if r.status_code == 200:
 5172:   697: 104:                 # 1. Check HTML for hidden input
 5173:   698: 105:                 token = extract_csrf_from_html(r.text, csrf_field_name)
 5174:   699: 106:                 if token:
 5175:   700: 107:                     return token, True
 5176:   701: 108: 
 5177:   702: 109:                 # 2. Check cookies (XSRF-TOKEN style, e.g., Laravel Sanctum)
 5178:   703: 110:                 for cookie_name in ["XSRF-TOKEN", "csrftoken", "csrf_token"]:
 5179:   704: 111:                     if cookie_name in session.cookies:
 5180:   705: 112:                         import urllib.parse
 5181:   706: 113:                         return urllib.parse.unquote(session.cookies[cookie_name]), True
 5182:   707: 114: 
 5183:   708: 115:                 # 3. Check response headers
 5184:   709: 116:                 for header_name in ["X-CSRF-Token", "X-XSRF-Token", "CSRF-Token"]:
 5185:   710: 117:                     if header_name in r.headers:
 5186:   711: 118:                         return r.headers[header_name], True
 5187:   712: 119: 
 5188:   713: 120:         except Exception:
 5189:   714: 121:             continue
 5190:   715: 122: 
 5191:   716: 123:     return None, False
 5192:   717: 124: 
 5193:   718: 125: 
 5194:   719: 126: # ─── Dummy Data Generator ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 5195:   720: 127: 
 5196:   721: 128: DUMMY_VALUES: dict[str, Any] = {
 5197:   722: 129:     "email":    "test@example.com",
 5198:   723: 130:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
 5199:   724: 131:     "name":     "Test User",
 5200:   725: 132:     "username": "testuser",
 5201:   726: 133:     "phone":    "+1234567890",
 5202:   727: 134:     "address":  "123 Test Street",
 5203:   728: 135:     "title":    "Test Title",
 5204:   729: 136:     "body":     "Test body content for automated testing",
 5205:   730: 137:     "content":  "Test content",
 5206:   731: 138:     "message":  "Test message",
 5207:   732: 139:     "amount":   "100.00",
 5208:   733: 140:     "price":    "99.99",
 5209:   734: 141:     "quantity": "1",
 5210:   735: 142:     "date":     "2024-01-01",
 5211:   736: 143:     "token":    "dummy_token_for_testing",
 5212:   737: 144:     "code":     "TEST123",
 5213:   738: 145:     "url":      "https://example.com",
 5214:   739: 146:     "file":     None,  # Skip file uploads
 5215:   740: 147: }
 5216:   741: 148: 
 5217:   742: 149: TYPE_DEFAULTS: dict[str, Any] = {
 5218:   743: 150:     "email":    "test@example.com",
 5219:   744: 151:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
 5220:   745: 152:     "string":   "test_value",
 5221:   746: 153:     "integer":  "1",
 5222:   747: 154:     "number":   "1",
 5223:   748: 155:     "boolean":  "true",
 5224:   749: 156:     "text":     "Test text content",
 5225:   750: 157:     "file":     None,
 5226:   751: 158: }
 5227:   752: 159: 
 5228:   753: 160: 
 5229:   754: 161: def generate_dummy_payload(fields: list[dict]) -> dict:
 5230:   755: 162:     """Generate dummy payload from field definitions."""
 5231:   756: 163:     payload = {}
 5232:   757: 164:     for f in fields:
 5233:   758: 165:         name = f["name"].lower()
 5234:   759: 166:         ftype = f.get("type", "string").lower()
 5235:   760: 167: 
 5236:   761: 168:         if ftype == "file":
 5237:   762: 169:             continue  # Skip file fields in automated testing
 5238:   763: 170: 
 5239:   764: 171:         # Try name match first
 5240:   765: 172:         value = DUMMY_VALUES.get(name)
 5241:   766: 173:         if value is None:
 5242:   767: 174:             # Try partial match
 5243:   768: 175:             for key, val in DUMMY_VALUES.items():
 5244:   769: 176:                 if key in name:
 5245:   770: 177:                     value = val
 5246:   771: 178:                     break
 5247:   772: 179: 
 5248:   773: 180:         # Fallback to type default
 5249:   774: 181:         if value is None:
 5250:   775: 182:             value = TYPE_DEFAULTS.get(ftype, "test_value")
 5251:   776: 183: 
 5252:   777: 184:         if value is not None:
 5253:   778: 185:             payload[f["name"]] = value
 5254:   779: 186: 
 5255:   780: 187:     return payload
 5256:   781: 188: 
 5257:   782: 189: 
 5258:   783: 190: # ─── Main Runner ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 5259:   784: 191: 
 5260:   785: 192: def run_transaction(
 5261:   786: 193:     session: requests.Session,
 5262:   787: 194:     transaction: dict,
 5263:   788: 195:     framework: str,
 5264:   789: 196:     tracker: EmissionsTracker
 5265:   790: 197: ) -> RequestMeasurement:
 5266:   791: 198:     """Execute a single transaction with carbon tracking."""
 5267:   792: 199:     method = transaction["method"].upper()
 5268:   793: 200:     endpoint = transaction["endpoint"]
 5269:   794: 201:     full_url = f"{BASE_URL}{endpoint}"
 5270:   795: 202: 
 5271:   796: 203:     csrf_obtained = False
 5272:   797: 204:     csrf_token = None
 5273:   798: 205: 
 5274:   799: 206:     # Get CSRF token if required
 5275:   800: 207:     if transaction.get("requires_csrf") and method in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
 5276:   801: 208:         csrf_field = transaction.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
 5277:   802: 209:         csrf_token, csrf_obtained = get_csrf_token(session, endpoint, csrf_field, framework)
 5278:   803: 210: 
 5279:   804: 211:         if csrf_token:
 5280:   805: 212:             session.headers.update({
 5281:   806: 213:                 "X-CSRF-Token": csrf_token,
 5282:   807: 214:                 "X-XSRF-Token": csrf_token,
 5283:   808: 215:             })
 5284:   809: 216: 
 5285:   810: 217:     # Build payload
 5286:   811: 218:     payload = generate_dummy_payload(transaction.get("fields", []))
 5287:   812: 219: 
 5288:   813: 220:     # Add CSRF to payload if token found
 5289:   814: 221:     if csrf_token and transaction.get("csrf_field_name"):
 5290:   815: 222:         payload[transaction["csrf_field_name"]] = csrf_token
 5291:   816: 223: 
 5292:   817: 224:     # Track energy for this request
 5293:   818: 225:     tracker.start_task(transaction["id"])
 5294:   819: 226:     start_time = time.time()
 5295:   820: 227: 
 5296:   821: 228:     try:
 5297:   822: 229:         if method == "GET":
 5298:   823: 230:             response = session.get(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 5299:   824: 231:         elif method == "POST":
 5300:   825: 232:             response = session.post(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 5301:   826: 233:         elif method == "PUT":
 5302:   827: 234:             response = session.put(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 5303:   828: 235:         elif method == "PATCH":
 5304:   829: 236:             response = session.patch(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 5305:   830: 237:         elif method == "DELETE":
 5306:   831: 238:             response = session.delete(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 5307:   832: 239:         else:
 5308:   833: 240:             raise ValueError(f"Unsupported method: {method}")
 5309:   834: 241: 
 5310:   835: 242:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
 5311:   836: 243:         emissions_data = tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
 5312:   837: 244: 
 5313:   838: 245:         return RequestMeasurement(
 5314:   839: 246:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
 5315:   840: 247:             method=method,
 5316:   841: 248:             endpoint=endpoint,
 5317:   842: 249:             full_url=full_url,
 5318:   843: 250:             status_code=response.status_code,
 5319:   844: 251:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
 5320:   845: 252:             energy_consumed_kwh=emissions_data.energy_consumed if emissions_data else 0.0,
 5321:   846: 253:             co2_emissions_kg=emissions_data.emissions if emissions_data else 0.0,
 5322:   847: 254:             success=200 <= response.status_code < 400,
 5323:   848: 255:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
 5324:   849: 256:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
 5325:   850: 257:             response_preview=response.text[:200],
 5326:   851: 258:         )
 5327:   852: 259: 
 5328:   853: 260:     except Exception as e:
 5329:   854: 261:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
 5330:   855: 262:         try:
 5331:   856: 263:             tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
 5332:   857: 264:         except Exception:
 5333:   858: 265:             pass
 5334:   859: 266: 
 5335:   860: 267:         return RequestMeasurement(
 5336:   861: 268:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
 5337:   862: 269:             method=method,
 5338:   863: 270:             endpoint=endpoint,
 5339:   864: 271:             full_url=full_url,
 5340:   865: 272:             status_code=0,
 5341:   866: 273:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
 5342:   867: 274:             energy_consumed_kwh=0.0,
 5343:   868: 275:             co2_emissions_kg=0.0,
 5344:   869: 276:             success=False,
 5345:   870: 277:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
 5346:   871: 278:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
 5347:   872: 279:             error=str(e),
 5348:   873: 280:         )
 5349:   874: 281: 
 5350:   875: 282: 
 5351:   876: 283: def run(transactions_path: str) -> CarbonResult:
 5352:   877: 284:     """
 5353:   878: 285:     Main entry point for Agent 3.
 5354:   879: 286:     
 5355:   880: 287:     Args:
 5356:   881: 288:         transactions_path: Path to transactions.json from Agent 2
 5357:   882: 289:     
 5358:   883: 290:     Returns:
 5359:   884: 291:         CarbonResult with per-request energy measurements
 5360:   885: 292:     """
 5361:   886: 293:     try:
 5362:   887: 294:         with open(transactions_path) as f:
 5363:   888: 295:             data = json.load(f)
 5364:   889: 296: 
 5365:   890: 297:         transactions = data.get("transactions", [])
 5366:   891: 298:         framework = data.get("framework", "unknown")
 5367:   892: 299: 
 5368:   893: 300:         print(f"[Agent 3] Running {len(transactions)} transactions against {BASE_URL}")
 5369:   894: 301: 
 5370:   895: 302:         session = requests.Session()
 5371:   896: 303:         session.headers.update({
 5372:   897: 304:             "Accept": "application/json, text/html",
 5373:   898: 305:             "User-Agent": "CodeCarbonAgent/1.0",
 5374:   899: 306:         })
 5375:   900: 307: 
 5376:   901: 308:         # Initialize CodeCarbon tracker
 5377:   902: 309:         tracker = EmissionsTracker(
 5378:   903: 310:             project_name="code_carbon_agent",
 5379:   904: 311:             output_dir=str(Path(transactions_path).parent),
 5380:   905: 312:             log_level="warning",
 5381:   906: 313:             save_to_file=False,
 5382:   907: 314:             tracking_mode="process",
 5383:   908: 315:         )
 5384:   909: 316:         tracker.start()
 5385:   910: 317: 
 5386:   911: 318:         measurements = []
 5387:   912: 319: 
 5388:   913: 320:         for txn in transactions:
 5389:   914: 321:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {txn['method']} {txn['endpoint']}")
 5390:   915: 322:             measurement = run_transaction(session, txn, framework, tracker)
 5391:   916: 323:             measurements.append(measurement)
 5392:   917: 324: 
 5393:   918: 325:             status_icon = "✅" if measurement.success else "❌"
 5394:   919: 326:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {status_icon} {measurement.status_code} "
 5395:   920: 327:                   f"({measurement.response_time_ms:.0f}ms, "
 5396:   921: 328:                   f"{measurement.co2_emissions_kg*1000:.4f}g CO₂)")
 5397:   922: 329: 
 5398:   923: 330:             time.sleep(DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS)
 5399:   924: 331: 
 5400:   925: 332:         tracker.stop()
 5401:   926: 333: 
 5402:   927: 334:         successful = sum(1 for m in measurements if m.success)
 5403:   928: 335:         total_energy = sum(m.energy_consumed_kwh for m in measurements)
 5404:   929: 336:         total_co2 = sum(m.co2_emissions_kg for m in measurements)
 5405:   930: 337:         avg_time = (sum(m.response_time_ms for m in measurements) / len(measurements)
 5406:   931: 338:                     if measurements else 0)
 5407:   932: 339: 
 5408:   933: 340:         result = CarbonResult(
 5409:   934: 341:             success=True,
 5410:   935: 342:             base_url=BASE_URL,
 5411:   936: 343:             total_requests=len(measurements),
 5412:   937: 344:             successful_requests=successful,
 5413:   938: 345:             failed_requests=len(measurements) - successful,
 5414:   939: 346:             total_energy_kwh=round(total_energy, 8),
 5415:   940: 347:             total_co2_kg=round(total_co2, 8),
 5416:   941: 348:             avg_response_time_ms=round(avg_time, 2),
 5417:   942: 349:             measurements=measurements,
 5418:   943: 350:         )
 5419:   944: 351: 
 5420:   945: 352:         # Save carbon report
 5421:   946: 353:         output_path = Path(transactions_path).parent / "carbon_report.json"
 5422:   947: 354:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
 5423:   948: 355:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
 5424:   949: 356:         print(f"[Agent 3] ✅ Saved: {output_path}")
 5425:   950: 357: 
 5426:   951: 358:         return result
 5427:   952: 359: 
 5428:   953: 360:     except Exception as e:
 5429:   954: 361:         return CarbonResult(
 5430:   955: 362:             success=False,
 5431:   956: 363:             base_url=BASE_URL,
 5432:   957: 364:             total_requests=0,
 5433:   958: 365:             successful_requests=0,
 5434:   959: 366:             failed_requests=0,
 5435:   960: 367:             total_energy_kwh=0.0,
 5436:   961: 368:             total_co2_kg=0.0,
 5437:   962: 369:             avg_response_time_ms=0.0,
 5438:   963: 370:             measurements=[],
 5439:   964: 371:             error=str(e),
 5440:   965: 372:         )
 5441:   966: 373: 
 5442:   967: 374: 
 5443:   968: 375: if __name__ == "__main__":
 5444:   969: 376:     import sys
 5445:   970: 377:     txn_path = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/transactions.json"
 5446:   971: 378:     result = run(txn_path)
 5447:   972: 379:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))

 5588:  1113: 137: def slugify(text: str) -> str:
 5589:  1114: 138:     """Convert endpoint path to test function name."""
 5590:  1115: 139:     return re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]", "_", text.lower()).strip("_")
 5591:  1116: 140: 
 5592:  1117: 141: 
 5593:  1118: 142: def generate_unit_tests(transactions: list[dict], framework: str) -> str:
 5594:  1119: 143:     """Generate unit test file content for the given framework."""
 5595:  1120: 144:     template = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])
 5596:  1121: 145:     lines = [template["header"]]
 5597:  1122: 146: 
 5598:  1123: 147:     mutating = ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]
 5599:  1124: 148:     test_transactions = [t for t in transactions if t["method"] in mutating]
 5600:  1125: 149: 
 5601:  1126: 150:     if not test_transactions:
 5602:  1127: 151:         test_transactions = transactions  # Include all if no mutating found
 5603:  1128: 152: 
 5604:  1129: 153:     for txn in test_transactions:
 5605:  1130: 154:         method = txn["method"].upper()
 5606:  1131: 155:         endpoint = txn["endpoint"]
 5607:  1132: 156:         slug = slugify(endpoint)
 5608:  1133: 157:         fields = txn.get("fields", [])
 5609:  1134: 158:         requires_csrf = txn.get("requires_csrf", False)
 5610:  1135: 159:         requires_auth = txn.get("requires_auth", False)
 5611:  1136: 160:         description = txn.get("description", "Auto-generated test")
 5612:  1137: 161: 
 5613:  1138: 162:         # Format fields
 5614:  1139: 163:         field_lines = []
 5615:  1140: 164:         for f in fields[:10]:  # Max 10 fields
 5616:  1141: 165:             name = f["name"]
 5617:  1142: 166:             ftype = f.get("type", "string")
 5618:  1143: 167:             if framework in ("laravel", "django"):
 5619:  1144: 168:                 if ftype == "email":
 5620:  1145: 169:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'test@example.com',")
 5621:  1146: 170:                 elif ftype == "password":
 5622:  1147: 171:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'TestPassword123!',")
 5623:  1148: 172:                 else:
 5624:  1149: 173:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'test_value',")
 5625:  1150: 174:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
 5626:  1151: 175:                 if ftype == "email":
 5627:  1152: 176:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "test@example.com",')
 5628:  1153: 177:                 elif ftype == "password":
 5629:  1154: 178:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "TestPassword123!",')
 5630:  1155: 179:                 else:
 5631:  1156: 180:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "test_value",')
 5632:  1157: 181: 
 5633:  1158: 182:         fields_str = "\n".join(field_lines)
 5634:  1159: 183: 
 5635:  1160: 184:         # Auth setup
 5636:  1161: 185:         if requires_auth:
 5637:  1162: 186:             if framework == "laravel":
 5638:  1163: 187:                 auth_setup = "$this->actingAs(User::factory()->create());"
 5639:  1164: 188:             elif framework == "django":
 5640:  1165: 189:                 auth_setup = "self.client.force_login(User.objects.create_user('testuser', 'test@test.com', 'pass'))"
 5641:  1166: 190:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
 5642:  1167: 191:                 auth_setup = "// TODO: Set Authorization header with valid JWT token"
 5643:  1168: 192:             else:
 5644:  1169: 193:                 auth_setup = "// TODO: Setup authentication"
 5645:  1170: 194:         else:
 5646:  1171: 195:             auth_setup = ""
 5647:  1172: 196: 
 5648:  1173: 197:         # CSRF setup
 5649:  1174: 198:         if requires_csrf:
 5650:  1175: 199:             csrf_field_name = txn.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
 5651:  1176: 200:             if framework == "laravel":
 5652:  1177: 201:                 csrf_field = f"'{csrf_field_name}' => csrf_token(),"
 5653:  1178: 202:                 csrf_kwarg = ""
 5654:  1179: 203:                 csrf_header = ""
 5655:  1180: 204:             elif framework == "django":
 5656:  1181: 205:                 csrf_field = ""
 5657:  1182: 206:                 csrf_kwarg = ", enforce_csrf_checks=False"
 5658:  1183: 207:                 csrf_header = ""
 5659:  1184: 208:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
 5660:  1185: 209:                 csrf_field = ""
 5661:  1186: 210:                 csrf_kwarg = ""
 5662:  1187: 211:                 csrf_header = f'.set("X-CSRF-Token", "test-csrf-token")'
 5663:  1188: 212:             else:
 5664:  1189: 213:                 csrf_field = ""
 5665:  1190: 214:                 csrf_kwarg = ""
 5666:  1191: 215:                 csrf_header = ""
 5667:  1192: 216:         else:
 5668:  1193: 217:             csrf_field = ""
 5669:  1194: 218:             csrf_kwarg = ""
 5670:  1195: 219:             csrf_header = ""
 5671:  1196: 220: 
 5672:  1197: 221:         expected_status = 201 if method == "POST" else 200
 5673:  1198: 222: 
 5674:  1199: 223:         test_case = template["test_case"].format(
 5675:  1200: 224:             method=method,
 5676:  1201: 225:             method_lower=method.lower(),
 5677:  1202: 226:             endpoint=endpoint,
 5678:  1203: 227:             endpoint_slug=slug,
 5679:  1204: 228:             EndpointCamel="".join(w.capitalize() for w in slug.split("_")),
 5680:  1205: 229:             description=description,
 5681:  1206: 230:             auth_setup=auth_setup,
 5682:  1207: 231:             fields=fields_str,
 5683:  1208: 232:             csrf_field=csrf_field,
 5684:  1209: 233:             csrf_kwarg=csrf_kwarg,

 5687:  1212: 236:             expected_status_name="Ok" if expected_status == 200 else "Created",
 5688:  1213: 237:         )
 5689:  1214: 238: 
 5690:  1215: 239:         lines.append(test_case)
 5691:  1216: 240: 
 5692:  1217: 241:     lines.append(template["footer"])
 5693:  1218: 242:     return "".join(lines)
 5694:  1219: 243: 
 5695:  1220: 244: 
 5696:  1221: 245: # ─── Markdown Report Builder ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
 5697:  1222: 246: 
 5698:  1223: 247: def build_report(
 5699:  1224: 248:     ingestion: dict,
 5700:  1225: 249:     identification: dict,
 5701:  1226: 250:     carbon: dict,
 5702:  1227: 251:     output_dir: str,
 5703:  1228: 252: ) -> str:
 5704:  1229: 253:     """Build full Markdown report."""
 5705:  1230: 254: 
 5706:  1231: 255:     now = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
 5707:  1232: 256:     framework = identification.get("framework", "unknown")
 5708:  1233: 257:     language = identification.get("language", "Unknown")
 5709:  1234: 258:     transactions = identification.get("transactions", [])
 5710:  1235: 259:     measurements = {m["transaction_id"]: m for m in carbon.get("measurements", [])}
 5711:  1236: 260: 
 5712:  1237: 261:     lines = [
 5713:  1238: 262:         f"# 🤖 Code Carbon Report",
 5714:  1239: 263:         f"",
 5715:  1240: 264:         f"> Generated: `{now}`",
 5716:  1241: 265:         f"> Source: `{ingestion.get('source_path', 'N/A')}`",
 5717:  1242: 266:         f"> Framework: `{framework}` · Language: `{language}`",
 5718:  1243: 267:         f"",
 5719:  1244: 268:         f"---",
 5720:  1245: 269:         f"",
 5721:  1246: 270:         f"## 📊 Executive Summary",
 5722:  1247: 271:         f"",
 5723:  1248: 272:         f"| Metric | Value |",
 5724:  1249: 273:         f"|--------|-------|",
 5725:  1250: 274:         f"| Total Routes | `{identification.get('total_routes', 0)}` |",
 5726:  1251: 275:         f"| POST/Mutating | `{identification.get('post_routes', 0)}` |",
 5727:  1252: 276:         f"| CSRF Protected | `{identification.get('csrf_protected_routes', 0)}` |",
 5728:  1253: 277:         f"| Auth Required | `{identification.get('auth_required_routes', 0)}` |",
 5729:  1254: 278:         f"| Successful Requests | `{carbon.get('successful_requests', 0)}/{carbon.get('total_requests', 0)}` |",
 5730:  1255: 279:         f"| Total Energy | `{carbon.get('total_energy_kwh', 0):.8f} kWh` |",
 5731:  1256: 280:         f"| Total CO₂ | `{carbon.get('total_co2_kg', 0)*1000:.4f} g` |",
 5732:  1257: 281:         f"| Avg Response Time | `{carbon.get('avg_response_time_ms', 0):.1f} ms` |",
 5733:  1258: 282:         f"",
 5734:  1259: 283:         f"---",
 5735:  1260: 284:         f"",
 5736:  1261: 285:         f"## 🔍 Transaction Analysis",
 5737:  1262: 286:         f"",
 5738:  1263: 287:     ]
 5739:  1264: 288: 
 5740:  1265: 289:     # Group by method
 5741:  1266: 290:     for method in ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
 5742:  1267: 291:         method_txns = [t for t in transactions if t["method"] == method]
 5743:  1268: 292:         if not method_txns:
 5744:  1269: 293:             continue
 5745:  1270: 294: 
 5746:  1271: 295:         icon = {"GET": "🔵", "POST": "🟢", "PUT": "🟡", "PATCH": "🟠", "DELETE": "🔴"}.get(method, "⚪")
 5747:  1272: 296:         lines.append(f"### {icon} {method} Endpoints ({len(method_txns)})")
 5748:  1273: 297:         lines.append("")
 5749:  1274: 298: 
 5750:  1275: 299:         for txn in method_txns:
 5751:  1276: 300:             m = measurements.get(txn["id"], {})
 5752:  1277: 301:             status = m.get("status_code", "—")
 5753:  1278: 302:             rtime = m.get("response_time_ms", 0)
 5754:  1279: 303:             co2 = m.get("co2_emissions_kg", 0) * 1000
 5755:  1280: 304:             success = "✅" if m.get("success") else "❌"
 5756:  1281: 305: 
 5757:  1282: 306:             lines.append(f"#### `{txn['endpoint']}`")
 5758:  1283: 307:             lines.append(f"")
 5759:  1284: 308:             lines.append(f"- **Description:** {txn.get('description', 'N/A')}")
 5760:  1285: 309:             lines.append(f"- **Auth Required:** {'✅ Yes' if txn.get('requires_auth') else '❌ No'}")
 5761:  1286: 310:             lines.append(f"- **CSRF Protected:** {'✅ Yes' if txn.get('requires_csrf') else '❌ No'}")
 5762:  1287: 311:             if txn.get("csrf_field_name"):
 5763:  1288: 312:                 lines.append(f"- **CSRF Field:** `{txn['csrf_field_name']}`")
 5764:  1289: 313:             lines.append(f"- **Live Result:** {success} `HTTP {status}` · `{rtime:.0f}ms` · `{co2:.4f}g CO₂`")
 5765:  1290: 314: 
 5766:  1291: 315:             if txn.get("fields"):
 5767:  1292: 316:                 lines.append(f"")
 5768:  1293: 317:                 lines.append(f"**Required Fields:**")
 5769:  1294: 318:                 lines.append(f"")
 5770:  1295: 319:                 lines.append(f"| Field | Type | Required | Validation |")
 5771:  1296: 320:                 lines.append(f"|-------|------|----------|------------|")
 5772:  1297: 321:                 for f in txn["fields"]:
 5773:  1298: 322:                     req = "✅" if f.get("required") else "⬜"
 5774:  1299: 323:                     rules = ", ".join(f.get("validation_rules", [])) or "—"
 5775:  1300: 324:                     lines.append(f"| `{f['name']}` | `{f['type']}` | {req} | `{rules}` |")
 5776:  1301: 325: 
 5777:  1302: 326:             lines.append(f"")
 5778:  1303: 327: 
 5779:  1304: 328:     # CSRF Summary
 5780:  1305: 329:     lines += [
 5781:  1306: 330:         f"---",
 5782:  1307: 331:         f"",
 5783:  1308: 332:         f"## 🔐 CSRF Analysis",
 5784:  1309: 333:         f"",
 5785:  1310: 334:         f"Framework `{framework}` uses the following CSRF pattern:",
 5786:  1311: 335:         f"",
 5787:  1312: 336:     ]
 5788:  1313: 337: 
 5789:  1314: 338:     csrf_txns = [t for t in transactions if t.get("requires_csrf")]
 5790:  1315: 339:     if csrf_txns:
 5791:  1316: 340:         csrf_fields = list(set(t.get("csrf_field_name", "") for t in csrf_txns if t.get("csrf_field_name")))
 5792:  1317: 341:         for cf in csrf_fields:
 5793:  1318: 342:             lines.append(f"- CSRF field name: **`{cf}`**")
 5794:  1319: 343:         lines.append("")
 5795:  1320: 344:         lines.append("Endpoints with CSRF protection:")
 5796:  1321: 345:         for t in csrf_txns:
 5797:  1322: 346:             lines.append(f"- `{t['method']} {t['endpoint']}`")
 5798:  1323: 347:     else:
 5799:  1324: 348:         lines.append("_No CSRF-protected endpoints detected._")
 5800:  1325: 349: 
 5801:  1326: 350:     lines += [
 5802:  1327: 351:         f"",
 5803:  1328: 352:         f"---",
 5804:  1329: 353:         f"",
 5805:  1330: 354:         f"## 🌱 Carbon Footprint Analysis",
 5806:  1331: 355:         f"",
 5807:  1332: 356:         f"| Endpoint | Method | Status | Energy (kWh) | CO₂ (g) | Time (ms) |",
 5808:  1333: 357:         f"|----------|--------|--------|-------------|---------|-----------| ",
 5809:  1334: 358:     ]
 5810:  1335: 359: 
 5811:  1336: 360:     for m in carbon.get("measurements", []):
 5812:  1337: 361:         co2_g = m["co2_emissions_kg"] * 1000
 5813:  1338: 362:         icon = "✅" if m["success"] else "❌"
 5814:  1339: 363:         lines.append(
 5815:  1340: 364:             f"| `{m['endpoint']}` | `{m['method']}` | {icon} `{m['status_code']}` "
 5816:  1341: 365:             f"| `{m['energy_consumed_kwh']:.8f}` | `{co2_g:.4f}` | `{m['response_time_ms']:.0f}` |"
 5817:  1342: 366:         )
 5818:  1343: 367: 
 5819:  1344: 368:     lines += [
 5820:  1345: 369:         f"",
 5821:  1346: 370:         f"---",
 5822:  1347: 371:         f"",
 5823:  1348: 372:         f"## 🔧 Refactoring Recommendations",
 5824:  1349: 373:         f"",
 5825:  1350: 374:     ]
 5826:  1351: 375: 
 5827:  1352: 376:     # Auto recommendations
 5828:  1353: 377:     recs = []
 5829:  1354: 378: 
 5830:  1355: 379:     slow_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if m["response_time_ms"] > 1000]
 5831:  1356: 380:     if slow_txns:
 5832:  1357: 381:         recs.append(f"**⚠️ Slow endpoints detected** ({len(slow_txns)} endpoint > 1000ms):")
 5833:  1358: 382:         for m in slow_txns:
 5834:  1359: 383:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` ({m['response_time_ms']:.0f}ms) — consider caching or query optimization")
 5835:  1360: 384: 
 5836:  1361: 385:     failed_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if not m["success"]]
 5837:  1362: 386:     if failed_txns:
 5838:  1363: 387:         recs.append(f"**❌ Failed requests** ({len(failed_txns)} endpoints returned error):")
 5839:  1364: 388:         for m in failed_txns:
 5840:  1365: 389:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` → HTTP {m['status_code']}")
 5841:  1366: 390: 
 5842:  1367: 391:     unprotected_mutating = [
 5843:  1368: 392:         t for t in transactions
 5844:  1369: 393:         if t["method"] in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]
 5845:  1370: 394:         and not t.get("requires_csrf")
 5846:  1371: 395:         and not t.get("requires_auth")
 5847:  1372: 396:     ]
 5848:  1373: 397:     if unprotected_mutating:
 5849:  1374: 398:         recs.append(f"**🔓 Unprotected mutating endpoints** — no CSRF or auth:")
 5850:  1375: 399:         for t in unprotected_mutating:
 5851:  1376: 400:             recs.append(f"  - `{t['method']} {t['endpoint']}`")
 5852:  1377: 401: 
 5853:  1378: 402:     if not recs:
 5854:  1379: 403:         recs.append("✅ No critical issues detected. Code looks clean!")
 5855:  1380: 404: 
 5856:  1381: 405:     for rec in recs:
 5857:  1382: 406:         lines.append(rec)
 5858:  1383: 407:         lines.append("")
 5859:  1384: 408: 
 5860:  1385: 409:     lines += [
 5861:  1386: 410:         f"---",
 5862:  1387: 411:         f"",
 5863:  1388: 412:         f"## 🧪 Generated Unit Tests",
 5864:  1389: 413:         f"",
 5865:  1390: 414:         f"Unit test files have been saved to `{output_dir}/tests/`",
 5866:  1391: 415:         f"",
 5867:  1392: 416:         f"| File | Framework | Test Count |",
 5868:  1393: 417:         f"|------|-----------|------------|",
 5869:  1394: 418:         f"| `GeneratedTransactionTest.{UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES['express'])['ext']}` | `{framework}` | `{identification.get('post_routes', 0)}` |",
 5870:  1395: 419:         f"",
 5871:  1396: 420:         f"---",
 5872:  1397: 421:         f"",
 5873:  1398: 422:         f"_Report generated by Multi-Agent Code Carbon System_",
 5874:  1399: 423:     ]
 5875:  1400: 424: 
 5876:  1401: 425:     return "\n".join(lines)
 5877:  1402: 426: 
 5878:  1403: 427: 
 5879:  1404: 428: def run(output_dir: str = "./output") -> str:
 5880:  1405: 429:     """
 5881:  1406: 430:     Main entry point for Agent 4.
 5882:  1407: 431:     
 5883:  1408: 432:     Args:
 5884:  1409: 433:         output_dir: Directory containing all agent outputs
 5885:  1410: 434:     
 5886:  1411: 435:     Returns:
 5887:  1412: 436:         Path to the generated report
 5888:  1413: 437:     """
 5889:  1414: 438:     os.makedirs(REPORT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
 5890:  1415: 439:     os.makedirs(f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests", exist_ok=True)
 5891:  1416: 440: 
 5892:  1417: 441:     # Load all agent outputs
 5893:  1418: 442:     with open(f"{output_dir}/transactions.json") as f:
 5894:  1419: 443:         identification = json.load(f)
 5895:  1420: 444: 
 5896:  1421: 445:     with open(f"{output_dir}/carbon_report.json") as f:
 5897:  1422: 446:         carbon = json.load(f)
 5898:  1423: 447: 
 5899:  1424: 448:     # Agent 1 result may or may not exist
 5900:  1425: 449:     ingestion_path = Path(output_dir) / "ingestion_result.json"
 5901:  1426: 450:     if ingestion_path.exists():
 5902:  1427: 451:         with open(ingestion_path) as f:
 5903:  1428: 452:             ingestion = json.load(f)
 5904:  1429: 453:     else:
 5905:  1430: 454:         ingestion = {"source_path": output_dir}
 5906:  1431: 455: 
 5907:  1432: 456:     framework = identification.get("framework", "express")
 5908:  1433: 457: 
 5909:  1434: 458:     # Generate unit tests
 5910:  1435: 459:     print("[Agent 4] Generating unit tests...")
 5911:  1436: 460:     test_content = generate_unit_tests(identification.get("transactions", []), framework)
 5912:  1437: 461:     test_ext = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])["ext"]
 5913:  1438: 462:     test_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests/GeneratedTransactionTest.{test_ext}"
 5914:  1439: 463:     with open(test_path, "w") as f:
 5915:  1440: 464:         f.write(test_content)
 5916:  1441: 465:     print(f"[Agent 4] Unit tests saved: {test_path}")
 5917:  1442: 466: 
 5918:  1443: 467:     # Generate markdown report
 5919:  1444: 468:     print("[Agent 4] Building report...")
 5920:  1445: 469:     report_md = build_report(ingestion, identification, carbon, REPORT_DIR)
 5921:  1446: 470:     report_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/code_carbon_report.md"
 5922:  1447: 471:     with open(report_path, "w") as f:
 5923:  1448: 472:         f.write(report_md)
 5924:  1449: 473: 
 5925:  1450: 474:     print(f"[Agent 4] ✅ Report saved: {report_path}")
 5926:  1451: 475:     return report_path
 5927:  1452: 476: 
 5928:  1453: 477: 
 5929:  1454: 478: if __name__ == "__main__":
 5930:  1455: 479:     import sys
 5931:  1456: 480:     out_dir = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output"
 5932:  1457: 481:     run(out_dir)

 6406:  1931: 470:                 <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-1 tracking-tight">Laporan Diagnostik Optimasi Kode</h1>
