 6421:  1946: 485:                 <div class="stat-card">
 6422:  1947: 486:                     <div class="number text-slate-800">4</div>
 6423:  1948: 487:                     <div class="text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-semibold mt-1 uppercase tracking-wider">Prioritas Tinggi
 6424:  1949: 488:                     </div>
 6425:  1950: 489:                 </div>
 6426:  1951: 490:                 <div class="stat-card">
 6427:  1952: 491:                     <div class="number text-slate-500">4</div>
 6428:  1953: 492:                     <div class="text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-semibold mt-1 uppercase tracking-wider">Prioritas
 6429:  1954: 493:                         Menengah</div>
 6430:  1955: 494:                 </div>
 6431:  1956: 495:             </div>
 6432:  1957: 496: 
 6433:  1958: 497:             <!-- Hotspot 1 -->
 6434:  1959: 498:             <div class="hotspot">
 6435:  1960: 499:                 <div class="hotspot-header">
 6436:  1961: 500:                     <span class="severity-badge severity-HIGH">P-1</span>
 6437:  1962: 501:                     <div>
 6438:  1963: 502:                         <h3 class="text-base font-bold text-slate-800 font-mono">GET /grid-agenda</h3>
 6439:  1964: 503:                         <div class="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5">AgendaController@grid</div>
 6440:  1965: 504:                     </div>
 6441:  1966: 505:                     <div class="energy-badge">45.27 mWh</div>
 6442:  1967: 506:                 </div>
 6443:  1968: 507: 
 6444:  1969: 508:                 <div class="issue-box">
 6445:  1970: 509:                     <strong>Diagnosis:</strong> Terdeteksi pengambilan data tanpa paginasi. Pemakaian memori sangat
 6446:  1971: 510:                     tinggi dan eksekusi query lambat akibat <code>-&gt;get()</code>. Proses loop berlanjut menghasilkan
 6447:  1972: 511:                     kompleksitas berat O(N*M).
 6448:  1973: 512:                 </div>
 6449:  1974: 513: 
 6450:  1975: 514:                 <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4 my-4">
 6451:  1976: 515:                     <div class="code-block">
 6452:  1977: 516:                         <div class="code-label label-orig">Kode Asli</div>
 6453:  1978: 517:                         <pre>public function grid(Request $request)
 6454:  1979: 518: {
 6455:  1980: 519:     $month = $request-&gt;input('month', Carbon::now()-&gt;month);
 6456:  1981: 520:     $year = $request-&gt;input('year', Carbon::now()-&gt;year);
 6457:  1982: 521:     
 6458:  1983: 522:     // Inefficient read
 6459:  1984: 523:     $agendas = Agenda::whereMonth('tanggal_mulai', $month)
 6460:  1985: 524:                     -&gt;whereYear('tanggal_mulai', $year)
 6461:  1986: 525:                     -&gt;orWhere(function($query) use ($month, $year) {
 6462:  1987: 526:                         $query-&gt;whereMonth('tanggal_deadline', $month)
 6463:  1988: 527:                               -&gt;whereYear('tanggal_deadline', $year);
 6464:  1989: 528:                     })-&gt;get();
 6465:  1990: 529:     
 6466:  1991: 530:     $calendar = $this-&gt;generateCalendar($month, $year, $agendas);
 6467:  1992: 531:     return view('pages.reference.agenda.grid', compact('calendar', 'agendas'));
 6468:  1993: 532: }</pre>
 6469:  1994: 533:                     </div>
 6470:  1995: 534:                     <div class="code-block">
 6471:  1996: 535:                         <div class="code-label label-ref">Saran Optimasi</div>
 6472:  1997: 536:                         <pre>public function grid(Request $request)
 6473:  1998: 537: {
 6474:  1999: 538:     $month = $request-&gt;input('month', Carbon::now()-&gt;month);
 6475:  2000: 539:     $year = $request-&gt;input('year', Carbon::now()-&gt;year);
 6476:  2001: 540:     
 6477:  2002: 541:     $startOfMonth = Carbon::create($year, $month, 1)-&gt;startOfDay();
 6478:  2003: 542:     $endOfMonth = Carbon::create($year, $month, 1)-&gt;endOfMonth()-&gt;endOfDay();
 6479:  2004: 543: 
 6480:  2005: 544:     // Range bounded query
 6481:  2006: 545:     $agendas = Agenda::where(function($query) use ($startOfMonth, $endOfMonth) {
 6482:  2007: 546:                         $query-&gt;where('tanggal_mulai', '&lt;=', $endOfMonth)
 6483:  2008: 547:                               -&gt;where('tanggal_deadline', '&gt;=', $startOfMonth);
 6484:  2009: 548:                     })-&gt;get();
 6485:  2010: 549: 
 6486:  2011: 550:     $agendasGroupedByDay = collect();
 6487:  2012: 551:     foreach ($agendas as $agenda) {
 6488:  2013: 552:         // O(1) structure logic
 6489:  2014: 553:     }
 6490:  2015: 554:     
 6491:  2016: 555:     $calendar = $this-&gt;generateCalendar($month, $year, $agendasGroupedByDay);
 6492:  2017: 556:     return view('pages.reference.agenda.grid', compact('calendar', 'agendas'));
 6493:  2018: 557: }</pre>
 6494:  2019: 558:                     </div>
 6495:  2020: 559:                 </div>
 6496:  2021: 560: 
 6497:  2022: 561:                 <div class="bg-slate-50 p-5 rounded border border-slate-200 mt-4 text-sm text-slate-700">
 6498:  2023: 562:                     <div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 mb-4">
 6499:  2024: 563:                         <div><strong>Perubahan Logika:</strong> Parameter query dibatasi dan menggunakan penyusunan data
 6500:  2025: 564:                             tingkat lanjut untuk akses kecepatan O(1).</div>
 6501:  2026: 565:                         <div><strong>Dampak (Delta):</strong> Penurunan drastis pemakaian siklus CPU dengan mencegah
 6502:  2027: 566:                             loop berulang pada perenderan tampilan.</div>
 6503:  2028: 567:                     </div>
 6504:  2029: 568: 
 6505:  2030: 569:                     <div class="border-t border-slate-200 pt-3 mt-2">
 6506:  2031: 570:                         <strong class="block mb-2 text-slate-800">Penjelasan Teknis:</strong>
 6507:  2032: 571:                         <ol class="list-decimal pl-5 space-y-1 text-slate-600">
 6508:  2033: 572:                             <li>Mengganti pencocokan tanggal luas dengan perbandingan timestamp yang ketat.</li>
 6509:  2034: 573:                             <li>Mengaplikasikan memori kelompok (*memory grouping*) untuk mencegah loop berlebih saat
 6510:  2035: 574:                                 kalender dimuat.</li>
 6511:  2036: 575:                         </ol>
 6512:  2037: 576:                     </div>
 6513:  2038: 577:                 </div>
 6514:  2039: 578:             </div>
 6515:  2040: 579: 
 6516:  2041: 580:             <!-- Hotspot 2 -->
 6517:  2042: 581:             <div class="hotspot">
 6518:  2043: 582:                 <div class="hotspot-header">
 6519:  2044: 583:                     <span class="severity-badge severity-HIGH">P-1</span>
 6520:  2045: 584:                     <div>
 6521:  2046: 585:                         <h3 class="text-base font-bold text-slate-800 font-mono">GET /logo</h3>
 6522:  2047: 586:                         <div class="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5">LogoController@index</div>
 6523:  2048: 587:                     </div>
 6524:  2049: 588:                     <div class="energy-badge">42.22 mWh</div>
 6525:  2050: 589:                 </div>
 6526:  2051: 590: 
 6527:  2052: 591:                 <div class="issue-box">
 6528:  2053: 592:                     <strong>Diagnosis:</strong> Tarikan database langsung secara keseluruhan tanpa adanya batasan
 6529:  2054: 593:                     (*offset mapping*), mengakibatkan RAM membengkak.
 6530:  2055: 594:                 </div>
 6531:  2056: 595: 
 6532:  2057: 596:                 <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4 my-4">
 6533:  2058: 597:                     <div class="code-block">
 6534:  2059: 598:                         <div class="code-label label-orig">Kode Asli</div>
 6535:  2060: 599:                         <pre>public function index()
 6536:  2061: 600: {
 6537:  2062: 601:     $logos = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'logo')-&gt;get();
 6538:  2063: 602:     return view('pages.picture.logo.index', compact('logos'));
 6539:  2064: 603: }</pre>
 6540:  2065: 604:                     </div>
 6541:  2066: 605:                     <div class="code-block">
 6542:  2067: 606:                         <div class="code-label label-ref">Saran Optimasi</div>
 6543:  2068: 607:                         <pre>public function index()
 6544:  2069: 608: {
 6545:  2070: 609:     // Limit application
 6546:  2071: 610:     $logos = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'logo')-&gt;paginate(15);
 6547:  2072: 611:     return view('pages.picture.logo.index', compact('logos'));
 6548:  2073: 612: }</pre>
 6549:  2074: 613:                     </div>
 6550:  2075: 614:                 </div>
 6551:  2076: 615: 
 6552:  2077: 616:                 <div class="bg-slate-50 p-5 rounded border border-slate-200 mt-4 text-sm text-slate-700">
 6553:  2078: 617:                     <div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 mb-4">
 6554:  2079: 618:                         <div><strong>Perubahan Logika:</strong> Implementasi batas paginasi otomatis.</div>
 6555:  2080: 619:                         <div><strong>Dampak (Delta):</strong> Konsumsi memori menjadi jauh lebih ringan dan stabil pada
 6556:  2081: 620:                             bobot *payload* tetap.</div>
 6557:  2082: 621:                     </div>
 6558:  2083: 622:                 </div>
 6559:  2084: 623:             </div>
 6560:  2085: 624: 
 6561:  2086: 625:             <div
 6562:  2087: 626:                 class="text-center text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-4 pb-8 border-t border-slate-200 pt-6 uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold">
 6563:  2088: 627:                 Akhir Laporan
 6564:  2089: 628:             </div>
 6565:  2090: 629: 
 6566:  2091: 630:         </div>
 6567:  2092: 631:     </div>
 6568:  2093: 632: 
 6569:  2094: 633: 
 6570:  2095: 634:     <script>
 6571:  2096: 635:         const executionPanel = document.getElementById('executionPanel');
 6572:  2097: 636:         const pipelineStatus = document.getElementById('pipelineStatus');
 6573:  2098: 637:         const runBtn = document.getElementById('runBtn');
 6574:  2099: 638:         const reportView = document.getElementById('reportView');
 6575:  2100: 639: 
 6576:  2101: 640:         // Lock the left card's height to the right card's initial height
 6577:  2102: 641:         window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
 6578:  2103: 642:             setTimeout(() => {
 6579:  2104: 643:                 const configCard = document.getElementById('configCard');
 6580:  2105: 644:                 const execPanel = document.getElementById('executionPanel');
 6581:  2106: 645:                 if (configCard && execPanel) {
 6582:  2107: 646:                     // Reset heights to auto just in case
 6583:  2108: 647:                     configCard.style.height = 'auto';
 6584:  2109: 648:                     execPanel.style.minHeight = 'auto';
 6585:  2110: 649: 
 6586:  2111: 650:                     const maxHeight = Math.max(configCard.offsetHeight, execPanel.offsetHeight);
 6587:  2112: 651: 
 6588:  2113: 652:                     configCard.style.height = maxHeight + 'px';
 6589:  2114: 653:                     execPanel.style.minHeight = maxHeight + 'px';
 6590:  2115: 654:                 }
 6591:  2116: 655:             }, 100);
 6592:  2117: 656:         });
 6593:  2118: 657: 
 6594:  2119: 658:         async function wait(ms) { return new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); }
 6595:  2120: 659: 
 6596:  2121: 660:         function updateStep(stepId, state, msgText) {
 6597:  2122: 661:             const el = document.getElementById(`step${stepId}`);
 6598:  2123: 662:             const msgEl = document.getElementById(`s${stepId}-msg`);
 6599:  2124: 663: 
 6600:  2125: 664:             if (state === 'active') {
 6601:  2126: 665:                 el.classList.add('step-active');
 6602:  2127: 666:                 msgEl.classList.remove('hidden');
 6603:  2128: 667:                 if (msgText) msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> ${msgText}`;
 6604:  2129: 668:             } else if (state === 'done') {
 6605:  2130: 669:                 el.classList.replace('step-active', 'step-done');
 6606:  2131: 670:                 msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="text-slate-800 font-semibold">Selesai</span>`;
 6607:  2132: 671:             }
 6608:  2133: 672:         }
 6609:  2134: 673: 
 6610:  2135: 674:         async function runPipeline() {
 6611:  2136: 675:             runBtn.disabled = true;
 6612:  2137: 676:             runBtn.innerText = "Sistem Sedang Berjalan...";
 6613:  2138: 677: 
 6614:  2139: 678:             executionPanel.classList.remove('opacity-50', 'pointer-events-none');
 6615:  2140: 679:             pipelineStatus.className = 'px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded text-xs font-semibold';
 6616:  2141: 680:             pipelineStatus.innerText = 'Aktif';
 6617:  2142: 681:             reportView.classList.remove('show-view');
 6618:  2143: 682:             reportView.classList.add('hidden-view');
 6619:  2144: 683: 
 6620:  2145: 684:             // Reset
 6621:  2146: 685:             for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
 6622:  2147: 686:                 document.getElementById(`step${i}`).className = 'step-item' + (i === 4 ? ' pb-0' : '');
 6623:  2148: 687:                 document.getElementById(`s${i}-msg`).classList.add('hidden');
 6624:  2149: 688:             }
 6625:  2150: 689:             document.getElementById('s4-action').classList.add('hidden');
 6626:  2151: 690:             const consoleEl = document.getElementById('s3-console');
 6627:  2152: 691:             consoleEl.classList.add('hidden');
 6628:  2153: 692:             // Do not clear innerHTML here because it will destroy the table layout
 6629:  2154: 693: 
 6630:  2155: 694:             // Step 1
 6631:  2156: 695:             updateStep(1, 'active', 'Memindai kerangka proyek...');
 6632:  2157: 696:             await wait(2800);
 6633:  2158: 697:             updateStep(1, 'done');
 6634:  2159: 698: 
 6635:  2160: 699:             // Step 2
 6636:  2161: 700:             updateStep(2, 'active', 'Mengirim konteks ke AI...');
 6637:  2162: 701:             await wait(3500);
 6638:  2163: 702:             updateStep(2, 'done');
 6639:  2164: 703: 
 6640:  2165: 704:             // Step 3
 6641:  2166: 705:             const staticEndpoints = [
 6642:  2167: 706:                 { method: 'GET', path: '/api/users', ms: 120, status: 200 },

 6671:  2196: 735:                 { method: 'DELETE', path: '/api/buku/1', ms: 75, status: 401 },
 6672:  2197: 736:                 { method: 'GET', path: '/api/system/health', ms: 15, status: 200 },
 6673:  2198: 737:                 { method: 'POST', path: '/api/auth/logout', ms: 40, status: 200 }
 6674:  2199: 738:             ];
 6675:  2200: 739: 
 6676:  2201: 740:             const totalEndpoints = staticEndpoints.length;
 6677:  2202: 741:             updateStep(3, 'active', `Menguji (${0}/${totalEndpoints})...`);
 6678:  2203: 742:             consoleEl.classList.remove('hidden');
 6679:  2204: 743: 
 6680:  2205: 744:             let totEnergy = 0;
 6681:  2206: 745:             let totCo2 = 0;
 6682:  2207: 746:             const tableBody = document.getElementById('s3-table-body');
 6683:  2208: 747:             const tableContainer = document.getElementById('s3-table-container');
 6684:  2209: 748:             tableBody.innerHTML = ''; // reset
 6685:  2210: 749: 
 6686:  2211: 750:             for (let i = 0; i < totalEndpoints; i++) {
 6687:  2212: 751:                 const ep = staticEndpoints[i];
 6688:  2213: 752:                 document.getElementById(`s3-msg`).innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> Menguji (${i + 1}/${totalEndpoints})...`;
 6689:  2214: 753: 
 6690:  2215: 754:                 const ms = ep.ms;
 6691:  2216: 755:                 const energy = ms * 0.0001;
 6692:  2217: 756:                 const co2 = ms * 0.00003;
 6693:  2218: 757: 
 6694:  2219: 758:                 totEnergy += energy;
 6695:  2220: 759:                 totCo2 += co2;
 6696:  2221: 760: 
 6697:  2222: 761:                 const statusVal = ep.status;
 6698:  2223: 762:                 const statusHtml = `<span class="text-slate-500">[${statusVal}]</span>`;
 6699:  2224: 763: 
 6700:  2225: 764:                 const tr = document.createElement('tr');
 6701:  2226: 765:                 tr.className = "hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors";
 6702:  2227: 766:                 tr.innerHTML = `
 6703:  2228: 767:                     <td class="px-4 py-2 whitespace-nowrap font-medium text-slate-700">${ep.method}</td>
 6704:  2229: 768:                     <td class="px-4 py-2 truncate max-w-[150px] text-slate-500">${ep.path}</td>
 6705:  2230: 769:                     <td class="px-4 py-2">${statusHtml}</td>
 6706:  2231: 770:                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-400">${ms}ms</td>
 6707:  2232: 771:                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-700 font-medium">${energy.toFixed(4)}</td>
 6708:  2233: 772:                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-700 font-medium">${co2.toFixed(5)}</td>
 6709:  2234: 773:                 `;
 6710:  2235: 774: 
 6711:  2236: 775:                 tableBody.appendChild(tr);
 6712:  2237: 776:                 tableContainer.scrollTop = tableContainer.scrollHeight;
 6713:  2238: 777: 
 6714:  2239: 778:                 await wait(2000); // 2 seconds per row as requested
 6715:  2240: 779:             }
 6716:  2241: 780: 
 6717:  2242: 781:             document.getElementById('s3-tot-energy').innerText = totEnergy.toFixed(2);
 6718:  2243: 782:             document.getElementById('s3-tot-co2').innerText = totCo2.toFixed(3);
 6719:  2244: 783:             document.getElementById('s3-summary').classList.remove('hidden');
 6720:  2245: 784: 
 6721:  2246: 785:             updateStep(3, 'done');
 6722:  2247: 786: 
 6723:  2248: 787:             // Step 4
 6724:  2249: 788:             updateStep(4, 'active', 'Menyusun laporan akhir...');
 6725:  2250: 789:             await wait(3500);
 6726:  2251: 790:             updateStep(4, 'done');
 6727:  2252: 791: 
 6728:  2253: 792:             // Finish
 6729:  2254: 793:             document.getElementById('s4-action').classList.remove('hidden');
 6730:  2255: 794:             pipelineStatus.className = 'px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-100 border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 rounded text-xs font-medium';
 6731:  2256: 795:             pipelineStatus.innerText = 'Selesai';
 6732:  2257: 796: 
 6733:  2258: 797:             runBtn.disabled = false;
 6734:  2259: 798:             runBtn.innerText = "Jalankan Ulang Audit";
 6735:  2260: 799: 
 6736:  2261: 800:             // Automatically reveal report smoothly
 6737:  2262: 801:             await wait(500);
 6738:  2263: 802:             reportView.classList.remove('hidden-view');
 6739:  2264: 803:             reportView.classList.add('show-view');
 6740:  2265: 804: 
 6741:  2266: 805:             // Scroll down to the report view
 6742:  2267: 806:             setTimeout(() => {
 6743:  2268: 807:                 reportView.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
 6744:  2269: 808:             }, 100);
 6745:  2270: 809:         }
 6746:  2271: 810:     </script>

 6753:  2278: ================
 6754:  2279:  1: # 🤖 Multi-Agent Code Carbon System — Implementation Complete

 6756:  2281:  3: ## Files Created
 6757:  2282:  4: 
 6758:  2283:  5: | File | Description |
 6759:  2284:  6: |------|-------------|
 6760:  2285:  7: | [agent1_ingestion.py](file:///d:/technofest/agent1_ingestion.py) | **Agent 1** — Repository Ingestion (repomix flat bundler) |
 6761:  2286:  8: | [agent2_gemini_identifier.py](file:///d:/technofest/agent2_gemini_identifier.py) | **Agent 2** — Gemini Transaction Identifier (route/CSRF/field detection) |
 6762:  2287:  9: | [agent3_carbon.py](file:///d:/technofest/agent3_carbon.py) | **Agent 3** — Code Carbon Agent (live HTTP + energy measurement) |
 6763:  2288: 10: | [agent4_report.py](file:///d:/technofest/agent4_report.py) | **Agent 4** — Refactor Report (Markdown report + unit test generator) |
 6764:  2289: 11: | [pipeline.py](file:///d:/technofest/pipeline.py) | **Orchestrator** — Runs all 4 agents in sequence via CLI |
 6765:  2290: 12: | [server.py](file:///d:/technofest/server.py) | **Backend Server** — Flask app serving Web UI and streaming pipeline logs |
 6766:  2291: 13: | [web_ui/index.html](file:///d:/technofest/web_ui/index.html) | **Web Dashboard** — Interactive UI to run pipeline & test transactions |
 6767:  2292: 14: | [.env](file:///d:/technofest/.env) | Environment configuration (API keys, URLs) |
 6768:  2293: 15: | [requirements.txt](file:///d:/technofest/requirements.txt) | Python dependencies (Flask, Flask-CORS, CodeCarbon, etc.) |
 6769:  2294: 16: 
 6770:  2295: 17: ## Directory Structure
 6771:  2296: 18: 
 6772:  2297: 19: ```
 6773:  2298: 20: d:\technofest\
 6774:  2299: 21: ├── .env                          ← Configuration
 6775:  2300: 22: ├── requirements.txt              ← Python deps (✅ installed)
 6776:  2301: 23: ├── agent1_ingestion.py           ← Agent 1: repo → flat .txt
 6777:  2302: 24: ├── agent2_gemini_identifier.py   ← Agent 2: flat .txt → transactions.json
 6778:  2303: 25: ├── agent3_carbon.py              ← Agent 3: transactions → carbon_report.json
 6779:  2304: 26: ├── agent4_report.py              ← Agent 4: all data → markdown report + tests
 6780:  2305: 27: ├── pipeline.py                   ← Full pipeline orchestrator
 6781:  2306: 28: ├── server.py                     ← Web Backend (Flask API & SSE stream)
 6782:  2307: 29: ├── web_ui/
 6783:  2308: 30: │   └── index.html                ← Modern Web Dashboard for pipeline & testing
 6784:  2309: 31: ├── output/                       ← Agent outputs (auto-populated)
 6785:  2310: 32: └── reports/
 6786:  2311: 33:     └── tests/                    ← Generated unit tests
 6787:  2312: 34: ```
 6788:  2313: 35: 
 6789:  2314: 36: ## Quick Start (Web Dashboard)
 6790:  2315: 37: 
 6791:  2316: 38: ```bash
 6792:  2317: 39: # 1. Set your Gemini API key in .env
 6793:  2318: 40: # GEMINI_API_KEY=your_key_here
 6794:  2319: 41: 
 6795:  2320: 42: # 2. Start the Backend Server
 6796:  2321: 43: python server.py
 6797:  2322: 44: 
 6798:  2323: 45: # 3. Open your browser
 6799:  2324: 46: # Go to: http://localhost:5000
 6800:  2325: 47: ```
 6801:  2326: 48: 
 6802:  2327: 49: > **How to use the dashboard:**
 6803:  2328: 50: > 1. Enter your **Repository Path** (e.g., `C:\xampp\htdocs\my-app`) or **Git URL**.
 6804:  2329: 51: > 2. Enter the **Target Base URL** (e.g., `http://localhost:8000`).
 6805:  2330: 52: > 3. Click **Run Pipeline**.
 6806:  2331: 53: > 4. Watch the terminal logs stream in real-time.
 6807:  2332: 54: > 5. Once finished, scroll down to interact with the detected transactions!
 6808:  2333: 55: 
 6809:  2334: 56: ## Alternative: CLI Usage
 6810:  2335: 57: 
 6811:  2336: 58: ```bash
 6812:  2337: 59: # Run full pipeline via terminal
 6813:  2338: 60: python pipeline.py --source /path/to/your/app --base-url http://localhost:8000
 6814:  2339: 61: 
 6815:  2340: 62: # Skip Agent 3
 6816:  2341: 63: python pipeline.py --source https://github.com/user/repo --skip-carbon
 6817:  2342: 64: ```
 6818:  2343: 65: 
 6819:  2344: 66: > [!IMPORTANT]
 6820:  2345: 67: > Before running, update `GEMINI_API_KEY` in `.env` with your actual Gemini API key.
 6821:  2346: 68: 
 6822:  2347: 69: > [!NOTE]
 6823:  2348: 70: > All Python dependencies are already installed. `repomix` must be installed globally via `npm install -g repomix` for Agent 1 to work.
 6824:  2349: 71: 
 6825:  2350: 72: ## Supported Frameworks
 6826:  2351: 73: 
 6827:  2352: 74: Laravel · Django · Express.js · Spring Boot · Rails · FastAPI · NestJS · Go (Gin/Echo) · ASP.NET Core

 6831:  2356: ================
 6832:  2357:    1: # 🤖 Multi-Agent Code Carbon System
 6833:  2358:    2: > **Universal Code Analyzer · Transaction Detector · Carbon Auditor · Refactor Reporter**
 6834:  2359:    3: 
 6835:  2360:    4: ---
