 6852:  2377:   21: 
 6853:  2378:   22: ---
 6854:  2379:   23: 
 6855:  2380:   24: ## System Overview
 6856:  2381:   25: 
 6857:  2382:   26: System ini terdiri dari **4 agen yang bekerja secara pipeline** untuk menganalisis codebase dari berbagai framework/bahasa, mendeteksi transaksi, mengukur konsumsi energi (carbon), dan menghasilkan laporan refactoring.
 6858:  2383:   27: 
 6859:  2384:   28: ```
 6860:  2385:   29: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 6861:  2386:   30: │                     MULTI-AGENT PIPELINE                        │
 6862:  2387:   31: │                                                                 │
 6863:  2388:   32: │  [Repo/Local]  →  [Repomix]  →  [Gemini AI]  →  [Code Carbon] │
 6864:  2389:   33: │      Agent 1         ↓             Agent 2         Agent 3      │
 6865:  2390:   34: │                  flat_pack                              ↓        │
 6866:  2391:   35: │                  .txt file      transactions        energy_data  │
 6867:  2392:   36: │                                      ↓                  ↓       │
 6868:  2393:   37: │                               ┌──────────────────────────┐      │
 6869:  2394:   38: │                               │    Agent 4 — Refactor    │      │
 6870:  2395:   39: │                               │         Report           │      │
 6871:  2396:   40: │                               └──────────────────────────┘      │
 6872:  2397:   41: └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
 6873:  2398:   42: ```
 6874:  2399:   43: 
 6875:  2400:   44: ### Supported Languages / Frameworks
 6876:  2401:   45: 
 6877:  2402:   46: | Framework | Language | CSRF Support | Unit Test |
 6878:  2403:   47: |-----------|----------|--------------|-----------|
 6879:  2404:   48: | Laravel | PHP | ✅ Auto-detect `@csrf` | PHPUnit |
 6880:  2405:   49: | Django | Python | ✅ `{% csrf_token %}` | pytest |
 6881:  2406:   50: | Express.js | JavaScript/TypeScript | ✅ `csurf` middleware | Jest |
 6882:  2407:   51: | Spring Boot | Java | ✅ `CsrfToken` | JUnit |
 6883:  2408:   52: | Rails | Ruby | ✅ `authenticity_token` | RSpec |
 6884:  2409:   53: | FastAPI | Python | ✅ Custom CSRF | pytest |
 6885:  2410:   54: | NestJS | TypeScript | ✅ `@nestjs/csrf` | Jest |
 6886:  2411:   55: | Go (Gin/Echo) | Go | ✅ `gorilla/csrf` | go test |
 6887:  2412:   56: | ASP.NET Core | C# | ✅ `[ValidateAntiForgeryToken]` | xUnit |
 6888:  2413:   57: 
 6889:  2414:   58: ---
 6890:  2415:   59: 
 6891:  2416:   60: ## Architecture Diagram
 6892:  2417:   61: 
 6893:  2418:   62: ```
 6894:  2419:   63:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
 6895:  2420:   64:                          ║   AGENT 1            ║
 6896:  2421:   65:                          ║   Repo Ingestion     ║
 6897:  2422:   66:                          ║                      ║
 6898:  2423:   67:                          ║  Input:              ║
 6899:  2424:   68:                          ║  • Local filepath    ║
 6900:  2425:   69:                          ║  • Git URL           ║
 6901:  2426:   70:                          ║  • ZIP upload        ║
 6902:  2427:   71:                          ║                      ║
 6903:  2428:   72:                          ║  Process:            ║
 6904:  2429:   73:                          ║  repomix → flat .txt ║
 6905:  2430:   74:                          ╚══════════╦═══════════╝
 6906:  2431:   75:                                     ║ flat_codebase.txt
 6907:  2432:   76:                                     ▼
 6908:  2433:   77:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
 6909:  2434:   78:                          ║   AGENT 2            ║
 6910:  2435:   79:                          ║   Gemini Identifier  ║
 6911:  2436:   80:                          ║                      ║
 6912:  2437:   81:                          ║  • Detect routes     ║
 6913:  2438:   82:                          ║  • Detect CSRF fields║
 6914:  2439:   83:                          ║  • Detect POST/PUT   ║
 6915:  2440:   84:                          ║  • Form fields map   ║
 6916:  2441:   85:                          ║  • Auth endpoints    ║
 6917:  2442:   86:                          ╚══════════╦═══════════╝
 6918:  2443:   87:                                     ║ transactions.json
 6919:  2444:   88:                                     ▼
 6920:  2445:   89:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
 6921:  2446:   90:                          ║   AGENT 3            ║
 6922:  2447:   91:                          ║   Code Carbon        ║
 6923:  2448:   92:                          ║                      ║
 6924:  2449:   93:                          ║  • Run live requests ║
 6925:  2450:   94:                          ║  • Measure energy    ║
 6926:  2451:   95:                          ║  • Track CO₂ per req ║
 6927:  2452:   96:                          ║  • Perf profiling    ║
 6928:  2453:   97:                          ╚══════════╦═══════════╝
 6929:  2454:   98:                                     ║ carbon_report.json
 6930:  2455:   99:                                     ▼
 6931:  2456:  100:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
 6932:  2457:  101:                          ║   AGENT 4            ║
 6933:  2458:  102:                          ║   Refactor Report    ║
 6934:  2459:  103:                          ║                      ║
 6935:  2460:  104:                          ║  • Combine all data  ║
 6936:  2461:  105:                          ║  • Suggest fixes     ║
 6937:  2462:  106:                          ║  • Generate tests    ║
 6938:  2463:  107:                          ║  • Send MD report    ║
 6939:  2464:  108:                          ╚══════════════════════╝
 6940:  2465:  109: ```
 6941:  2466:  110: 
 6942:  2467:  111: ---
 6943:  2468:  112: 
 6944:  2469:  113: ## Prerequisites
 6945:  2470:  114: 
 6946:  2471:  115: ### System Requirements
 6947:  2472:  116: 
 6948:  2473:  117: ```bash
 6949:  2474:  118: # Node.js >= 18
 6950:  2475:  119: node --version
 6951:  2476:  120: 
 6952:  2477:  121: # Python >= 3.9
 6953:  2478:  122: python3 --version
 6954:  2479:  123: 
 6955:  2480:  124: # Git
 6956:  2481:  125: git --version
 6957:  2482:  126: 
 6958:  2483:  127: # repomix (Agent 1)
 6959:  2484:  128: npm install -g repomix
 6960:  2485:  129: 
 6961:  2486:  130: # codecarbon (Agent 3)
 6962:  2487:  131: pip install codecarbon requests python-dotenv
 6963:  2488:  132: 
 6964:  2489:  133: # Optional: jq (untuk parsing JSON di terminal)
 6965:  2490:  134: # Ubuntu/Debian
 6966:  2491:  135: sudo apt install jq
 6967:  2492:  136: # macOS
 6968:  2493:  137: brew install jq
 6969:  2494:  138: ```
 6970:  2495:  139: 
 6971:  2496:  140: ### API Keys
 6972:  2497:  141: 
 6973:  2498:  142: ```bash
 6974:  2499:  143: # .env
 6975:  2500:  144: GEMINI_API_KEY=your_gemini_api_key_here
 6976:  2501:  145: TARGET_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000   # URL app yang sedang running
 6977:  2502:  146: REPOMIX_OUTPUT_DIR=./output
 6978:  2503:  147: REPORT_OUTPUT_DIR=./reports
 6979:  2504:  148: ```
 6980:  2505:  149: 
 6981:  2506:  150: ---
 6982:  2507:  151: 
 6983:  2508:  152: ## Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
 6984:  2509:  153: 
 6985:  2510:  154: ### Konsep
 6986:  2511:  155: 
 6987:  2512:  156: Agent 1 bertanggung jawab untuk **mengkonversi codebase** (baik dari path lokal maupun Git URL) menjadi satu file teks flat menggunakan **repomix**. Format flat ini kemudian dikirim ke Agent 2.
 6988:  2513:  157: 
 6989:  2514:  158: > **Kenapa repomix?** Repomix menghasilkan satu file `.txt` yang merepresentasikan seluruh struktur folder + isi file, sehingga Gemini AI dapat memahami konteks penuh codebase tanpa harus dikirim file per file.
 6990:  2515:  159: 
 6991:  2516:  160: ### File: `agent1_ingestion.py`
 6992:  2517:  161: 
 6993:  2518:  162: ```python
 6994:  2519:  163: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 6995:  2520:  164: """
 6996:  2521:  165: Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
 6997:  2522:  166: Converts local path or Git URL to a flat repomix bundle.
 6998:  2523:  167: """
 6999:  2524:  168: 
 7000:  2525:  169: import subprocess
 7001:  2526:  170: import os
 7002:  2527:  171: import sys
 7003:  2528:  172: import shutil
 7004:  2529:  173: import tempfile
 7005:  2530:  174: import json
 7006:  2531:  175: from pathlib import Path
 7007:  2532:  176: from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
 7008:  2533:  177: from typing import Optional
 7009:  2534:  178: 
 7010:  2535:  179: 
 7011:  2536:  180: @dataclass
 7012:  2537:  181: class IngestionResult:
 7013:  2538:  182:     success: bool
 7014:  2539:  183:     flat_file_path: str
 7015:  2540:  184:     source_type: str          # "local" | "git"
 7016:  2541:  185:     source_path: str
 7017:  2542:  186:     file_size_bytes: int
 7018:  2543:  187:     detected_language: str
 7019:  2544:  188:     detected_framework: str
 7020:  2545:  189:     error: Optional[str] = None
 7021:  2546:  190: 
 7022:  2547:  191: 
 7023:  2548:  192: FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES = {
 7024:  2549:  193:     "laravel":     ["artisan", "composer.json", "app/Http/Controllers"],
 7025:  2550:  194:     "django":      ["manage.py", "settings.py", "wsgi.py"],
 7026:  2551:  195:     "express":     ["package.json", "app.js", "routes/"],
 7027:  2552:  196:     "nestjs":      ["nest-cli.json", "src/main.ts"],
 7028:  2553:  197:     "springboot":  ["pom.xml", "src/main/java", "Application.java"],
 7029:  2554:  198:     "rails":       ["Gemfile", "config/routes.rb", "app/controllers"],
 7030:  2555:  199:     "fastapi":     ["main.py", "requirements.txt"],  # + fastapi in requirements
 7031:  2556:  200:     "gin":         ["go.mod", "main.go"],
 7032:  2557:  201:     "aspnet":      ["*.csproj", "Program.cs", "Startup.cs"],
 7033:  2558:  202: }
 7034:  2559:  203: 
 7035:  2560:  204: LANGUAGE_MAP = {
 7036:  2561:  205:     "laravel": "PHP",
 7037:  2562:  206:     "django": "Python",
 7038:  2563:  207:     "fastapi": "Python",
 7039:  2564:  208:     "express": "JavaScript",
 7040:  2565:  209:     "nestjs": "TypeScript",
 7041:  2566:  210:     "springboot": "Java",
 7042:  2567:  211:     "rails": "Ruby",
 7043:  2568:  212:     "gin": "Go",
 7044:  2569:  213:     "aspnet": "C#",
 7045:  2570:  214: }
 7046:  2571:  215: 
 7047:  2572:  216: 
 7048:  2573:  217: def detect_framework(path: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
 7049:  2574:  218:     """Detect framework and language from directory structure."""
 7050:  2575:  219:     for framework, signatures in FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES.items():
 7051:  2576:  220:         for sig in signatures:
 7052:  2577:  221:             check = Path(path) / sig
 7053:  2578:  222:             # Check direct file/dir
 7054:  2579:  223:             if check.exists():
 7055:  2580:  224:                 return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
 7056:  2581:  225:             # Glob pattern
 7057:  2582:  226:             if "*" in sig:
 7058:  2583:  227:                 matches = list(Path(path).glob(sig))
 7059:  2584:  228:                 if matches:
 7060:  2585:  229:                     return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
 7061:  2586:  230:     return "unknown", "Unknown"
 7062:  2587:  231: 
 7063:  2588:  232: 
 7064:  2589:  233: def clone_repo(git_url: str, target_dir: str) -> str:
 7065:  2590:  234:     """Clone a git repository to target_dir."""
 7066:  2591:  235:     print(f"[Agent 1] Cloning {git_url}...")
 7067:  2592:  236:     result = subprocess.run(
 7068:  2593:  237:         ["git", "clone", "--depth=1", git_url, target_dir],
 7069:  2594:  238:         capture_output=True, text=True
 7070:  2595:  239:     )
 7071:  2596:  240:     if result.returncode != 0:
 7072:  2597:  241:         raise RuntimeError(f"Git clone failed: {result.stderr}")
 7073:  2598:  242:     return target_dir
 7074:  2599:  243: 
 7075:  2600:  244: 
 7076:  2601:  245: def run_repomix(source_dir: str, output_path: str) -> None:
 7077:  2602:  246:     """Run repomix to create flat bundle from source_dir."""
 7078:  2603:  247:     print(f"[Agent 1] Running repomix on {source_dir}...")
 7079:  2604:  248: 
 7080:  2605:  249:     # repomix config — exclude common non-essential files
 7081:  2606:  250:     repomix_config = {
 7082:  2607:  251:         "output": {
 7083:  2608:  252:             "filePath": output_path,
 7084:  2609:  253:             "style": "plain",
 7085:  2610:  254:             "removeComments": False,
 7086:  2611:  255:             "removeEmptyLines": False,
 7087:  2612:  256:             "showLineNumbers": True,
 7088:  2613:  257:             "copyToClipboard": False,
 7089:  2614:  258:         },
 7090:  2615:  259:         "ignore": {
 7091:  2616:  260:             "useGitignore": True,
 7092:  2617:  261:             "useDefaultPatterns": True,
 7093:  2618:  262:             "customPatterns": [
 7094:  2619:  263:                 "node_modules/**",
 7095:  2620:  264:                 "vendor/**",
 7096:  2621:  265:                 ".git/**",
 7097:  2622:  266:                 "*.lock",
 7098:  2623:  267:                 "*.log",
 7099:  2624:  268:                 "dist/**",
 7100:  2625:  269:                 "build/**",
 7101:  2626:  270:                 "__pycache__/**",
 7102:  2627:  271:                 "*.pyc",
 7103:  2628:  272:                 ".env",
 7104:  2629:  273:                 "storage/**",
 7105:  2630:  274:                 "public/storage/**",
 7106:  2631:  275:             ]
 7107:  2632:  276:         }
 7108:  2633:  277:     }
 7109:  2634:  278: 
 7110:  2635:  279:     config_path = Path(source_dir) / ".repomix-config.json"
 7111:  2636:  280:     with open(config_path, "w") as f:
 7112:  2637:  281:         json.dump(repomix_config, f, indent=2)
 7113:  2638:  282: 
 7114:  2639:  283:     result = subprocess.run(
 7115:  2640:  284:         ["repomix", "--config", str(config_path), "--output", output_path, source_dir],
 7116:  2641:  285:         capture_output=True, text=True
 7117:  2642:  286:     )
 7118:  2643:  287: 
 7119:  2644:  288:     # Cleanup config
 7120:  2645:  289:     config_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
 7121:  2646:  290: 
 7122:  2647:  291:     if result.returncode != 0:
 7123:  2648:  292:         raise RuntimeError(f"repomix failed: {result.stderr}")
 7124:  2649:  293: 
 7125:  2650:  294:     print(f"[Agent 1] ✅ repomix output: {output_path}")
 7126:  2651:  295: 
 7127:  2652:  296: 
 7128:  2653:  297: def run(source: str, output_dir: str = "./output") -> IngestionResult:
 7129:  2654:  298:     """
 7130:  2655:  299:     Main entry point for Agent 1.
 7131:  2656:  300:     
 7132:  2657:  301:     Args:
 7133:  2658:  302:         source: Local directory path OR Git URL
 7134:  2659:  303:         output_dir: Where to save the flat bundle
 7135:  2660:  304:     
 7136:  2661:  305:     Returns:
 7137:  2662:  306:         IngestionResult with flat_file_path pointing to repomix output
 7138:  2663:  307:     """
 7139:  2664:  308:     os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
 7140:  2665:  309:     output_path = str(Path(output_dir) / "flat_codebase.txt")
 7141:  2666:  310:     temp_dir = None
 7142:  2667:  311: 
 7143:  2668:  312:     try:
 7144:  2669:  313:         # Determine source type
 7145:  2670:  314:         if source.startswith("http") or source.startswith("git@"):
 7146:  2671:  315:             source_type = "git"
 7147:  2672:  316:             temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="agent1_repo_")
 7148:  2673:  317:             working_dir = clone_repo(source, temp_dir)
 7149:  2674:  318:         else:
 7150:  2675:  319:             source_type = "local"
 7151:  2676:  320:             working_dir = os.path.abspath(source)
 7152:  2677:  321:             if not os.path.isdir(working_dir):
 7153:  2678:  322:                 raise ValueError(f"Directory not found: {working_dir}")
 7154:  2679:  323: 
 7155:  2680:  324:         # Detect framework
 7156:  2681:  325:         framework, language = detect_framework(working_dir)
 7157:  2682:  326:         print(f"[Agent 1] Detected: {framework} / {language}")
 7158:  2683:  327: 
 7159:  2684:  328:         # Run repomix
 7160:  2685:  329:         run_repomix(working_dir, output_path)
 7161:  2686:  330: 
 7162:  2687:  331:         file_size = Path(output_path).stat().st_size
 7163:  2688:  332: 
 7164:  2689:  333:         return IngestionResult(
 7165:  2690:  334:             success=True,
 7166:  2691:  335:             flat_file_path=output_path,
 7167:  2692:  336:             source_type=source_type,
 7168:  2693:  337:             source_path=source,
 7169:  2694:  338:             file_size_bytes=file_size,
 7170:  2695:  339:             detected_language=language,
 7171:  2696:  340:             detected_framework=framework,
 7172:  2697:  341:         )
 7173:  2698:  342: 
 7174:  2699:  343:     except Exception as e:
 7175:  2700:  344:         return IngestionResult(
 7176:  2701:  345:             success=False,
 7177:  2702:  346:             flat_file_path="",
 7178:  2703:  347:             source_type="unknown",
 7179:  2704:  348:             source_path=source,
 7180:  2705:  349:             file_size_bytes=0,
 7181:  2706:  350:             detected_language="Unknown",
 7182:  2707:  351:             detected_framework="unknown",
 7183:  2708:  352:             error=str(e),
 7184:  2709:  353:         )
 7185:  2710:  354:     finally:
 7186:  2711:  355:         if temp_dir and os.path.exists(temp_dir):
 7187:  2712:  356:             shutil.rmtree(temp_dir, ignore_errors=True)
 7188:  2713:  357: 
 7189:  2714:  358: 
 7190:  2715:  359: if __name__ == "__main__":
 7191:  2716:  360:     source = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
 7192:  2717:  361:     result = run(source)
 7193:  2718:  362:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 7194:  2719:  363: ```
 7195:  2720:  364: 
 7196:  2721:  365: ---
 7197:  2722:  366: 
 7198:  2723:  367: ## Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
 7199:  2724:  368: 
 7200:  2725:  369: ### Konsep
 7201:  2726:  370: 
 7202:  2727:  371: Agent 2 menerima file flat dari Agent 1, lalu mengirimkannya ke **Gemini AI** untuk dianalisis. Gemini akan:
 7203:  2728:  372: 
 7204:  2729:  373: - Mendeteksi semua **route/endpoint** (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH)
 7205:  2730:  374: - Mengidentifikasi **field yang wajib diisi** untuk setiap endpoint
 7206:  2731:  375: - Mendeteksi kebutuhan **CSRF token** secara otomatis per framework
 7207:  2732:  376: - Mengidentifikasi endpoint yang membutuhkan **autentikasi**
 7208:  2733:  377: - Menghasilkan **unit test skeleton** untuk transaksi POST/PUT/DELETE
 7209:  2734:  378: 
 7210:  2735:  379: ### File: `agent2_gemini_identifier.py`
 7211:  2736:  380: 
 7212:  2737:  381: ```python
 7213:  2738:  382: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 7214:  2739:  383: """
 7215:  2740:  384: Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
 7216:  2741:  385: Sends repomix bundle to Gemini AI for transaction analysis.
 7217:  2742:  386: """
 7218:  2743:  387: 
 7219:  2744:  388: import os
 7220:  2745:  389: import json
 7221:  2746:  390: import time
 7222:  2747:  391: import requests
 7223:  2748:  392: from pathlib import Path
 7224:  2749:  393: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
 7225:  2750:  394: from typing import Optional
 7226:  2751:  395: from dotenv import load_dotenv
 7227:  2752:  396: 
 7228:  2753:  397: load_dotenv()
 7229:  2754:  398: 
 7230:  2755:  399: GEMINI_API_KEY = os.getenv("GEMINI_API_KEY")
 7231:  2756:  400: GEMINI_ENDPOINT = (
 7232:  2757:  401:     f"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/"
 7233:  2758:  402:     f"gemini-1.5-pro:generateContent?key={GEMINI_API_KEY}"
 7234:  2759:  403: )
 7235:  2760:  404: 
 7236:  2761:  405: # Max chars to send to Gemini (stay under token limit)
 7237:  2762:  406: MAX_CONTENT_CHARS = 800_000
 7238:  2763:  407: 
 7239:  2764:  408: 
 7240:  2765:  409: @dataclass
 7241:  2766:  410: class TransactionField:
 7242:  2767:  411:     name: str
 7243:  2768:  412:     type: str            # "string" | "email" | "password" | "integer" | "boolean" | "file"
 7244:  2769:  413:     required: bool
 7245:  2770:  414:     description: str
 7246:  2771:  415:     validation_rules: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 7247:  2772:  416: 
 7248:  2773:  417: 
 7249:  2774:  418: @dataclass
 7250:  2775:  419: class Transaction:
 7251:  2776:  420:     id: str
 7252:  2777:  421:     method: str          # GET | POST | PUT | PATCH | DELETE
 7253:  2778:  422:     endpoint: str
 7254:  2779:  423:     description: str
 7255:  2780:  424:     requires_auth: bool
 7256:  2781:  425:     requires_csrf: bool
 7257:  2782:  426:     csrf_field_name: str  # e.g. "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "X-CSRF-Token"
 7258:  2783:  427:     fields: list[TransactionField]
 7259:  2784:  428:     framework: str
 7260:  2785:  429:     unit_test_skeleton: str = ""
 7261:  2786:  430:     tags: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 7262:  2787:  431: 
 7263:  2788:  432: 
 7264:  2789:  433: @dataclass
 7265:  2790:  434: class IdentificationResult:
 7266:  2791:  435:     success: bool
 7267:  2792:  436:     framework: str
 7268:  2793:  437:     language: str
 7269:  2794:  438:     transactions: list[Transaction]
 7270:  2795:  439:     total_routes: int
 7271:  2796:  440:     post_routes: int
 7272:  2797:  441:     csrf_protected_routes: int
 7273:  2798:  442:     auth_required_routes: int
 7274:  2799:  443:     error: Optional[str] = None
 7275:  2800:  444: 
 7276:  2801:  445: 
 7277:  2802:  446: SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
 7278:  2803:  447: You are an expert code analyzer. You will receive a flat bundle of a web application codebase.
 7279:  2804:  448: 
 7280:  2805:  449: Your task is to analyze ALL routes/endpoints and return a STRICT JSON response.
 7281:  2806:  450: 
 7282:  2807:  451: ## What to extract per endpoint:
 7283:  2808:  452: 1. HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)
 7284:  2809:  453: 2. URL path / route
 7285:  2810:  454: 3. Description of what the endpoint does
 7286:  2811:  455: 4. Whether it requires authentication (JWT, session, Bearer token, etc.)
 7287:  2812:  456: 5. Whether it requires CSRF protection — detect automatically by framework:
 7288:  2813:  457:    - Laravel: look for @csrf, csrf_field(), VerifyCsrfToken middleware, X-CSRF-TOKEN header
 7289:  2814:  458:    - Django: look for {% csrf_token %}, CsrfViewMiddleware, csrf_protect decorator
 7290:  2815:  459:    - Express.js: look for csurf, csrf(), csrfToken()
 7291:  2816:  460:    - Rails: look for authenticity_token, protect_from_forgery
 7292:  2817:  461:    - Spring Boot: look for CsrfToken, .csrf(), SecurityConfig
 7293:  2818:  462:    - FastAPI: look for custom CSRF implementations or fastapi-csrf-protect
 7294:  2819:  463:    - NestJS: look for @nestjs/csrf, CsrfGuard
 7295:  2820:  464:    - Go (Gin/Echo): look for gorilla/csrf, nosurf
 7296:  2821:  465:    - ASP.NET: look for [ValidateAntiForgeryToken], AntiForgeryToken()
 7297:  2822:  466: 6. The exact CSRF field name used (e.g., "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "authenticity_token")
 7298:  2823:  467: 7. ALL form fields/request body fields with: name, type, required status, and any validation rules
 7299:  2824:  468: 8. For POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE: generate a unit test skeleton in the framework's native test style
 7300:  2825:  469: 
 7301:  2826:  470: ## Response format — return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation:
 7302:  2827:  471: 
 7303:  2828:  472: {
 7304:  2829:  473:   "framework": "laravel",
 7305:  2830:  474:   "language": "PHP",
 7306:  2831:  475:   "transactions": [
 7307:  2832:  476:     {
 7308:  2833:  477:       "id": "txn_001",
 7309:  2834:  478:       "method": "POST",
 7310:  2835:  479:       "endpoint": "/api/login",
 7311:  2836:  480:       "description": "User authentication endpoint",
 7312:  2837:  481:       "requires_auth": false,
 7313:  2838:  482:       "requires_csrf": true,
 7314:  2839:  483:       "csrf_field_name": "_token",
 7315:  2840:  484:       "fields": [
 7316:  2841:  485:         {
 7317:  2842:  486:           "name": "email",
 7318:  2843:  487:           "type": "email",
 7319:  2844:  488:           "required": true,
 7320:  2845:  489:           "description": "User email address",
 7321:  2846:  490:           "validation_rules": ["required", "email", "max:255"]
 7322:  2847:  491:         },
 7323:  2848:  492:         {
 7324:  2849:  493:           "name": "password",
 7325:  2850:  494:           "type": "password",
 7326:  2851:  495:           "required": true,
 7327:  2852:  496:           "description": "User password",
 7328:  2853:  497:           "validation_rules": ["required", "min:8"]
 7329:  2854:  498:         }
 7330:  2855:  499:       ],
 7331:  2856:  500:       "unit_test_skeleton": "/** @test */\\npublic function test_user_can_login()\\n{\\n    $response = $this->post('/api/login', [\\n        'email' => 'test@example.com',\\n        'password' => 'password123',\\n    ]);\\n    $response->assertStatus(200);\\n}",
 7332:  2857:  501:       "tags": ["auth", "csrf"]
 7333:  2858:  502:     }
 7334:  2859:  503:   ]
 7335:  2860:  504: }
 7336:  2861:  505: """
 7337:  2862:  506: 
 7338:  2863:  507: 
 7339:  2864:  508: def chunk_content(content: str, max_chars: int) -> str:
 7340:  2865:  509:     """Truncate content if too large, prioritizing route/controller files."""
 7341:  2866:  510:     if len(content) <= max_chars:
 7342:  2867:  511:         return content
 7343:  2868:  512: 
 7344:  2869:  513:     # Try to keep the most important parts
 7345:  2870:  514:     lines = content.split("\n")
 7346:  2871:  515:     priority_keywords = [
 7347:  2872:  516:         "route", "controller", "middleware", "csrf", "request",
 7348:  2873:  517:         "form", "validate", "auth", "login", "register", "api",
 7349:  2874:  518:         "POST", "GET", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"
 7350:  2875:  519:     ]
 7351:  2876:  520: 
 7352:  2877:  521:     priority_lines = []
 7353:  2878:  522:     other_lines = []
 7354:  2879:  523: 
 7355:  2880:  524:     for line in lines:
 7356:  2881:  525:         if any(kw.lower() in line.lower() for kw in priority_keywords):
 7357:  2882:  526:             priority_lines.append(line)
 7358:  2883:  527:         else:
 7359:  2884:  528:             other_lines.append(line)
 7360:  2885:  529: 
 7361:  2886:  530:     result = "\n".join(priority_lines)
 7362:  2887:  531:     if len(result) < max_chars:
 7363:  2888:  532:         remaining = max_chars - len(result)
 7364:  2889:  533:         result += "\n" + "\n".join(other_lines)[:remaining]
 7365:  2890:  534: 
 7366:  2891:  535:     return result[:max_chars]
 7367:  2892:  536: 
 7368:  2893:  537: 
 7369:  2894:  538: def call_gemini(content: str) -> dict:
 7370:  2895:  539:     """Call Gemini API with the codebase content."""
 7371:  2896:  540:     print("[Agent 2] Sending codebase to Gemini AI...")
 7372:  2897:  541: 
 7373:  2898:  542:     payload = {
 7374:  2899:  543:         "system_instruction": {
 7375:  2900:  544:             "parts": [{"text": SYSTEM_PROMPT}]
 7376:  2901:  545:         },
 7377:  2902:  546:         "contents": [{
 7378:  2903:  547:             "parts": [{
 7379:  2904:  548:                 "text": f"Analyze this codebase and return the JSON:\n\n{content}"
 7380:  2905:  549:             }]
 7381:  2906:  550:         }],
 7382:  2907:  551:         "generationConfig": {
 7383:  2908:  552:             "temperature": 0.1,
 7384:  2909:  553:             "maxOutputTokens": 8192,
 7385:  2910:  554:             "responseMimeType": "application/json"
 7386:  2911:  555:         }
 7387:  2912:  556:     }
 7388:  2913:  557: 
 7389:  2914:  558:     for attempt in range(3):
 7390:  2915:  559:         try:
 7391:  2916:  560:             response = requests.post(
 7392:  2917:  561:                 GEMINI_ENDPOINT,
 7393:  2918:  562:                 json=payload,
 7394:  2919:  563:                 headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
 7395:  2920:  564:                 timeout=120
 7396:  2921:  565:             )
 7397:  2922:  566:             response.raise_for_status()
 7398:  2923:  567:             data = response.json()
 7399:  2924:  568: 
 7400:  2925:  569:             raw_text = data["candidates"][0]["content"]["parts"][0]["text"]
 7401:  2926:  570:             # Strip possible markdown fences
 7402:  2927:  571:             raw_text = raw_text.strip()
 7403:  2928:  572:             if raw_text.startswith("```"):
 7404:  2929:  573:                 raw_text = "\n".join(raw_text.split("\n")[1:-1])
 7405:  2930:  574: 
 7406:  2931:  575:             return json.loads(raw_text)
 7407:  2932:  576: 
 7408:  2933:  577:         except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
 7409:  2934:  578:             print(f"[Agent 2] Timeout on attempt {attempt + 1}, retrying...")
 7410:  2935:  579:             time.sleep(5 * (attempt + 1))
 7411:  2936:  580:         except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
 7412:  2937:  581:             raise ValueError(f"Gemini returned invalid JSON: {e}")
 7413:  2938:  582: 
 7414:  2939:  583:     raise RuntimeError("Gemini API failed after 3 attempts")
 7415:  2940:  584: 
 7416:  2941:  585: 
 7417:  2942:  586: def parse_result(raw: dict, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
 7418:  2943:  587:     """Parse Gemini response into typed IdentificationResult."""
 7419:  2944:  588:     transactions = []
 7420:  2945:  589: 
 7421:  2946:  590:     for t in raw.get("transactions", []):
 7422:  2947:  591:         fields = [
 7423:  2948:  592:             TransactionField(
 7424:  2949:  593:                 name=f["name"],
 7425:  2950:  594:                 type=f.get("type", "string"),
 7426:  2951:  595:                 required=f.get("required", False),
 7427:  2952:  596:                 description=f.get("description", ""),
 7428:  2953:  597:                 validation_rules=f.get("validation_rules", []),
 7429:  2954:  598:             )
 7430:  2955:  599:             for f in t.get("fields", [])
 7431:  2956:  600:         ]
 7432:  2957:  601: 
 7433:  2958:  602:         transactions.append(Transaction(
 7434:  2959:  603:             id=t.get("id", f"txn_{len(transactions):03d}"),
 7435:  2960:  604:             method=t["method"].upper(),
 7436:  2961:  605:             endpoint=t["endpoint"],
 7437:  2962:  606:             description=t.get("description", ""),
 7438:  2963:  607:             requires_auth=t.get("requires_auth", False),
 7439:  2964:  608:             requires_csrf=t.get("requires_csrf", False),
 7440:  2965:  609:             csrf_field_name=t.get("csrf_field_name", ""),
 7441:  2966:  610:             fields=fields,
 7442:  2967:  611:             framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
 7443:  2968:  612:             unit_test_skeleton=t.get("unit_test_skeleton", ""),
 7444:  2969:  613:             tags=t.get("tags", []),
 7445:  2970:  614:         ))
 7446:  2971:  615: 
 7447:  2972:  616:     mutating_methods = {"POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"}
 7448:  2973:  617:     return IdentificationResult(
 7449:  2974:  618:         success=True,
 7450:  2975:  619:         framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
 7451:  2976:  620:         language=raw.get("language", "Unknown"),
 7452:  2977:  621:         transactions=transactions,
 7453:  2978:  622:         total_routes=len(transactions),
 7454:  2979:  623:         post_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.method in mutating_methods),
 7455:  2980:  624:         csrf_protected_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_csrf),
 7456:  2981:  625:         auth_required_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_auth),
 7457:  2982:  626:     )
 7458:  2983:  627: 
 7459:  2984:  628: 
 7460:  2985:  629: def run(flat_file_path: str, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
 7461:  2986:  630:     """
 7462:  2987:  631:     Main entry point for Agent 2.
 7463:  2988:  632:     
 7464:  2989:  633:     Args:
 7465:  2990:  634:         flat_file_path: Path to repomix output file
 7466:  2991:  635:         framework_hint: Optional hint from Agent 1
 7467:  2992:  636:     
 7468:  2993:  637:     Returns:
 7469:  2994:  638:         IdentificationResult with all transactions
 7470:  2995:  639:     """
 7471:  2996:  640:     try:
 7472:  2997:  641:         content = Path(flat_file_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
 7473:  2998:  642:         content = chunk_content(content, MAX_CONTENT_CHARS)
 7474:  2999:  643: 
 7475:  3000:  644:         raw = call_gemini(content)
 7476:  3001:  645:         result = parse_result(raw, framework_hint)
 7477:  3002:  646: 
 7478:  3003:  647:         print(f"[Agent 2] ✅ Found {result.total_routes} routes")
 7479:  3004:  648:         print(f"[Agent 2]    POST/mutating: {result.post_routes}")
 7480:  3005:  649:         print(f"[Agent 2]    CSRF protected: {result.csrf_protected_routes}")
 7481:  3006:  650:         print(f"[Agent 2]    Auth required: {result.auth_required_routes}")
 7482:  3007:  651: 
 7483:  3008:  652:         # Save transactions to file
 7484:  3009:  653:         output_path = Path(flat_file_path).parent / "transactions.json"
 7485:  3010:  654:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
 7486:  3011:  655:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
 7487:  3012:  656:         print(f"[Agent 2] Saved: {output_path}")
 7488:  3013:  657: 
 7489:  3014:  658:         return result
 7490:  3015:  659: 
 7491:  3016:  660:     except Exception as e:
 7492:  3017:  661:         return IdentificationResult(
 7493:  3018:  662:             success=False,
 7494:  3019:  663:             framework=framework_hint,
 7495:  3020:  664:             language="Unknown",
 7496:  3021:  665:             transactions=[],
 7497:  3022:  666:             total_routes=0,
 7498:  3023:  667:             post_routes=0,
 7499:  3024:  668:             csrf_protected_routes=0,
 7500:  3025:  669:             auth_required_routes=0,
 7501:  3026:  670:             error=str(e),
 7502:  3027:  671:         )
 7503:  3028:  672: 
 7504:  3029:  673: 
 7505:  3030:  674: if __name__ == "__main__":
 7506:  3031:  675:     import sys
 7507:  3032:  676:     flat_file = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/flat_codebase.txt"
 7508:  3033:  677:     result = run(flat_file)
 7509:  3034:  678:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 7510:  3035:  679: ```
 7511:  3036:  680: 
 7512:  3037:  681: ---
 7513:  3038:  682: 
 7514:  3039:  683: ## Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent (Live Runner)
 7515:  3040:  684: 
 7516:  3041:  685: ### Konsep
 7517:  3042:  686: 
 7518:  3043:  687: Agent 3 menerima `transactions.json` dari Agent 2 dan mengeksekusi **HTTP requests nyata** ke aplikasi yang sedang berjalan. Setiap request diukur menggunakan **CodeCarbon** untuk melacak konsumsi energi dan emisi CO₂.
 7519:  3044:  688: 
 7520:  3045:  689: Untuk endpoint yang membutuhkan CSRF, agent ini secara otomatis:
 7521:  3046:  690: 1. Melakukan GET request ke halaman login/form terlebih dahulu
 7522:  3047:  691: 2. Mengekstrak CSRF token dari response (cookie, header, atau HTML hidden input)
 7523:  3048:  692: 3. Menyertakan token tersebut di request POST
 7524:  3049:  693: 
 7525:  3050:  694: ### File: `agent3_carbon.py`
 7526:  3051:  695: 
 7527:  3052:  696: ```python
 7528:  3053:  697: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 7529:  3054:  698: """
 7530:  3055:  699: Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent
 7531:  3056:  700: Runs live HTTP requests to the target app and measures CO2 emissions.
 7532:  3057:  701: """
 7533:  3058:  702: 
 7534:  3059:  703: import os
 7535:  3060:  704: import json
 7536:  3061:  705: import time
 7537:  3062:  706: import re
 7538:  3063:  707: import requests
 7539:  3064:  708: from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
 7540:  3065:  709: from codecarbon import EmissionsTracker
 7541:  3066:  710: from pathlib import Path
 7542:  3067:  711: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
 7543:  3068:  712: from typing import Optional, Any
 7544:  3069:  713: from dotenv import load_dotenv
 7545:  3070:  714: 
 7546:  3071:  715: load_dotenv()
 7547:  3072:  716: 
 7548:  3073:  717: BASE_URL = os.getenv("TARGET_BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
 7549:  3074:  718: REQUEST_TIMEOUT = int(os.getenv("REQUEST_TIMEOUT", "30"))
 7550:  3075:  719: DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS = float(os.getenv("DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS", "0.5"))
 7551:  3076:  720: 
 7552:  3077:  721: 
 7553:  3078:  722: @dataclass
 7554:  3079:  723: class RequestMeasurement:
 7555:  3080:  724:     transaction_id: str
 7556:  3081:  725:     method: str
 7557:  3082:  726:     endpoint: str
 7558:  3083:  727:     full_url: str
 7559:  3084:  728:     status_code: int
 7560:  3085:  729:     response_time_ms: float
 7561:  3086:  730:     energy_consumed_kwh: float
 7562:  3087:  731:     co2_emissions_kg: float
 7563:  3088:  732:     success: bool
 7564:  3089:  733:     csrf_obtained: bool
 7565:  3090:  734:     fields_sent: list[str]
 7566:  3091:  735:     error: Optional[str] = None
 7567:  3092:  736:     response_preview: str = ""
 7568:  3093:  737: 
 7569:  3094:  738: 
 7570:  3095:  739: @dataclass
 7571:  3096:  740: class CarbonResult:
 7572:  3097:  741:     success: bool
 7573:  3098:  742:     base_url: str
 7574:  3099:  743:     total_requests: int
 7575:  3100:  744:     successful_requests: int
 7576:  3101:  745:     failed_requests: int
 7577:  3102:  746:     total_energy_kwh: float
 7578:  3103:  747:     total_co2_kg: float
 7579:  3104:  748:     avg_response_time_ms: float
 7580:  3105:  749:     measurements: list[RequestMeasurement]
 7581:  3106:  750:     error: Optional[str] = None
 7582:  3107:  751: 
 7583:  3108:  752: 
 7584:  3109:  753: # ─── CSRF Token Extractors ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
 7585:  3110:  754: 
 7586:  3111:  755: def extract_csrf_from_html(html: str, field_name: str) -> Optional[str]:
 7587:  3112:  756:     """Extract CSRF token from HTML hidden input."""
 7588:  3113:  757:     soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "html.parser")
 7589:  3114:  758: 
 7590:  3115:  759:     # Try direct name match
 7591:  3116:  760:     token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": field_name})
 7592:  3117:  761:     if token_input:
 7593:  3118:  762:         return token_input.get("value")
 7594:  3119:  763: 
 7595:  3120:  764:     # Try meta tag (common in SPAs)
 7596:  3121:  765:     meta = soup.find("meta", {"name": field_name})
 7597:  3122:  766:     if meta:
 7598:  3123:  767:         return meta.get("content")
 7599:  3124:  768: 
 7600:  3125:  769:     # Generic CSRF patterns
 7601:  3126:  770:     for pattern in ["csrf", "token", "_token", "xsrf"]:
 7602:  3127:  771:         token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": re.compile(pattern, re.I)})
 7603:  3128:  772:         if token_input:
 7604:  3129:  773:             return token_input.get("value")
 7605:  3130:  774: 
 7606:  3131:  775:     return None
 7607:  3132:  776: 
 7608:  3133:  777: 
 7609:  3134:  778: def get_csrf_token(
 7610:  3135:  779:     session: requests.Session,
 7611:  3136:  780:     transaction_endpoint: str,
 7612:  3137:  781:     csrf_field_name: str,
 7613:  3138:  782:     framework: str
 7614:  3139:  783: ) -> tuple[Optional[str], bool]:
 7615:  3140:  784:     """
 7616:  3141:  785:     Attempt to retrieve CSRF token before a mutating request.
 7617:  3142:  786:     Returns (token_value, success).
 7618:  3143:  787:     """
 7619:  3144:  788:     # Guess the form/GET page that provides the CSRF token
 7620:  3145:  789:     # Strip /api/ prefix for web form pages
 7621:  3146:  790:     form_endpoint = transaction_endpoint.replace("/api/", "/")
 7622:  3147:  791:     candidates = [
 7623:  3148:  792:         f"{BASE_URL}{form_endpoint}",
 7624:  3149:  793:         f"{BASE_URL}/",
 7625:  3150:  794:         f"{BASE_URL}/login",
 7626:  3151:  795:         f"{BASE_URL}/home",
 7627:  3152:  796:     ]
 7628:  3153:  797: 
 7629:  3154:  798:     for url in candidates:
 7630:  3155:  799:         try:
 7631:  3156:  800:             r = session.get(url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 7632:  3157:  801:             if r.status_code == 200:
 7633:  3158:  802:                 # 1. Check HTML for hidden input
 7634:  3159:  803:                 token = extract_csrf_from_html(r.text, csrf_field_name)
 7635:  3160:  804:                 if token:
 7636:  3161:  805:                     return token, True
 7637:  3162:  806: 
 7638:  3163:  807:                 # 2. Check cookies (XSRF-TOKEN style, e.g., Laravel Sanctum)
 7639:  3164:  808:                 for cookie_name in ["XSRF-TOKEN", "csrftoken", "csrf_token"]:
 7640:  3165:  809:                     if cookie_name in session.cookies:
 7641:  3166:  810:                         import urllib.parse
 7642:  3167:  811:                         return urllib.parse.unquote(session.cookies[cookie_name]), True
 7643:  3168:  812: 
 7644:  3169:  813:                 # 3. Check response headers
 7645:  3170:  814:                 for header_name in ["X-CSRF-Token", "X-XSRF-Token", "CSRF-Token"]:
 7646:  3171:  815:                     if header_name in r.headers:
 7647:  3172:  816:                         return r.headers[header_name], True
 7648:  3173:  817: 
 7649:  3174:  818:         except Exception:
 7650:  3175:  819:             continue
 7651:  3176:  820: 
 7652:  3177:  821:     return None, False
 7653:  3178:  822: 
 7654:  3179:  823: 
 7655:  3180:  824: # ─── Dummy Data Generator ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 7656:  3181:  825: 
 7657:  3182:  826: DUMMY_VALUES: dict[str, Any] = {
 7658:  3183:  827:     "email":    "test@example.com",
 7659:  3184:  828:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
 7660:  3185:  829:     "name":     "Test User",
 7661:  3186:  830:     "username": "testuser",
 7662:  3187:  831:     "phone":    "+1234567890",
 7663:  3188:  832:     "address":  "123 Test Street",
 7664:  3189:  833:     "title":    "Test Title",
 7665:  3190:  834:     "body":     "Test body content for automated testing",
 7666:  3191:  835:     "content":  "Test content",
 7667:  3192:  836:     "message":  "Test message",
 7668:  3193:  837:     "amount":   "100.00",
 7669:  3194:  838:     "price":    "99.99",
 7670:  3195:  839:     "quantity": "1",
 7671:  3196:  840:     "date":     "2024-01-01",
 7672:  3197:  841:     "token":    "dummy_token_for_testing",
 7673:  3198:  842:     "code":     "TEST123",
 7674:  3199:  843:     "url":      "https://example.com",
 7675:  3200:  844:     "file":     None,  # Skip file uploads
 7676:  3201:  845: }
 7677:  3202:  846: 
 7678:  3203:  847: TYPE_DEFAULTS: dict[str, Any] = {
 7679:  3204:  848:     "email":    "test@example.com",
 7680:  3205:  849:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
 7681:  3206:  850:     "string":   "test_value",
 7682:  3207:  851:     "integer":  "1",
 7683:  3208:  852:     "number":   "1",
 7684:  3209:  853:     "boolean":  "true",
 7685:  3210:  854:     "text":     "Test text content",
 7686:  3211:  855:     "file":     None,
 7687:  3212:  856: }
 7688:  3213:  857: 
 7689:  3214:  858: 
 7690:  3215:  859: def generate_dummy_payload(fields: list[dict]) -> dict:
 7691:  3216:  860:     """Generate dummy payload from field definitions."""
 7692:  3217:  861:     payload = {}
 7693:  3218:  862:     for f in fields:
 7694:  3219:  863:         name = f["name"].lower()
 7695:  3220:  864:         ftype = f.get("type", "string").lower()
 7696:  3221:  865: 
 7697:  3222:  866:         if ftype == "file":
 7698:  3223:  867:             continue  # Skip file fields in automated testing
 7699:  3224:  868: 
 7700:  3225:  869:         # Try name match first
 7701:  3226:  870:         value = DUMMY_VALUES.get(name)
 7702:  3227:  871:         if value is None:
 7703:  3228:  872:             # Try partial match
 7704:  3229:  873:             for key, val in DUMMY_VALUES.items():
 7705:  3230:  874:                 if key in name:
 7706:  3231:  875:                     value = val
 7707:  3232:  876:                     break
 7708:  3233:  877: 
 7709:  3234:  878:         # Fallback to type default
 7710:  3235:  879:         if value is None:
 7711:  3236:  880:             value = TYPE_DEFAULTS.get(ftype, "test_value")
 7712:  3237:  881: 
 7713:  3238:  882:         if value is not None:
 7714:  3239:  883:             payload[f["name"]] = value
 7715:  3240:  884: 
 7716:  3241:  885:     return payload
 7717:  3242:  886: 
 7718:  3243:  887: 
 7719:  3244:  888: # ─── Main Runner ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 7720:  3245:  889: 
 7721:  3246:  890: def run_transaction(
 7722:  3247:  891:     session: requests.Session,
 7723:  3248:  892:     transaction: dict,
 7724:  3249:  893:     framework: str,
 7725:  3250:  894:     tracker: EmissionsTracker
 7726:  3251:  895: ) -> RequestMeasurement:
 7727:  3252:  896:     """Execute a single transaction with carbon tracking."""
 7728:  3253:  897:     method = transaction["method"].upper()
 7729:  3254:  898:     endpoint = transaction["endpoint"]
 7730:  3255:  899:     full_url = f"{BASE_URL}{endpoint}"
 7731:  3256:  900: 
 7732:  3257:  901:     csrf_obtained = False
 7733:  3258:  902:     csrf_token = None
 7734:  3259:  903: 
 7735:  3260:  904:     # Get CSRF token if required
 7736:  3261:  905:     if transaction.get("requires_csrf") and method in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
 7737:  3262:  906:         csrf_field = transaction.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
 7738:  3263:  907:         csrf_token, csrf_obtained = get_csrf_token(session, endpoint, csrf_field, framework)
 7739:  3264:  908: 
 7740:  3265:  909:         if csrf_token:
 7741:  3266:  910:             # Set in headers too (SPA pattern)
 7742:  3267:  911:             session.headers.update({
 7743:  3268:  912:                 "X-CSRF-Token": csrf_token,
 7744:  3269:  913:                 "X-XSRF-Token": csrf_token,
 7745:  3270:  914:             })
 7746:  3271:  915: 
 7747:  3272:  916:     # Build payload
 7748:  3273:  917:     payload = generate_dummy_payload(transaction.get("fields", []))
 7749:  3274:  918: 
 7750:  3275:  919:     # Add CSRF to payload if token found
 7751:  3276:  920:     if csrf_token and transaction.get("csrf_field_name"):
 7752:  3277:  921:         payload[transaction["csrf_field_name"]] = csrf_token
 7753:  3278:  922: 
 7754:  3279:  923:     # Track energy for this request
 7755:  3280:  924:     tracker.start_task(transaction["id"])
 7756:  3281:  925:     start_time = time.time()
 7757:  3282:  926: 
 7758:  3283:  927:     try:
 7759:  3284:  928:         if method == "GET":
 7760:  3285:  929:             response = session.get(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 7761:  3286:  930:         elif method == "POST":
 7762:  3287:  931:             response = session.post(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 7763:  3288:  932:         elif method == "PUT":
 7764:  3289:  933:             response = session.put(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 7765:  3290:  934:         elif method == "PATCH":
 7766:  3291:  935:             response = session.patch(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 7767:  3292:  936:         elif method == "DELETE":
 7768:  3293:  937:             response = session.delete(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 7769:  3294:  938:         else:
 7770:  3295:  939:             raise ValueError(f"Unsupported method: {method}")
 7771:  3296:  940: 
 7772:  3297:  941:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
 7773:  3298:  942:         emissions_data = tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
 7774:  3299:  943: 
 7775:  3300:  944:         return RequestMeasurement(
 7776:  3301:  945:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
 7777:  3302:  946:             method=method,
 7778:  3303:  947:             endpoint=endpoint,
 7779:  3304:  948:             full_url=full_url,
 7780:  3305:  949:             status_code=response.status_code,
 7781:  3306:  950:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
 7782:  3307:  951:             energy_consumed_kwh=emissions_data.energy_consumed if emissions_data else 0.0,
 7783:  3308:  952:             co2_emissions_kg=emissions_data.emissions if emissions_data else 0.0,
 7784:  3309:  953:             success=200 <= response.status_code < 400,
 7785:  3310:  954:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
 7786:  3311:  955:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
 7787:  3312:  956:             response_preview=response.text[:200],
 7788:  3313:  957:         )
 7789:  3314:  958: 
 7790:  3315:  959:     except Exception as e:
 7791:  3316:  960:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
 7792:  3317:  961:         try:
 7793:  3318:  962:             tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
 7794:  3319:  963:         except Exception:
 7795:  3320:  964:             pass
 7796:  3321:  965: 
 7797:  3322:  966:         return RequestMeasurement(
 7798:  3323:  967:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
 7799:  3324:  968:             method=method,
 7800:  3325:  969:             endpoint=endpoint,
 7801:  3326:  970:             full_url=full_url,
 7802:  3327:  971:             status_code=0,
 7803:  3328:  972:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
 7804:  3329:  973:             energy_consumed_kwh=0.0,
 7805:  3330:  974:             co2_emissions_kg=0.0,
 7806:  3331:  975:             success=False,
 7807:  3332:  976:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
 7808:  3333:  977:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
 7809:  3334:  978:             error=str(e),
 7810:  3335:  979:         )
 7811:  3336:  980: 
 7812:  3337:  981: 
 7813:  3338:  982: def run(transactions_path: str) -> CarbonResult:
 7814:  3339:  983:     """
 7815:  3340:  984:     Main entry point for Agent 3.
 7816:  3341:  985:     
 7817:  3342:  986:     Args:
 7818:  3343:  987:         transactions_path: Path to transactions.json from Agent 2
 7819:  3344:  988:     
 7820:  3345:  989:     Returns:
 7821:  3346:  990:         CarbonResult with per-request energy measurements
 7822:  3347:  991:     """
 7823:  3348:  992:     try:
 7824:  3349:  993:         with open(transactions_path) as f:
 7825:  3350:  994:             data = json.load(f)
 7826:  3351:  995: 
 7827:  3352:  996:         transactions = data.get("transactions", [])
 7828:  3353:  997:         framework = data.get("framework", "unknown")
 7829:  3354:  998: 
 7830:  3355:  999:         print(f"[Agent 3] Running {len(transactions)} transactions against {BASE_URL}")
 7831:  3356: 1000: 
 7832:  3357: 1001:         session = requests.Session()
 7833:  3358: 1002:         session.headers.update({
 7834:  3359: 1003:             "Accept": "application/json, text/html",
 7835:  3360: 1004:             "User-Agent": "CodeCarbonAgent/1.0",
 7836:  3361: 1005:         })
 7837:  3362: 1006: 
 7838:  3363: 1007:         # Initialize CodeCarbon tracker
 7839:  3364: 1008:         tracker = EmissionsTracker(
 7840:  3365: 1009:             project_name="code_carbon_agent",
 7841:  3366: 1010:             output_dir=str(Path(transactions_path).parent),
 7842:  3367: 1011:             log_level="warning",
 7843:  3368: 1012:             save_to_file=False,
 7844:  3369: 1013:             tracking_mode="process",
 7845:  3370: 1014:         )
 7846:  3371: 1015:         tracker.start()
 7847:  3372: 1016: 
 7848:  3373: 1017:         measurements = []
 7849:  3374: 1018: 
 7850:  3375: 1019:         for txn in transactions:
 7851:  3376: 1020:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {txn['method']} {txn['endpoint']}")
 7852:  3377: 1021:             measurement = run_transaction(session, txn, framework, tracker)
 7853:  3378: 1022:             measurements.append(measurement)
 7854:  3379: 1023: 
 7855:  3380: 1024:             status_icon = "✅" if measurement.success else "❌"
 7856:  3381: 1025:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {status_icon} {measurement.status_code} "
 7857:  3382: 1026:                   f"({measurement.response_time_ms:.0f}ms, "
 7858:  3383: 1027:                   f"{measurement.co2_emissions_kg*1000:.4f}g CO₂)")
 7859:  3384: 1028: 
 7860:  3385: 1029:             time.sleep(DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS)
 7861:  3386: 1030: 
 7862:  3387: 1031:         tracker.stop()
 7863:  3388: 1032: 
 7864:  3389: 1033:         successful = sum(1 for m in measurements if m.success)
 7865:  3390: 1034:         total_energy = sum(m.energy_consumed_kwh for m in measurements)
 7866:  3391: 1035:         total_co2 = sum(m.co2_emissions_kg for m in measurements)
 7867:  3392: 1036:         avg_time = (sum(m.response_time_ms for m in measurements) / len(measurements)
 7868:  3393: 1037:                     if measurements else 0)
 7869:  3394: 1038: 
 7870:  3395: 1039:         result = CarbonResult(
 7871:  3396: 1040:             success=True,
 7872:  3397: 1041:             base_url=BASE_URL,
 7873:  3398: 1042:             total_requests=len(measurements),
 7874:  3399: 1043:             successful_requests=successful,
 7875:  3400: 1044:             failed_requests=len(measurements) - successful,
 7876:  3401: 1045:             total_energy_kwh=round(total_energy, 8),
 7877:  3402: 1046:             total_co2_kg=round(total_co2, 8),
 7878:  3403: 1047:             avg_response_time_ms=round(avg_time, 2),
 7879:  3404: 1048:             measurements=measurements,
 7880:  3405: 1049:         )
 7881:  3406: 1050: 
 7882:  3407: 1051:         # Save carbon report
 7883:  3408: 1052:         output_path = Path(transactions_path).parent / "carbon_report.json"
 7884:  3409: 1053:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
 7885:  3410: 1054:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
 7886:  3411: 1055:         print(f"[Agent 3] ✅ Saved: {output_path}")
 7887:  3412: 1056: 
 7888:  3413: 1057:         return result
 7889:  3414: 1058: 
 7890:  3415: 1059:     except Exception as e:
 7891:  3416: 1060:         return CarbonResult(
 7892:  3417: 1061:             success=False,
 7893:  3418: 1062:             base_url=BASE_URL,
 7894:  3419: 1063:             total_requests=0,
 7895:  3420: 1064:             successful_requests=0,
 7896:  3421: 1065:             failed_requests=0,
 7897:  3422: 1066:             total_energy_kwh=0.0,
 7898:  3423: 1067:             total_co2_kg=0.0,
 7899:  3424: 1068:             avg_response_time_ms=0.0,
 7900:  3425: 1069:             measurements=[],
 7901:  3426: 1070:             error=str(e),
 7902:  3427: 1071:         )
 7903:  3428: 1072: 
 7904:  3429: 1073: 
 7905:  3430: 1074: if __name__ == "__main__":
 7906:  3431: 1075:     import sys
 7907:  3432: 1076:     txn_path = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/transactions.json"
 7908:  3433: 1077:     result = run(txn_path)
 7909:  3434: 1078:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 7910:  3435: 1079: ```
 7911:  3436: 1080: 
 7912:  3437: 1081: ---
 7913:  3438: 1082: 
 7914:  3439: 1083: ## Agent 4 — Refactor Report Agent
 7915:  3440: 1084: 
 7916:  3441: 1085: ### Konsep
 7917:  3442: 1086: 
 7918:  3443: 1087: Agent 4 mengambil semua hasil dari Agent 1–3 dan menghasilkan:
 7919:  3444: 1088: 
 7920:  3445: 1089: - **Laporan refactoring lengkap** dalam format Markdown
 7921:  3446: 1090: - **Unit test files** untuk setiap transaksi POST/mutating
 7922:  3447: 1091: - **Ringkasan carbon footprint** dengan rekomendasi optimasi

 8044:  3569: 1213: """,

 8046:  3571: 1215:         "test_case": """

 8049:  3574: 1218:         // {description}

 8057:  3582: 1226: """,
 8058:  3583: 1227:     },
 8059:  3584: 1228: }

 8062:  3587: 1231: def slugify(text: str) -> str:
 8063:  3588: 1232:     """Convert endpoint path to test function name."""
 8064:  3589: 1233:     return re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]", "_", text.lower()).strip("_")

 8069:  3594: 1238:     import re
 8070:  3595: 1239:

 8355:  3880: 1524: def run(output_dir: str = "./output") -> str:
 8356:  3881: 1525:     """
 8357:  3882: 1526:     Main entry point for Agent 4.
 8358:  3883: 1527:     
 8359:  3884: 1528:     Args:
 8360:  3885: 1529:         output_dir: Directory containing all agent outputs
 8361:  3886: 1530:     
 8362:  3887: 1531:     Returns:
 8363:  3888: 1532:         Path to the generated report
 8364:  3889: 1533:     """
 8365:  3890: 1534:     os.makedirs(REPORT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
 8366:  3891: 1535:     os.makedirs(f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests", exist_ok=True)
 8367:  3892: 1536: 
 8368:  3893: 1537:     # Load all agent outputs
 8369:  3894: 1538:     with open(f"{output_dir}/transactions.json") as f:
 8370:  3895: 1539:         identification = json.load(f)
 8371:  3896: 1540: 
 8372:  3897: 1541:     with open(f"{output_dir}/carbon_report.json") as f:
 8373:  3898: 1542:         carbon = json.load(f)
 8374:  3899: 1543: 
 8375:  3900: 1544:     # Agent 1 result may or may not exist
 8376:  3901: 1545:     ingestion_path = Path(output_dir) / "ingestion_result.json"
 8377:  3902: 1546:     if ingestion_path.exists():
 8378:  3903: 1547:         with open(ingestion_path) as f:
 8379:  3904: 1548:             ingestion = json.load(f)
 8380:  3905: 1549:     else:
 8381:  3906: 1550:         ingestion = {"source_path": output_dir}
 8382:  3907: 1551: 
 8383:  3908: 1552:     framework = identification.get("framework", "express")
 8384:  3909: 1553: 
 8385:  3910: 1554:     # Generate unit tests
 8386:  3911: 1555:     print("[Agent 4] Generating unit tests...")
 8387:  3912: 1556:     test_content = generate_unit_tests(identification.get("transactions", []), framework)
 8388:  3913: 1557:     test_ext = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])["ext"]
 8389:  3914: 1558:     test_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests/GeneratedTransactionTest.{test_ext}"
 8390:  3915: 1559:     with open(test_path, "w") as f:
 8391:  3916: 1560:         f.write(test_content)
 8392:  3917: 1561:     print(f"[Agent 4] Unit tests saved: {test_path}")
 8393:  3918: 1562: 
 8394:  3919: 1563:     # Generate markdown report
 8395:  3920: 1564:     print("[Agent 4] Building report...")
 8396:  3921: 1565:     report_md = build_report(ingestion, identification, carbon, REPORT_DIR)
 8397:  3922: 1566:     report_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/code_carbon_report.md"
 8398:  3923: 1567:     with open(report_path, "w") as f:
 8399:  3924: 1568:         f.write(report_md)
 8400:  3925: 1569: 
 8401:  3926: 1570:     print(f"[Agent 4] ✅ Report saved: {report_path}")
 8402:  3927: 1571:     return report_path

 8405:  3930: 1574: if __name__ == "__main__":
 8406:  3931: 1575:     import sys
 8407:  3932: 1576:     out_dir = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output"
 8408:  3933: 1577:     run(out_dir)
 8409:  3934: 1578: ```
 8410:  3935: 1579: 
 8411:  3936: 1580: ---
 8412:  3937: 1581: 
 8413:  3938: 1582: ## Pipeline Orchestrator
 8414:  3939: 1583: 
 8415:  3940: 1584: ### File: `pipeline.py`
 8416:  3941: 1585: 
 8417:  3942: 1586: ```python
 8418:  3943: 1587: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 8419:  3944: 1588: """
 8420:  3945: 1589: Pipeline Orchestrator
 8421:  3946: 1590: Runs all 4 agents in sequence.
 8422:  3947: 1591: """
 8423:  3948: 1592: 
 8424:  3949: 1593: import sys
 8425:  3950: 1594: import json
 8426:  3951: 1595: import argparse
 8427:  3952: 1596: from dataclasses import asdict
 8428:  3953: 1597: from pathlib import Path
 8429:  3954: 1598: 
 8430:  3955: 1599: import agent1_ingestion
 8431:  3956: 1600: import agent2_gemini_identifier
 8432:  3957: 1601: import agent3_carbon
 8433:  3958: 1602: import agent4_report
 8434:  3959: 1603: 
 8435:  3960: 1604: 
 8436:  3961: 1605: def main():
 8437:  3962: 1606:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
 8438:  3963: 1607:         description="Multi-Agent Code Carbon Pipeline",
 8439:  3964: 1608:         formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
 8440:  3965: 1609:         epilog="""
 8441:  3966: 1610: Examples:
 8442:  3967: 1611:   # Local directory
 8443:  3968: 1612:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-laravel-app
 8444:  3969: 1613: 
 8445:  3970: 1614:   # Git repository
 8446:  3971: 1615:   python pipeline.py --source https://github.com/user/repo
 8447:  3972: 1616: 
 8448:  3973: 1617:   # Skip carbon testing (no live app running)
 8449:  3974: 1618:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --skip-carbon
 8450:  3975: 1619: 
 8451:  3976: 1620:   # Specify output directory
 8452:  3977: 1621:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --output ./my-analysis
 8453:  3978: 1622:         """
 8454:  3979: 1623:     )
 8455:  3980: 1624:     parser.add_argument("--source", required=True, help="Local path or Git URL")
 8456:  3981: 1625:     parser.add_argument("--output", default="./output", help="Output directory")
 8457:  3982: 1626:     parser.add_argument("--skip-carbon", action="store_true",
 8458:  3983: 1627:                         help="Skip Agent 3 (no live app required)")
 8459:  3984: 1628:     parser.add_argument("--base-url", default=None,
 8460:  3985: 1629:                         help="Override TARGET_BASE_URL for Agent 3")
 8461:  3986: 1630: 
 8462:  3987: 1631:     args = parser.parse_args()
 8463:  3988: 1632: 
 8464:  3989: 1633:     if args.base_url:
 8465:  3990: 1634:         import os
 8466:  3991: 1635:         os.environ["TARGET_BASE_URL"] = args.base_url
 8467:  3992: 1636: 
 8468:  3993: 1637:     print("=" * 60)
 8469:  3994: 1638:     print("🤖 MULTI-AGENT CODE CARBON PIPELINE")
 8470:  3995: 1639:     print("=" * 60)
 8471:  3996: 1640: 
 8472:  3997: 1641:     # ── Agent 1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 8473:  3998: 1642:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion")
 8474:  3999: 1643:     ingestion = agent1_ingestion.run(args.source, args.output)
 8475:  4000: 1644:     if not ingestion.success:
 8476:  4001: 1645:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 1 failed: {ingestion.error}")
 8477:  4002: 1646:         sys.exit(1)
 8478:  4003: 1647: 
 8479:  4004: 1648:     # Save ingestion result
 8480:  4005: 1649:     with open(f"{args.output}/ingestion_result.json", "w") as f:
 8481:  4006: 1650:         json.dump(asdict(ingestion), f, indent=2)
 8482:  4007: 1651: 
 8483:  4008: 1652:     # ── Agent 2 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 8484:  4009: 1653:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier")
 8485:  4010: 1654:     identification = agent2_gemini_identifier.run(
 8486:  4011: 1655:         ingestion.flat_file_path,
 8487:  4012: 1656:         ingestion.detected_framework
 8488:  4013: 1657:     )
 8489:  4014: 1658:     if not identification.success:
 8490:  4015: 1659:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 2 failed: {identification.error}")
 8491:  4016: 1660:         sys.exit(1)
 8492:  4017: 1661: 
 8493:  4018: 1662:     # ── Agent 3 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 8494:  4019: 1663:     if args.skip_carbon:
 8495:  4020: 1664:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ⏭  Agent 3 — Skipped (--skip-carbon)")
 8496:  4021: 1665:         # Create empty carbon result
 8497:  4022: 1666:         empty_carbon = {
 8498:  4023: 1667:             "success": True, "base_url": "", "total_requests": 0,
 8499:  4024: 1668:             "successful_requests": 0, "failed_requests": 0,
 8500:  4025: 1669:             "total_energy_kwh": 0.0, "total_co2_kg": 0.0,
 8501:  4026: 1670:             "avg_response_time_ms": 0.0, "measurements": []
 8502:  4027: 1671:         }
 8503:  4028: 1672:         with open(f"{args.output}/carbon_report.json", "w") as f:
 8504:  4029: 1673:             json.dump(empty_carbon, f, indent=2)
 8505:  4030: 1674:     else:
 8506:  4031: 1675:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 3 — Code Carbon")
 8507:  4032: 1676:         carbon = agent3_carbon.run(f"{args.output}/transactions.json")
 8508:  4033: 1677:         if not carbon.success:
 8509:  4034: 1678:             print(f"[PIPELINE] ⚠️  Agent 3 warning: {carbon.error}")
 8510:  4035: 1679: 
 8511:  4036: 1680:     # ── Agent 4 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 8512:  4037: 1681:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 4 — Refactor Report")
 8513:  4038: 1682:     report_path = agent4_report.run(args.output)
 8514:  4039: 1683: 
 8515:  4040: 1684:     print("\n" + "=" * 60)
 8516:  4041: 1685:     print("✅ PIPELINE COMPLETE")
 8517:  4042: 1686:     print(f"📄 Report: {report_path}")
 8518:  4043: 1687:     print(f"🧪 Tests:  ./reports/tests/")
 8519:  4044: 1688:     print("=" * 60)
 8520:  4045: 1689: 
 8521:  4046: 1690: 
 8522:  4047: 1691: if __name__ == "__main__":
 8523:  4048: 1692:     main()
 8524:  4049: 1693: ```
 8525:  4050: 1694: 
 8526:  4051: 1695: ---
 8527:  4052: 1696: 
 8528:  4053: 1697: ## Web UI — CSRF & Form Field Handler
 8529:  4054: 1698: 
 8530:  4055: 1699: File ini adalah **web interface** yang menampilkan form dari hasil Gemini, lengkap dengan field yang harus diisi, label, dan CSRF token secara otomatis.
 8531:  4056: 1700: 
 8532:  4057: 1701: ### File: `web_ui/index.html`
 8533:  4058: 1702: 
 8534:  4059: 1703: ```html
 8535:  4060: 1704: <!DOCTYPE html>
 8536:  4061: 1705: <html lang="id">
 8537:  4062: 1706: <head>
 8538:  4063: 1707:   <meta charset="UTF-8">
 8539:  4064: 1708:   <title>Code Carbon — Transaction Tester</title>
 8540:  4065: 1709:   <style>
 8541:  4066: 1710:     body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 0 1rem; }
 8542:  4067: 1711:     .card { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.5rem; margin: 1rem 0; }
 8543:  4068: 1712:     .method-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 4px;
 8544:  4069: 1713:                     font-weight: bold; font-size: 0.8rem; color: white; }
 8545:  4070: 1714:     .POST   { background: #2ecc71; }
 8546:  4071: 1715:     .GET    { background: #3498db; }
 8547:  4072: 1716:     .PUT    { background: #f39c12; }
 8548:  4073: 1717:     .PATCH  { background: #e67e22; }
 8549:  4074: 1718:     .DELETE { background: #e74c3c; }
 8550:  4075: 1719:     .form-group { margin: 0.75rem 0; }
 8551:  4076: 1720:     label { display: block; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 4px; }
 8552:  4077: 1721:     input, select { width: 100%; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;
 8553:  4078: 1722:                     box-sizing: border-box; }
 8554:  4079: 1723:     input[type=password] { font-family: monospace; }
 8555:  4080: 1724:     .csrf-badge { font-size: 0.75rem; background: #fff3cd; padding: 2px 6px;
 8556:  4081: 1725:                   border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #ffc107; }
 8557:  4082: 1726:     .auth-badge { font-size: 0.75rem; background: #cce5ff; padding: 2px 6px;
 8558:  4083: 1727:                   border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #004085; }
 8559:  4084: 1728:     button[type=submit] { background: #2c3e50; color: white; border: none;
 8560:  4085: 1729:                           padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; }
 8561:  4086: 1730:     .response-box { background: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px;
 8562:  4087: 1731:                     padding: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem; font-family: monospace;
 8563:  4088: 1732:                     white-space: pre-wrap; max-height: 300px; overflow-y: auto; }
 8564:  4089: 1733:     .required-mark { color: #e74c3c; }
 8565:  4090: 1734:   </style>
 8566:  4091: 1735: </head>
 8567:  4092: 1736: <body>
 8568:  4093: 1737:   <h1>🤖 Code Carbon — Transaction Tester</h1>
 8569:  4094: 1738:   <p>Load <code>transactions.json</code> to auto-generate forms for each endpoint.</p>
 8570:  4095: 1739: 
 8571:  4096: 1740:   <input type="file" id="txnFile" accept=".json">
 8572:  4097: 1741:   <div id="app"></div>
 8573:  4098: 1742: 
 8574:  4099: 1743:   <script>
 8575:  4100: 1744:     const BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:8000';  // Change this!
 8576:  4101: 1745: 
 8577:  4102: 1746:     document.getElementById('txnFile').addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
 8578:  4103: 1747:       const file = e.target.files[0];
 8579:  4104: 1748:       if (!file) return;
 8580:  4105: 1749:       const data = JSON.parse(await file.text());
 8581:  4106: 1750:       renderTransactions(data.transactions || [], data.framework || 'unknown');
 8582:  4107: 1751:     });
 8583:  4108: 1752: 
 8584:  4109: 1753:     function renderTransactions(transactions, framework) {
 8585:  4110: 1754:       const app = document.getElementById('app');
 8586:  4111: 1755:       app.innerHTML = '';
 8587:  4112: 1756: 
 8588:  4113: 1757:       transactions.forEach((txn, i) => {
 8589:  4114: 1758:         const card = document.createElement('div');
 8590:  4115: 1759:         card.className = 'card';
 8591:  4116: 1760:         card.id = `txn-${txn.id}`;
 8592:  4117: 1761: 
 8593:  4118: 1762:         const badges = [
 8594:  4119: 1763:           `<span class="method-badge ${txn.method}">${txn.method}</span>`,
 8595:  4120: 1764:           txn.requires_csrf ? '<span class="csrf-badge">🔐 CSRF</span>' : '',
 8596:  4121: 1765:           txn.requires_auth ? '<span class="auth-badge">🔑 Auth</span>' : '',
 8597:  4122: 1766:         ].filter(Boolean).join(' ');
 8598:  4123: 1767: 
 8599:  4124: 1768:         let fieldsHtml = '';
 8600:  4125: 1769:         (txn.fields || []).forEach(f => {
 8601:  4126: 1770:           const inputType = {
 8602:  4127: 1771:             'email': 'email', 'password': 'password',
 8603:  4128: 1772:             'integer': 'number', 'number': 'number', 'file': 'file',
 8604:  4129: 1773:           }[f.type] || 'text';
 8605:  4130: 1774: 
 8606:  4131: 1775:           const req = f.required ? '<span class="required-mark">*</span>' : '';
 8607:  4132: 1776:           const rules = (f.validation_rules || []).join(', ');
 8608:  4133: 1777:           const placeholder = f.description || f.name;
 8609:  4134: 1778: 
 8610:  4135: 1779:           fieldsHtml += `
 8611:  4136: 1780:             <div class="form-group">
 8612:  4137: 1781:               <label for="${txn.id}_${f.name}">${f.name} ${req}
 8613:  4138: 1782:                 <small style="color:#888;">(${f.type}${rules ? ' · ' + rules : ''})</small>
 8614:  4139: 1783:               </label>
 8615:  4140: 1784:               <input type="${inputType}"
 8616:  4141: 1785:                      id="${txn.id}_${f.name}"
 8617:  4142: 1786:                      name="${f.name}"
 8618:  4143: 1787:                      placeholder="${placeholder}"
 8619:  4144: 1788:                      ${f.required ? 'required' : ''}>
 8620:  4145: 1789:             </div>`;
 8621:  4146: 1790:         });
 8622:  4147: 1791: 
 8623:  4148: 1792:         // CSRF hidden field
 8624:  4149: 1793:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
 8625:  4150: 1794:           fieldsHtml += `
 8626:  4151: 1795:             <div class="form-group" style="opacity:0.5">
 8627:  4152: 1796:               <label>CSRF Token (auto-fetched: <code>${txn.csrf_field_name}</code>)</label>
 8628:  4153: 1797:               <input type="text" id="${txn.id}_csrf" name="${txn.csrf_field_name}"
 8629:  4154: 1798:                      placeholder="Will be fetched automatically" readonly>
 8630:  4155: 1799:             </div>`;
 8631:  4156: 1800:         }
 8632:  4157: 1801: 
 8633:  4158: 1802:         card.innerHTML = `
 8634:  4159: 1803:           <h3>${badges} <code>${txn.endpoint}</code></h3>
 8635:  4160: 1804:           <p style="color:#666;">${txn.description || ''}</p>
 8636:  4161: 1805:           <form id="form-${txn.id}">
 8637:  4162: 1806:             ${fieldsHtml}
 8638:  4163: 1807:             <button type="submit">Send ${txn.method} Request</button>
 8639:  4164: 1808:           </form>
 8640:  4165: 1809:           <div id="response-${txn.id}" class="response-box" style="display:none;"></div>
 8641:  4166: 1810:         `;
 8642:  4167: 1811: 
 8643:  4168: 1812:         app.appendChild(card);
 8644:  4169: 1813: 
 8645:  4170: 1814:         // Auto-fetch CSRF if needed
 8646:  4171: 1815:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
 8647:  4172: 1816:           fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework);
 8648:  4173: 1817:         }
 8649:  4174: 1818: 
 8650:  4175: 1819:         // Form submit
 8651:  4176: 1820:         document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`).addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
 8652:  4177: 1821:           e.preventDefault();
 8653:  4178: 1822:           await submitTransaction(txn);
 8654:  4179: 1823:         });
 8655:  4180: 1824:       });
 8656:  4181: 1825:     }
 8657:  4182: 1826: 
 8658:  4183: 1827:     async function fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework) {
 8659:  4184: 1828:       try {
 8660:  4185: 1829:         // Try to get CSRF from the same page
 8661:  4186: 1830:         const endpoints = [txn.endpoint.replace('/api/', '/'), '/', '/login'];
 8662:  4187: 1831:         for (const ep of endpoints) {
 8663:  4188: 1832:           const r = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${ep}`, { credentials: 'include' });
 8664:  4189: 1833:           if (r.ok) {
 8665:  4190: 1834:             const html = await r.text();
 8666:  4191: 1835:             const match = html.match(
 8667:  4192: 1836:               new RegExp(`name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']\\s+value=["']([^"']+)["']`)
 8668:  4193: 1837:             ) || html.match(
 8669:  4194: 1838:               new RegExp(`value=["']([^"']+)["']\\s+name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']`)
 8670:  4195: 1839:             );
 8671:  4196: 1840:             if (match) {
 8672:  4197: 1841:               const csrfInput = document.getElementById(`${txn.id}_csrf`);
 8673:  4198: 1842:               if (csrfInput) csrfInput.value = match[1];
 8674:  4199: 1843:               return;
 8675:  4200: 1844:             }
 8676:  4201: 1845:           }
 8677:  4202: 1846:         }
 8678:  4203: 1847:       } catch (e) {
 8679:  4204: 1848:         console.warn('Could not auto-fetch CSRF:', e.message);
 8680:  4205: 1849:       }
 8681:  4206: 1850:     }
 8682:  4207: 1851: 
 8683:  4208: 1852:     async function submitTransaction(txn) {
 8684:  4209: 1853:       const form = document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`);
 8685:  4210: 1854:       const responseBox = document.getElementById(`response-${txn.id}`);
 8686:  4211: 1855:       const formData = new FormData(form);
 8687:  4212: 1856:       const payload = Object.fromEntries(formData);
 8688:  4213: 1857: 
 8689:  4214: 1858:       responseBox.style.display = 'block';
 8690:  4215: 1859:       responseBox.textContent = '⏳ Sending...';
 8691:  4216: 1860: 
 8692:  4217: 1861:       try {
 8693:  4218: 1862:         const options = {
 8694:  4219: 1863:           method: txn.method,
 8695:  4220: 1864:           credentials: 'include',
 8696:  4221: 1865:           headers: {},
 8697:  4222: 1866:         };
 8698:  4223: 1867: 
 8699:  4224: 1868:         if (txn.method !== 'GET') {
 8700:  4225: 1869:           options.headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
 8701:  4226: 1870:           options.body = JSON.stringify(payload);
 8702:  4227: 1871: 
 8703:  4228: 1872:           if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
 8704:  4229: 1873:             options.headers['X-CSRF-Token'] = payload[txn.csrf_field_name] || '';
 8705:  4230: 1874:           }
 8706:  4231: 1875:         }
 8707:  4232: 1876: 
 8708:  4233: 1877:         const start = performance.now();
 8709:  4234: 1878:         const r = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${txn.endpoint}`, options);
 8710:  4235: 1879:         const elapsed = (performance.now() - start).toFixed(0);
 8711:  4236: 1880:         const text = await r.text();
 8712:  4237: 1881: 
 8713:  4238: 1882:         let display;
 8714:  4239: 1883:         try {
 8715:  4240: 1884:           display = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2);
 8716:  4241: 1885:         } catch {
 8717:  4242: 1886:           display = text.substring(0, 1000);
 8718:  4243: 1887:         }
 8719:  4244: 1888: 
 8720:  4245: 1889:         responseBox.textContent =
 8721:  4246: 1890:           `HTTP ${r.status} (${elapsed}ms)\n\n${display}`;
 8722:  4247: 1891: 
 8723:  4248: 1892:       } catch (err) {
 8724:  4249: 1893:         responseBox.textContent = `❌ Error: ${err.message}`;
 8725:  4250: 1894:       }
 8726:  4251: 1895:     }
 8727:  4252: 1896:   </script>
 8728:  4253: 1897: </body>
 8729:  4254: 1898: </html>
 8730:  4255: 1899: ```
 8731:  4256: 1900: 
 8732:  4257: 1901: ---
 8733:  4258: 1902: 
 8734:  4259: 1903: ## Unit Test Generator
 8735:  4260: 1904: 
 8736:  4261: 1905: Contoh output unit test untuk **Laravel** dari Agent 4:
 8737:  4262: 1906: 
 8738:  4263: 1907: ```php
 8739:  4264: 1908: <?php
 8740:  4265: 1909: // reports/tests/GeneratedTransactionTest.php
 8741:  4266: 1910: 
 8742:  4267: 1911: namespace Tests\Feature;
 8743:  4268: 1912:

 8747:  4272: 1916: 
 8748:  4273: 1917: class GeneratedTransactionTest extends TestCase
 8749:  4274: 1918: {

 8751:  4276: 1920:

 8753:  4278: 1922:     public function test_post_api_login()
 8754:  4279: 1923:     {

 8756:  4281: 1925:             'email'    => 'test@example.com',

 8762:  4287: 1931:     }
 8763:  4288: 1932: 
 8764:  4289: 1933:     /** @test */
