 8775:  4300: 1944:     }
 8776:  4301: 1945: 
 8777:  4302: 1946:     /** @test */
 8778:  4303: 1947:     public function test_post_api_transactions_requires_auth()
 8779:  4304: 1948:     {
 8780:  4305: 1949:         $response = $this->post('/api/transactions', [
 8781:  4306: 1950:             'amount'      => '100.00',
 8782:  4307: 1951:             'description' => 'Test transaction',
 8783:  4308: 1952:             '_token'      => csrf_token(),
 8784:  4309: 1953:         ]);
 8785:  4310: 1954:         // Should redirect to login or return 401
 8786:  4311: 1955:         $response->assertStatus(401);
 8787:  4312: 1956:     }
 8788:  4313: 1957: 
 8789:  4314: 1958:     /** @test */
 8790:  4315: 1959:     public function test_post_api_transactions_authenticated()
 8791:  4316: 1960:     {
 8792:  4317: 1961:         $user = User::factory()->create();
 8793:  4318: 1962:         $this->actingAs($user);
 8794:  4319: 1963: 
 8795:  4320: 1964:         $response = $this->post('/api/transactions', [
 8796:  4321: 1965:             'amount'      => '100.00',
 8797:  4322: 1966:             'description' => 'Test transaction',
 8798:  4323: 1967:             '_token'      => csrf_token(),
 8799:  4324: 1968:         ]);
 8800:  4325: 1969:         $response->assertStatus(201);
 8801:  4326: 1970:     }
 8802:  4327: 1971: }
 8803:  4328: 1972: ```
 8804:  4329: 1973: 
 8805:  4330: 1974: ---
 8806:  4331: 1975: 
 8807:  4332: 1976: ## Configuration & Environment
 8808:  4333: 1977: 
 8809:  4334: 1978: ### File: `.env`
 8810:  4335: 1979: 
 8811:  4336: 1980: ```dotenv
 8812:  4337: 1981: # Required
 8813:  4338: 1982: GEMINI_API_KEY=your_gemini_api_key_here
 8814:  4339: 1983: 
 8815:  4340: 1984: # Agent 3 — Target app URL (must be running)
 8816:  4341: 1985: TARGET_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000
 8817:  4342: 1986: 
 8818:  4343: 1987: # Optional tuning
 8819:  4344: 1988: REQUEST_TIMEOUT=30
 8820:  4345: 1989: DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS=0.5
 8821:  4346: 1990: 
 8822:  4347: 1991: # Output paths
 8823:  4348: 1992: REPOMIX_OUTPUT_DIR=./output
 8824:  4349: 1993: REPORT_OUTPUT_DIR=./reports
 8825:  4350: 1994: ```
 8826:  4351: 1995: 
 8827:  4352: 1996: ### File: `requirements.txt`
 8828:  4353: 1997: 
 8829:  4354: 1998: ```
 8830:  4355: 1999: codecarbon>=2.3.0
 8831:  4356: 2000: requests>=2.31.0
 8832:  4357: 2001: beautifulsoup4>=4.12.0
 8833:  4358: 2002: python-dotenv>=1.0.0
 8834:  4359: 2003: lxml>=4.9.0
 8835:  4360: 2004: ```
 8836:  4361: 2005: 
 8837:  4362: 2006: ### Installation
 8838:  4363: 2007: 
 8839:  4364: 2008: ```bash
 8840:  4365: 2009: # Install Python deps
 8841:  4366: 2010: pip install -r requirements.txt
 8842:  4367: 2011: 
 8843:  4368: 2012: # Install repomix (Node.js required)
 8844:  4369: 2013: npm install -g repomix
 8845:  4370: 2014: 
 8846:  4371: 2015: # Verify
 8847:  4372: 2016: repomix --version
 8848:  4373: 2017: python -c "import codecarbon; print('CodeCarbon OK')"
 8849:  4374: 2018: ```
 8850:  4375: 2019: 
 8851:  4376: 2020: ---
 8852:  4377: 2021: 
 8853:  4378: 2022: ## Running the Full Pipeline
 8854:  4379: 2023: 
 8855:  4380: 2024: ```bash
 8856:  4381: 2025: # 1. Analyze local Laravel project (app must be running)
 8857:  4382: 2026: python pipeline.py \
 8858:  4383: 2027:   --source /path/to/my-laravel-app \
 8859:  4384: 2028:   --base-url http://localhost:8000
 8860:  4385: 2029: 
 8861:  4386: 2030: # 2. Analyze from Git URL, skip live testing
 8862:  4387: 2031: python pipeline.py \
 8863:  4388: 2032:   --source https://github.com/user/my-express-api \
 8864:  4389: 2033:   --skip-carbon
 8865:  4390: 2034: 
 8866:  4391: 2035: # 3. Analyze Django app
 8867:  4392: 2036: python pipeline.py \
 8868:  4393: 2037:   --source /path/to/my-django-app \
 8869:  4394: 2038:   --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8000
 8870:  4395: 2039: 
 8871:  4396: 2040: # 4. Run only Agent 2 (already have repomix output)
 8872:  4397: 2041: python agent2_gemini_identifier.py ./output/flat_codebase.txt
 8873:  4398: 2042: 
 8874:  4399: 2043: # 5. Open Web UI
 8875:  4400: 2044: # Open web_ui/index.html in browser
 8876:  4401: 2045: # Load transactions.json
 8877:  4402: 2046: # Fill required fields → Send request
 8878:  4403: 2047: ```
 8879:  4404: 2048: 
 8880:  4405: 2049: ---
 8881:  4406: 2050: 
 8882:  4407: 2051: ## Output Examples
 8883:  4408: 2052: 
 8884:  4409: 2053: ### Directory Structure After Run
 8885:  4410: 2054: 
 8886:  4411: 2055: ```
 8887:  4412: 2056: output/
 8888:  4413: 2057: ├── flat_codebase.txt          ← Agent 1: repomix bundle
 8889:  4414: 2058: ├── ingestion_result.json      ← Agent 1: metadata
 8890:  4415: 2059: ├── transactions.json          ← Agent 2: all transactions + fields
 8891:  4416: 2060: └── carbon_report.json         ← Agent 3: per-request energy data
 8892:  4417: 2061: 
 8893:  4418: 2062: reports/
 8894:  4419: 2063: ├── code_carbon_report.md      ← Agent 4: full report
 8895:  4420: 2064: └── tests/
 8896:  4421: 2065:     └── GeneratedTransactionTest.php  ← Agent 4: unit tests
 8897:  4422: 2066: ```
 8898:  4423: 2067:

 8939:  4464: 2108: 
 8940:  4465: 2109: ---
 8941:  4466: 2110: 
 8942:  4467: 2111: ## Troubleshooting
 8943:  4468: 2112: 
 8944:  4469: 2113: | Problem | Cause | Fix |
 8945:  4470: 2114: |---------|-------|-----|
 8946:  4471: 2115: | `repomix: command not found` | Not installed | `npm install -g repomix` |
 8947:  4472: 2116: | `Gemini API 429 Too Many Requests` | Rate limit hit | Add `GEMINI_DELAY=10` to .env |
 8948:  4473: 2117: | `Connection refused` in Agent 3 | App not running | Start app or use `--skip-carbon` |
 8949:  4474: 2118: | `CSRF token mismatch` in Agent 3 | Wrong field name | Gemini will detect correct name; check `transactions.json` |
 8950:  4475: 2119: | `CodeCarbon ImportError` | Not installed | `pip install codecarbon` |
 8951:  4476: 2120: | `repomix output too large` | Big codebase | Add exclusions in `FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES` |
 8952:  4477: 2121: 
 8953:  4478: 2122: ---
 8954:  4479: 2123: 
 8955:  4480: 2124: _Dibuat dengan ❤️ untuk semua framework — Laravel, Django, Express, Spring, Rails, FastAPI, NestJS, Go, ASP.NET_

 8972:  4497: ================
 8973:  4498: File: output/flat_codebase.txt
 8974:  4499: ================
 8975:  4500:     1: This file is a merged representation of a subset of the codebase, containing files not matching ignore patterns, combined into a single document by Repomix.
 8976:  4501:     2: The content has been processed where line numbers have been added.
 8977:  4502:     3: 
 8978:  4503:     4: ================================================================
 8979:  4504:     5: File Summary
 8980:  4505:     6: ================================================================
 8981:  4506:     7: 
 8982:  4507:     8: Purpose:
 8983:  4508:     9: --------
 8984:  4509:    10: This file contains a packed representation of a subset of the repository's contents that is considered the most important context.
 8985:  4510:    11: It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
 8986:  4511:    12: or other automated processes.
 8987:  4512:    13: 
 8988:  4513:    14: File Format:
 8989:  4514:    15: ------------
 8990:  4515:    16: The content is organized as follows:
 8991:  4516:    17: 1. This summary section
 8992:  4517:    18: 2. Repository information
 8993:  4518:    19: 3. Directory structure
 8994:  4519:    20: 4. Repository files (if enabled)
 8995:  4520:    21: 5. Multiple file entries, each consisting of:
 8996:  4521:    22:   a. A separator line (================)
 8997:  4522:    23:   b. The file path (File: path/to/file)
 8998:  4523:    24:   c. Another separator line
 8999:  4524:    25:   d. The full contents of the file
 9000:  4525:    26:   e. A blank line
 9001:  4526:    27: 
 9002:  4527:    28: Usage Guidelines:
 9003:  4528:    29: -----------------
 9004:  4529:    30: - This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
 9005:  4530:    31:   original repository files, not this packed version.
 9006:  4531:    32: - When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
 9007:  4532:    33:   between different files in the repository.
 9008:  4533:    34: - Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with
 9009:  4534:    35:   the same level of security as you would the original repository.
 9010:  4535:    36: 
 9011:  4536:    37: Notes:
 9012:  4537:    38: ------
 9013:  4538:    39: - Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
 9014:  4539:    40: - Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
 9015:  4540:    41: - Files matching these patterns are excluded: node_modules/**, vendor/**, .git/**, storage/**, tests/**, public/**, resources/assets/**, *.min.js, *.css, *.scss, *.json, *.lock, *.log
 9016:  4541:    42: - Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded
 9017:  4542:    43: - Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded
 9018:  4543:    44: - Line numbers have been added to the beginning of each line
 9019:  4544:    45: - Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)
 9020:  4545:    46: 
 9021:  4546:    47: 
 9022:  4547:    48: ================================================================
 9023:  4548:    49: Directory Structure

 9046:  4571:    72: 
 9047:  4572:    73: ================
 9048:  4573:    74: File: agent1_ingestion.py
 9049:  4574:    75: ================
 9050:  4575:    76:   1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 9051:  4576:    77:   2: """
 9052:  4577:    78:   3: Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
 9053:  4578:    79:   4: Converts local path or Git URL to a flat repomix bundle.
 9054:  4579:    80:   5: """
 9055:  4580:    81:   6: 
 9056:  4581:    82:   7: import subprocess
 9057:  4582:    83:   8: import os
 9058:  4583:    84:   9: import sys
 9059:  4584:    85:  10: import shutil
 9060:  4585:    86:  11: import tempfile
 9061:  4586:    87:  12: import json
 9062:  4587:    88:  13: from pathlib import Path
 9063:  4588:    89:  14: from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
 9064:  4589:    90:  15: from typing import Optional
 9065:  4590:    91:  16: 
 9066:  4591:    92:  17: 
 9067:  4592:    93:  18: @dataclass
 9068:  4593:    94:  19: class IngestionResult:
 9069:  4594:    95:  20:     success: bool
 9070:  4595:    96:  21:     flat_file_path: str
 9071:  4596:    97:  22:     source_type: str          # "local" | "git"
 9072:  4597:    98:  23:     source_path: str
 9073:  4598:    99:  24:     file_size_bytes: int
 9074:  4599:   100:  25:     detected_language: str
 9075:  4600:   101:  26:     detected_framework: str
 9076:  4601:   102:  27:     error: Optional[str] = None
 9077:  4602:   103:  28: 
 9078:  4603:   104:  29: 
 9079:  4604:   105:  30: FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES = {
 9080:  4605:   106:  31:     "laravel":     ["artisan", "composer.json", "app/Http/Controllers"],
 9081:  4606:   107:  32:     "django":      ["manage.py", "settings.py", "wsgi.py"],
 9082:  4607:   108:  33:     "express":     ["package.json", "app.js", "routes/"],
 9083:  4608:   109:  34:     "nestjs":      ["nest-cli.json", "src/main.ts"],
 9084:  4609:   110:  35:     "springboot":  ["pom.xml", "src/main/java", "Application.java"],
 9085:  4610:   111:  36:     "rails":       ["Gemfile", "config/routes.rb", "app/controllers"],
 9086:  4611:   112:  37:     "fastapi":     ["main.py", "requirements.txt"],  # + fastapi in requirements
 9087:  4612:   113:  38:     "gin":         ["go.mod", "main.go"],
 9088:  4613:   114:  39:     "aspnet":      ["*.csproj", "Program.cs", "Startup.cs"],
 9089:  4614:   115:  40: }
 9090:  4615:   116:  41: 
 9091:  4616:   117:  42: LANGUAGE_MAP = {
 9092:  4617:   118:  43:     "laravel": "PHP",
 9093:  4618:   119:  44:     "django": "Python",
 9094:  4619:   120:  45:     "fastapi": "Python",
 9095:  4620:   121:  46:     "express": "JavaScript",
 9096:  4621:   122:  47:     "nestjs": "TypeScript",
 9097:  4622:   123:  48:     "springboot": "Java",
 9098:  4623:   124:  49:     "rails": "Ruby",
 9099:  4624:   125:  50:     "gin": "Go",
 9100:  4625:   126:  51:     "aspnet": "C#",
 9101:  4626:   127:  52: }
 9102:  4627:   128:  53: 
 9103:  4628:   129:  54: 
 9104:  4629:   130:  55: def detect_framework(path: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
 9105:  4630:   131:  56:     """Detect framework and language from directory structure."""
 9106:  4631:   132:  57:     for framework, signatures in FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES.items():
 9107:  4632:   133:  58:         for sig in signatures:
 9108:  4633:   134:  59:             check = Path(path) / sig
 9109:  4634:   135:  60:             # Check direct file/dir
 9110:  4635:   136:  61:             if check.exists():
 9111:  4636:   137:  62:                 return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
 9112:  4637:   138:  63:             # Glob pattern
 9113:  4638:   139:  64:             if "*" in sig:
 9114:  4639:   140:  65:                 matches = list(Path(path).glob(sig))
 9115:  4640:   141:  66:                 if matches:
 9116:  4641:   142:  67:                     return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
 9117:  4642:   143:  68:     return "unknown", "Unknown"
 9118:  4643:   144:  69: 
 9119:  4644:   145:  70: 
 9120:  4645:   146:  71: def clone_repo(git_url: str, target_dir: str) -> str:
 9121:  4646:   147:  72:     """Clone a git repository to target_dir."""
 9122:  4647:   148:  73:     print(f"[Agent 1] Cloning {git_url}...")
 9123:  4648:   149:  74:     result = subprocess.run(
 9124:  4649:   150:  75:         ["git", "clone", "--depth=1", git_url, target_dir],
 9125:  4650:   151:  76:         capture_output=True, text=True
 9126:  4651:   152:  77:     )
 9127:  4652:   153:  78:     if result.returncode != 0:
 9128:  4653:   154:  79:         raise RuntimeError(f"Git clone failed: {result.stderr}")
 9129:  4654:   155:  80:     return target_dir
 9130:  4655:   156:  81: 
 9131:  4656:   157:  82: 
 9132:  4657:   158:  83: def run_repomix(source_dir: str, output_path: str) -> None:
 9133:  4658:   159:  84:     """Run repomix to create flat bundle from source_dir."""
 9134:  4659:   160:  85:     print(f"[Agent 1] Running repomix on {source_dir}...")
 9135:  4660:   161:  86: 
 9136:  4661:   162:  87:     # repomix config — exclude common non-essential files
 9137:  4662:   163:  88:     repomix_config = {
 9138:  4663:   164:  89:         "output": {
 9139:  4664:   165:  90:             "filePath": output_path,
 9140:  4665:   166:  91:             "style": "plain",
 9141:  4666:   167:  92:             "removeComments": False,
 9142:  4667:   168:  93:             "removeEmptyLines": False,
 9143:  4668:   169:  94:             "showLineNumbers": True,
 9144:  4669:   170:  95:             "copyToClipboard": False,
 9145:  4670:   171:  96:         },
 9146:  4671:   172:  97:         "ignore": {
 9147:  4672:   173:  98:             "useGitignore": True,
 9148:  4673:   174:  99:             "useDefaultPatterns": True,
 9149:  4674:   175: 100:             "customPatterns": [
 9150:  4675:   176: 101:                 "node_modules/**",
 9151:  4676:   177: 102:                 "vendor/**",
 9152:  4677:   178: 103:                 ".git/**",
 9153:  4678:   179: 104:                 "storage/**",
 9154:  4679:   180: 105:                 "tests/**",               # File test bisa dibuang untuk analisis logika utama
 9155:  4680:   181: 106:                 "public/**",              # Gambar, CSS, Minified JS di sini dibuang saja
 9156:  4681:   182: 107:                 "resources/assets/**",    # Assets mentah
 9157:  4682:   183: 108:                 "*.min.js",
 9158:  4683:   184: 109:                 "*.css",
 9159:  4684:   185: 110:                 "*.scss",
 9160:  4685:   186: 111:                 "*.json",                 # File JSON besar (seperti package-lock) sering ikut terbawa
 9161:  4686:   187: 112:                 "*.lock",
 9162:  4687:   188: 113:                 "*.log"
 9163:  4688:   189: 114:             ]
 9164:  4689:   190: 115:         }
 9165:  4690:   191: 116:     }
 9166:  4691:   192: 117: 
 9167:  4692:   193: 118:     config_path = Path(source_dir) / ".repomix-config.json"
 9168:  4693:   194: 119:     with open(config_path, "w") as f:
 9169:  4694:   195: 120:         json.dump(repomix_config, f, indent=2)
 9170:  4695:   196: 121: 
 9171:  4696:   197: 122:     result = subprocess.run(
 9172:  4697:   198: 123:         ["repomix", "--config", str(config_path), "--output", output_path, source_dir],
 9173:  4698:   199: 124:         capture_output=True, text=True, shell=True, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"
 9174:  4699:   200: 125:     )
 9175:  4700:   201: 126: 
 9176:  4701:   202: 127:     # Cleanup config
 9177:  4702:   203: 128:     config_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
 9178:  4703:   204: 129: 
 9179:  4704:   205: 130:     if result.returncode != 0:
 9180:  4705:   206: 131:         raise RuntimeError(f"repomix failed: {result.stderr}")
 9181:  4706:   207: 132: 
 9182:  4707:   208: 133:     print(f"[Agent 1] ✅ repomix output: {output_path}")
 9183:  4708:   209: 134: 
 9184:  4709:   210: 135: 
 9185:  4710:   211: 136: def run(source: str, output_dir: str = "./output") -> IngestionResult:
 9186:  4711:   212: 137:     """
 9187:  4712:   213: 138:     Main entry point for Agent 1.
 9188:  4713:   214: 139:     
 9189:  4714:   215: 140:     Args:
 9190:  4715:   216: 141:         source: Local directory path OR Git URL
 9191:  4716:   217: 142:         output_dir: Where to save the flat bundle
 9192:  4717:   218: 143:     
 9193:  4718:   219: 144:     Returns:
 9194:  4719:   220: 145:         IngestionResult with flat_file_path pointing to repomix output
 9195:  4720:   221: 146:     """
 9196:  4721:   222: 147:     os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
 9197:  4722:   223: 148:     output_path = str(Path(output_dir) / "flat_codebase.txt")
 9198:  4723:   224: 149:     temp_dir = None
 9199:  4724:   225: 150: 
 9200:  4725:   226: 151:     try:
 9201:  4726:   227: 152:         # Determine source type
 9202:  4727:   228: 153:         if source.startswith("http") or source.startswith("git@"):
 9203:  4728:   229: 154:             source_type = "git"
 9204:  4729:   230: 155:             temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="agent1_repo_")
 9205:  4730:   231: 156:             working_dir = clone_repo(source, temp_dir)
 9206:  4731:   232: 157:         else:
 9207:  4732:   233: 158:             source_type = "local"
 9208:  4733:   234: 159:             working_dir = os.path.abspath(source)
 9209:  4734:   235: 160:             if not os.path.isdir(working_dir):
 9210:  4735:   236: 161:                 raise ValueError(f"Directory not found: {working_dir}")
 9211:  4736:   237: 162: 
 9212:  4737:   238: 163:         # Detect framework
 9213:  4738:   239: 164:         framework, language = detect_framework(working_dir)
 9214:  4739:   240: 165:         print(f"[Agent 1] Detected: {framework} / {language}")
 9215:  4740:   241: 166: 
 9216:  4741:   242: 167:         # Run repomix
 9217:  4742:   243: 168:         run_repomix(working_dir, output_path)
 9218:  4743:   244: 169: 
 9219:  4744:   245: 170:         file_size = Path(output_path).stat().st_size
 9220:  4745:   246: 171: 
 9221:  4746:   247: 172:         return IngestionResult(
 9222:  4747:   248: 173:             success=True,
 9223:  4748:   249: 174:             flat_file_path=output_path,
 9224:  4749:   250: 175:             source_type=source_type,
 9225:  4750:   251: 176:             source_path=source,
 9226:  4751:   252: 177:             file_size_bytes=file_size,
 9227:  4752:   253: 178:             detected_language=language,
 9228:  4753:   254: 179:             detected_framework=framework,
 9229:  4754:   255: 180:         )
 9230:  4755:   256: 181: 
 9231:  4756:   257: 182:     except Exception as e:
 9232:  4757:   258: 183:         return IngestionResult(
 9233:  4758:   259: 184:             success=False,
 9234:  4759:   260: 185:             flat_file_path="",
 9235:  4760:   261: 186:             source_type="unknown",
 9236:  4761:   262: 187:             source_path=source,
 9237:  4762:   263: 188:             file_size_bytes=0,
 9238:  4763:   264: 189:             detected_language="Unknown",
 9239:  4764:   265: 190:             detected_framework="unknown",
 9240:  4765:   266: 191:             error=str(e),
 9241:  4766:   267: 192:         )
 9242:  4767:   268: 193:     finally:
 9243:  4768:   269: 194:         if temp_dir and os.path.exists(temp_dir):
 9244:  4769:   270: 195:             shutil.rmtree(temp_dir, ignore_errors=True)
 9245:  4770:   271: 196: 
 9246:  4771:   272: 197: 
 9247:  4772:   273: 198: if __name__ == "__main__":
 9248:  4773:   274: 199:     source = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
 9249:  4774:   275: 200:     result = run(source)
 9250:  4775:   276: 201:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 9251:  4776:   277: 
 9252:  4777:   278: ================
 9253:  4778:   279: File: agent2_gemini_identifier.py
 9254:  4779:   280: ================
 9255:  4780:   281:   1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 9256:  4781:   282:   2: """
 9257:  4782:   283:   3: Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
 9258:  4783:   284:   4: Sends repomix bundle to Gemini AI for transaction analysis.
 9259:  4784:   285:   5: """
 9260:  4785:   286:   6: 
 9261:  4786:   287:   7: import os
 9262:  4787:   288:   8: import json
 9263:  4788:   289:   9: import time
 9264:  4789:   290:  10: import requests
 9265:  4790:   291:  11: from pathlib import Path
 9266:  4791:   292:  12: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
 9267:  4792:   293:  13: from typing import Optional
 9268:  4793:   294:  14: from dotenv import load_dotenv
 9269:  4794:   295:  15: 
 9270:  4795:   296:  16: load_dotenv()
 9271:  4796:   297:  17: 
 9272:  4797:   298:  18: GEMINI_API_KEY = os.getenv("GEMINI_API_KEY")
 9273:  4798:   299:  19: GEMINI_ENDPOINT = (
 9274:  4799:   300:  20:     f"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/"
 9275:  4800:   301:  21:     f"gemini-2.5-flash:generateContent?key={GEMINI_API_KEY}"
 9276:  4801:   302:  22: )
 9277:  4802:   303:  23: 
 9278:  4803:   304:  24: MAX_CONTENT_CHARS = 900_000
 9279:  4804:   305:  25: 
 9280:  4805:   306:  26: 
 9281:  4806:   307:  27: @dataclass
 9282:  4807:   308:  28: class TransactionField:
 9283:  4808:   309:  29:     name: str
 9284:  4809:   310:  30:     type: str
 9285:  4810:   311:  31:     required: bool
 9286:  4811:   312:  32:     description: str
 9287:  4812:   313:  33:     validation_rules: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 9288:  4813:   314:  34: 
 9289:  4814:   315:  35: 
 9290:  4815:   316:  36: @dataclass
 9291:  4816:   317:  37: class Transaction:
 9292:  4817:   318:  38:     id: str
 9293:  4818:   319:  39:     method: str
 9294:  4819:   320:  40:     endpoint: str
 9295:  4820:   321:  41:     description: str
 9296:  4821:   322:  42:     requires_auth: bool
 9297:  4822:   323:  43:     requires_csrf: bool
 9298:  4823:   324:  44:     csrf_field_name: str
 9299:  4824:   325:  45:     fields: list[TransactionField]
 9300:  4825:   326:  46:     framework: str
 9301:  4826:   327:  47:     tags: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 9302:  4827:   328:  48: 
 9303:  4828:   329:  49: 
 9304:  4829:   330:  50: @dataclass
 9305:  4830:   331:  51: class IdentificationResult:
 9306:  4831:   332:  52:     success: bool
 9307:  4832:   333:  53:     framework: str
 9308:  4833:   334:  54:     language: str
 9309:  4834:   335:  55:     transactions: list[Transaction]
 9310:  4835:   336:  56:     total_routes: int
 9311:  4836:   337:  57:     post_routes: int
 9312:  4837:   338:  58:     csrf_protected_routes: int
 9313:  4838:   339:  59:     auth_required_routes: int
 9314:  4839:   340:  60:     error: Optional[str] = None
 9315:  4840:   341:  61: 
 9316:  4841:   342:  62: 
 9317:  4842:   343:  63: SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
 9318:  4843:   344:  64: You are an expert code analyzer. You will receive a flat bundle of a web application codebase.
 9319:  4844:   345:  65: 
 9320:  4845:   346:  66: Your task is to analyze ALL routes/endpoints and return a STRICT JSON response.
 9321:  4846:   347:  67: 
 9322:  4847:   348:  68: ## What to extract per endpoint:
 9323:  4848:   349:  69: 1. HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)
 9324:  4849:   350:  70: 2. URL path / route
 9325:  4850:   351:  71: 3. Description of what the endpoint does
 9326:  4851:   352:  72: 4. Whether it requires authentication (JWT, session, Bearer token, etc.)
 9327:  4852:   353:  73: 5. Whether it requires CSRF protection — detect automatically by framework:
 9328:  4853:   354:  74:    - Laravel: look for @csrf, csrf_field(), VerifyCsrfToken middleware, X-CSRF-TOKEN header
 9329:  4854:   355:  75:    - Django: look for {% csrf_token %}, CsrfViewMiddleware, csrf_protect decorator
 9330:  4855:   356:  76:    - Express.js: look for csurf, csrf(), csrfToken()
 9331:  4856:   357:  77:    - Rails: look for authenticity_token, protect_from_forgery
 9332:  4857:   358:  78:    - Spring Boot: look for CsrfToken, .csrf(), SecurityConfig
 9333:  4858:   359:  79:    - FastAPI: look for custom CSRF implementations or fastapi-csrf-protect
 9334:  4859:   360:  80:    - NestJS: look for @nestjs/csrf, CsrfGuard
 9335:  4860:   361:  81:    - Go (Gin/Echo): look for gorilla/csrf, nosurf
 9336:  4861:   362:  82:    - ASP.NET: look for [ValidateAntiForgeryToken], AntiForgeryToken()
 9337:  4862:   363:  83: 6. The exact CSRF field name used (e.g., "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "authenticity_token")
 9338:  4863:   364:  84: 7. ALL form fields/request body fields with: name, type, required status, and any validation rules
 9339:  4864:   365:  85: 8. Return ONLY valid JSON
 9340:  4865:   366:  86: 
 9341:  4866:   367:  87: ## Response format — return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation:
 9342:  4867:   368:  88: 
 9343:  4868:   369:  89: {
 9344:  4869:   370:  90:   "framework": "laravel",
 9345:  4870:   371:  91:   "language": "PHP",
 9346:  4871:   372:  92:   "transactions": [
 9347:  4872:   373:  93:     {
 9348:  4873:   374:  94:       "id": "txn_001",
 9349:  4874:   375:  95:       "method": "POST",
 9350:  4875:   376:  96:       "endpoint": "/api/login",
 9351:  4876:   377:  97:       "description": "User authentication endpoint",
 9352:  4877:   378:  98:       "requires_auth": false,
 9353:  4878:   379:  99:       "requires_csrf": true,
 9354:  4879:   380: 100:       "csrf_field_name": "_token",
 9355:  4880:   381: 101:       "fields": [
 9356:  4881:   382: 102:         {
 9357:  4882:   383: 103:           "name": "email",
 9358:  4883:   384: 104:           "type": "email",
 9359:  4884:   385: 105:           "required": true,
 9360:  4885:   386: 106:           "description": "User email address",
 9361:  4886:   387: 107:           "validation_rules": ["required", "email", "max:255"]
 9362:  4887:   388: 108:         }
 9363:  4888:   389: 109:       ],
 9364:  4889:   390: 110:       "tags": ["auth", "csrf"]
 9365:  4890:   391: 111:     }
 9366:  4891:   392: 112:   ]
 9367:  4892:   393: 113: }
 9368:  4893:   394: 114: """
 9369:  4894:   395: 115: 
 9370:  4895:   396: 116: 
 9371:  4896:   397: 117: def chunk_content(content: str, max_chars: int) -> str:
 9372:  4897:   398: 118:     """Truncate content if too large, prioritizing route/controller files."""
 9373:  4898:   399: 119:     if len(content) <= max_chars:
 9374:  4899:   400: 120:         return content
 9375:  4900:   401: 121: 
 9376:  4901:   402: 122:     lines = content.split("\n")
 9377:  4902:   403: 123:     priority_keywords = [
 9378:  4903:   404: 124:         "route", "controller", "middleware", "csrf", "request",
 9379:  4904:   405: 125:         "form", "validate", "auth", "login", "register", "api",
 9380:  4905:   406: 126:         "POST", "GET", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"
 9381:  4906:   407: 127:     ]
 9382:  4907:   408: 128: 
 9383:  4908:   409: 129:     priority_lines = []
 9384:  4909:   410: 130:     other_lines = []
 9385:  4910:   411: 131: 
 9386:  4911:   412: 132:     for line in lines:
 9387:  4912:   413: 133:         if any(kw.lower() in line.lower() for kw in priority_keywords):
 9388:  4913:   414: 134:             priority_lines.append(line)
 9389:  4914:   415: 135:         else:
 9390:  4915:   416: 136:             other_lines.append(line)
 9391:  4916:   417: 137: 
 9392:  4917:   418: 138:     result = "\n".join(priority_lines)
 9393:  4918:   419: 139:     if len(result) < max_chars:
 9394:  4919:   420: 140:         remaining = max_chars - len(result)
 9395:  4920:   421: 141:         result += "\n" + "\n".join(other_lines)[:remaining]
 9396:  4921:   422: 142: 
 9397:  4922:   423: 143:     return result[:max_chars]
 9398:  4923:   424: 144: 
 9399:  4924:   425: 145: 
 9400:  4925:   426: 146: def call_gemini(content: str) -> dict:
 9401:  4926:   427: 147:     """Call Gemini API with the codebase content."""
 9402:  4927:   428: 148:     print(f"[Agent 2] Sending {len(content)} chars (~{len(content)//4} tokens) to Gemini AI...")
 9403:  4928:   429: 149:     start_time = time.time()
 9404:  4929:   430: 150:     
 9405:  4930:   431: 151:     payload = {
 9406:  4931:   432: 152:         "system_instruction": {
 9407:  4932:   433: 153:             "parts": [{"text": SYSTEM_PROMPT}]
 9408:  4933:   434: 154:         },
 9409:  4934:   435: 155:         "contents": [{
 9410:  4935:   436: 156:             "parts": [{
 9411:  4936:   437: 157:                 "text": f"Analyze this codebase and return the JSON:\n\n{content}"
 9412:  4937:   438: 158:             }]
 9413:  4938:   439: 159:         }],
 9414:  4939:   440: 160:         "generationConfig": {
 9415:  4940:   441: 161:             "temperature": 0.1,
 9416:  4941:   442: 162:             "maxOutputTokens": 8192,
 9417:  4942:   443: 163:             "responseMimeType": "application/json"
 9418:  4943:   444: 164:         }
 9419:  4944:   445: 165:     }
 9420:  4945:   446: 166: 
 9421:  4946:   447: 167:     for attempt in range(5):
 9422:  4947:   448: 168:         try:
 9423:  4948:   449: 169:             response = requests.post(
 9424:  4949:   450: 170:                 GEMINI_ENDPOINT,
 9425:  4950:   451: 171:                 json=payload,
 9426:  4951:   452: 172:                 headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
 9427:  4952:   453: 173:                 timeout=120
 9428:  4953:   454: 174:             )
 9429:  4954:   455: 175: 
 9430:  4955:   456: 176:             # Retry on rate limit (429) or server errors (5xx)
 9431:  4956:   457: 177:             if response.status_code in (429, 500, 502, 503):
 9432:  4957:   458: 178:                 wait_time = 30 * (attempt + 1)
 9433:  4958:   459: 179:                 print(f"[Agent 2] HTTP {response.status_code} on attempt {attempt + 1}/5.")
 9434:  4959:   460: 180:                 print(f"[Agent 2] Response: {response.text}")
 9435:  4960:   461: 181:                 print(f"[Agent 2] Waiting {wait_time}s before retry...")
 9436:  4961:   462: 182:                 time.sleep(wait_time)
 9437:  4962:   463: 183:                 continue
 9438:  4963:   464: 184: 
 9439:  4964:   465: 185:             response.raise_for_status()
 9440:  4965:   466: 186:             data = response.json()
 9441:  4966:   467: 187: 
 9442:  4967:   468: 188:             raw_text = data["candidates"][0]["content"]["parts"][0]["text"]
 9443:  4968:   469: 189:             raw_text = raw_text.strip()
 9444:  4969:   470: 190:             if raw_text.startswith("```"):
 9445:  4970:   471: 191:                 raw_text = "\n".join(raw_text.split("\n")[1:-1])
 9446:  4971:   472: 192: 
 9447:  4972:   473: 193:             elapsed = time.time() - start_time
 9448:  4973:   474: 194:             print(f"[Agent 2] Response received in {elapsed:.1f}s")
 9449:  4974:   475: 195:             return json.loads(raw_text)
 9450:  4975:   476: 196: 
 9451:  4976:   477: 197:         except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
 9452:  4977:   478: 198:             print(f"[Agent 2] Timeout on attempt {attempt + 1}/5, retrying...")
 9453:  4978:   479: 199:             time.sleep(10 * (attempt + 1))
 9454:  4979:   480: 200:         except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
 9455:  4980:   481: 201:             raise ValueError(f"Gemini returned invalid JSON: {e}")
 9456:  4981:   482: 202: 
 9457:  4982:   483: 203:     raise RuntimeError("Gemini API failed after 5 attempts")
 9458:  4983:   484: 204: 
 9459:  4984:   485: 205: 
 9460:  4985:   486: 206: def parse_result(raw: dict, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
 9461:  4986:   487: 207:     """Parse Gemini response into typed IdentificationResult."""
 9462:  4987:   488: 208:     transactions = []
 9463:  4988:   489: 209: 
 9464:  4989:   490: 210:     for t in raw.get("transactions", []):
 9465:  4990:   491: 211:         fields = [
 9466:  4991:   492: 212:             TransactionField(
 9467:  4992:   493: 213:                 name=f["name"],
 9468:  4993:   494: 214:                 type=f.get("type", "string"),
 9469:  4994:   495: 215:                 required=f.get("required", False),
 9470:  4995:   496: 216:                 description=f.get("description", ""),
 9471:  4996:   497: 217:                 validation_rules=f.get("validation_rules", []),
 9472:  4997:   498: 218:             )
 9473:  4998:   499: 219:             for f in t.get("fields", [])
 9474:  4999:   500: 220:         ]
 9475:  5000:   501: 221: 
 9476:  5001:   502: 222:         transactions.append(Transaction(
 9477:  5002:   503: 223:             id=t.get("id", f"txn_{len(transactions):03d}"),
 9478:  5003:   504: 224:             method=t["method"].upper(),
 9479:  5004:   505: 225:             endpoint=t["endpoint"],
 9480:  5005:   506: 226:             description=t.get("description", ""),
 9481:  5006:   507: 227:             requires_auth=t.get("requires_auth", False),
 9482:  5007:   508: 228:             requires_csrf=t.get("requires_csrf", False),
 9483:  5008:   509: 229:             csrf_field_name=t.get("csrf_field_name", ""),
 9484:  5009:   510: 230:             fields=fields,
 9485:  5010:   511: 231:             framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
 9486:  5011:   512: 232:             tags=t.get("tags", []),
 9487:  5012:   513: 233:         ))
 9488:  5013:   514: 234: 
 9489:  5014:   515: 235:     mutating_methods = {"POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"}
 9490:  5015:   516: 236:     return IdentificationResult(
 9491:  5016:   517: 237:         success=True,
 9492:  5017:   518: 238:         framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
 9493:  5018:   519: 239:         language=raw.get("language", "Unknown"),
 9494:  5019:   520: 240:         transactions=transactions,
 9495:  5020:   521: 241:         total_routes=len(transactions),
 9496:  5021:   522: 242:         post_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.method in mutating_methods),
 9497:  5022:   523: 243:         csrf_protected_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_csrf),
 9498:  5023:   524: 244:         auth_required_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_auth),
 9499:  5024:   525: 245:     )
 9500:  5025:   526: 246: 
 9501:  5026:   527: 247: 
 9502:  5027:   528: 248: def run(flat_file_path: str, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
 9503:  5028:   529: 249:     """
 9504:  5029:   530: 250:     Main entry point for Agent 2.
 9505:  5030:   531: 251:     
 9506:  5031:   532: 252:     Args:
 9507:  5032:   533: 253:         flat_file_path: Path to repomix output file
 9508:  5033:   534: 254:         framework_hint: Optional hint from Agent 1
 9509:  5034:   535: 255:     
 9510:  5035:   536: 256:     Returns:
 9511:  5036:   537: 257:         IdentificationResult with all transactions
 9512:  5037:   538: 258:     """
 9513:  5038:   539: 259:     try:
 9514:  5039:   540: 260:         print(f"[Agent 2] Reading: {flat_file_path}")
 9515:  5040:   541: 261:         content = Path(flat_file_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
 9516:  5041:   542: 262:         
 9517:  5042:   543: 263:         print(f"[Agent 2] Preparing context (limit: {MAX_CONTENT_CHARS} chars)...")
 9518:  5043:   544: 264:         content = chunk_content(content, MAX_CONTENT_CHARS)
 9519:  5044:   545: 265: 
 9520:  5045:   546: 266:         raw = call_gemini(content)
 9521:  5046:   547: 267:         print("[Agent 2] Parsing results...")
 9522:  5047:   548: 268:         result = parse_result(raw, framework_hint)
 9523:  5048:   549: 269: 
 9524:  5049:   550: 270:         print(f"[Agent 2] Discovering endpoints...")
 9525:  5050:   551: 271:         for txn in result.transactions:
 9526:  5051:   552: 272:             auth_icon = "🔑" if txn.requires_auth else "🔓"
 9527:  5052:   553: 273:             csrf_icon = "🔐" if txn.requires_csrf else ""
 9528:  5053:   554: 274:             print(f"[Agent 2]   ✅ {txn.method.ljust(6)} {txn.endpoint} {auth_icon} {csrf_icon}")
 9529:  5054:   555: 275:             time.sleep(0.2)  # Delay to simulate processing and make the SSE stream visible
 9530:  5055:   556: 276: 
 9531:  5056:   557: 277:         print(f"[Agent 2] ✅ Found {result.total_routes} routes total")
 9532:  5057:   558: 278:         print(f"[Agent 2]    POST/mutating: {result.post_routes}")
 9533:  5058:   559: 279:         print(f"[Agent 2]    CSRF protected: {result.csrf_protected_routes}")
 9534:  5059:   560: 280:         print(f"[Agent 2]    Auth required: {result.auth_required_routes}")
 9535:  5060:   561: 281: 
 9536:  5061:   562: 282:         # Save transactions to file
 9537:  5062:   563: 283:         output_path = Path(flat_file_path).parent / "transactions.json"
 9538:  5063:   564: 284:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
 9539:  5064:   565: 285:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
 9540:  5065:   566: 286:         print(f"[Agent 2] Saved: {output_path}")
 9541:  5066:   567: 287: 
 9542:  5067:   568: 288:         return result
 9543:  5068:   569: 289: 
 9544:  5069:   570: 290:     except Exception as e:
 9545:  5070:   571: 291:         print(f"[Agent 2] ❌ Error: {str(e)}")
 9546:  5071:   572: 292:         return IdentificationResult(
 9547:  5072:   573: 293:             success=False,
 9548:  5073:   574: 294:             framework=framework_hint,
 9549:  5074:   575: 295:             language="Unknown",
 9550:  5075:   576: 296:             transactions=[],
 9551:  5076:   577: 297:             total_routes=0,
 9552:  5077:   578: 298:             post_routes=0,
 9553:  5078:   579: 299:             csrf_protected_routes=0,
 9554:  5079:   580: 300:             auth_required_routes=0,
 9555:  5080:   581: 301:             error=str(e),
 9556:  5081:   582: 302:         )
 9557:  5082:   583: 303: 
 9558:  5083:   584: 304: 
 9559:  5084:   585: 305: if __name__ == "__main__":
 9560:  5085:   586: 306:     import sys
 9561:  5086:   587: 307:     flat_file = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/flat_codebase.txt"
 9562:  5087:   588: 308:     result = run(flat_file)
 9563:  5088:   589: 309:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 9564:  5089:   590: 
 9565:  5090:   591: ================
 9566:  5091:   592: File: agent3_carbon.py
 9567:  5092:   593: ================
 9568:  5093:   594:   1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
 9569:  5094:   595:   2: """
 9570:  5095:   596:   3: Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent
 9571:  5096:   597:   4: Runs live HTTP requests to the target app and measures CO2 emissions.
 9572:  5097:   598:   5: """
 9573:  5098:   599:   6: 
 9574:  5099:   600:   7: import os
 9575:  5100:   601:   8: import json
 9576:  5101:   602:   9: import time
 9577:  5102:   603:  10: import re
 9578:  5103:   604:  11: import requests
 9579:  5104:   605:  12: from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
 9580:  5105:   606:  13: from codecarbon import EmissionsTracker
 9581:  5106:   607:  14: from pathlib import Path
 9582:  5107:   608:  15: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
 9583:  5108:   609:  16: from typing import Optional, Any
 9584:  5109:   610:  17: from dotenv import load_dotenv
 9585:  5110:   611:  18: 
 9586:  5111:   612:  19: load_dotenv()
 9587:  5112:   613:  20: 
 9588:  5113:   614:  21: BASE_URL = os.getenv("TARGET_BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
 9589:  5114:   615:  22: REQUEST_TIMEOUT = int(os.getenv("REQUEST_TIMEOUT", "30"))
 9590:  5115:   616:  23: DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS = float(os.getenv("DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS", "0.5"))
 9591:  5116:   617:  24: 
 9592:  5117:   618:  25: 
 9593:  5118:   619:  26: @dataclass
 9594:  5119:   620:  27: class RequestMeasurement:
 9595:  5120:   621:  28:     transaction_id: str
 9596:  5121:   622:  29:     method: str
 9597:  5122:   623:  30:     endpoint: str
 9598:  5123:   624:  31:     full_url: str
 9599:  5124:   625:  32:     status_code: int
 9600:  5125:   626:  33:     response_time_ms: float
 9601:  5126:   627:  34:     energy_consumed_kwh: float
 9602:  5127:   628:  35:     co2_emissions_kg: float
 9603:  5128:   629:  36:     success: bool
 9604:  5129:   630:  37:     csrf_obtained: bool
 9605:  5130:   631:  38:     fields_sent: list[str]
 9606:  5131:   632:  39:     error: Optional[str] = None
 9607:  5132:   633:  40:     response_preview: str = ""
 9608:  5133:   634:  41: 
 9609:  5134:   635:  42: 
 9610:  5135:   636:  43: @dataclass
 9611:  5136:   637:  44: class CarbonResult:
 9612:  5137:   638:  45:     success: bool
 9613:  5138:   639:  46:     base_url: str
 9614:  5139:   640:  47:     total_requests: int
 9615:  5140:   641:  48:     successful_requests: int
 9616:  5141:   642:  49:     failed_requests: int
 9617:  5142:   643:  50:     total_energy_kwh: float
 9618:  5143:   644:  51:     total_co2_kg: float
 9619:  5144:   645:  52:     avg_response_time_ms: float

 9622:  5147:   648:  55: 
 9623:  5148:   649:  56: 
 9624:  5149:   650:  57: # ─── CSRF Token Extractors ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
 9625:  5150:   651:  58: 
 9626:  5151:   652:  59: def extract_csrf_from_html(html: str, field_name: str) -> Optional[str]:
 9627:  5152:   653:  60:     """Extract CSRF token from HTML hidden input."""
 9628:  5153:   654:  61:     soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "html.parser")
 9629:  5154:   655:  62: 
 9630:  5155:   656:  63:     # Try direct name match
 9631:  5156:   657:  64:     token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": field_name})
 9632:  5157:   658:  65:     if token_input:
 9633:  5158:   659:  66:         return token_input.get("value")
 9634:  5159:   660:  67: 
 9635:  5160:   661:  68:     # Try meta tag (common in SPAs)
 9636:  5161:   662:  69:     meta = soup.find("meta", {"name": field_name})
 9637:  5162:   663:  70:     if meta:
 9638:  5163:   664:  71:         return meta.get("content")
 9639:  5164:   665:  72: 
 9640:  5165:   666:  73:     # Generic CSRF patterns
 9641:  5166:   667:  74:     for pattern in ["csrf", "token", "_token", "xsrf"]:
 9642:  5167:   668:  75:         token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": re.compile(pattern, re.I)})
 9643:  5168:   669:  76:         if token_input:
 9644:  5169:   670:  77:             return token_input.get("value")
 9645:  5170:   671:  78: 
 9646:  5171:   672:  79:     return None
 9647:  5172:   673:  80: 
 9648:  5173:   674:  81: 
 9649:  5174:   675:  82: def get_csrf_token(
 9650:  5175:   676:  83:     session: requests.Session,
 9651:  5176:   677:  84:     transaction_endpoint: str,
 9652:  5177:   678:  85:     csrf_field_name: str,
 9653:  5178:   679:  86:     framework: str
 9654:  5179:   680:  87: ) -> tuple[Optional[str], bool]:
 9655:  5180:   681:  88:     """
 9656:  5181:   682:  89:     Attempt to retrieve CSRF token before a mutating request.
 9657:  5182:   683:  90:     Returns (token_value, success).
 9658:  5183:   684:  91:     """
 9659:  5184:   685:  92:     form_endpoint = transaction_endpoint.replace("/api/", "/")
 9660:  5185:   686:  93:     candidates = [
 9661:  5186:   687:  94:         f"{BASE_URL}{form_endpoint}",
 9662:  5187:   688:  95:         f"{BASE_URL}/",
 9663:  5188:   689:  96:         f"{BASE_URL}/login",
 9664:  5189:   690:  97:         f"{BASE_URL}/home",
 9665:  5190:   691:  98:     ]
 9666:  5191:   692:  99: 
 9667:  5192:   693: 100:     for url in candidates:
 9668:  5193:   694: 101:         try:
 9669:  5194:   695: 102:             r = session.get(url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 9670:  5195:   696: 103:             if r.status_code == 200:
 9671:  5196:   697: 104:                 # 1. Check HTML for hidden input
 9672:  5197:   698: 105:                 token = extract_csrf_from_html(r.text, csrf_field_name)
 9673:  5198:   699: 106:                 if token:
 9674:  5199:   700: 107:                     return token, True
 9675:  5200:   701: 108: 
 9676:  5201:   702: 109:                 # 2. Check cookies (XSRF-TOKEN style, e.g., Laravel Sanctum)
 9677:  5202:   703: 110:                 for cookie_name in ["XSRF-TOKEN", "csrftoken", "csrf_token"]:
 9678:  5203:   704: 111:                     if cookie_name in session.cookies:
 9679:  5204:   705: 112:                         import urllib.parse
 9680:  5205:   706: 113:                         return urllib.parse.unquote(session.cookies[cookie_name]), True
 9681:  5206:   707: 114: 
 9682:  5207:   708: 115:                 # 3. Check response headers
 9683:  5208:   709: 116:                 for header_name in ["X-CSRF-Token", "X-XSRF-Token", "CSRF-Token"]:
 9684:  5209:   710: 117:                     if header_name in r.headers:
 9685:  5210:   711: 118:                         return r.headers[header_name], True
 9686:  5211:   712: 119: 
 9687:  5212:   713: 120:         except Exception:
 9688:  5213:   714: 121:             continue
 9689:  5214:   715: 122: 
 9690:  5215:   716: 123:     return None, False
 9691:  5216:   717: 124: 
 9692:  5217:   718: 125: 
 9693:  5218:   719: 126: # ─── Dummy Data Generator ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 9694:  5219:   720: 127: 
 9695:  5220:   721: 128: DUMMY_VALUES: dict[str, Any] = {
 9696:  5221:   722: 129:     "email":    "test@example.com",
 9697:  5222:   723: 130:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
 9698:  5223:   724: 131:     "name":     "Test User",
 9699:  5224:   725: 132:     "username": "testuser",
 9700:  5225:   726: 133:     "phone":    "+1234567890",
 9701:  5226:   727: 134:     "address":  "123 Test Street",
 9702:  5227:   728: 135:     "title":    "Test Title",
 9703:  5228:   729: 136:     "body":     "Test body content for automated testing",
 9704:  5229:   730: 137:     "content":  "Test content",
 9705:  5230:   731: 138:     "message":  "Test message",
 9706:  5231:   732: 139:     "amount":   "100.00",
 9707:  5232:   733: 140:     "price":    "99.99",
 9708:  5233:   734: 141:     "quantity": "1",
 9709:  5234:   735: 142:     "date":     "2024-01-01",
 9710:  5235:   736: 143:     "token":    "dummy_token_for_testing",
 9711:  5236:   737: 144:     "code":     "TEST123",
 9712:  5237:   738: 145:     "url":      "https://example.com",
 9713:  5238:   739: 146:     "file":     None,  # Skip file uploads
 9714:  5239:   740: 147: }
 9715:  5240:   741: 148: 
 9716:  5241:   742: 149: TYPE_DEFAULTS: dict[str, Any] = {
 9717:  5242:   743: 150:     "email":    "test@example.com",
 9718:  5243:   744: 151:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
 9719:  5244:   745: 152:     "string":   "test_value",
 9720:  5245:   746: 153:     "integer":  "1",
 9721:  5246:   747: 154:     "number":   "1",
 9722:  5247:   748: 155:     "boolean":  "true",
 9723:  5248:   749: 156:     "text":     "Test text content",
 9724:  5249:   750: 157:     "file":     None,
 9725:  5250:   751: 158: }
 9726:  5251:   752: 159: 
 9727:  5252:   753: 160: 
 9728:  5253:   754: 161: def generate_dummy_payload(fields: list[dict]) -> dict:
 9729:  5254:   755: 162:     """Generate dummy payload from field definitions."""
 9730:  5255:   756: 163:     payload = {}
 9731:  5256:   757: 164:     for f in fields:
 9732:  5257:   758: 165:         name = f["name"].lower()
 9733:  5258:   759: 166:         ftype = f.get("type", "string").lower()
 9734:  5259:   760: 167: 
 9735:  5260:   761: 168:         if ftype == "file":
 9736:  5261:   762: 169:             continue  # Skip file fields in automated testing
 9737:  5262:   763: 170: 
 9738:  5263:   764: 171:         # Try name match first
 9739:  5264:   765: 172:         value = DUMMY_VALUES.get(name)
 9740:  5265:   766: 173:         if value is None:
 9741:  5266:   767: 174:             # Try partial match
 9742:  5267:   768: 175:             for key, val in DUMMY_VALUES.items():
 9743:  5268:   769: 176:                 if key in name:
 9744:  5269:   770: 177:                     value = val
 9745:  5270:   771: 178:                     break
 9746:  5271:   772: 179: 
 9747:  5272:   773: 180:         # Fallback to type default
 9748:  5273:   774: 181:         if value is None:
 9749:  5274:   775: 182:             value = TYPE_DEFAULTS.get(ftype, "test_value")
 9750:  5275:   776: 183: 
 9751:  5276:   777: 184:         if value is not None:
 9752:  5277:   778: 185:             payload[f["name"]] = value
 9753:  5278:   779: 186: 
 9754:  5279:   780: 187:     return payload
 9755:  5280:   781: 188: 
 9756:  5281:   782: 189: 
 9757:  5282:   783: 190: # ─── Main Runner ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 9758:  5283:   784: 191: 
 9759:  5284:   785: 192: def run_transaction(
 9760:  5285:   786: 193:     session: requests.Session,
 9761:  5286:   787: 194:     transaction: dict,
 9762:  5287:   788: 195:     framework: str,
 9763:  5288:   789: 196:     tracker: EmissionsTracker
 9764:  5289:   790: 197: ) -> RequestMeasurement:
 9765:  5290:   791: 198:     """Execute a single transaction with carbon tracking."""
 9766:  5291:   792: 199:     method = transaction["method"].upper()
 9767:  5292:   793: 200:     endpoint = transaction["endpoint"]
 9768:  5293:   794: 201:     full_url = f"{BASE_URL}{endpoint}"
 9769:  5294:   795: 202: 
 9770:  5295:   796: 203:     csrf_obtained = False
 9771:  5296:   797: 204:     csrf_token = None
 9772:  5297:   798: 205: 
 9773:  5298:   799: 206:     # Get CSRF token if required
 9774:  5299:   800: 207:     if transaction.get("requires_csrf") and method in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
 9775:  5300:   801: 208:         csrf_field = transaction.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
 9776:  5301:   802: 209:         csrf_token, csrf_obtained = get_csrf_token(session, endpoint, csrf_field, framework)
 9777:  5302:   803: 210: 
 9778:  5303:   804: 211:         if csrf_token:
 9779:  5304:   805: 212:             session.headers.update({
 9780:  5305:   806: 213:                 "X-CSRF-Token": csrf_token,
 9781:  5306:   807: 214:                 "X-XSRF-Token": csrf_token,
 9782:  5307:   808: 215:             })
 9783:  5308:   809: 216: 
 9784:  5309:   810: 217:     # Build payload
 9785:  5310:   811: 218:     payload = generate_dummy_payload(transaction.get("fields", []))
 9786:  5311:   812: 219: 
 9787:  5312:   813: 220:     # Add CSRF to payload if token found
 9788:  5313:   814: 221:     if csrf_token and transaction.get("csrf_field_name"):
 9789:  5314:   815: 222:         payload[transaction["csrf_field_name"]] = csrf_token
 9790:  5315:   816: 223: 
 9791:  5316:   817: 224:     # Track energy for this request
 9792:  5317:   818: 225:     tracker.start_task(transaction["id"])
 9793:  5318:   819: 226:     start_time = time.time()
 9794:  5319:   820: 227: 
 9795:  5320:   821: 228:     try:
 9796:  5321:   822: 229:         if method == "GET":
 9797:  5322:   823: 230:             response = session.get(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 9798:  5323:   824: 231:         elif method == "POST":
 9799:  5324:   825: 232:             response = session.post(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 9800:  5325:   826: 233:         elif method == "PUT":
 9801:  5326:   827: 234:             response = session.put(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 9802:  5327:   828: 235:         elif method == "PATCH":
 9803:  5328:   829: 236:             response = session.patch(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 9804:  5329:   830: 237:         elif method == "DELETE":
 9805:  5330:   831: 238:             response = session.delete(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
 9806:  5331:   832: 239:         else:
 9807:  5332:   833: 240:             raise ValueError(f"Unsupported method: {method}")
 9808:  5333:   834: 241: 
 9809:  5334:   835: 242:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
 9810:  5335:   836: 243:         emissions_data = tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
 9811:  5336:   837: 244: 
 9812:  5337:   838: 245:         return RequestMeasurement(
 9813:  5338:   839: 246:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
 9814:  5339:   840: 247:             method=method,
 9815:  5340:   841: 248:             endpoint=endpoint,
 9816:  5341:   842: 249:             full_url=full_url,
 9817:  5342:   843: 250:             status_code=response.status_code,
 9818:  5343:   844: 251:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
 9819:  5344:   845: 252:             energy_consumed_kwh=emissions_data.energy_consumed if emissions_data else 0.0,
 9820:  5345:   846: 253:             co2_emissions_kg=emissions_data.emissions if emissions_data else 0.0,
 9821:  5346:   847: 254:             success=200 <= response.status_code < 400,
 9822:  5347:   848: 255:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
 9823:  5348:   849: 256:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
 9824:  5349:   850: 257:             response_preview=response.text[:200],
 9825:  5350:   851: 258:         )
 9826:  5351:   852: 259: 
 9827:  5352:   853: 260:     except Exception as e:
 9828:  5353:   854: 261:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
 9829:  5354:   855: 262:         try:
 9830:  5355:   856: 263:             tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
 9831:  5356:   857: 264:         except Exception:
 9832:  5357:   858: 265:             pass
 9833:  5358:   859: 266: 
 9834:  5359:   860: 267:         return RequestMeasurement(
 9835:  5360:   861: 268:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
 9836:  5361:   862: 269:             method=method,
 9837:  5362:   863: 270:             endpoint=endpoint,
 9838:  5363:   864: 271:             full_url=full_url,
 9839:  5364:   865: 272:             status_code=0,
 9840:  5365:   866: 273:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
 9841:  5366:   867: 274:             energy_consumed_kwh=0.0,
 9842:  5367:   868: 275:             co2_emissions_kg=0.0,
 9843:  5368:   869: 276:             success=False,
 9844:  5369:   870: 277:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
 9845:  5370:   871: 278:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
 9846:  5371:   872: 279:             error=str(e),
 9847:  5372:   873: 280:         )
 9848:  5373:   874: 281: 
 9849:  5374:   875: 282: 
 9850:  5375:   876: 283: def run(transactions_path: str) -> CarbonResult:
 9851:  5376:   877: 284:     """
 9852:  5377:   878: 285:     Main entry point for Agent 3.
 9853:  5378:   879: 286:     
 9854:  5379:   880: 287:     Args:
 9855:  5380:   881: 288:         transactions_path: Path to transactions.json from Agent 2
 9856:  5381:   882: 289:     
 9857:  5382:   883: 290:     Returns:
 9858:  5383:   884: 291:         CarbonResult with per-request energy measurements
 9859:  5384:   885: 292:     """
 9860:  5385:   886: 293:     try:
 9861:  5386:   887: 294:         with open(transactions_path) as f:
 9862:  5387:   888: 295:             data = json.load(f)
 9863:  5388:   889: 296: 
 9864:  5389:   890: 297:         transactions = data.get("transactions", [])
 9865:  5390:   891: 298:         framework = data.get("framework", "unknown")
 9866:  5391:   892: 299: 
 9867:  5392:   893: 300:         print(f"[Agent 3] Running {len(transactions)} transactions against {BASE_URL}")
 9868:  5393:   894: 301: 
 9869:  5394:   895: 302:         session = requests.Session()
 9870:  5395:   896: 303:         session.headers.update({
 9871:  5396:   897: 304:             "Accept": "application/json, text/html",
 9872:  5397:   898: 305:             "User-Agent": "CodeCarbonAgent/1.0",
 9873:  5398:   899: 306:         })
 9874:  5399:   900: 307: 
 9875:  5400:   901: 308:         # Initialize CodeCarbon tracker
 9876:  5401:   902: 309:         tracker = EmissionsTracker(
 9877:  5402:   903: 310:             project_name="code_carbon_agent",
 9878:  5403:   904: 311:             output_dir=str(Path(transactions_path).parent),
 9879:  5404:   905: 312:             log_level="warning",
 9880:  5405:   906: 313:             save_to_file=False,
 9881:  5406:   907: 314:             tracking_mode="process",
 9882:  5407:   908: 315:         )
 9883:  5408:   909: 316:         tracker.start()
 9884:  5409:   910: 317: 
 9885:  5410:   911: 318:         measurements = []
 9886:  5411:   912: 319: 
 9887:  5412:   913: 320:         for txn in transactions:
 9888:  5413:   914: 321:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {txn['method']} {txn['endpoint']}")
 9889:  5414:   915: 322:             measurement = run_transaction(session, txn, framework, tracker)
 9890:  5415:   916: 323:             measurements.append(measurement)
 9891:  5416:   917: 324: 
 9892:  5417:   918: 325:             status_icon = "✅" if measurement.success else "❌"
 9893:  5418:   919: 326:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {status_icon} {measurement.status_code} "
 9894:  5419:   920: 327:                   f"({measurement.response_time_ms:.0f}ms, "
 9895:  5420:   921: 328:                   f"{measurement.co2_emissions_kg*1000:.4f}g CO₂)")
 9896:  5421:   922: 329: 
 9897:  5422:   923: 330:             time.sleep(DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS)
 9898:  5423:   924: 331: 
 9899:  5424:   925: 332:         tracker.stop()
 9900:  5425:   926: 333: 
 9901:  5426:   927: 334:         successful = sum(1 for m in measurements if m.success)
 9902:  5427:   928: 335:         total_energy = sum(m.energy_consumed_kwh for m in measurements)
 9903:  5428:   929: 336:         total_co2 = sum(m.co2_emissions_kg for m in measurements)
 9904:  5429:   930: 337:         avg_time = (sum(m.response_time_ms for m in measurements) / len(measurements)
 9905:  5430:   931: 338:                     if measurements else 0)
 9906:  5431:   932: 339: 
 9907:  5432:   933: 340:         result = CarbonResult(
 9908:  5433:   934: 341:             success=True,
 9909:  5434:   935: 342:             base_url=BASE_URL,
 9910:  5435:   936: 343:             total_requests=len(measurements),
 9911:  5436:   937: 344:             successful_requests=successful,
 9912:  5437:   938: 345:             failed_requests=len(measurements) - successful,
 9913:  5438:   939: 346:             total_energy_kwh=round(total_energy, 8),
 9914:  5439:   940: 347:             total_co2_kg=round(total_co2, 8),
 9915:  5440:   941: 348:             avg_response_time_ms=round(avg_time, 2),
 9916:  5441:   942: 349:             measurements=measurements,
 9917:  5442:   943: 350:         )
 9918:  5443:   944: 351: 
 9919:  5444:   945: 352:         # Save carbon report
 9920:  5445:   946: 353:         output_path = Path(transactions_path).parent / "carbon_report.json"
 9921:  5446:   947: 354:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
 9922:  5447:   948: 355:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
 9923:  5448:   949: 356:         print(f"[Agent 3] ✅ Saved: {output_path}")
 9924:  5449:   950: 357: 
 9925:  5450:   951: 358:         return result
 9926:  5451:   952: 359: 
 9927:  5452:   953: 360:     except Exception as e:
 9928:  5453:   954: 361:         return CarbonResult(
 9929:  5454:   955: 362:             success=False,
 9930:  5455:   956: 363:             base_url=BASE_URL,
 9931:  5456:   957: 364:             total_requests=0,
 9932:  5457:   958: 365:             successful_requests=0,
 9933:  5458:   959: 366:             failed_requests=0,
 9934:  5459:   960: 367:             total_energy_kwh=0.0,
 9935:  5460:   961: 368:             total_co2_kg=0.0,
 9936:  5461:   962: 369:             avg_response_time_ms=0.0,
 9937:  5462:   963: 370:             measurements=[],
 9938:  5463:   964: 371:             error=str(e),
 9939:  5464:   965: 372:         )
 9940:  5465:   966: 373: 
 9941:  5466:   967: 374: 
 9942:  5467:   968: 375: if __name__ == "__main__":
 9943:  5468:   969: 376:     import sys
 9944:  5469:   970: 377:     txn_path = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/transactions.json"
 9945:  5470:   971: 378:     result = run(txn_path)
 9946:  5471:   972: 379:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
 9947:  5472:   973: 
 9948:  5473:   974: ================

10087:  5612:  1113: 137: def slugify(text: str) -> str:
10088:  5613:  1114: 138:     """Convert endpoint path to test function name."""
10089:  5614:  1115: 139:     return re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]", "_", text.lower()).strip("_")
10090:  5615:  1116: 140: 
10091:  5616:  1117: 141: 
10092:  5617:  1118: 142: def generate_unit_tests(transactions: list[dict], framework: str) -> str:
10093:  5618:  1119: 143:     """Generate unit test file content for the given framework."""
10094:  5619:  1120: 144:     template = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])
10095:  5620:  1121: 145:     lines = [template["header"]]
10096:  5621:  1122: 146: 
10097:  5622:  1123: 147:     mutating = ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]
10098:  5623:  1124: 148:     test_transactions = [t for t in transactions if t["method"] in mutating]
10099:  5624:  1125: 149: 
10100:  5625:  1126: 150:     if not test_transactions:
10101:  5626:  1127: 151:         test_transactions = transactions  # Include all if no mutating found
10102:  5627:  1128: 152: 
10103:  5628:  1129: 153:     for txn in test_transactions:
10104:  5629:  1130: 154:         method = txn["method"].upper()
10105:  5630:  1131: 155:         endpoint = txn["endpoint"]
10106:  5631:  1132: 156:         slug = slugify(endpoint)
10107:  5632:  1133: 157:         fields = txn.get("fields", [])
10108:  5633:  1134: 158:         requires_csrf = txn.get("requires_csrf", False)
10109:  5634:  1135: 159:         requires_auth = txn.get("requires_auth", False)
10110:  5635:  1136: 160:         description = txn.get("description", "Auto-generated test")
10111:  5636:  1137: 161: 
10112:  5637:  1138: 162:         # Format fields
10113:  5638:  1139: 163:         field_lines = []
10114:  5639:  1140: 164:         for f in fields[:10]:  # Max 10 fields
10115:  5640:  1141: 165:             name = f["name"]
10116:  5641:  1142: 166:             ftype = f.get("type", "string")
10117:  5642:  1143: 167:             if framework in ("laravel", "django"):
10118:  5643:  1144: 168:                 if ftype == "email":
10119:  5644:  1145: 169:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'test@example.com',")
10120:  5645:  1146: 170:                 elif ftype == "password":
10121:  5646:  1147: 171:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'TestPassword123!',")
10122:  5647:  1148: 172:                 else:
10123:  5648:  1149: 173:                     field_lines.append(f"            '{name}' => 'test_value',")
10124:  5649:  1150: 174:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
10125:  5650:  1151: 175:                 if ftype == "email":
10126:  5651:  1152: 176:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "test@example.com",')
10127:  5652:  1153: 177:                 elif ftype == "password":
10128:  5653:  1154: 178:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "TestPassword123!",')
10129:  5654:  1155: 179:                 else:
10130:  5655:  1156: 180:                     field_lines.append(f'        "{name}": "test_value",')
10131:  5656:  1157: 181: 
10132:  5657:  1158: 182:         fields_str = "\n".join(field_lines)
10133:  5658:  1159: 183: 
10134:  5659:  1160: 184:         # Auth setup
10135:  5660:  1161: 185:         if requires_auth:
10136:  5661:  1162: 186:             if framework == "laravel":
10137:  5662:  1163: 187:                 auth_setup = "$this->actingAs(User::factory()->create());"
10138:  5663:  1164: 188:             elif framework == "django":
10139:  5664:  1165: 189:                 auth_setup = "self.client.force_login(User.objects.create_user('testuser', 'test@test.com', 'pass'))"
10140:  5665:  1166: 190:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
10141:  5666:  1167: 191:                 auth_setup = "// TODO: Set Authorization header with valid JWT token"
10142:  5667:  1168: 192:             else:
10143:  5668:  1169: 193:                 auth_setup = "// TODO: Setup authentication"
10144:  5669:  1170: 194:         else:
10145:  5670:  1171: 195:             auth_setup = ""
10146:  5671:  1172: 196: 
10147:  5672:  1173: 197:         # CSRF setup
10148:  5673:  1174: 198:         if requires_csrf:
10149:  5674:  1175: 199:             csrf_field_name = txn.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
10150:  5675:  1176: 200:             if framework == "laravel":

10172:  5697:  1198: 222:

10176:  5701:  1202: 226:             endpoint=endpoint,

10190:  5715:  1216: 240:
