10193:  5718:  1219: 243: 
10194:  5719:  1220: 244: 
10195:  5720:  1221: 245: # ─── Markdown Report Builder ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
10196:  5721:  1222: 246: 
10197:  5722:  1223: 247: def build_report(
10198:  5723:  1224: 248:     ingestion: dict,
10199:  5724:  1225: 249:     identification: dict,
10200:  5725:  1226: 250:     carbon: dict,
10201:  5726:  1227: 251:     output_dir: str,
10202:  5727:  1228: 252: ) -> str:
10203:  5728:  1229: 253:     """Build full Markdown report."""
10204:  5729:  1230: 254: 
10205:  5730:  1231: 255:     now = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
10206:  5731:  1232: 256:     framework = identification.get("framework", "unknown")
10207:  5732:  1233: 257:     language = identification.get("language", "Unknown")
10208:  5733:  1234: 258:     transactions = identification.get("transactions", [])
10209:  5734:  1235: 259:     measurements = {m["transaction_id"]: m for m in carbon.get("measurements", [])}
10210:  5735:  1236: 260: 
10211:  5736:  1237: 261:     lines = [
10212:  5737:  1238: 262:         f"# 🤖 Code Carbon Report",
10213:  5738:  1239: 263:         f"",
10214:  5739:  1240: 264:         f"> Generated: `{now}`",
10215:  5740:  1241: 265:         f"> Source: `{ingestion.get('source_path', 'N/A')}`",
10216:  5741:  1242: 266:         f"> Framework: `{framework}` · Language: `{language}`",
10217:  5742:  1243: 267:         f"",
10218:  5743:  1244: 268:         f"---",
10219:  5744:  1245: 269:         f"",
10220:  5745:  1246: 270:         f"## 📊 Executive Summary",
10221:  5746:  1247: 271:         f"",
10222:  5747:  1248: 272:         f"| Metric | Value |",
10223:  5748:  1249: 273:         f"|--------|-------|",
10224:  5749:  1250: 274:         f"| Total Routes | `{identification.get('total_routes', 0)}` |",
10225:  5750:  1251: 275:         f"| POST/Mutating | `{identification.get('post_routes', 0)}` |",
10226:  5751:  1252: 276:         f"| CSRF Protected | `{identification.get('csrf_protected_routes', 0)}` |",
10227:  5752:  1253: 277:         f"| Auth Required | `{identification.get('auth_required_routes', 0)}` |",
10228:  5753:  1254: 278:         f"| Successful Requests | `{carbon.get('successful_requests', 0)}/{carbon.get('total_requests', 0)}` |",
10229:  5754:  1255: 279:         f"| Total Energy | `{carbon.get('total_energy_kwh', 0):.8f} kWh` |",
10230:  5755:  1256: 280:         f"| Total CO₂ | `{carbon.get('total_co2_kg', 0)*1000:.4f} g` |",
10231:  5756:  1257: 281:         f"| Avg Response Time | `{carbon.get('avg_response_time_ms', 0):.1f} ms` |",
10232:  5757:  1258: 282:         f"",
10233:  5758:  1259: 283:         f"---",
10234:  5759:  1260: 284:         f"",
10235:  5760:  1261: 285:         f"## 🔍 Transaction Analysis",
10236:  5761:  1262: 286:         f"",
10237:  5762:  1263: 287:     ]
10238:  5763:  1264: 288: 
10239:  5764:  1265: 289:     # Group by method
10240:  5765:  1266: 290:     for method in ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
10241:  5766:  1267: 291:         method_txns = [t for t in transactions if t["method"] == method]
10242:  5767:  1268: 292:         if not method_txns:
10243:  5768:  1269: 293:             continue
10244:  5769:  1270: 294: 
10245:  5770:  1271: 295:         icon = {"GET": "🔵", "POST": "🟢", "PUT": "🟡", "PATCH": "🟠", "DELETE": "🔴"}.get(method, "⚪")
10246:  5771:  1272: 296:         lines.append(f"### {icon} {method} Endpoints ({len(method_txns)})")
10247:  5772:  1273: 297:         lines.append("")
10248:  5773:  1274: 298: 
10249:  5774:  1275: 299:         for txn in method_txns:
10250:  5775:  1276: 300:             m = measurements.get(txn["id"], {})
10251:  5776:  1277: 301:             status = m.get("status_code", "—")
10252:  5777:  1278: 302:             rtime = m.get("response_time_ms", 0)
10253:  5778:  1279: 303:             co2 = m.get("co2_emissions_kg", 0) * 1000
10254:  5779:  1280: 304:             success = "✅" if m.get("success") else "❌"
10255:  5780:  1281: 305: 
10256:  5781:  1282: 306:             lines.append(f"#### `{txn['endpoint']}`")
10257:  5782:  1283: 307:             lines.append(f"")
10258:  5783:  1284: 308:             lines.append(f"- **Description:** {txn.get('description', 'N/A')}")
10259:  5784:  1285: 309:             lines.append(f"- **Auth Required:** {'✅ Yes' if txn.get('requires_auth') else '❌ No'}")
10260:  5785:  1286: 310:             lines.append(f"- **CSRF Protected:** {'✅ Yes' if txn.get('requires_csrf') else '❌ No'}")
10261:  5786:  1287: 311:             if txn.get("csrf_field_name"):
10262:  5787:  1288: 312:                 lines.append(f"- **CSRF Field:** `{txn['csrf_field_name']}`")
10263:  5788:  1289: 313:             lines.append(f"- **Live Result:** {success} `HTTP {status}` · `{rtime:.0f}ms` · `{co2:.4f}g CO₂`")
10264:  5789:  1290: 314: 
10265:  5790:  1291: 315:             if txn.get("fields"):
10266:  5791:  1292: 316:                 lines.append(f"")
10267:  5792:  1293: 317:                 lines.append(f"**Required Fields:**")
10268:  5793:  1294: 318:                 lines.append(f"")
10269:  5794:  1295: 319:                 lines.append(f"| Field | Type | Required | Validation |")
10270:  5795:  1296: 320:                 lines.append(f"|-------|------|----------|------------|")
10271:  5796:  1297: 321:                 for f in txn["fields"]:
10272:  5797:  1298: 322:                     req = "✅" if f.get("required") else "⬜"
10273:  5798:  1299: 323:                     rules = ", ".join(f.get("validation_rules", [])) or "—"
10274:  5799:  1300: 324:                     lines.append(f"| `{f['name']}` | `{f['type']}` | {req} | `{rules}` |")
10275:  5800:  1301: 325: 
10276:  5801:  1302: 326:             lines.append(f"")
10277:  5802:  1303: 327: 
10278:  5803:  1304: 328:     # CSRF Summary
10279:  5804:  1305: 329:     lines += [
10280:  5805:  1306: 330:         f"---",
10281:  5806:  1307: 331:         f"",
10282:  5807:  1308: 332:         f"## 🔐 CSRF Analysis",
10283:  5808:  1309: 333:         f"",
10284:  5809:  1310: 334:         f"Framework `{framework}` uses the following CSRF pattern:",
10285:  5810:  1311: 335:         f"",
10286:  5811:  1312: 336:     ]
10287:  5812:  1313: 337: 
10288:  5813:  1314: 338:     csrf_txns = [t for t in transactions if t.get("requires_csrf")]
10289:  5814:  1315: 339:     if csrf_txns:
10290:  5815:  1316: 340:         csrf_fields = list(set(t.get("csrf_field_name", "") for t in csrf_txns if t.get("csrf_field_name")))
10291:  5816:  1317: 341:         for cf in csrf_fields:
10292:  5817:  1318: 342:             lines.append(f"- CSRF field name: **`{cf}`**")
10293:  5818:  1319: 343:         lines.append("")
10294:  5819:  1320: 344:         lines.append("Endpoints with CSRF protection:")
10295:  5820:  1321: 345:         for t in csrf_txns:
10296:  5821:  1322: 346:             lines.append(f"- `{t['method']} {t['endpoint']}`")
10297:  5822:  1323: 347:     else:
10298:  5823:  1324: 348:         lines.append("_No CSRF-protected endpoints detected._")
10299:  5824:  1325: 349: 
10300:  5825:  1326: 350:     lines += [
10301:  5826:  1327: 351:         f"",
10302:  5827:  1328: 352:         f"---",
10303:  5828:  1329: 353:         f"",
10304:  5829:  1330: 354:         f"## 🌱 Carbon Footprint Analysis",
10305:  5830:  1331: 355:         f"",
10306:  5831:  1332: 356:         f"| Endpoint | Method | Status | Energy (kWh) | CO₂ (g) | Time (ms) |",
10307:  5832:  1333: 357:         f"|----------|--------|--------|-------------|---------|-----------| ",
10308:  5833:  1334: 358:     ]
10309:  5834:  1335: 359: 
10310:  5835:  1336: 360:     for m in carbon.get("measurements", []):
10311:  5836:  1337: 361:         co2_g = m["co2_emissions_kg"] * 1000
10312:  5837:  1338: 362:         icon = "✅" if m["success"] else "❌"
10313:  5838:  1339: 363:         lines.append(
10314:  5839:  1340: 364:             f"| `{m['endpoint']}` | `{m['method']}` | {icon} `{m['status_code']}` "
10315:  5840:  1341: 365:             f"| `{m['energy_consumed_kwh']:.8f}` | `{co2_g:.4f}` | `{m['response_time_ms']:.0f}` |"
10316:  5841:  1342: 366:         )
10317:  5842:  1343: 367: 
10318:  5843:  1344: 368:     lines += [
10319:  5844:  1345: 369:         f"",
10320:  5845:  1346: 370:         f"---",
10321:  5846:  1347: 371:         f"",
10322:  5847:  1348: 372:         f"## 🔧 Refactoring Recommendations",
10323:  5848:  1349: 373:         f"",
10324:  5849:  1350: 374:     ]
10325:  5850:  1351: 375: 
10326:  5851:  1352: 376:     # Auto recommendations
10327:  5852:  1353: 377:     recs = []
10328:  5853:  1354: 378: 
10329:  5854:  1355: 379:     slow_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if m["response_time_ms"] > 1000]
10330:  5855:  1356: 380:     if slow_txns:
10331:  5856:  1357: 381:         recs.append(f"**⚠️ Slow endpoints detected** ({len(slow_txns)} endpoint > 1000ms):")
10332:  5857:  1358: 382:         for m in slow_txns:
10333:  5858:  1359: 383:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` ({m['response_time_ms']:.0f}ms) — consider caching or query optimization")
10334:  5859:  1360: 384: 
10335:  5860:  1361: 385:     failed_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if not m["success"]]
10336:  5861:  1362: 386:     if failed_txns:
10337:  5862:  1363: 387:         recs.append(f"**❌ Failed requests** ({len(failed_txns)} endpoints returned error):")
10338:  5863:  1364: 388:         for m in failed_txns:
10339:  5864:  1365: 389:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` → HTTP {m['status_code']}")
10340:  5865:  1366: 390: 
10341:  5866:  1367: 391:     unprotected_mutating = [
10342:  5867:  1368: 392:         t for t in transactions
10343:  5868:  1369: 393:         if t["method"] in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]
10344:  5869:  1370: 394:         and not t.get("requires_csrf")
10345:  5870:  1371: 395:         and not t.get("requires_auth")
10346:  5871:  1372: 396:     ]
10347:  5872:  1373: 397:     if unprotected_mutating:
10348:  5873:  1374: 398:         recs.append(f"**🔓 Unprotected mutating endpoints** — no CSRF or auth:")
10349:  5874:  1375: 399:         for t in unprotected_mutating:
10350:  5875:  1376: 400:             recs.append(f"  - `{t['method']} {t['endpoint']}`")
10351:  5876:  1377: 401: 
10352:  5877:  1378: 402:     if not recs:
10353:  5878:  1379: 403:         recs.append("✅ No critical issues detected. Code looks clean!")
10354:  5879:  1380: 404: 
10355:  5880:  1381: 405:     for rec in recs:
10356:  5881:  1382: 406:         lines.append(rec)
10357:  5882:  1383: 407:         lines.append("")
10358:  5883:  1384: 408: 
10359:  5884:  1385: 409:     lines += [
10360:  5885:  1386: 410:         f"---",
10361:  5886:  1387: 411:         f"",
10362:  5887:  1388: 412:         f"## 🧪 Generated Unit Tests",
10363:  5888:  1389: 413:         f"",
10364:  5889:  1390: 414:         f"Unit test files have been saved to `{output_dir}/tests/`",
10365:  5890:  1391: 415:         f"",
10366:  5891:  1392: 416:         f"| File | Framework | Test Count |",
10367:  5892:  1393: 417:         f"|------|-----------|------------|",
10368:  5893:  1394: 418:         f"| `GeneratedTransactionTest.{UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES['express'])['ext']}` | `{framework}` | `{identification.get('post_routes', 0)}` |",
10369:  5894:  1395: 419:         f"",
10370:  5895:  1396: 420:         f"---",
10371:  5896:  1397: 421:         f"",
10372:  5897:  1398: 422:         f"_Report generated by Multi-Agent Code Carbon System_",
10373:  5898:  1399: 423:     ]
10374:  5899:  1400: 424: 
10375:  5900:  1401: 425:     return "\n".join(lines)
10376:  5901:  1402: 426: 
10377:  5902:  1403: 427: 
10378:  5903:  1404: 428: def run(output_dir: str = "./output") -> str:
10379:  5904:  1405: 429:     """
10380:  5905:  1406: 430:     Main entry point for Agent 4.
10381:  5906:  1407: 431:     
10382:  5907:  1408: 432:     Args:
10383:  5908:  1409: 433:         output_dir: Directory containing all agent outputs
10384:  5909:  1410: 434:     
10385:  5910:  1411: 435:     Returns:
10386:  5911:  1412: 436:         Path to the generated report
10387:  5912:  1413: 437:     """
10388:  5913:  1414: 438:     os.makedirs(REPORT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
10389:  5914:  1415: 439:     os.makedirs(f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests", exist_ok=True)
10390:  5915:  1416: 440: 
10391:  5916:  1417: 441:     # Load all agent outputs
10392:  5917:  1418: 442:     with open(f"{output_dir}/transactions.json") as f:
10393:  5918:  1419: 443:         identification = json.load(f)
10394:  5919:  1420: 444: 
10395:  5920:  1421: 445:     with open(f"{output_dir}/carbon_report.json") as f:
10396:  5921:  1422: 446:         carbon = json.load(f)
10397:  5922:  1423: 447: 
10398:  5923:  1424: 448:     # Agent 1 result may or may not exist
10399:  5924:  1425: 449:     ingestion_path = Path(output_dir) / "ingestion_result.json"
10400:  5925:  1426: 450:     if ingestion_path.exists():
10401:  5926:  1427: 451:         with open(ingestion_path) as f:
10402:  5927:  1428: 452:             ingestion = json.load(f)
10403:  5928:  1429: 453:     else:
10404:  5929:  1430: 454:         ingestion = {"source_path": output_dir}
10405:  5930:  1431: 455: 
10406:  5931:  1432: 456:     framework = identification.get("framework", "express")
10407:  5932:  1433: 457: 
10408:  5933:  1434: 458:     # Generate unit tests
10409:  5934:  1435: 459:     print("[Agent 4] Generating unit tests...")
10410:  5935:  1436: 460:     test_content = generate_unit_tests(identification.get("transactions", []), framework)
10411:  5936:  1437: 461:     test_ext = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])["ext"]
10412:  5937:  1438: 462:     test_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests/GeneratedTransactionTest.{test_ext}"
10413:  5938:  1439: 463:     with open(test_path, "w") as f:
10414:  5939:  1440: 464:         f.write(test_content)
10415:  5940:  1441: 465:     print(f"[Agent 4] Unit tests saved: {test_path}")
10416:  5941:  1442: 466: 
10417:  5942:  1443: 467:     # Generate markdown report
10418:  5943:  1444: 468:     print("[Agent 4] Building report...")
10419:  5944:  1445: 469:     report_md = build_report(ingestion, identification, carbon, REPORT_DIR)
10420:  5945:  1446: 470:     report_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/code_carbon_report.md"
10421:  5946:  1447: 471:     with open(report_path, "w") as f:
10422:  5947:  1448: 472:         f.write(report_md)
10423:  5948:  1449: 473: 
10424:  5949:  1450: 474:     print(f"[Agent 4] ✅ Report saved: {report_path}")
10425:  5950:  1451: 475:     return report_path
10426:  5951:  1452: 476: 
10427:  5952:  1453: 477:

10429:  5954:  1455: 479:     import sys
10430:  5955:  1456: 480:     out_dir = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output"
10431:  5956:  1457: 481:     run(out_dir)

10953:  6478:  1979: 518: {
10954:  6479:  1980: 519:     $month = $request-&gt;input('month', Carbon::now()-&gt;month);
10955:  6480:  1981: 520:     $year = $request-&gt;input('year', Carbon::now()-&gt;year);
10956:  6481:  1982: 521:     
10957:  6482:  1983: 522:     // Inefficient read

10961:  6486:  1987: 526:                         $query-&gt;whereMonth('tanggal_deadline', $month)
10962:  6487:  1988: 527:                               -&gt;whereYear('tanggal_deadline', $year);
10963:  6488:  1989: 528:                     })-&gt;get();

10968:  6493:  1994: 533:                     </div>

10971:  6496:  1997: 536:                         <pre>public function grid(Request $request)
10972:  6497:  1998: 537: {
10973:  6498:  1999: 538:     $month = $request-&gt;input('month', Carbon::now()-&gt;month);
10974:  6499:  2000: 539:     $year = $request-&gt;input('year', Carbon::now()-&gt;year);
10975:  6500:  2001: 540:     
10976:  6501:  2002: 541:     $startOfMonth = Carbon::create($year, $month, 1)-&gt;startOfDay();
10977:  6502:  2003: 542:     $endOfMonth = Carbon::create($year, $month, 1)-&gt;endOfMonth()-&gt;endOfDay();
10978:  6503:  2004: 543: 
10979:  6504:  2005: 544:     // Range bounded query
10980:  6505:  2006: 545:     $agendas = Agenda::where(function($query) use ($startOfMonth, $endOfMonth) {

10987:  6512:  2013: 552:         // O(1) structure logic

11164:  6689:  2190: 729:                 { method: 'POST', path: '/api/crm/follow-up', ms: 230, status: 201 },
11165:  6690:  2191: 730:                 { method: 'GET', path: '/api/report/export', ms: 1150, status: 200 },
11166:  6691:  2192: 731:                 { method: 'GET', path: '/api/users/list', ms: 90, status: 200 },
11167:  6692:  2193: 732:                 { method: 'POST', path: '/api/media-monitoring/sync', ms: 840, status: 200 },
11168:  6693:  2194: 733:                 { method: 'PUT', path: '/api/agenda/publish', ms: 135, status: 200 },
11169:  6694:  2195: 734:                 { method: 'GET', path: '/api/dashboard/stats', ms: 215, status: 200 },
11170:  6695:  2196: 735:                 { method: 'DELETE', path: '/api/buku/1', ms: 75, status: 401 },
11171:  6696:  2197: 736:                 { method: 'GET', path: '/api/system/health', ms: 15, status: 200 },
11172:  6697:  2198: 737:                 { method: 'POST', path: '/api/auth/logout', ms: 40, status: 200 }
11173:  6698:  2199: 738:             ];
11174:  6699:  2200: 739: 
11175:  6700:  2201: 740:             const totalEndpoints = staticEndpoints.length;
11176:  6701:  2202: 741:             updateStep(3, 'active', `Menguji (${0}/${totalEndpoints})...`);
11177:  6702:  2203: 742:             consoleEl.classList.remove('hidden');
11178:  6703:  2204: 743: 
11179:  6704:  2205: 744:             let totEnergy = 0;
11180:  6705:  2206: 745:             let totCo2 = 0;
11181:  6706:  2207: 746:             const tableBody = document.getElementById('s3-table-body');
11182:  6707:  2208: 747:             const tableContainer = document.getElementById('s3-table-container');
11183:  6708:  2209: 748:             tableBody.innerHTML = ''; // reset
11184:  6709:  2210: 749: 
11185:  6710:  2211: 750:             for (let i = 0; i < totalEndpoints; i++) {
11186:  6711:  2212: 751:                 const ep = staticEndpoints[i];
11187:  6712:  2213: 752:                 document.getElementById(`s3-msg`).innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> Menguji (${i + 1}/${totalEndpoints})...`;
11188:  6713:  2214: 753: 
11189:  6714:  2215: 754:                 const ms = ep.ms;
11190:  6715:  2216: 755:                 const energy = ms * 0.0001;
11191:  6716:  2217: 756:                 const co2 = ms * 0.00003;
11192:  6717:  2218: 757: 
11193:  6718:  2219: 758:                 totEnergy += energy;
11194:  6719:  2220: 759:                 totCo2 += co2;
11195:  6720:  2221: 760: 
11196:  6721:  2222: 761:                 const statusVal = ep.status;
11197:  6722:  2223: 762:                 const statusHtml = `<span class="text-slate-500">[${statusVal}]</span>`;
11198:  6723:  2224: 763: 
11199:  6724:  2225: 764:                 const tr = document.createElement('tr');
11200:  6725:  2226: 765:                 tr.className = "hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors";
11201:  6726:  2227: 766:                 tr.innerHTML = `
11202:  6727:  2228: 767:                     <td class="px-4 py-2 whitespace-nowrap font-medium text-slate-700">${ep.method}</td>
11203:  6728:  2229: 768:                     <td class="px-4 py-2 truncate max-w-[150px] text-slate-500">${ep.path}</td>
11204:  6729:  2230: 769:                     <td class="px-4 py-2">${statusHtml}</td>
11205:  6730:  2231: 770:                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-400">${ms}ms</td>
11206:  6731:  2232: 771:                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-700 font-medium">${energy.toFixed(4)}</td>
11207:  6732:  2233: 772:                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-700 font-medium">${co2.toFixed(5)}</td>
11208:  6733:  2234: 773:                 `;
11209:  6734:  2235: 774: 
11210:  6735:  2236: 775:                 tableBody.appendChild(tr);
11211:  6736:  2237: 776:                 tableContainer.scrollTop = tableContainer.scrollHeight;
11212:  6737:  2238: 777: 
11213:  6738:  2239: 778:                 await wait(2000); // 2 seconds per row as requested
11214:  6739:  2240: 779:             }
11215:  6740:  2241: 780: 
11216:  6741:  2242: 781:             document.getElementById('s3-tot-energy').innerText = totEnergy.toFixed(2);
11217:  6742:  2243: 782:             document.getElementById('s3-tot-co2').innerText = totCo2.toFixed(3);
11218:  6743:  2244: 783:             document.getElementById('s3-summary').classList.remove('hidden');
11219:  6744:  2245: 784: 
11220:  6745:  2246: 785:             updateStep(3, 'done');
11221:  6746:  2247: 786: 
11222:  6747:  2248: 787:             // Step 4
11223:  6748:  2249: 788:             updateStep(4, 'active', 'Menyusun laporan akhir...');
11224:  6749:  2250: 789:             await wait(3500);
11225:  6750:  2251: 790:             updateStep(4, 'done');
11226:  6751:  2252: 791: 
11227:  6752:  2253: 792:             // Finish
11228:  6753:  2254: 793:             document.getElementById('s4-action').classList.remove('hidden');
11229:  6754:  2255: 794:             pipelineStatus.className = 'px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-100 border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 rounded text-xs font-medium';
11230:  6755:  2256: 795:             pipelineStatus.innerText = 'Selesai';
11231:  6756:  2257: 796: 
11232:  6757:  2258: 797:             runBtn.disabled = false;
11233:  6758:  2259: 798:             runBtn.innerText = "Jalankan Ulang Audit";
11234:  6759:  2260: 799: 
11235:  6760:  2261: 800:             // Automatically reveal report smoothly
11236:  6761:  2262: 801:             await wait(500);
11237:  6762:  2263: 802:             reportView.classList.remove('hidden-view');
11238:  6763:  2264: 803:             reportView.classList.add('show-view');
11239:  6764:  2265: 804: 
11240:  6765:  2266: 805:             // Scroll down to the report view
11241:  6766:  2267: 806:             setTimeout(() => {
11242:  6767:  2268: 807:                 reportView.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
11243:  6768:  2269: 808:             }, 100);
11244:  6769:  2270: 809:         }
11245:  6770:  2271: 810:     </script>
11246:  6771:  2272: 811: </body>
11247:  6772:  2273: 812: 
11248:  6773:  2274: 813: </html>

11288:  6813:  2314: 36: ## Quick Start (Web Dashboard)
11289:  6814:  2315: 37: 
11290:  6815:  2316: 38: ```bash
11291:  6816:  2317: 39: # 1. Set your Gemini API key in .env
11292:  6817:  2318: 40: # GEMINI_API_KEY=your_key_here
11293:  6818:  2319: 41: 
11294:  6819:  2320: 42: # 2. Start the Backend Server
11295:  6820:  2321: 43: python server.py
11296:  6821:  2322: 44: 
11297:  6822:  2323: 45: # 3. Open your browser
11298:  6823:  2324: 46: # Go to: http://localhost:5000
11299:  6824:  2325: 47: ```
11300:  6825:  2326: 48: 
11301:  6826:  2327: 49: > **How to use the dashboard:**
11302:  6827:  2328: 50: > 1. Enter your **Repository Path** (e.g., `C:\xampp\htdocs\my-app`) or **Git URL**.
11303:  6828:  2329: 51: > 2. Enter the **Target Base URL** (e.g., `http://localhost:8000`).
11304:  6829:  2330: 52: > 3. Click **Run Pipeline**.
11305:  6830:  2331: 53: > 4. Watch the terminal logs stream in real-time.
11306:  6831:  2332: 54: > 5. Once finished, scroll down to interact with the detected transactions!
11307:  6832:  2333: 55: 
11308:  6833:  2334: 56: ## Alternative: CLI Usage
11309:  6834:  2335: 57: 
11310:  6835:  2336: 58: ```bash
11311:  6836:  2337: 59: # Run full pipeline via terminal
11312:  6837:  2338: 60: python pipeline.py --source /path/to/your/app --base-url http://localhost:8000
11313:  6838:  2339: 61: 
11314:  6839:  2340: 62: # Skip Agent 3
11315:  6840:  2341: 63: python pipeline.py --source https://github.com/user/repo --skip-carbon
11316:  6841:  2342: 64: ```
11317:  6842:  2343: 65: 
11318:  6843:  2344: 66: > [!IMPORTANT]
11319:  6844:  2345: 67: > Before running, update `GEMINI_API_KEY` in `.env` with your actual Gemini API key.
11320:  6845:  2346: 68: 
11321:  6846:  2347: 69: > [!NOTE]
11322:  6847:  2348: 70: > All Python dependencies are already installed. `repomix` must be installed globally via `npm install -g repomix` for Agent 1 to work.

11353:  6878:  2379:   23: 
11354:  6879:  2380:   24: ## System Overview
11355:  6880:  2381:   25: 
11356:  6881:  2382:   26: System ini terdiri dari **4 agen yang bekerja secara pipeline** untuk menganalisis codebase dari berbagai framework/bahasa, mendeteksi transaksi, mengukur konsumsi energi (carbon), dan menghasilkan laporan refactoring.
11357:  6882:  2383:   27: 
11358:  6883:  2384:   28: ```
11359:  6884:  2385:   29: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
11360:  6885:  2386:   30: │                     MULTI-AGENT PIPELINE                        │
11361:  6886:  2387:   31: │                                                                 │
11362:  6887:  2388:   32: │  [Repo/Local]  →  [Repomix]  →  [Gemini AI]  →  [Code Carbon] │
11363:  6888:  2389:   33: │      Agent 1         ↓             Agent 2         Agent 3      │
11364:  6889:  2390:   34: │                  flat_pack                              ↓        │
11365:  6890:  2391:   35: │                  .txt file      transactions        energy_data  │
11366:  6891:  2392:   36: │                                      ↓                  ↓       │
11367:  6892:  2393:   37: │                               ┌──────────────────────────┐      │
11368:  6893:  2394:   38: │                               │    Agent 4 — Refactor    │      │
11369:  6894:  2395:   39: │                               │         Report           │      │
11370:  6895:  2396:   40: │                               └──────────────────────────┘      │
11371:  6896:  2397:   41: └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
11372:  6897:  2398:   42: ```
11373:  6898:  2399:   43: 
11374:  6899:  2400:   44: ### Supported Languages / Frameworks
11375:  6900:  2401:   45: 
11376:  6901:  2402:   46: | Framework | Language | CSRF Support | Unit Test |
11377:  6902:  2403:   47: |-----------|----------|--------------|-----------|
11378:  6903:  2404:   48: | Laravel | PHP | ✅ Auto-detect `@csrf` | PHPUnit |
11379:  6904:  2405:   49: | Django | Python | ✅ `{% csrf_token %}` | pytest |
11380:  6905:  2406:   50: | Express.js | JavaScript/TypeScript | ✅ `csurf` middleware | Jest |
11381:  6906:  2407:   51: | Spring Boot | Java | ✅ `CsrfToken` | JUnit |
11382:  6907:  2408:   52: | Rails | Ruby | ✅ `authenticity_token` | RSpec |
11383:  6908:  2409:   53: | FastAPI | Python | ✅ Custom CSRF | pytest |
11384:  6909:  2410:   54: | NestJS | TypeScript | ✅ `@nestjs/csrf` | Jest |
11385:  6910:  2411:   55: | Go (Gin/Echo) | Go | ✅ `gorilla/csrf` | go test |
11386:  6911:  2412:   56: | ASP.NET Core | C# | ✅ `[ValidateAntiForgeryToken]` | xUnit |
11387:  6912:  2413:   57: 
11388:  6913:  2414:   58: ---

11390:  6915:  2416:   60: ## Architecture Diagram
11391:  6916:  2417:   61: 
11392:  6917:  2418:   62: ```
11393:  6918:  2419:   63:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
11394:  6919:  2420:   64:                          ║   AGENT 1            ║
11395:  6920:  2421:   65:                          ║   Repo Ingestion     ║
11396:  6921:  2422:   66:                          ║                      ║
11397:  6922:  2423:   67:                          ║  Input:              ║
11398:  6923:  2424:   68:                          ║  • Local filepath    ║
11399:  6924:  2425:   69:                          ║  • Git URL           ║
11400:  6925:  2426:   70:                          ║  • ZIP upload        ║
11401:  6926:  2427:   71:                          ║                      ║
11402:  6927:  2428:   72:                          ║  Process:            ║
11403:  6928:  2429:   73:                          ║  repomix → flat .txt ║
11404:  6929:  2430:   74:                          ╚══════════╦═══════════╝
11405:  6930:  2431:   75:                                     ║ flat_codebase.txt
11406:  6931:  2432:   76:                                     ▼
11407:  6932:  2433:   77:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
11408:  6933:  2434:   78:                          ║   AGENT 2            ║
11409:  6934:  2435:   79:                          ║   Gemini Identifier  ║
11410:  6935:  2436:   80:                          ║                      ║
11411:  6936:  2437:   81:                          ║  • Detect routes     ║
11412:  6937:  2438:   82:                          ║  • Detect CSRF fields║
11413:  6938:  2439:   83:                          ║  • Detect POST/PUT   ║
11414:  6939:  2440:   84:                          ║  • Form fields map   ║
11415:  6940:  2441:   85:                          ║  • Auth endpoints    ║
11416:  6941:  2442:   86:                          ╚══════════╦═══════════╝
11417:  6942:  2443:   87:                                     ║ transactions.json
11418:  6943:  2444:   88:                                     ▼
11419:  6944:  2445:   89:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
11420:  6945:  2446:   90:                          ║   AGENT 3            ║
11421:  6946:  2447:   91:                          ║   Code Carbon        ║
11422:  6947:  2448:   92:                          ║                      ║
11423:  6948:  2449:   93:                          ║  • Run live requests ║
11424:  6949:  2450:   94:                          ║  • Measure energy    ║
11425:  6950:  2451:   95:                          ║  • Track CO₂ per req ║
11426:  6951:  2452:   96:                          ║  • Perf profiling    ║
11427:  6952:  2453:   97:                          ╚══════════╦═══════════╝
11428:  6953:  2454:   98:                                     ║ carbon_report.json
11429:  6954:  2455:   99:                                     ▼
11430:  6955:  2456:  100:                          ╔══════════════════════╗
11431:  6956:  2457:  101:                          ║   AGENT 4            ║
11432:  6957:  2458:  102:                          ║   Refactor Report    ║
11433:  6958:  2459:  103:                          ║                      ║
11434:  6959:  2460:  104:                          ║  • Combine all data  ║
11435:  6960:  2461:  105:                          ║  • Suggest fixes     ║
11436:  6961:  2462:  106:                          ║  • Generate tests    ║
11437:  6962:  2463:  107:                          ║  • Send MD report    ║
11438:  6963:  2464:  108:                          ╚══════════════════════╝
11439:  6964:  2465:  109: ```

11447:  6972:  2473:  117: ```bash

11449:  6974:  2475:  119: node --version
11450:  6975:  2476:  120:
