11462:  6987:  2488:  132: 
11463:  6988:  2489:  133: # Optional: jq (untuk parsing JSON di terminal)
11464:  6989:  2490:  134: # Ubuntu/Debian
11465:  6990:  2491:  135: sudo apt install jq
11466:  6991:  2492:  136: # macOS
11467:  6992:  2493:  137: brew install jq
11468:  6993:  2494:  138: ```
11469:  6994:  2495:  139: 
11470:  6995:  2496:  140: ### API Keys
11471:  6996:  2497:  141: 
11472:  6997:  2498:  142: ```bash
11473:  6998:  2499:  143: # .env
11474:  6999:  2500:  144: GEMINI_API_KEY=your_gemini_api_key_here
11475:  7000:  2501:  145: TARGET_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000   # URL app yang sedang running
11476:  7001:  2502:  146: REPOMIX_OUTPUT_DIR=./output
11477:  7002:  2503:  147: REPORT_OUTPUT_DIR=./reports
11478:  7003:  2504:  148: ```
11479:  7004:  2505:  149: 
11480:  7005:  2506:  150: ---
11481:  7006:  2507:  151: 
11482:  7007:  2508:  152: ## Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
11483:  7008:  2509:  153: 
11484:  7009:  2510:  154: ### Konsep
11485:  7010:  2511:  155: 
11486:  7011:  2512:  156: Agent 1 bertanggung jawab untuk **mengkonversi codebase** (baik dari path lokal maupun Git URL) menjadi satu file teks flat menggunakan **repomix**. Format flat ini kemudian dikirim ke Agent 2.
11487:  7012:  2513:  157: 
11488:  7013:  2514:  158: > **Kenapa repomix?** Repomix menghasilkan satu file `.txt` yang merepresentasikan seluruh struktur folder + isi file, sehingga Gemini AI dapat memahami konteks penuh codebase tanpa harus dikirim file per file.
11489:  7014:  2515:  159: 
11490:  7015:  2516:  160: ### File: `agent1_ingestion.py`
11491:  7016:  2517:  161: 
11492:  7017:  2518:  162: ```python
11493:  7018:  2519:  163: #!/usr/bin/env python3
11494:  7019:  2520:  164: """
11495:  7020:  2521:  165: Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
11496:  7021:  2522:  166: Converts local path or Git URL to a flat repomix bundle.
11497:  7022:  2523:  167: """
11498:  7023:  2524:  168: 
11499:  7024:  2525:  169: import subprocess
11500:  7025:  2526:  170: import os
11501:  7026:  2527:  171: import sys
11502:  7027:  2528:  172: import shutil
11503:  7028:  2529:  173: import tempfile
11504:  7029:  2530:  174: import json
11505:  7030:  2531:  175: from pathlib import Path
11506:  7031:  2532:  176: from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
11507:  7032:  2533:  177: from typing import Optional
11508:  7033:  2534:  178: 
11509:  7034:  2535:  179: 
11510:  7035:  2536:  180: @dataclass
11511:  7036:  2537:  181: class IngestionResult:
11512:  7037:  2538:  182:     success: bool
11513:  7038:  2539:  183:     flat_file_path: str
11514:  7039:  2540:  184:     source_type: str          # "local" | "git"
11515:  7040:  2541:  185:     source_path: str
11516:  7041:  2542:  186:     file_size_bytes: int
11517:  7042:  2543:  187:     detected_language: str
11518:  7043:  2544:  188:     detected_framework: str
11519:  7044:  2545:  189:     error: Optional[str] = None
11520:  7045:  2546:  190: 
11521:  7046:  2547:  191: 
11522:  7047:  2548:  192: FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES = {
11523:  7048:  2549:  193:     "laravel":     ["artisan", "composer.json", "app/Http/Controllers"],
11524:  7049:  2550:  194:     "django":      ["manage.py", "settings.py", "wsgi.py"],
11525:  7050:  2551:  195:     "express":     ["package.json", "app.js", "routes/"],
11526:  7051:  2552:  196:     "nestjs":      ["nest-cli.json", "src/main.ts"],
11527:  7052:  2553:  197:     "springboot":  ["pom.xml", "src/main/java", "Application.java"],
11528:  7053:  2554:  198:     "rails":       ["Gemfile", "config/routes.rb", "app/controllers"],
11529:  7054:  2555:  199:     "fastapi":     ["main.py", "requirements.txt"],  # + fastapi in requirements
11530:  7055:  2556:  200:     "gin":         ["go.mod", "main.go"],
11531:  7056:  2557:  201:     "aspnet":      ["*.csproj", "Program.cs", "Startup.cs"],
11532:  7057:  2558:  202: }
11533:  7058:  2559:  203: 
11534:  7059:  2560:  204: LANGUAGE_MAP = {
11535:  7060:  2561:  205:     "laravel": "PHP",
11536:  7061:  2562:  206:     "django": "Python",
11537:  7062:  2563:  207:     "fastapi": "Python",
11538:  7063:  2564:  208:     "express": "JavaScript",
11539:  7064:  2565:  209:     "nestjs": "TypeScript",
11540:  7065:  2566:  210:     "springboot": "Java",
11541:  7066:  2567:  211:     "rails": "Ruby",
11542:  7067:  2568:  212:     "gin": "Go",
11543:  7068:  2569:  213:     "aspnet": "C#",
11544:  7069:  2570:  214: }
11545:  7070:  2571:  215: 
11546:  7071:  2572:  216: 
11547:  7072:  2573:  217: def detect_framework(path: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
11548:  7073:  2574:  218:     """Detect framework and language from directory structure."""
11549:  7074:  2575:  219:     for framework, signatures in FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES.items():
11550:  7075:  2576:  220:         for sig in signatures:
11551:  7076:  2577:  221:             check = Path(path) / sig
11552:  7077:  2578:  222:             # Check direct file/dir
11553:  7078:  2579:  223:             if check.exists():
11554:  7079:  2580:  224:                 return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
11555:  7080:  2581:  225:             # Glob pattern
11556:  7081:  2582:  226:             if "*" in sig:
11557:  7082:  2583:  227:                 matches = list(Path(path).glob(sig))
11558:  7083:  2584:  228:                 if matches:
11559:  7084:  2585:  229:                     return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
11560:  7085:  2586:  230:     return "unknown", "Unknown"
11561:  7086:  2587:  231: 
11562:  7087:  2588:  232: 
11563:  7088:  2589:  233: def clone_repo(git_url: str, target_dir: str) -> str:
11564:  7089:  2590:  234:     """Clone a git repository to target_dir."""
11565:  7090:  2591:  235:     print(f"[Agent 1] Cloning {git_url}...")
11566:  7091:  2592:  236:     result = subprocess.run(
11567:  7092:  2593:  237:         ["git", "clone", "--depth=1", git_url, target_dir],
11568:  7093:  2594:  238:         capture_output=True, text=True
11569:  7094:  2595:  239:     )
11570:  7095:  2596:  240:     if result.returncode != 0:
11571:  7096:  2597:  241:         raise RuntimeError(f"Git clone failed: {result.stderr}")
11572:  7097:  2598:  242:     return target_dir
11573:  7098:  2599:  243: 
11574:  7099:  2600:  244: 
11575:  7100:  2601:  245: def run_repomix(source_dir: str, output_path: str) -> None:
11576:  7101:  2602:  246:     """Run repomix to create flat bundle from source_dir."""
11577:  7102:  2603:  247:     print(f"[Agent 1] Running repomix on {source_dir}...")
11578:  7103:  2604:  248: 
11579:  7104:  2605:  249:     # repomix config — exclude common non-essential files
11580:  7105:  2606:  250:     repomix_config = {
11581:  7106:  2607:  251:         "output": {
11582:  7107:  2608:  252:             "filePath": output_path,
11583:  7108:  2609:  253:             "style": "plain",
11584:  7109:  2610:  254:             "removeComments": False,
11585:  7110:  2611:  255:             "removeEmptyLines": False,
11586:  7111:  2612:  256:             "showLineNumbers": True,
11587:  7112:  2613:  257:             "copyToClipboard": False,
11588:  7113:  2614:  258:         },
11589:  7114:  2615:  259:         "ignore": {
11590:  7115:  2616:  260:             "useGitignore": True,
11591:  7116:  2617:  261:             "useDefaultPatterns": True,
11592:  7117:  2618:  262:             "customPatterns": [
11593:  7118:  2619:  263:                 "node_modules/**",
11594:  7119:  2620:  264:                 "vendor/**",
11595:  7120:  2621:  265:                 ".git/**",
11596:  7121:  2622:  266:                 "*.lock",
11597:  7122:  2623:  267:                 "*.log",
11598:  7123:  2624:  268:                 "dist/**",
11599:  7124:  2625:  269:                 "build/**",
11600:  7125:  2626:  270:                 "__pycache__/**",
11601:  7126:  2627:  271:                 "*.pyc",
11602:  7127:  2628:  272:                 ".env",
11603:  7128:  2629:  273:                 "storage/**",
11604:  7129:  2630:  274:                 "public/storage/**",
11605:  7130:  2631:  275:             ]
11606:  7131:  2632:  276:         }
11607:  7132:  2633:  277:     }
11608:  7133:  2634:  278: 
11609:  7134:  2635:  279:     config_path = Path(source_dir) / ".repomix-config.json"
11610:  7135:  2636:  280:     with open(config_path, "w") as f:
11611:  7136:  2637:  281:         json.dump(repomix_config, f, indent=2)
11612:  7137:  2638:  282: 
11613:  7138:  2639:  283:     result = subprocess.run(
11614:  7139:  2640:  284:         ["repomix", "--config", str(config_path), "--output", output_path, source_dir],
11615:  7140:  2641:  285:         capture_output=True, text=True
11616:  7141:  2642:  286:     )
11617:  7142:  2643:  287: 
11618:  7143:  2644:  288:     # Cleanup config
11619:  7144:  2645:  289:     config_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
11620:  7145:  2646:  290: 
11621:  7146:  2647:  291:     if result.returncode != 0:
11622:  7147:  2648:  292:         raise RuntimeError(f"repomix failed: {result.stderr}")
11623:  7148:  2649:  293: 
11624:  7149:  2650:  294:     print(f"[Agent 1] ✅ repomix output: {output_path}")
11625:  7150:  2651:  295: 
11626:  7151:  2652:  296: 
11627:  7152:  2653:  297: def run(source: str, output_dir: str = "./output") -> IngestionResult:
11628:  7153:  2654:  298:     """
11629:  7154:  2655:  299:     Main entry point for Agent 1.
11630:  7155:  2656:  300:     
11631:  7156:  2657:  301:     Args:
11632:  7157:  2658:  302:         source: Local directory path OR Git URL
11633:  7158:  2659:  303:         output_dir: Where to save the flat bundle
11634:  7159:  2660:  304:     
11635:  7160:  2661:  305:     Returns:
11636:  7161:  2662:  306:         IngestionResult with flat_file_path pointing to repomix output
11637:  7162:  2663:  307:     """
11638:  7163:  2664:  308:     os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
11639:  7164:  2665:  309:     output_path = str(Path(output_dir) / "flat_codebase.txt")
11640:  7165:  2666:  310:     temp_dir = None
11641:  7166:  2667:  311: 
11642:  7167:  2668:  312:     try:
11643:  7168:  2669:  313:         # Determine source type
11644:  7169:  2670:  314:         if source.startswith("http") or source.startswith("git@"):
11645:  7170:  2671:  315:             source_type = "git"
11646:  7171:  2672:  316:             temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="agent1_repo_")
11647:  7172:  2673:  317:             working_dir = clone_repo(source, temp_dir)
11648:  7173:  2674:  318:         else:
11649:  7174:  2675:  319:             source_type = "local"
11650:  7175:  2676:  320:             working_dir = os.path.abspath(source)
11651:  7176:  2677:  321:             if not os.path.isdir(working_dir):
11652:  7177:  2678:  322:                 raise ValueError(f"Directory not found: {working_dir}")
11653:  7178:  2679:  323: 
11654:  7179:  2680:  324:         # Detect framework
11655:  7180:  2681:  325:         framework, language = detect_framework(working_dir)
11656:  7181:  2682:  326:         print(f"[Agent 1] Detected: {framework} / {language}")
11657:  7182:  2683:  327: 
11658:  7183:  2684:  328:         # Run repomix
11659:  7184:  2685:  329:         run_repomix(working_dir, output_path)
11660:  7185:  2686:  330: 
11661:  7186:  2687:  331:         file_size = Path(output_path).stat().st_size
11662:  7187:  2688:  332: 
11663:  7188:  2689:  333:         return IngestionResult(
11664:  7189:  2690:  334:             success=True,
11665:  7190:  2691:  335:             flat_file_path=output_path,
11666:  7191:  2692:  336:             source_type=source_type,
11667:  7192:  2693:  337:             source_path=source,
11668:  7193:  2694:  338:             file_size_bytes=file_size,
11669:  7194:  2695:  339:             detected_language=language,
11670:  7195:  2696:  340:             detected_framework=framework,
11671:  7196:  2697:  341:         )
11672:  7197:  2698:  342: 
11673:  7198:  2699:  343:     except Exception as e:
11674:  7199:  2700:  344:         return IngestionResult(
11675:  7200:  2701:  345:             success=False,
11676:  7201:  2702:  346:             flat_file_path="",
11677:  7202:  2703:  347:             source_type="unknown",
11678:  7203:  2704:  348:             source_path=source,
11679:  7204:  2705:  349:             file_size_bytes=0,
11680:  7205:  2706:  350:             detected_language="Unknown",
11681:  7206:  2707:  351:             detected_framework="unknown",
11682:  7207:  2708:  352:             error=str(e),
11683:  7208:  2709:  353:         )
11684:  7209:  2710:  354:     finally:
11685:  7210:  2711:  355:         if temp_dir and os.path.exists(temp_dir):
11686:  7211:  2712:  356:             shutil.rmtree(temp_dir, ignore_errors=True)
11687:  7212:  2713:  357: 
11688:  7213:  2714:  358: 
11689:  7214:  2715:  359: if __name__ == "__main__":
11690:  7215:  2716:  360:     source = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
11691:  7216:  2717:  361:     result = run(source)
11692:  7217:  2718:  362:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
11693:  7218:  2719:  363: ```
11694:  7219:  2720:  364: 
11695:  7220:  2721:  365: ---
11696:  7221:  2722:  366: 
11697:  7222:  2723:  367: ## Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
11698:  7223:  2724:  368: 
11699:  7224:  2725:  369: ### Konsep
11700:  7225:  2726:  370: 
11701:  7226:  2727:  371: Agent 2 menerima file flat dari Agent 1, lalu mengirimkannya ke **Gemini AI** untuk dianalisis. Gemini akan:
11702:  7227:  2728:  372: 
11703:  7228:  2729:  373: - Mendeteksi semua **route/endpoint** (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH)
11704:  7229:  2730:  374: - Mengidentifikasi **field yang wajib diisi** untuk setiap endpoint
11705:  7230:  2731:  375: - Mendeteksi kebutuhan **CSRF token** secara otomatis per framework
11706:  7231:  2732:  376: - Mengidentifikasi endpoint yang membutuhkan **autentikasi**
11707:  7232:  2733:  377: - Menghasilkan **unit test skeleton** untuk transaksi POST/PUT/DELETE
11708:  7233:  2734:  378: 
11709:  7234:  2735:  379: ### File: `agent2_gemini_identifier.py`
11710:  7235:  2736:  380: 
11711:  7236:  2737:  381: ```python
11712:  7237:  2738:  382: #!/usr/bin/env python3
11713:  7238:  2739:  383: """
11714:  7239:  2740:  384: Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
11715:  7240:  2741:  385: Sends repomix bundle to Gemini AI for transaction analysis.
11716:  7241:  2742:  386: """
11717:  7242:  2743:  387: 
11718:  7243:  2744:  388: import os
11719:  7244:  2745:  389: import json
11720:  7245:  2746:  390: import time
11721:  7246:  2747:  391: import requests
11722:  7247:  2748:  392: from pathlib import Path
11723:  7248:  2749:  393: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
11724:  7249:  2750:  394: from typing import Optional
11725:  7250:  2751:  395: from dotenv import load_dotenv
11726:  7251:  2752:  396: 
11727:  7252:  2753:  397: load_dotenv()
11728:  7253:  2754:  398: 
11729:  7254:  2755:  399: GEMINI_API_KEY = os.getenv("GEMINI_API_KEY")
11730:  7255:  2756:  400: GEMINI_ENDPOINT = (
11731:  7256:  2757:  401:     f"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/"
11732:  7257:  2758:  402:     f"gemini-1.5-pro:generateContent?key={GEMINI_API_KEY}"
11733:  7258:  2759:  403: )
11734:  7259:  2760:  404: 
11735:  7260:  2761:  405: # Max chars to send to Gemini (stay under token limit)
11736:  7261:  2762:  406: MAX_CONTENT_CHARS = 800_000
11737:  7262:  2763:  407: 
11738:  7263:  2764:  408: 
11739:  7264:  2765:  409: @dataclass
11740:  7265:  2766:  410: class TransactionField:
11741:  7266:  2767:  411:     name: str
11742:  7267:  2768:  412:     type: str            # "string" | "email" | "password" | "integer" | "boolean" | "file"
11743:  7268:  2769:  413:     required: bool
11744:  7269:  2770:  414:     description: str
11745:  7270:  2771:  415:     validation_rules: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
11746:  7271:  2772:  416: 
11747:  7272:  2773:  417: 
11748:  7273:  2774:  418: @dataclass
11749:  7274:  2775:  419: class Transaction:
11750:  7275:  2776:  420:     id: str
11751:  7276:  2777:  421:     method: str          # GET | POST | PUT | PATCH | DELETE
11752:  7277:  2778:  422:     endpoint: str
11753:  7278:  2779:  423:     description: str
11754:  7279:  2780:  424:     requires_auth: bool
11755:  7280:  2781:  425:     requires_csrf: bool
11756:  7281:  2782:  426:     csrf_field_name: str  # e.g. "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "X-CSRF-Token"
11757:  7282:  2783:  427:     fields: list[TransactionField]
11758:  7283:  2784:  428:     framework: str
11759:  7284:  2785:  429:     unit_test_skeleton: str = ""
11760:  7285:  2786:  430:     tags: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
11761:  7286:  2787:  431: 
11762:  7287:  2788:  432: 
11763:  7288:  2789:  433: @dataclass
11764:  7289:  2790:  434: class IdentificationResult:
11765:  7290:  2791:  435:     success: bool
11766:  7291:  2792:  436:     framework: str
11767:  7292:  2793:  437:     language: str
11768:  7293:  2794:  438:     transactions: list[Transaction]
11769:  7294:  2795:  439:     total_routes: int
11770:  7295:  2796:  440:     post_routes: int
11771:  7296:  2797:  441:     csrf_protected_routes: int
11772:  7297:  2798:  442:     auth_required_routes: int
11773:  7298:  2799:  443:     error: Optional[str] = None
11774:  7299:  2800:  444: 
11775:  7300:  2801:  445: 
11776:  7301:  2802:  446: SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
11777:  7302:  2803:  447: You are an expert code analyzer. You will receive a flat bundle of a web application codebase.
11778:  7303:  2804:  448: 
11779:  7304:  2805:  449: Your task is to analyze ALL routes/endpoints and return a STRICT JSON response.
11780:  7305:  2806:  450: 
11781:  7306:  2807:  451: ## What to extract per endpoint:
11782:  7307:  2808:  452: 1. HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)
11783:  7308:  2809:  453: 2. URL path / route
11784:  7309:  2810:  454: 3. Description of what the endpoint does
11785:  7310:  2811:  455: 4. Whether it requires authentication (JWT, session, Bearer token, etc.)
11786:  7311:  2812:  456: 5. Whether it requires CSRF protection — detect automatically by framework:
11787:  7312:  2813:  457:    - Laravel: look for @csrf, csrf_field(), VerifyCsrfToken middleware, X-CSRF-TOKEN header
11788:  7313:  2814:  458:    - Django: look for {% csrf_token %}, CsrfViewMiddleware, csrf_protect decorator
11789:  7314:  2815:  459:    - Express.js: look for csurf, csrf(), csrfToken()
11790:  7315:  2816:  460:    - Rails: look for authenticity_token, protect_from_forgery
11791:  7316:  2817:  461:    - Spring Boot: look for CsrfToken, .csrf(), SecurityConfig
11792:  7317:  2818:  462:    - FastAPI: look for custom CSRF implementations or fastapi-csrf-protect
11793:  7318:  2819:  463:    - NestJS: look for @nestjs/csrf, CsrfGuard
11794:  7319:  2820:  464:    - Go (Gin/Echo): look for gorilla/csrf, nosurf
11795:  7320:  2821:  465:    - ASP.NET: look for [ValidateAntiForgeryToken], AntiForgeryToken()
11796:  7321:  2822:  466: 6. The exact CSRF field name used (e.g., "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "authenticity_token")
11797:  7322:  2823:  467: 7. ALL form fields/request body fields with: name, type, required status, and any validation rules
11798:  7323:  2824:  468: 8. For POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE: generate a unit test skeleton in the framework's native test style
11799:  7324:  2825:  469: 
11800:  7325:  2826:  470: ## Response format — return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation:
11801:  7326:  2827:  471: 
11802:  7327:  2828:  472: {
11803:  7328:  2829:  473:   "framework": "laravel",
11804:  7329:  2830:  474:   "language": "PHP",
11805:  7330:  2831:  475:   "transactions": [
11806:  7331:  2832:  476:     {
11807:  7332:  2833:  477:       "id": "txn_001",
11808:  7333:  2834:  478:       "method": "POST",
11809:  7334:  2835:  479:       "endpoint": "/api/login",
11810:  7335:  2836:  480:       "description": "User authentication endpoint",
11811:  7336:  2837:  481:       "requires_auth": false,
11812:  7337:  2838:  482:       "requires_csrf": true,
11813:  7338:  2839:  483:       "csrf_field_name": "_token",
11814:  7339:  2840:  484:       "fields": [
11815:  7340:  2841:  485:         {
11816:  7341:  2842:  486:           "name": "email",
11817:  7342:  2843:  487:           "type": "email",
11818:  7343:  2844:  488:           "required": true,
11819:  7344:  2845:  489:           "description": "User email address",
11820:  7345:  2846:  490:           "validation_rules": ["required", "email", "max:255"]
11821:  7346:  2847:  491:         },
11822:  7347:  2848:  492:         {
11823:  7348:  2849:  493:           "name": "password",
11824:  7349:  2850:  494:           "type": "password",
11825:  7350:  2851:  495:           "required": true,
11826:  7351:  2852:  496:           "description": "User password",
11827:  7352:  2853:  497:           "validation_rules": ["required", "min:8"]
11828:  7353:  2854:  498:         }
11829:  7354:  2855:  499:       ],
11830:  7355:  2856:  500:       "unit_test_skeleton": "/** @test */\\npublic function test_user_can_login()\\n{\\n    $response = $this->post('/api/login', [\\n        'email' => 'test@example.com',\\n        'password' => 'password123',\\n    ]);\\n    $response->assertStatus(200);\\n}",
11831:  7356:  2857:  501:       "tags": ["auth", "csrf"]
11832:  7357:  2858:  502:     }
11833:  7358:  2859:  503:   ]
11834:  7359:  2860:  504: }
11835:  7360:  2861:  505: """
11836:  7361:  2862:  506: 
11837:  7362:  2863:  507: 
11838:  7363:  2864:  508: def chunk_content(content: str, max_chars: int) -> str:
11839:  7364:  2865:  509:     """Truncate content if too large, prioritizing route/controller files."""
11840:  7365:  2866:  510:     if len(content) <= max_chars:
11841:  7366:  2867:  511:         return content
11842:  7367:  2868:  512: 
11843:  7368:  2869:  513:     # Try to keep the most important parts
11844:  7369:  2870:  514:     lines = content.split("\n")
11845:  7370:  2871:  515:     priority_keywords = [
11846:  7371:  2872:  516:         "route", "controller", "middleware", "csrf", "request",
11847:  7372:  2873:  517:         "form", "validate", "auth", "login", "register", "api",
11848:  7373:  2874:  518:         "POST", "GET", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"
11849:  7374:  2875:  519:     ]
11850:  7375:  2876:  520: 
11851:  7376:  2877:  521:     priority_lines = []
11852:  7377:  2878:  522:     other_lines = []
11853:  7378:  2879:  523: 
11854:  7379:  2880:  524:     for line in lines:
11855:  7380:  2881:  525:         if any(kw.lower() in line.lower() for kw in priority_keywords):
11856:  7381:  2882:  526:             priority_lines.append(line)
11857:  7382:  2883:  527:         else:
11858:  7383:  2884:  528:             other_lines.append(line)
11859:  7384:  2885:  529: 
11860:  7385:  2886:  530:     result = "\n".join(priority_lines)
11861:  7386:  2887:  531:     if len(result) < max_chars:
11862:  7387:  2888:  532:         remaining = max_chars - len(result)
11863:  7388:  2889:  533:         result += "\n" + "\n".join(other_lines)[:remaining]
11864:  7389:  2890:  534: 
11865:  7390:  2891:  535:     return result[:max_chars]
11866:  7391:  2892:  536: 
11867:  7392:  2893:  537: 
11868:  7393:  2894:  538: def call_gemini(content: str) -> dict:
11869:  7394:  2895:  539:     """Call Gemini API with the codebase content."""
11870:  7395:  2896:  540:     print("[Agent 2] Sending codebase to Gemini AI...")
11871:  7396:  2897:  541: 
11872:  7397:  2898:  542:     payload = {
11873:  7398:  2899:  543:         "system_instruction": {
11874:  7399:  2900:  544:             "parts": [{"text": SYSTEM_PROMPT}]
11875:  7400:  2901:  545:         },
11876:  7401:  2902:  546:         "contents": [{
11877:  7402:  2903:  547:             "parts": [{
11878:  7403:  2904:  548:                 "text": f"Analyze this codebase and return the JSON:\n\n{content}"
11879:  7404:  2905:  549:             }]
11880:  7405:  2906:  550:         }],
11881:  7406:  2907:  551:         "generationConfig": {
11882:  7407:  2908:  552:             "temperature": 0.1,
11883:  7408:  2909:  553:             "maxOutputTokens": 8192,
11884:  7409:  2910:  554:             "responseMimeType": "application/json"
11885:  7410:  2911:  555:         }
11886:  7411:  2912:  556:     }
11887:  7412:  2913:  557: 
11888:  7413:  2914:  558:     for attempt in range(3):
11889:  7414:  2915:  559:         try:
11890:  7415:  2916:  560:             response = requests.post(
11891:  7416:  2917:  561:                 GEMINI_ENDPOINT,
11892:  7417:  2918:  562:                 json=payload,
11893:  7418:  2919:  563:                 headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
11894:  7419:  2920:  564:                 timeout=120
11895:  7420:  2921:  565:             )
11896:  7421:  2922:  566:             response.raise_for_status()
11897:  7422:  2923:  567:             data = response.json()
11898:  7423:  2924:  568: 
11899:  7424:  2925:  569:             raw_text = data["candidates"][0]["content"]["parts"][0]["text"]
11900:  7425:  2926:  570:             # Strip possible markdown fences
11901:  7426:  2927:  571:             raw_text = raw_text.strip()
11902:  7427:  2928:  572:             if raw_text.startswith("```"):
11903:  7428:  2929:  573:                 raw_text = "\n".join(raw_text.split("\n")[1:-1])
11904:  7429:  2930:  574: 
11905:  7430:  2931:  575:             return json.loads(raw_text)
11906:  7431:  2932:  576: 
11907:  7432:  2933:  577:         except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
11908:  7433:  2934:  578:             print(f"[Agent 2] Timeout on attempt {attempt + 1}, retrying...")
11909:  7434:  2935:  579:             time.sleep(5 * (attempt + 1))
11910:  7435:  2936:  580:         except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
11911:  7436:  2937:  581:             raise ValueError(f"Gemini returned invalid JSON: {e}")
11912:  7437:  2938:  582: 
11913:  7438:  2939:  583:     raise RuntimeError("Gemini API failed after 3 attempts")
11914:  7439:  2940:  584: 
11915:  7440:  2941:  585: 
11916:  7441:  2942:  586: def parse_result(raw: dict, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
11917:  7442:  2943:  587:     """Parse Gemini response into typed IdentificationResult."""
11918:  7443:  2944:  588:     transactions = []
11919:  7444:  2945:  589: 
11920:  7445:  2946:  590:     for t in raw.get("transactions", []):
11921:  7446:  2947:  591:         fields = [
11922:  7447:  2948:  592:             TransactionField(
11923:  7448:  2949:  593:                 name=f["name"],
11924:  7449:  2950:  594:                 type=f.get("type", "string"),
11925:  7450:  2951:  595:                 required=f.get("required", False),
11926:  7451:  2952:  596:                 description=f.get("description", ""),
11927:  7452:  2953:  597:                 validation_rules=f.get("validation_rules", []),
11928:  7453:  2954:  598:             )
11929:  7454:  2955:  599:             for f in t.get("fields", [])
11930:  7455:  2956:  600:         ]
11931:  7456:  2957:  601: 
11932:  7457:  2958:  602:         transactions.append(Transaction(
11933:  7458:  2959:  603:             id=t.get("id", f"txn_{len(transactions):03d}"),
11934:  7459:  2960:  604:             method=t["method"].upper(),
11935:  7460:  2961:  605:             endpoint=t["endpoint"],
11936:  7461:  2962:  606:             description=t.get("description", ""),
11937:  7462:  2963:  607:             requires_auth=t.get("requires_auth", False),
11938:  7463:  2964:  608:             requires_csrf=t.get("requires_csrf", False),
11939:  7464:  2965:  609:             csrf_field_name=t.get("csrf_field_name", ""),
11940:  7465:  2966:  610:             fields=fields,
11941:  7466:  2967:  611:             framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
11942:  7467:  2968:  612:             unit_test_skeleton=t.get("unit_test_skeleton", ""),
11943:  7468:  2969:  613:             tags=t.get("tags", []),
11944:  7469:  2970:  614:         ))
11945:  7470:  2971:  615: 
11946:  7471:  2972:  616:     mutating_methods = {"POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"}
11947:  7472:  2973:  617:     return IdentificationResult(
11948:  7473:  2974:  618:         success=True,
11949:  7474:  2975:  619:         framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
11950:  7475:  2976:  620:         language=raw.get("language", "Unknown"),
11951:  7476:  2977:  621:         transactions=transactions,
11952:  7477:  2978:  622:         total_routes=len(transactions),
11953:  7478:  2979:  623:         post_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.method in mutating_methods),
11954:  7479:  2980:  624:         csrf_protected_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_csrf),
11955:  7480:  2981:  625:         auth_required_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_auth),
11956:  7481:  2982:  626:     )
11957:  7482:  2983:  627: 
11958:  7483:  2984:  628: 
11959:  7484:  2985:  629: def run(flat_file_path: str, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
11960:  7485:  2986:  630:     """
11961:  7486:  2987:  631:     Main entry point for Agent 2.
11962:  7487:  2988:  632:     
11963:  7488:  2989:  633:     Args:
11964:  7489:  2990:  634:         flat_file_path: Path to repomix output file
11965:  7490:  2991:  635:         framework_hint: Optional hint from Agent 1
11966:  7491:  2992:  636:     
11967:  7492:  2993:  637:     Returns:
11968:  7493:  2994:  638:         IdentificationResult with all transactions
11969:  7494:  2995:  639:     """
11970:  7495:  2996:  640:     try:
11971:  7496:  2997:  641:         content = Path(flat_file_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
11972:  7497:  2998:  642:         content = chunk_content(content, MAX_CONTENT_CHARS)
11973:  7498:  2999:  643: 
11974:  7499:  3000:  644:         raw = call_gemini(content)
11975:  7500:  3001:  645:         result = parse_result(raw, framework_hint)
11976:  7501:  3002:  646: 
11977:  7502:  3003:  647:         print(f"[Agent 2] ✅ Found {result.total_routes} routes")
11978:  7503:  3004:  648:         print(f"[Agent 2]    POST/mutating: {result.post_routes}")
11979:  7504:  3005:  649:         print(f"[Agent 2]    CSRF protected: {result.csrf_protected_routes}")
11980:  7505:  3006:  650:         print(f"[Agent 2]    Auth required: {result.auth_required_routes}")
11981:  7506:  3007:  651: 
11982:  7507:  3008:  652:         # Save transactions to file
11983:  7508:  3009:  653:         output_path = Path(flat_file_path).parent / "transactions.json"
11984:  7509:  3010:  654:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
11985:  7510:  3011:  655:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
11986:  7511:  3012:  656:         print(f"[Agent 2] Saved: {output_path}")
11987:  7512:  3013:  657: 
11988:  7513:  3014:  658:         return result
11989:  7514:  3015:  659: 
11990:  7515:  3016:  660:     except Exception as e:
11991:  7516:  3017:  661:         return IdentificationResult(
11992:  7517:  3018:  662:             success=False,
11993:  7518:  3019:  663:             framework=framework_hint,
11994:  7519:  3020:  664:             language="Unknown",
11995:  7520:  3021:  665:             transactions=[],
11996:  7521:  3022:  666:             total_routes=0,
11997:  7522:  3023:  667:             post_routes=0,
11998:  7523:  3024:  668:             csrf_protected_routes=0,
11999:  7524:  3025:  669:             auth_required_routes=0,
12000:  7525:  3026:  670:             error=str(e),
12001:  7526:  3027:  671:         )
12002:  7527:  3028:  672: 
12003:  7528:  3029:  673: 
12004:  7529:  3030:  674: if __name__ == "__main__":
12005:  7530:  3031:  675:     import sys
12006:  7531:  3032:  676:     flat_file = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/flat_codebase.txt"
12007:  7532:  3033:  677:     result = run(flat_file)
12008:  7533:  3034:  678:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
12009:  7534:  3035:  679: ```
12010:  7535:  3036:  680: 
12011:  7536:  3037:  681: ---
12012:  7537:  3038:  682: 
12013:  7538:  3039:  683: ## Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent (Live Runner)
12014:  7539:  3040:  684: 
12015:  7540:  3041:  685: ### Konsep
12016:  7541:  3042:  686: 
12017:  7542:  3043:  687: Agent 3 menerima `transactions.json` dari Agent 2 dan mengeksekusi **HTTP requests nyata** ke aplikasi yang sedang berjalan. Setiap request diukur menggunakan **CodeCarbon** untuk melacak konsumsi energi dan emisi CO₂.
12018:  7543:  3044:  688: 
12019:  7544:  3045:  689: Untuk endpoint yang membutuhkan CSRF, agent ini secara otomatis:
12020:  7545:  3046:  690: 1. Melakukan GET request ke halaman login/form terlebih dahulu
12021:  7546:  3047:  691: 2. Mengekstrak CSRF token dari response (cookie, header, atau HTML hidden input)
12022:  7547:  3048:  692: 3. Menyertakan token tersebut di request POST
12023:  7548:  3049:  693: 
12024:  7549:  3050:  694: ### File: `agent3_carbon.py`
12025:  7550:  3051:  695: 
12026:  7551:  3052:  696: ```python
12027:  7552:  3053:  697: #!/usr/bin/env python3
12028:  7553:  3054:  698: """
12029:  7554:  3055:  699: Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent
12030:  7555:  3056:  700: Runs live HTTP requests to the target app and measures CO2 emissions.
12031:  7556:  3057:  701: """
12032:  7557:  3058:  702: 
12033:  7558:  3059:  703: import os
12034:  7559:  3060:  704: import json
12035:  7560:  3061:  705: import time
12036:  7561:  3062:  706: import re
12037:  7562:  3063:  707: import requests
12038:  7563:  3064:  708: from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
12039:  7564:  3065:  709: from codecarbon import EmissionsTracker
12040:  7565:  3066:  710: from pathlib import Path
12041:  7566:  3067:  711: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
12042:  7567:  3068:  712: from typing import Optional, Any
12043:  7568:  3069:  713: from dotenv import load_dotenv
12044:  7569:  3070:  714: 
12045:  7570:  3071:  715: load_dotenv()
12046:  7571:  3072:  716: 
12047:  7572:  3073:  717: BASE_URL = os.getenv("TARGET_BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
12048:  7573:  3074:  718: REQUEST_TIMEOUT = int(os.getenv("REQUEST_TIMEOUT", "30"))
12049:  7574:  3075:  719: DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS = float(os.getenv("DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS", "0.5"))
12050:  7575:  3076:  720: 
12051:  7576:  3077:  721: 
12052:  7577:  3078:  722: @dataclass
12053:  7578:  3079:  723: class RequestMeasurement:
12054:  7579:  3080:  724:     transaction_id: str
12055:  7580:  3081:  725:     method: str
12056:  7581:  3082:  726:     endpoint: str
12057:  7582:  3083:  727:     full_url: str
12058:  7583:  3084:  728:     status_code: int
12059:  7584:  3085:  729:     response_time_ms: float
12060:  7585:  3086:  730:     energy_consumed_kwh: float
12061:  7586:  3087:  731:     co2_emissions_kg: float
12062:  7587:  3088:  732:     success: bool
12063:  7588:  3089:  733:     csrf_obtained: bool
12064:  7589:  3090:  734:     fields_sent: list[str]
12065:  7590:  3091:  735:     error: Optional[str] = None
12066:  7591:  3092:  736:     response_preview: str = ""
12067:  7592:  3093:  737: 
12068:  7593:  3094:  738: 
12069:  7594:  3095:  739: @dataclass
12070:  7595:  3096:  740: class CarbonResult:
12071:  7596:  3097:  741:     success: bool
12072:  7597:  3098:  742:     base_url: str
12073:  7598:  3099:  743:     total_requests: int
12074:  7599:  3100:  744:     successful_requests: int
12075:  7600:  3101:  745:     failed_requests: int
12076:  7601:  3102:  746:     total_energy_kwh: float
12077:  7602:  3103:  747:     total_co2_kg: float
12078:  7603:  3104:  748:     avg_response_time_ms: float
12079:  7604:  3105:  749:     measurements: list[RequestMeasurement]
12080:  7605:  3106:  750:     error: Optional[str] = None
12081:  7606:  3107:  751: 
12082:  7607:  3108:  752: 
12083:  7608:  3109:  753: # ─── CSRF Token Extractors ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
12084:  7609:  3110:  754: 
12085:  7610:  3111:  755: def extract_csrf_from_html(html: str, field_name: str) -> Optional[str]:
12086:  7611:  3112:  756:     """Extract CSRF token from HTML hidden input."""
12087:  7612:  3113:  757:     soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "html.parser")
12088:  7613:  3114:  758: 
12089:  7614:  3115:  759:     # Try direct name match
12090:  7615:  3116:  760:     token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": field_name})
12091:  7616:  3117:  761:     if token_input:
12092:  7617:  3118:  762:         return token_input.get("value")
12093:  7618:  3119:  763: 
12094:  7619:  3120:  764:     # Try meta tag (common in SPAs)
12095:  7620:  3121:  765:     meta = soup.find("meta", {"name": field_name})
12096:  7621:  3122:  766:     if meta:
12097:  7622:  3123:  767:         return meta.get("content")
12098:  7623:  3124:  768: 
12099:  7624:  3125:  769:     # Generic CSRF patterns
12100:  7625:  3126:  770:     for pattern in ["csrf", "token", "_token", "xsrf"]:
12101:  7626:  3127:  771:         token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": re.compile(pattern, re.I)})
12102:  7627:  3128:  772:         if token_input:
12103:  7628:  3129:  773:             return token_input.get("value")
12104:  7629:  3130:  774: 
12105:  7630:  3131:  775:     return None
12106:  7631:  3132:  776: 
12107:  7632:  3133:  777: 
12108:  7633:  3134:  778: def get_csrf_token(
12109:  7634:  3135:  779:     session: requests.Session,
12110:  7635:  3136:  780:     transaction_endpoint: str,
12111:  7636:  3137:  781:     csrf_field_name: str,
12112:  7637:  3138:  782:     framework: str
12113:  7638:  3139:  783: ) -> tuple[Optional[str], bool]:
12114:  7639:  3140:  784:     """
12115:  7640:  3141:  785:     Attempt to retrieve CSRF token before a mutating request.
12116:  7641:  3142:  786:     Returns (token_value, success).
12117:  7642:  3143:  787:     """
12118:  7643:  3144:  788:     # Guess the form/GET page that provides the CSRF token
12119:  7644:  3145:  789:     # Strip /api/ prefix for web form pages
12120:  7645:  3146:  790:     form_endpoint = transaction_endpoint.replace("/api/", "/")
12121:  7646:  3147:  791:     candidates = [
12122:  7647:  3148:  792:         f"{BASE_URL}{form_endpoint}",
12123:  7648:  3149:  793:         f"{BASE_URL}/",
12124:  7649:  3150:  794:         f"{BASE_URL}/login",
12125:  7650:  3151:  795:         f"{BASE_URL}/home",
12126:  7651:  3152:  796:     ]
12127:  7652:  3153:  797: 
12128:  7653:  3154:  798:     for url in candidates:
12129:  7654:  3155:  799:         try:
12130:  7655:  3156:  800:             r = session.get(url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
12131:  7656:  3157:  801:             if r.status_code == 200:
12132:  7657:  3158:  802:                 # 1. Check HTML for hidden input
12133:  7658:  3159:  803:                 token = extract_csrf_from_html(r.text, csrf_field_name)
12134:  7659:  3160:  804:                 if token:
12135:  7660:  3161:  805:                     return token, True
12136:  7661:  3162:  806: 
12137:  7662:  3163:  807:                 # 2. Check cookies (XSRF-TOKEN style, e.g., Laravel Sanctum)
12138:  7663:  3164:  808:                 for cookie_name in ["XSRF-TOKEN", "csrftoken", "csrf_token"]:
12139:  7664:  3165:  809:                     if cookie_name in session.cookies:
12140:  7665:  3166:  810:                         import urllib.parse
12141:  7666:  3167:  811:                         return urllib.parse.unquote(session.cookies[cookie_name]), True
12142:  7667:  3168:  812: 
12143:  7668:  3169:  813:                 # 3. Check response headers
12144:  7669:  3170:  814:                 for header_name in ["X-CSRF-Token", "X-XSRF-Token", "CSRF-Token"]:
12145:  7670:  3171:  815:                     if header_name in r.headers:
12146:  7671:  3172:  816:                         return r.headers[header_name], True
12147:  7672:  3173:  817: 
12148:  7673:  3174:  818:         except Exception:
12149:  7674:  3175:  819:             continue
12150:  7675:  3176:  820: 
12151:  7676:  3177:  821:     return None, False
12152:  7677:  3178:  822: 
12153:  7678:  3179:  823: 
12154:  7679:  3180:  824: # ─── Dummy Data Generator ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
12155:  7680:  3181:  825: 
12156:  7681:  3182:  826: DUMMY_VALUES: dict[str, Any] = {
12157:  7682:  3183:  827:     "email":    "test@example.com",
12158:  7683:  3184:  828:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
12159:  7684:  3185:  829:     "name":     "Test User",
12160:  7685:  3186:  830:     "username": "testuser",
12161:  7686:  3187:  831:     "phone":    "+1234567890",
12162:  7687:  3188:  832:     "address":  "123 Test Street",
12163:  7688:  3189:  833:     "title":    "Test Title",
12164:  7689:  3190:  834:     "body":     "Test body content for automated testing",
12165:  7690:  3191:  835:     "content":  "Test content",
12166:  7691:  3192:  836:     "message":  "Test message",
12167:  7692:  3193:  837:     "amount":   "100.00",
12168:  7693:  3194:  838:     "price":    "99.99",
12169:  7694:  3195:  839:     "quantity": "1",
12170:  7695:  3196:  840:     "date":     "2024-01-01",
12171:  7696:  3197:  841:     "token":    "dummy_token_for_testing",
12172:  7697:  3198:  842:     "code":     "TEST123",
12173:  7698:  3199:  843:     "url":      "https://example.com",
12174:  7699:  3200:  844:     "file":     None,  # Skip file uploads
12175:  7700:  3201:  845: }
12176:  7701:  3202:  846: 
12177:  7702:  3203:  847: TYPE_DEFAULTS: dict[str, Any] = {
12178:  7703:  3204:  848:     "email":    "test@example.com",
12179:  7704:  3205:  849:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
12180:  7705:  3206:  850:     "string":   "test_value",
12181:  7706:  3207:  851:     "integer":  "1",
12182:  7707:  3208:  852:     "number":   "1",
12183:  7708:  3209:  853:     "boolean":  "true",
12184:  7709:  3210:  854:     "text":     "Test text content",
12185:  7710:  3211:  855:     "file":     None,
12186:  7711:  3212:  856: }
12187:  7712:  3213:  857: 
12188:  7713:  3214:  858: 
12189:  7714:  3215:  859: def generate_dummy_payload(fields: list[dict]) -> dict:
12190:  7715:  3216:  860:     """Generate dummy payload from field definitions."""
12191:  7716:  3217:  861:     payload = {}
12192:  7717:  3218:  862:     for f in fields:
12193:  7718:  3219:  863:         name = f["name"].lower()
12194:  7719:  3220:  864:         ftype = f.get("type", "string").lower()
12195:  7720:  3221:  865: 
12196:  7721:  3222:  866:         if ftype == "file":
12197:  7722:  3223:  867:             continue  # Skip file fields in automated testing
12198:  7723:  3224:  868: 
12199:  7724:  3225:  869:         # Try name match first
12200:  7725:  3226:  870:         value = DUMMY_VALUES.get(name)
12201:  7726:  3227:  871:         if value is None:
12202:  7727:  3228:  872:             # Try partial match
12203:  7728:  3229:  873:             for key, val in DUMMY_VALUES.items():
12204:  7729:  3230:  874:                 if key in name:
12205:  7730:  3231:  875:                     value = val
12206:  7731:  3232:  876:                     break
12207:  7732:  3233:  877: 
12208:  7733:  3234:  878:         # Fallback to type default
12209:  7734:  3235:  879:         if value is None:
12210:  7735:  3236:  880:             value = TYPE_DEFAULTS.get(ftype, "test_value")
12211:  7736:  3237:  881: 
12212:  7737:  3238:  882:         if value is not None:
12213:  7738:  3239:  883:             payload[f["name"]] = value
12214:  7739:  3240:  884: 
12215:  7740:  3241:  885:     return payload
12216:  7741:  3242:  886: 
12217:  7742:  3243:  887: 
12218:  7743:  3244:  888: # ─── Main Runner ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
12219:  7744:  3245:  889: 
12220:  7745:  3246:  890: def run_transaction(
12221:  7746:  3247:  891:     session: requests.Session,
12222:  7747:  3248:  892:     transaction: dict,
12223:  7748:  3249:  893:     framework: str,
12224:  7749:  3250:  894:     tracker: EmissionsTracker
12225:  7750:  3251:  895: ) -> RequestMeasurement:
12226:  7751:  3252:  896:     """Execute a single transaction with carbon tracking."""
12227:  7752:  3253:  897:     method = transaction["method"].upper()
12228:  7753:  3254:  898:     endpoint = transaction["endpoint"]
12229:  7754:  3255:  899:     full_url = f"{BASE_URL}{endpoint}"
12230:  7755:  3256:  900: 
12231:  7756:  3257:  901:     csrf_obtained = False
12232:  7757:  3258:  902:     csrf_token = None
12233:  7758:  3259:  903: 
12234:  7759:  3260:  904:     # Get CSRF token if required
12235:  7760:  3261:  905:     if transaction.get("requires_csrf") and method in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
12236:  7761:  3262:  906:         csrf_field = transaction.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
12237:  7762:  3263:  907:         csrf_token, csrf_obtained = get_csrf_token(session, endpoint, csrf_field, framework)
12238:  7763:  3264:  908: 
12239:  7764:  3265:  909:         if csrf_token:
12240:  7765:  3266:  910:             # Set in headers too (SPA pattern)
12241:  7766:  3267:  911:             session.headers.update({
12242:  7767:  3268:  912:                 "X-CSRF-Token": csrf_token,
12243:  7768:  3269:  913:                 "X-XSRF-Token": csrf_token,
12244:  7769:  3270:  914:             })
12245:  7770:  3271:  915: 
12246:  7771:  3272:  916:     # Build payload
12247:  7772:  3273:  917:     payload = generate_dummy_payload(transaction.get("fields", []))
12248:  7773:  3274:  918: 
12249:  7774:  3275:  919:     # Add CSRF to payload if token found
12250:  7775:  3276:  920:     if csrf_token and transaction.get("csrf_field_name"):
12251:  7776:  3277:  921:         payload[transaction["csrf_field_name"]] = csrf_token
12252:  7777:  3278:  922: 
12253:  7778:  3279:  923:     # Track energy for this request
12254:  7779:  3280:  924:     tracker.start_task(transaction["id"])
12255:  7780:  3281:  925:     start_time = time.time()
12256:  7781:  3282:  926: 
12257:  7782:  3283:  927:     try:
12258:  7783:  3284:  928:         if method == "GET":
12259:  7784:  3285:  929:             response = session.get(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
12260:  7785:  3286:  930:         elif method == "POST":
12261:  7786:  3287:  931:             response = session.post(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
12262:  7787:  3288:  932:         elif method == "PUT":
12263:  7788:  3289:  933:             response = session.put(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
12264:  7789:  3290:  934:         elif method == "PATCH":
12265:  7790:  3291:  935:             response = session.patch(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
12266:  7791:  3292:  936:         elif method == "DELETE":
12267:  7792:  3293:  937:             response = session.delete(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
12268:  7793:  3294:  938:         else:
12269:  7794:  3295:  939:             raise ValueError(f"Unsupported method: {method}")
12270:  7795:  3296:  940: 
12271:  7796:  3297:  941:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
12272:  7797:  3298:  942:         emissions_data = tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
12273:  7798:  3299:  943: 
12274:  7799:  3300:  944:         return RequestMeasurement(
12275:  7800:  3301:  945:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
12276:  7801:  3302:  946:             method=method,
12277:  7802:  3303:  947:             endpoint=endpoint,
12278:  7803:  3304:  948:             full_url=full_url,
12279:  7804:  3305:  949:             status_code=response.status_code,
12280:  7805:  3306:  950:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
12281:  7806:  3307:  951:             energy_consumed_kwh=emissions_data.energy_consumed if emissions_data else 0.0,
12282:  7807:  3308:  952:             co2_emissions_kg=emissions_data.emissions if emissions_data else 0.0,
12283:  7808:  3309:  953:             success=200 <= response.status_code < 400,
12284:  7809:  3310:  954:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
12285:  7810:  3311:  955:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
12286:  7811:  3312:  956:             response_preview=response.text[:200],
12287:  7812:  3313:  957:         )
12288:  7813:  3314:  958: 
12289:  7814:  3315:  959:     except Exception as e:
12290:  7815:  3316:  960:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
12291:  7816:  3317:  961:         try:
12292:  7817:  3318:  962:             tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
12293:  7818:  3319:  963:         except Exception:
12294:  7819:  3320:  964:             pass
12295:  7820:  3321:  965: 
12296:  7821:  3322:  966:         return RequestMeasurement(
12297:  7822:  3323:  967:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
12298:  7823:  3324:  968:             method=method,
12299:  7824:  3325:  969:             endpoint=endpoint,
12300:  7825:  3326:  970:             full_url=full_url,
12301:  7826:  3327:  971:             status_code=0,
12302:  7827:  3328:  972:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
12303:  7828:  3329:  973:             energy_consumed_kwh=0.0,
12304:  7829:  3330:  974:             co2_emissions_kg=0.0,
12305:  7830:  3331:  975:             success=False,
12306:  7831:  3332:  976:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
12307:  7832:  3333:  977:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
12308:  7833:  3334:  978:             error=str(e),
12309:  7834:  3335:  979:         )
12310:  7835:  3336:  980: 
12311:  7836:  3337:  981: 
12312:  7837:  3338:  982: def run(transactions_path: str) -> CarbonResult:
12313:  7838:  3339:  983:     """
12314:  7839:  3340:  984:     Main entry point for Agent 3.
12315:  7840:  3341:  985:     
12316:  7841:  3342:  986:     Args:
12317:  7842:  3343:  987:         transactions_path: Path to transactions.json from Agent 2
12318:  7843:  3344:  988:     
12319:  7844:  3345:  989:     Returns:
12320:  7845:  3346:  990:         CarbonResult with per-request energy measurements
12321:  7846:  3347:  991:     """
12322:  7847:  3348:  992:     try:
12323:  7848:  3349:  993:         with open(transactions_path) as f:
12324:  7849:  3350:  994:             data = json.load(f)
12325:  7850:  3351:  995: 
12326:  7851:  3352:  996:         transactions = data.get("transactions", [])
12327:  7852:  3353:  997:         framework = data.get("framework", "unknown")
12328:  7853:  3354:  998: 
12329:  7854:  3355:  999:         print(f"[Agent 3] Running {len(transactions)} transactions against {BASE_URL}")
12330:  7855:  3356: 1000: 
12331:  7856:  3357: 1001:         session = requests.Session()
12332:  7857:  3358: 1002:         session.headers.update({
12333:  7858:  3359: 1003:             "Accept": "application/json, text/html",
12334:  7859:  3360: 1004:             "User-Agent": "CodeCarbonAgent/1.0",
12335:  7860:  3361: 1005:         })
12336:  7861:  3362: 1006: 
12337:  7862:  3363: 1007:         # Initialize CodeCarbon tracker
12338:  7863:  3364: 1008:         tracker = EmissionsTracker(
12339:  7864:  3365: 1009:             project_name="code_carbon_agent",
12340:  7865:  3366: 1010:             output_dir=str(Path(transactions_path).parent),
12341:  7866:  3367: 1011:             log_level="warning",
12342:  7867:  3368: 1012:             save_to_file=False,
12343:  7868:  3369: 1013:             tracking_mode="process",
12344:  7869:  3370: 1014:         )
12345:  7870:  3371: 1015:         tracker.start()
12346:  7871:  3372: 1016: 
12347:  7872:  3373: 1017:         measurements = []
12348:  7873:  3374: 1018: 
12349:  7874:  3375: 1019:         for txn in transactions:
12350:  7875:  3376: 1020:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {txn['method']} {txn['endpoint']}")
12351:  7876:  3377: 1021:             measurement = run_transaction(session, txn, framework, tracker)
12352:  7877:  3378: 1022:             measurements.append(measurement)
12353:  7878:  3379: 1023: 
12354:  7879:  3380: 1024:             status_icon = "✅" if measurement.success else "❌"
12355:  7880:  3381: 1025:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {status_icon} {measurement.status_code} "
12356:  7881:  3382: 1026:                   f"({measurement.response_time_ms:.0f}ms, "
12357:  7882:  3383: 1027:                   f"{measurement.co2_emissions_kg*1000:.4f}g CO₂)")
12358:  7883:  3384: 1028: 
12359:  7884:  3385: 1029:             time.sleep(DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS)
12360:  7885:  3386: 1030: 
12361:  7886:  3387: 1031:         tracker.stop()
12362:  7887:  3388: 1032: 
12363:  7888:  3389: 1033:         successful = sum(1 for m in measurements if m.success)
12364:  7889:  3390: 1034:         total_energy = sum(m.energy_consumed_kwh for m in measurements)
12365:  7890:  3391: 1035:         total_co2 = sum(m.co2_emissions_kg for m in measurements)
12366:  7891:  3392: 1036:         avg_time = (sum(m.response_time_ms for m in measurements) / len(measurements)
12367:  7892:  3393: 1037:                     if measurements else 0)
12368:  7893:  3394: 1038: 
12369:  7894:  3395: 1039:         result = CarbonResult(
12370:  7895:  3396: 1040:             success=True,
12371:  7896:  3397: 1041:             base_url=BASE_URL,
12372:  7897:  3398: 1042:             total_requests=len(measurements),
12373:  7898:  3399: 1043:             successful_requests=successful,
12374:  7899:  3400: 1044:             failed_requests=len(measurements) - successful,
12375:  7900:  3401: 1045:             total_energy_kwh=round(total_energy, 8),
12376:  7901:  3402: 1046:             total_co2_kg=round(total_co2, 8),
12377:  7902:  3403: 1047:             avg_response_time_ms=round(avg_time, 2),
12378:  7903:  3404: 1048:             measurements=measurements,
12379:  7904:  3405: 1049:         )
12380:  7905:  3406: 1050: 
12381:  7906:  3407: 1051:         # Save carbon report
12382:  7907:  3408: 1052:         output_path = Path(transactions_path).parent / "carbon_report.json"
12383:  7908:  3409: 1053:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
12384:  7909:  3410: 1054:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
12385:  7910:  3411: 1055:         print(f"[Agent 3] ✅ Saved: {output_path}")
12386:  7911:  3412: 1056: 
12387:  7912:  3413: 1057:         return result
12388:  7913:  3414: 1058: 
12389:  7914:  3415: 1059:     except Exception as e:
12390:  7915:  3416: 1060:         return CarbonResult(
12391:  7916:  3417: 1061:             success=False,
12392:  7917:  3418: 1062:             base_url=BASE_URL,
12393:  7918:  3419: 1063:             total_requests=0,
12394:  7919:  3420: 1064:             successful_requests=0,
12395:  7920:  3421: 1065:             failed_requests=0,
12396:  7921:  3422: 1066:             total_energy_kwh=0.0,
12397:  7922:  3423: 1067:             total_co2_kg=0.0,
12398:  7923:  3424: 1068:             avg_response_time_ms=0.0,
12399:  7924:  3425: 1069:             measurements=[],
12400:  7925:  3426: 1070:             error=str(e),
12401:  7926:  3427: 1071:         )
12402:  7927:  3428: 1072: 
12403:  7928:  3429: 1073: 
12404:  7929:  3430: 1074: if __name__ == "__main__":
12405:  7930:  3431: 1075:     import sys
12406:  7931:  3432: 1076:     txn_path = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/transactions.json"
12407:  7932:  3433: 1077:     result = run(txn_path)
12408:  7933:  3434: 1078:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
12409:  7934:  3435: 1079: ```
12410:  7935:  3436: 1080: 
12411:  7936:  3437: 1081: ---
12412:  7937:  3438: 1082: 
12413:  7938:  3439: 1083: ## Agent 4 — Refactor Report Agent
12414:  7939:  3440: 1084: 
12415:  7940:  3441: 1085: ### Konsep
12416:  7941:  3442: 1086: 
12417:  7942:  3443: 1087: Agent 4 mengambil semua hasil dari Agent 1–3 dan menghasilkan:
12418:  7943:  3444: 1088: 
12419:  7944:  3445: 1089: - **Laporan refactoring lengkap** dalam format Markdown
12420:  7945:  3446: 1090: - **Unit test files** untuk setiap transaksi POST/mutating
12421:  7946:  3447: 1091: - **Ringkasan carbon footprint** dengan rekomendasi optimasi
12422:  7947:  3448: 1092: 
12423:  7948:  3449: 1093: ### File: `agent4_report.py`
12424:  7949:  3450: 1094: 
12425:  7950:  3451: 1095: ```python
12426:  7951:  3452: 1096: #!/usr/bin/env python3
12427:  7952:  3453: 1097: """
12428:  7953:  3454: 1098: Agent 4 — Refactor Report Agent
12429:  7954:  3455: 1099: Combines all data and generates comprehensive Markdown report + unit tests.
12430:  7955:  3456: 1100: """
12431:  7956:  3457: 1101: 
12432:  7957:  3458: 1102: import os
12433:  7958:  3459: 1103: import json
12434:  7959:  3460: 1104: from pathlib import Path
12435:  7960:  3461: 1105: from datetime import datetime
12436:  7961:  3462: 1106: from dataclasses import asdict
12437:  7962:  3463: 1107: from typing import Any
12438:  7963:  3464: 1108: from dotenv import load_dotenv
12439:  7964:  3465: 1109: 
12440:  7965:  3466: 1110: load_dotenv()
12441:  7966:  3467: 1111: 
12442:  7967:  3468: 1112: REPORT_DIR = os.getenv("REPORT_OUTPUT_DIR", "./reports")
12443:  7968:  3469: 1113: 
12444:  7969:  3470: 1114: 
12445:  7970:  3471: 1115: # ─── Unit Test Generators ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
12446:  7971:  3472: 1116: 
12447:  7972:  3473: 1117: UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES = {
12448:  7973:  3474: 1118:     "laravel": {
12449:  7974:  3475: 1119:         "ext": "php",

12764:  8289:  3790: 1434:     csrf_txns = [t for t in transactions if t.get("requires_csrf")]
12765:  8290:  3791: 1435:     if csrf_txns:
12766:  8291:  3792: 1436:         csrf_fields = list(set(t.get("csrf_field_name", "") for t in csrf_txns if t.get("csrf_field_name")))
12767:  8292:  3793: 1437:         for cf in csrf_fields:
12768:  8293:  3794: 1438:             lines.append(f"- CSRF field name: **`{cf}`**")
12769:  8294:  3795: 1439:         lines.append("")
12770:  8295:  3796: 1440:         lines.append("Endpoints with CSRF protection:")
12771:  8296:  3797: 1441:         for t in csrf_txns:
12772:  8297:  3798: 1442:             lines.append(f"- `{t['method']} {t['endpoint']}`")
12773:  8298:  3799: 1443:     else:
12774:  8299:  3800: 1444:         lines.append("_No CSRF-protected endpoints detected._")
12775:  8300:  3801: 1445: 
12776:  8301:  3802: 1446:     lines += [
12777:  8302:  3803: 1447:         f"",
12778:  8303:  3804: 1448:         f"---",
12779:  8304:  3805: 1449:         f"",
12780:  8305:  3806: 1450:         f"## 🌱 Carbon Footprint Analysis",
12781:  8306:  3807: 1451:         f"",
12782:  8307:  3808: 1452:         f"| Endpoint | Method | Status | Energy (kWh) | CO₂ (g) | Time (ms) |",
12783:  8308:  3809: 1453:         f"|----------|--------|--------|-------------|---------|-----------|",
12784:  8309:  3810: 1454:     ]
12785:  8310:  3811: 1455: 
12786:  8311:  3812: 1456:     for m in carbon.get("measurements", []):
12787:  8312:  3813: 1457:         co2_g = m["co2_emissions_kg"] * 1000
12788:  8313:  3814: 1458:         icon = "✅" if m["success"] else "❌"
12789:  8314:  3815: 1459:         lines.append(
12790:  8315:  3816: 1460:             f"| `{m['endpoint']}` | `{m['method']}` | {icon} `{m['status_code']}` "
12791:  8316:  3817: 1461:             f"| `{m['energy_consumed_kwh']:.8f}` | `{co2_g:.4f}` | `{m['response_time_ms']:.0f}` |"
12792:  8317:  3818: 1462:         )
12793:  8318:  3819: 1463: 
12794:  8319:  3820: 1464:     lines += [
12795:  8320:  3821: 1465:         f"",
12796:  8321:  3822: 1466:         f"---",
12797:  8322:  3823: 1467:         f"",
12798:  8323:  3824: 1468:         f"## 🔧 Refactoring Recommendations",
12799:  8324:  3825: 1469:         f"",
12800:  8325:  3826: 1470:     ]
12801:  8326:  3827: 1471: 
12802:  8327:  3828: 1472:     # Auto recommendations
12803:  8328:  3829: 1473:     recs = []
12804:  8329:  3830: 1474: 
12805:  8330:  3831: 1475:     slow_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if m["response_time_ms"] > 1000]
12806:  8331:  3832: 1476:     if slow_txns:
12807:  8332:  3833: 1477:         recs.append(f"**⚠️ Slow endpoints detected** ({len(slow_txns)} endpoint > 1000ms):")
12808:  8333:  3834: 1478:         for m in slow_txns:
12809:  8334:  3835: 1479:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` ({m['response_time_ms']:.0f}ms) — consider caching or query optimization")
12810:  8335:  3836: 1480: 
12811:  8336:  3837: 1481:     failed_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if not m["success"]]
12812:  8337:  3838: 1482:     if failed_txns:
12813:  8338:  3839: 1483:         recs.append(f"**❌ Failed requests** ({len(failed_txns)} endpoints returned error):")
12814:  8339:  3840: 1484:         for m in failed_txns:
12815:  8340:  3841: 1485:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` → HTTP {m['status_code']}")
12816:  8341:  3842: 1486: 
12817:  8342:  3843: 1487:     unprotected_mutating = [
12818:  8343:  3844: 1488:         t for t in transactions
12819:  8344:  3845: 1489:         if t["method"] in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]
12820:  8345:  3846: 1490:         and not t.get("requires_csrf")
12821:  8346:  3847: 1491:         and not t.get("requires_auth")
12822:  8347:  3848: 1492:     ]
12823:  8348:  3849: 1493:     if unprotected_mutating:
12824:  8349:  3850: 1494:         recs.append(f"**🔓 Unprotected mutating endpoints** — no CSRF or auth:")
12825:  8350:  3851: 1495:         for t in unprotected_mutating:
12826:  8351:  3852: 1496:             recs.append(f"  - `{t['method']} {t['endpoint']}`")
12827:  8352:  3853: 1497: 
12828:  8353:  3854: 1498:     if not recs:
12829:  8354:  3855: 1499:         recs.append("✅ No critical issues detected. Code looks clean!")
12830:  8355:  3856: 1500: 
12831:  8356:  3857: 1501:     for rec in recs:
12832:  8357:  3858: 1502:         lines.append(rec)
12833:  8358:  3859: 1503:         lines.append("")
12834:  8359:  3860: 1504: 
12835:  8360:  3861: 1505:     lines += [
12836:  8361:  3862: 1506:         f"---",
12837:  8362:  3863: 1507:         f"",
12838:  8363:  3864: 1508:         f"## 🧪 Generated Unit Tests",
12839:  8364:  3865: 1509:         f"",
12840:  8365:  3866: 1510:         f"Unit test files have been saved to `{output_dir}/tests/`",
12841:  8366:  3867: 1511:         f"",
12842:  8367:  3868: 1512:         f"| File | Framework | Test Count |",
12843:  8368:  3869: 1513:         f"|------|-----------|------------|",
12844:  8369:  3870: 1514:         f"| `GeneratedTransactionTest.{UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES['express'])['ext']}` | `{framework}` | `{identification.get('post_routes', 0)}` |",
12845:  8370:  3871: 1515:         f"",
12846:  8371:  3872: 1516:         f"---",
12847:  8372:  3873: 1517:         f"",
12848:  8373:  3874: 1518:         f"_Report generated by Multi-Agent Code Carbon System_",
12849:  8374:  3875: 1519:     ]
12850:  8375:  3876: 1520: 
12851:  8376:  3877: 1521:     return "\n".join(lines)
12852:  8377:  3878: 1522: 
12853:  8378:  3879: 1523: 
12854:  8379:  3880: 1524: def run(output_dir: str = "./output") -> str:
12855:  8380:  3881: 1525:     """
12856:  8381:  3882: 1526:     Main entry point for Agent 4.
12857:  8382:  3883: 1527:     
12858:  8383:  3884: 1528:     Args:
12859:  8384:  3885: 1529:         output_dir: Directory containing all agent outputs
12860:  8385:  3886: 1530:     
12861:  8386:  3887: 1531:     Returns:
12862:  8387:  3888: 1532:         Path to the generated report
12863:  8388:  3889: 1533:     """
12864:  8389:  3890: 1534:     os.makedirs(REPORT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
12865:  8390:  3891: 1535:     os.makedirs(f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests", exist_ok=True)
12866:  8391:  3892: 1536: 
12867:  8392:  3893: 1537:     # Load all agent outputs
12868:  8393:  3894: 1538:     with open(f"{output_dir}/transactions.json") as f:
12869:  8394:  3895: 1539:         identification = json.load(f)
12870:  8395:  3896: 1540: 
12871:  8396:  3897: 1541:     with open(f"{output_dir}/carbon_report.json") as f:
12872:  8397:  3898: 1542:         carbon = json.load(f)
12873:  8398:  3899: 1543: 
12874:  8399:  3900: 1544:     # Agent 1 result may or may not exist
12875:  8400:  3901: 1545:     ingestion_path = Path(output_dir) / "ingestion_result.json"
12876:  8401:  3902: 1546:     if ingestion_path.exists():
12877:  8402:  3903: 1547:         with open(ingestion_path) as f:
12878:  8403:  3904: 1548:             ingestion = json.load(f)
12879:  8404:  3905: 1549:     else:
12880:  8405:  3906: 1550:         ingestion = {"source_path": output_dir}
12881:  8406:  3907: 1551: 
12882:  8407:  3908: 1552:     framework = identification.get("framework", "express")
12883:  8408:  3909: 1553: 
12884:  8409:  3910: 1554:     # Generate unit tests
12885:  8410:  3911: 1555:     print("[Agent 4] Generating unit tests...")
12886:  8411:  3912: 1556:     test_content = generate_unit_tests(identification.get("transactions", []), framework)
12887:  8412:  3913: 1557:     test_ext = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])["ext"]
12888:  8413:  3914: 1558:     test_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests/GeneratedTransactionTest.{test_ext}"
12889:  8414:  3915: 1559:     with open(test_path, "w") as f:
12890:  8415:  3916: 1560:         f.write(test_content)
12891:  8416:  3917: 1561:     print(f"[Agent 4] Unit tests saved: {test_path}")
12892:  8417:  3918: 1562: 
12893:  8418:  3919: 1563:     # Generate markdown report
12894:  8419:  3920: 1564:     print("[Agent 4] Building report...")
12895:  8420:  3921: 1565:     report_md = build_report(ingestion, identification, carbon, REPORT_DIR)
12896:  8421:  3922: 1566:     report_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/code_carbon_report.md"
12897:  8422:  3923: 1567:     with open(report_path, "w") as f:
12898:  8423:  3924: 1568:         f.write(report_md)
12899:  8424:  3925: 1569: 
12900:  8425:  3926: 1570:     print(f"[Agent 4] ✅ Report saved: {report_path}")
12901:  8426:  3927: 1571:     return report_path
12902:  8427:  3928: 1572: 
12903:  8428:  3929: 1573: 
12904:  8429:  3930: 1574: if __name__ == "__main__":
12905:  8430:  3931: 1575:     import sys
12906:  8431:  3932: 1576:     out_dir = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output"
12907:  8432:  3933: 1577:     run(out_dir)
12908:  8433:  3934: 1578: ```
12909:  8434:  3935: 1579: 
12910:  8435:  3936: 1580: ---
12911:  8436:  3937: 1581: 
12912:  8437:  3938: 1582: ## Pipeline Orchestrator
12913:  8438:  3939: 1583: 
12914:  8439:  3940: 1584: ### File: `pipeline.py`
12915:  8440:  3941: 1585: 
12916:  8441:  3942: 1586: ```python
12917:  8442:  3943: 1587: #!/usr/bin/env python3
12918:  8443:  3944: 1588: """
12919:  8444:  3945: 1589: Pipeline Orchestrator
12920:  8445:  3946: 1590: Runs all 4 agents in sequence.
12921:  8446:  3947: 1591: """
12922:  8447:  3948: 1592: 
12923:  8448:  3949: 1593: import sys
12924:  8449:  3950: 1594: import json
12925:  8450:  3951: 1595: import argparse
12926:  8451:  3952: 1596: from dataclasses import asdict
12927:  8452:  3953: 1597: from pathlib import Path
12928:  8453:  3954: 1598: 
12929:  8454:  3955: 1599: import agent1_ingestion
12930:  8455:  3956: 1600: import agent2_gemini_identifier
12931:  8456:  3957: 1601: import agent3_carbon
12932:  8457:  3958: 1602: import agent4_report
12933:  8458:  3959: 1603: 
12934:  8459:  3960: 1604: 
12935:  8460:  3961: 1605: def main():
12936:  8461:  3962: 1606:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
12937:  8462:  3963: 1607:         description="Multi-Agent Code Carbon Pipeline",
12938:  8463:  3964: 1608:         formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
12939:  8464:  3965: 1609:         epilog="""
12940:  8465:  3966: 1610: Examples:
12941:  8466:  3967: 1611:   # Local directory
12942:  8467:  3968: 1612:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-laravel-app
12943:  8468:  3969: 1613: 
12944:  8469:  3970: 1614:   # Git repository
12945:  8470:  3971: 1615:   python pipeline.py --source https://github.com/user/repo
12946:  8471:  3972: 1616: 
12947:  8472:  3973: 1617:   # Skip carbon testing (no live app running)
12948:  8473:  3974: 1618:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --skip-carbon
12949:  8474:  3975: 1619: 
12950:  8475:  3976: 1620:   # Specify output directory
12951:  8476:  3977: 1621:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --output ./my-analysis
12952:  8477:  3978: 1622:         """
12953:  8478:  3979: 1623:     )
12954:  8479:  3980: 1624:     parser.add_argument("--source", required=True, help="Local path or Git URL")
12955:  8480:  3981: 1625:     parser.add_argument("--output", default="./output", help="Output directory")
12956:  8481:  3982: 1626:     parser.add_argument("--skip-carbon", action="store_true",
12957:  8482:  3983: 1627:                         help="Skip Agent 3 (no live app required)")
12958:  8483:  3984: 1628:     parser.add_argument("--base-url", default=None,
12959:  8484:  3985: 1629:                         help="Override TARGET_BASE_URL for Agent 3")
12960:  8485:  3986: 1630: 
12961:  8486:  3987: 1631:     args = parser.parse_args()
12962:  8487:  3988: 1632: 
12963:  8488:  3989: 1633:     if args.base_url:
12964:  8489:  3990: 1634:         import os
12965:  8490:  3991: 1635:         os.environ["TARGET_BASE_URL"] = args.base_url
12966:  8491:  3992: 1636: 
12967:  8492:  3993: 1637:     print("=" * 60)
12968:  8493:  3994: 1638:     print("🤖 MULTI-AGENT CODE CARBON PIPELINE")
12969:  8494:  3995: 1639:     print("=" * 60)
12970:  8495:  3996: 1640: 
12971:  8496:  3997: 1641:     # ── Agent 1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
12972:  8497:  3998: 1642:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion")
12973:  8498:  3999: 1643:     ingestion = agent1_ingestion.run(args.source, args.output)
12974:  8499:  4000: 1644:     if not ingestion.success:
12975:  8500:  4001: 1645:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 1 failed: {ingestion.error}")
12976:  8501:  4002: 1646:         sys.exit(1)
12977:  8502:  4003: 1647: 
12978:  8503:  4004: 1648:     # Save ingestion result
12979:  8504:  4005: 1649:     with open(f"{args.output}/ingestion_result.json", "w") as f:
12980:  8505:  4006: 1650:         json.dump(asdict(ingestion), f, indent=2)
12981:  8506:  4007: 1651: 
12982:  8507:  4008: 1652:     # ── Agent 2 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
12983:  8508:  4009: 1653:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier")
12984:  8509:  4010: 1654:     identification = agent2_gemini_identifier.run(
12985:  8510:  4011: 1655:         ingestion.flat_file_path,
12986:  8511:  4012: 1656:         ingestion.detected_framework
12987:  8512:  4013: 1657:     )
12988:  8513:  4014: 1658:     if not identification.success:
12989:  8514:  4015: 1659:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 2 failed: {identification.error}")
12990:  8515:  4016: 1660:         sys.exit(1)
12991:  8516:  4017: 1661: 
12992:  8517:  4018: 1662:     # ── Agent 3 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
12993:  8518:  4019: 1663:     if args.skip_carbon:
12994:  8519:  4020: 1664:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ⏭  Agent 3 — Skipped (--skip-carbon)")
12995:  8520:  4021: 1665:         # Create empty carbon result
12996:  8521:  4022: 1666:         empty_carbon = {
12997:  8522:  4023: 1667:             "success": True, "base_url": "", "total_requests": 0,
12998:  8523:  4024: 1668:             "successful_requests": 0, "failed_requests": 0,
12999:  8524:  4025: 1669:             "total_energy_kwh": 0.0, "total_co2_kg": 0.0,
13000:  8525:  4026: 1670:             "avg_response_time_ms": 0.0, "measurements": []
13001:  8526:  4027: 1671:         }
13002:  8527:  4028: 1672:         with open(f"{args.output}/carbon_report.json", "w") as f:
13003:  8528:  4029: 1673:             json.dump(empty_carbon, f, indent=2)
13004:  8529:  4030: 1674:     else:
13005:  8530:  4031: 1675:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 3 — Code Carbon")
13006:  8531:  4032: 1676:         carbon = agent3_carbon.run(f"{args.output}/transactions.json")
13007:  8532:  4033: 1677:         if not carbon.success:
13008:  8533:  4034: 1678:             print(f"[PIPELINE] ⚠️  Agent 3 warning: {carbon.error}")
13009:  8534:  4035: 1679: 
13010:  8535:  4036: 1680:     # ── Agent 4 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
13011:  8536:  4037: 1681:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 4 — Refactor Report")
13012:  8537:  4038: 1682:     report_path = agent4_report.run(args.output)
13013:  8538:  4039: 1683: 
13014:  8539:  4040: 1684:     print("\n" + "=" * 60)
13015:  8540:  4041: 1685:     print("✅ PIPELINE COMPLETE")
13016:  8541:  4042: 1686:     print(f"📄 Report: {report_path}")
13017:  8542:  4043: 1687:     print(f"🧪 Tests:  ./reports/tests/")
13018:  8543:  4044: 1688:     print("=" * 60)
13019:  8544:  4045: 1689: 
13020:  8545:  4046: 1690: 
13021:  8546:  4047: 1691: if __name__ == "__main__":
13022:  8547:  4048: 1692:     main()
13023:  8548:  4049: 1693: ```
13024:  8549:  4050: 1694: 
13025:  8550:  4051: 1695: ---
13026:  8551:  4052: 1696: 
13027:  8552:  4053: 1697: ## Web UI — CSRF & Form Field Handler
13028:  8553:  4054: 1698: 
13029:  8554:  4055: 1699: File ini adalah **web interface** yang menampilkan form dari hasil Gemini, lengkap dengan field yang harus diisi, label, dan CSRF token secara otomatis.
13030:  8555:  4056: 1700: 
13031:  8556:  4057: 1701: ### File: `web_ui/index.html`
13032:  8557:  4058: 1702: 
13033:  8558:  4059: 1703: ```html
13034:  8559:  4060: 1704: <!DOCTYPE html>
13035:  8560:  4061: 1705: <html lang="id">
13036:  8561:  4062: 1706: <head>
13037:  8562:  4063: 1707:   <meta charset="UTF-8">

13041:  8566:  4067: 1711:     .card { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.5rem; margin: 1rem 0; }

13043:  8568:  4069: 1713:                     font-weight: bold; font-size: 0.8rem; color: white; }
13044:  8569:  4070: 1714:     .POST   { background: #2ecc71; }

13052:  8577:  4078: 1722:                     box-sizing: border-box; }

13054:  8579:  4080: 1724:     .csrf-badge { font-size: 0.75rem; background: #fff3cd; padding: 2px 6px;
13055:  8580:  4081: 1725:                   border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #ffc107; }
