13057:  8582:  4083: 1727:                   border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #004085; }
13058:  8583:  4084: 1728:     button[type=submit] { background: #2c3e50; color: white; border: none;
13059:  8584:  4085: 1729:                           padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; }
13060:  8585:  4086: 1730:     .response-box { background: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px;
13061:  8586:  4087: 1731:                     padding: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem; font-family: monospace;
13062:  8587:  4088: 1732:                     white-space: pre-wrap; max-height: 300px; overflow-y: auto; }
13063:  8588:  4089: 1733:     .required-mark { color: #e74c3c; }
13064:  8589:  4090: 1734:   </style>
13065:  8590:  4091: 1735: </head>
13066:  8591:  4092: 1736: <body>
13067:  8592:  4093: 1737:   <h1>🤖 Code Carbon — Transaction Tester</h1>
13068:  8593:  4094: 1738:   <p>Load <code>transactions.json</code> to auto-generate forms for each endpoint.</p>
13069:  8594:  4095: 1739: 
13070:  8595:  4096: 1740:   <input type="file" id="txnFile" accept=".json">
13071:  8596:  4097: 1741:   <div id="app"></div>
13072:  8597:  4098: 1742: 
13073:  8598:  4099: 1743:   <script>
13074:  8599:  4100: 1744:     const BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:8000';  // Change this!
13075:  8600:  4101: 1745: 
13076:  8601:  4102: 1746:     document.getElementById('txnFile').addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
13077:  8602:  4103: 1747:       const file = e.target.files[0];
13078:  8603:  4104: 1748:       if (!file) return;
13079:  8604:  4105: 1749:       const data = JSON.parse(await file.text());
13080:  8605:  4106: 1750:       renderTransactions(data.transactions || [], data.framework || 'unknown');
13081:  8606:  4107: 1751:     });
13082:  8607:  4108: 1752: 
13083:  8608:  4109: 1753:     function renderTransactions(transactions, framework) {
13084:  8609:  4110: 1754:       const app = document.getElementById('app');
13085:  8610:  4111: 1755:       app.innerHTML = '';
13086:  8611:  4112: 1756: 
13087:  8612:  4113: 1757:       transactions.forEach((txn, i) => {
13088:  8613:  4114: 1758:         const card = document.createElement('div');
13089:  8614:  4115: 1759:         card.className = 'card';
13090:  8615:  4116: 1760:         card.id = `txn-${txn.id}`;
13091:  8616:  4117: 1761: 
13092:  8617:  4118: 1762:         const badges = [
13093:  8618:  4119: 1763:           `<span class="method-badge ${txn.method}">${txn.method}</span>`,
13094:  8619:  4120: 1764:           txn.requires_csrf ? '<span class="csrf-badge">🔐 CSRF</span>' : '',
13095:  8620:  4121: 1765:           txn.requires_auth ? '<span class="auth-badge">🔑 Auth</span>' : '',
13096:  8621:  4122: 1766:         ].filter(Boolean).join(' ');
13097:  8622:  4123: 1767: 
13098:  8623:  4124: 1768:         let fieldsHtml = '';
13099:  8624:  4125: 1769:         (txn.fields || []).forEach(f => {
13100:  8625:  4126: 1770:           const inputType = {
13101:  8626:  4127: 1771:             'email': 'email', 'password': 'password',
13102:  8627:  4128: 1772:             'integer': 'number', 'number': 'number', 'file': 'file',
13103:  8628:  4129: 1773:           }[f.type] || 'text';
13104:  8629:  4130: 1774: 
13105:  8630:  4131: 1775:           const req = f.required ? '<span class="required-mark">*</span>' : '';
13106:  8631:  4132: 1776:           const rules = (f.validation_rules || []).join(', ');
13107:  8632:  4133: 1777:           const placeholder = f.description || f.name;
13108:  8633:  4134: 1778: 
13109:  8634:  4135: 1779:           fieldsHtml += `
13110:  8635:  4136: 1780:             <div class="form-group">
13111:  8636:  4137: 1781:               <label for="${txn.id}_${f.name}">${f.name} ${req}
13112:  8637:  4138: 1782:                 <small style="color:#888;">(${f.type}${rules ? ' · ' + rules : ''})</small>
13113:  8638:  4139: 1783:               </label>
13114:  8639:  4140: 1784:               <input type="${inputType}"
13115:  8640:  4141: 1785:                      id="${txn.id}_${f.name}"
13116:  8641:  4142: 1786:                      name="${f.name}"
13117:  8642:  4143: 1787:                      placeholder="${placeholder}"
13118:  8643:  4144: 1788:                      ${f.required ? 'required' : ''}>
13119:  8644:  4145: 1789:             </div>`;
13120:  8645:  4146: 1790:         });
13121:  8646:  4147: 1791: 
13122:  8647:  4148: 1792:         // CSRF hidden field
13123:  8648:  4149: 1793:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
13124:  8649:  4150: 1794:           fieldsHtml += `
13125:  8650:  4151: 1795:             <div class="form-group" style="opacity:0.5">
13126:  8651:  4152: 1796:               <label>CSRF Token (auto-fetched: <code>${txn.csrf_field_name}</code>)</label>
13127:  8652:  4153: 1797:               <input type="text" id="${txn.id}_csrf" name="${txn.csrf_field_name}"
13128:  8653:  4154: 1798:                      placeholder="Will be fetched automatically" readonly>
13129:  8654:  4155: 1799:             </div>`;
13130:  8655:  4156: 1800:         }
13131:  8656:  4157: 1801: 
13132:  8657:  4158: 1802:         card.innerHTML = `
13133:  8658:  4159: 1803:           <h3>${badges} <code>${txn.endpoint}</code></h3>
13134:  8659:  4160: 1804:           <p style="color:#666;">${txn.description || ''}</p>
13135:  8660:  4161: 1805:           <form id="form-${txn.id}">
13136:  8661:  4162: 1806:             ${fieldsHtml}
13137:  8662:  4163: 1807:             <button type="submit">Send ${txn.method} Request</button>
13138:  8663:  4164: 1808:           </form>
13139:  8664:  4165: 1809:           <div id="response-${txn.id}" class="response-box" style="display:none;"></div>
13140:  8665:  4166: 1810:         `;
13141:  8666:  4167: 1811: 
13142:  8667:  4168: 1812:         app.appendChild(card);
13143:  8668:  4169: 1813: 
13144:  8669:  4170: 1814:         // Auto-fetch CSRF if needed
13145:  8670:  4171: 1815:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
13146:  8671:  4172: 1816:           fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework);
13147:  8672:  4173: 1817:         }
13148:  8673:  4174: 1818: 
13149:  8674:  4175: 1819:         // Form submit
13150:  8675:  4176: 1820:         document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`).addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
13151:  8676:  4177: 1821:           e.preventDefault();
13152:  8677:  4178: 1822:           await submitTransaction(txn);
13153:  8678:  4179: 1823:         });
13154:  8679:  4180: 1824:       });
13155:  8680:  4181: 1825:     }
13156:  8681:  4182: 1826: 
13157:  8682:  4183: 1827:     async function fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework) {
13158:  8683:  4184: 1828:       try {
13159:  8684:  4185: 1829:         // Try to get CSRF from the same page
13160:  8685:  4186: 1830:         const endpoints = [txn.endpoint.replace('/api/', '/'), '/', '/login'];
13161:  8686:  4187: 1831:         for (const ep of endpoints) {
13162:  8687:  4188: 1832:           const r = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${ep}`, { credentials: 'include' });
13163:  8688:  4189: 1833:           if (r.ok) {
13164:  8689:  4190: 1834:             const html = await r.text();
13165:  8690:  4191: 1835:             const match = html.match(
13166:  8691:  4192: 1836:               new RegExp(`name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']\\s+value=["']([^"']+)["']`)
13167:  8692:  4193: 1837:             ) || html.match(
13168:  8693:  4194: 1838:               new RegExp(`value=["']([^"']+)["']\\s+name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']`)
13169:  8694:  4195: 1839:             );
13170:  8695:  4196: 1840:             if (match) {
13171:  8696:  4197: 1841:               const csrfInput = document.getElementById(`${txn.id}_csrf`);
13172:  8697:  4198: 1842:               if (csrfInput) csrfInput.value = match[1];
13173:  8698:  4199: 1843:               return;
13174:  8699:  4200: 1844:             }
13175:  8700:  4201: 1845:           }
13176:  8701:  4202: 1846:         }
13177:  8702:  4203: 1847:       } catch (e) {
13178:  8703:  4204: 1848:         console.warn('Could not auto-fetch CSRF:', e.message);
13179:  8704:  4205: 1849:       }
13180:  8705:  4206: 1850:     }
13181:  8706:  4207: 1851: 
13182:  8707:  4208: 1852:     async function submitTransaction(txn) {
13183:  8708:  4209: 1853:       const form = document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`);
13184:  8709:  4210: 1854:       const responseBox = document.getElementById(`response-${txn.id}`);
13185:  8710:  4211: 1855:       const formData = new FormData(form);
13186:  8711:  4212: 1856:       const payload = Object.fromEntries(formData);
13187:  8712:  4213: 1857: 
13188:  8713:  4214: 1858:       responseBox.style.display = 'block';
13189:  8714:  4215: 1859:       responseBox.textContent = '⏳ Sending...';
13190:  8715:  4216: 1860: 
13191:  8716:  4217: 1861:       try {
13192:  8717:  4218: 1862:         const options = {
13193:  8718:  4219: 1863:           method: txn.method,
13194:  8719:  4220: 1864:           credentials: 'include',
13195:  8720:  4221: 1865:           headers: {},
13196:  8721:  4222: 1866:         };
13197:  8722:  4223: 1867: 
13198:  8723:  4224: 1868:         if (txn.method !== 'GET') {
13199:  8724:  4225: 1869:           options.headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
13200:  8725:  4226: 1870:           options.body = JSON.stringify(payload);
13201:  8726:  4227: 1871: 
13202:  8727:  4228: 1872:           if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
13203:  8728:  4229: 1873:             options.headers['X-CSRF-Token'] = payload[txn.csrf_field_name] || '';
13204:  8729:  4230: 1874:           }
13205:  8730:  4231: 1875:         }
13206:  8731:  4232: 1876: 
13207:  8732:  4233: 1877:         const start = performance.now();
13208:  8733:  4234: 1878:         const r = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${txn.endpoint}`, options);
13209:  8734:  4235: 1879:         const elapsed = (performance.now() - start).toFixed(0);
13210:  8735:  4236: 1880:         const text = await r.text();
13211:  8736:  4237: 1881: 
13212:  8737:  4238: 1882:         let display;
13213:  8738:  4239: 1883:         try {
13214:  8739:  4240: 1884:           display = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2);
13215:  8740:  4241: 1885:         } catch {
13216:  8741:  4242: 1886:           display = text.substring(0, 1000);
13217:  8742:  4243: 1887:         }
13218:  8743:  4244: 1888: 
13219:  8744:  4245: 1889:         responseBox.textContent =
13220:  8745:  4246: 1890:           `HTTP ${r.status} (${elapsed}ms)\n\n${display}`;
13221:  8746:  4247: 1891: 
13222:  8747:  4248: 1892:       } catch (err) {
13223:  8748:  4249: 1893:         responseBox.textContent = `❌ Error: ${err.message}`;
13224:  8749:  4250: 1894:       }
13225:  8750:  4251: 1895:     }
13226:  8751:  4252: 1896:   </script>
13227:  8752:  4253: 1897: </body>
13228:  8753:  4254: 1898: </html>
13229:  8754:  4255: 1899: ```
13230:  8755:  4256: 1900: 
13231:  8756:  4257: 1901: ---

13349:  8874:  4375: 2019: 
13350:  8875:  4376: 2020: ---
13351:  8876:  4377: 2021: 
13352:  8877:  4378: 2022: ## Running the Full Pipeline
13353:  8878:  4379: 2023: 
13354:  8879:  4380: 2024: ```bash
13355:  8880:  4381: 2025: # 1. Analyze local Laravel project (app must be running)
13356:  8881:  4382: 2026: python pipeline.py \
13357:  8882:  4383: 2027:   --source /path/to/my-laravel-app \
13358:  8883:  4384: 2028:   --base-url http://localhost:8000
13359:  8884:  4385: 2029: 
13360:  8885:  4386: 2030: # 2. Analyze from Git URL, skip live testing
13361:  8886:  4387: 2031: python pipeline.py \
13362:  8887:  4388: 2032:   --source https://github.com/user/my-express-api \
13363:  8888:  4389: 2033:   --skip-carbon
13364:  8889:  4390: 2034: 
13365:  8890:  4391: 2035: # 3. Analyze Django app
13366:  8891:  4392: 2036: python pipeline.py \
13367:  8892:  4393: 2037:   --source /path/to/my-django-app \
13368:  8893:  4394: 2038:   --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8000
13369:  8894:  4395: 2039: 
13370:  8895:  4396: 2040: # 4. Run only Agent 2 (already have repomix output)
13371:  8896:  4397: 2041: python agent2_gemini_identifier.py ./output/flat_codebase.txt
13372:  8897:  4398: 2042: 
13373:  8898:  4399: 2043: # 5. Open Web UI
13374:  8899:  4400: 2044: # Open web_ui/index.html in browser
13375:  8900:  4401: 2045: # Load transactions.json
13376:  8901:  4402: 2046: # Fill required fields → Send request
13377:  8902:  4403: 2047: ```
13378:  8903:  4404: 2048: 
13379:  8904:  4405: 2049: ---
13380:  8905:  4406: 2050: 
13381:  8906:  4407: 2051: ## Output Examples
13382:  8907:  4408: 2052: 
13383:  8908:  4409: 2053: ### Directory Structure After Run
13384:  8909:  4410: 2054: 
13385:  8910:  4411: 2055: ```
13386:  8911:  4412: 2056: output/
13387:  8912:  4413: 2057: ├── flat_codebase.txt          ← Agent 1: repomix bundle
13388:  8913:  4414: 2058: ├── ingestion_result.json      ← Agent 1: metadata
13389:  8914:  4415: 2059: ├── transactions.json          ← Agent 2: all transactions + fields
13390:  8915:  4416: 2060: └── carbon_report.json         ← Agent 3: per-request energy data
13391:  8916:  4417: 2061: 
13392:  8917:  4418: 2062: reports/
13393:  8918:  4419: 2063: ├── code_carbon_report.md      ← Agent 4: full report
13394:  8919:  4420: 2064: └── tests/
13395:  8920:  4421: 2065:     └── GeneratedTransactionTest.php  ← Agent 4: unit tests
13396:  8921:  4422: 2066: ```
13397:  8922:  4423: 2067: 
13398:  8923:  4424: 2068: ### `transactions.json` Sample
13399:  8924:  4425: 2069: 
13400:  8925:  4426: 2070: ```json
13401:  8926:  4427: 2071: {
13402:  8927:  4428: 2072:   "framework": "laravel",
13403:  8928:  4429: 2073:   "language": "PHP",
13404:  8929:  4430: 2074:   "total_routes": 12,
13405:  8930:  4431: 2075:   "post_routes": 5,
13406:  8931:  4432: 2076:   "csrf_protected_routes": 5,
13407:  8932:  4433: 2077:   "auth_required_routes": 8,
13408:  8933:  4434: 2078:   "transactions": [
13409:  8934:  4435: 2079:     {
13410:  8935:  4436: 2080:       "id": "txn_001",
13411:  8936:  4437: 2081:       "method": "POST",
13412:  8937:  4438: 2082:       "endpoint": "/api/login",
13413:  8938:  4439: 2083:       "description": "Authenticate user and return token",
13414:  8939:  4440: 2084:       "requires_auth": false,
13415:  8940:  4441: 2085:       "requires_csrf": true,
13416:  8941:  4442: 2086:       "csrf_field_name": "_token",
13417:  8942:  4443: 2087:       "fields": [
13418:  8943:  4444: 2088:         {
13419:  8944:  4445: 2089:           "name": "email",
13420:  8945:  4446: 2090:           "type": "email",
13421:  8946:  4447: 2091:           "required": true,
13422:  8947:  4448: 2092:           "description": "User email",
13423:  8948:  4449: 2093:           "validation_rules": ["required", "email"]
13424:  8949:  4450: 2094:         },
13425:  8950:  4451: 2095:         {
13426:  8951:  4452: 2096:           "name": "password",
13427:  8952:  4453: 2097:           "type": "password",
13428:  8953:  4454: 2098:           "required": true,
13429:  8954:  4455: 2099:           "description": "User password",
13430:  8955:  4456: 2100:           "validation_rules": ["required", "min:8"]
13431:  8956:  4457: 2101:         }
13432:  8957:  4458: 2102:       ],
13433:  8958:  4459: 2103:       "tags": ["auth"]
13434:  8959:  4460: 2104:     }
13435:  8960:  4461: 2105:   ]
13436:  8961:  4462: 2106: }
13437:  8962:  4463: 2107: ```
13438:  8963:  4464: 2108: 
13439:  8964:  4465: 2109: ---
13440:  8965:  4466: 2110: 
13441:  8966:  4467: 2111: ## Troubleshooting
13442:  8967:  4468: 2112: 
13443:  8968:  4469: 2113: | Problem | Cause | Fix |
13444:  8969:  4470: 2114: |---------|-------|-----|
13445:  8970:  4471: 2115: | `repomix: command not found` | Not installed | `npm install -g repomix` |
13446:  8971:  4472: 2116: | `Gemini API 429 Too Many Requests` | Rate limit hit | Add `GEMINI_DELAY=10` to .env |
13447:  8972:  4473: 2117: | `Connection refused` in Agent 3 | App not running | Start app or use `--skip-carbon` |
13448:  8973:  4474: 2118: | `CSRF token mismatch` in Agent 3 | Wrong field name | Gemini will detect correct name; check `transactions.json` |
13449:  8974:  4475: 2119: | `CodeCarbon ImportError` | Not installed | `pip install codecarbon` |
13450:  8975:  4476: 2120: | `repomix output too large` | Big codebase | Add exclusions in `FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES` |
13451:  8976:  4477: 2121: 
13452:  8977:  4478: 2122: ---

13475:  9000:  4501:    2: The content has been processed where line numbers have been added.
13476:  9001:  4502:    3: 
13477:  9002:  4503:    4: ================================================================
13478:  9003:  4504:    5: File Summary
13479:  9004:  4505:    6: ================================================================
13480:  9005:  4506:    7: 
13481:  9006:  4507:    8: Purpose:
13482:  9007:  4508:    9: --------
13483:  9008:  4509:   10: This file contains a packed representation of a subset of the repository's contents that is considered the most important context.
13484:  9009:  4510:   11: It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
13485:  9010:  4511:   12: or other automated processes.
13486:  9011:  4512:   13: 
13487:  9012:  4513:   14: File Format:
13488:  9013:  4514:   15: ------------
13489:  9014:  4515:   16: The content is organized as follows:
13490:  9015:  4516:   17: 1. This summary section
13491:  9016:  4517:   18: 2. Repository information
13492:  9017:  4518:   19: 3. Directory structure
13493:  9018:  4519:   20: 4. Repository files (if enabled)
13494:  9019:  4520:   21: 5. Multiple file entries, each consisting of:
13495:  9020:  4521:   22:   a. A separator line (================)
13496:  9021:  4522:   23:   b. The file path (File: path/to/file)
13497:  9022:  4523:   24:   c. Another separator line
13498:  9023:  4524:   25:   d. The full contents of the file
13499:  9024:  4525:   26:   e. A blank line
13500:  9025:  4526:   27: 
13501:  9026:  4527:   28: Usage Guidelines:
13502:  9027:  4528:   29: -----------------
13503:  9028:  4529:   30: - This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
13504:  9029:  4530:   31:   original repository files, not this packed version.
13505:  9030:  4531:   32: - When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
13506:  9031:  4532:   33:   between different files in the repository.
13507:  9032:  4533:   34: - Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with
13508:  9033:  4534:   35:   the same level of security as you would the original repository.
13509:  9034:  4535:   36: 
13510:  9035:  4536:   37: Notes:
13511:  9036:  4537:   38: ------
13512:  9037:  4538:   39: - Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
13513:  9038:  4539:   40: - Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
13514:  9039:  4540:   41: - Files matching these patterns are excluded: node_modules/**, vendor/**, .git/**, storage/**, tests/**, public/**, resources/assets/**, *.min.js, *.css, *.scss, *.json, *.lock, *.log
13515:  9040:  4541:   42: - Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded

13517:  9042:  4543:   44: - Line numbers have been added to the beginning of each line
13518:  9043:  4544:   45: - Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)

13542:  9067:  4568:   69: ================

13544:  9069:  4570:   71: ================
13545:  9070:  4571:   72:   1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
13546:  9071:  4572:   73:   2: """
13547:  9072:  4573:   74:   3: Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
13548:  9073:  4574:   75:   4: Converts local path or Git URL to a flat repomix bundle.
13549:  9074:  4575:   76:   5: """
13550:  9075:  4576:   77:   6: 
13551:  9076:  4577:   78:   7: import subprocess
13552:  9077:  4578:   79:   8: import os
13553:  9078:  4579:   80:   9: import sys
13554:  9079:  4580:   81:  10: import shutil
13555:  9080:  4581:   82:  11: import tempfile
13556:  9081:  4582:   83:  12: import json
13557:  9082:  4583:   84:  13: from pathlib import Path
13558:  9083:  4584:   85:  14: from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
13559:  9084:  4585:   86:  15: from typing import Optional
13560:  9085:  4586:   87:  16: 
13561:  9086:  4587:   88:  17: 
13562:  9087:  4588:   89:  18: @dataclass
13563:  9088:  4589:   90:  19: class IngestionResult:
13564:  9089:  4590:   91:  20:     success: bool
13565:  9090:  4591:   92:  21:     flat_file_path: str
13566:  9091:  4592:   93:  22:     source_type: str          # "local" | "git"
13567:  9092:  4593:   94:  23:     source_path: str
13568:  9093:  4594:   95:  24:     file_size_bytes: int
13569:  9094:  4595:   96:  25:     detected_language: str
13570:  9095:  4596:   97:  26:     detected_framework: str
13571:  9096:  4597:   98:  27:     error: Optional[str] = None
13572:  9097:  4598:   99:  28: 
13573:  9098:  4599:  100:  29: 
13574:  9099:  4600:  101:  30: FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES = {
13575:  9100:  4601:  102:  31:     "laravel":     ["artisan", "composer.json", "app/Http/Controllers"],
13576:  9101:  4602:  103:  32:     "django":      ["manage.py", "settings.py", "wsgi.py"],
13577:  9102:  4603:  104:  33:     "express":     ["package.json", "app.js", "routes/"],
13578:  9103:  4604:  105:  34:     "nestjs":      ["nest-cli.json", "src/main.ts"],
13579:  9104:  4605:  106:  35:     "springboot":  ["pom.xml", "src/main/java", "Application.java"],
13580:  9105:  4606:  107:  36:     "rails":       ["Gemfile", "config/routes.rb", "app/controllers"],
13581:  9106:  4607:  108:  37:     "fastapi":     ["main.py", "requirements.txt"],  # + fastapi in requirements
13582:  9107:  4608:  109:  38:     "gin":         ["go.mod", "main.go"],
13583:  9108:  4609:  110:  39:     "aspnet":      ["*.csproj", "Program.cs", "Startup.cs"],
13584:  9109:  4610:  111:  40: }
13585:  9110:  4611:  112:  41: 
13586:  9111:  4612:  113:  42: LANGUAGE_MAP = {
13587:  9112:  4613:  114:  43:     "laravel": "PHP",
13588:  9113:  4614:  115:  44:     "django": "Python",
13589:  9114:  4615:  116:  45:     "fastapi": "Python",
13590:  9115:  4616:  117:  46:     "express": "JavaScript",
13591:  9116:  4617:  118:  47:     "nestjs": "TypeScript",
13592:  9117:  4618:  119:  48:     "springboot": "Java",
13593:  9118:  4619:  120:  49:     "rails": "Ruby",
13594:  9119:  4620:  121:  50:     "gin": "Go",
13595:  9120:  4621:  122:  51:     "aspnet": "C#",
13596:  9121:  4622:  123:  52: }
13597:  9122:  4623:  124:  53: 
13598:  9123:  4624:  125:  54: 
13599:  9124:  4625:  126:  55: def detect_framework(path: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
13600:  9125:  4626:  127:  56:     """Detect framework and language from directory structure."""
13601:  9126:  4627:  128:  57:     for framework, signatures in FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES.items():
13602:  9127:  4628:  129:  58:         for sig in signatures:
13603:  9128:  4629:  130:  59:             check = Path(path) / sig
13604:  9129:  4630:  131:  60:             # Check direct file/dir
13605:  9130:  4631:  132:  61:             if check.exists():
13606:  9131:  4632:  133:  62:                 return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
13607:  9132:  4633:  134:  63:             # Glob pattern
13608:  9133:  4634:  135:  64:             if "*" in sig:
13609:  9134:  4635:  136:  65:                 matches = list(Path(path).glob(sig))
13610:  9135:  4636:  137:  66:                 if matches:
13611:  9136:  4637:  138:  67:                     return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
13612:  9137:  4638:  139:  68:     return "unknown", "Unknown"
13613:  9138:  4639:  140:  69: 
13614:  9139:  4640:  141:  70: 
13615:  9140:  4641:  142:  71: def clone_repo(git_url: str, target_dir: str) -> str:
13616:  9141:  4642:  143:  72:     """Clone a git repository to target_dir."""
13617:  9142:  4643:  144:  73:     print(f"[Agent 1] Cloning {git_url}...")
13618:  9143:  4644:  145:  74:     result = subprocess.run(
13619:  9144:  4645:  146:  75:         ["git", "clone", "--depth=1", git_url, target_dir],
13620:  9145:  4646:  147:  76:         capture_output=True, text=True
13621:  9146:  4647:  148:  77:     )
13622:  9147:  4648:  149:  78:     if result.returncode != 0:
13623:  9148:  4649:  150:  79:         raise RuntimeError(f"Git clone failed: {result.stderr}")
13624:  9149:  4650:  151:  80:     return target_dir
13625:  9150:  4651:  152:  81: 
13626:  9151:  4652:  153:  82: 
13627:  9152:  4653:  154:  83: def run_repomix(source_dir: str, output_path: str) -> None:
13628:  9153:  4654:  155:  84:     """Run repomix to create flat bundle from source_dir."""
13629:  9154:  4655:  156:  85:     print(f"[Agent 1] Running repomix on {source_dir}...")
13630:  9155:  4656:  157:  86: 
13631:  9156:  4657:  158:  87:     # repomix config — exclude common non-essential files
13632:  9157:  4658:  159:  88:     repomix_config = {
13633:  9158:  4659:  160:  89:         "output": {
13634:  9159:  4660:  161:  90:             "filePath": output_path,
13635:  9160:  4661:  162:  91:             "style": "plain",
13636:  9161:  4662:  163:  92:             "removeComments": False,
13637:  9162:  4663:  164:  93:             "removeEmptyLines": False,
13638:  9163:  4664:  165:  94:             "showLineNumbers": True,
13639:  9164:  4665:  166:  95:             "copyToClipboard": False,
13640:  9165:  4666:  167:  96:         },
13641:  9166:  4667:  168:  97:         "ignore": {
13642:  9167:  4668:  169:  98:             "useGitignore": True,
13643:  9168:  4669:  170:  99:             "useDefaultPatterns": True,
13644:  9169:  4670:  171: 100:             "customPatterns": [
13645:  9170:  4671:  172: 101:                 "node_modules/**",
13646:  9171:  4672:  173: 102:                 "vendor/**",
13647:  9172:  4673:  174: 103:                 ".git/**",
13648:  9173:  4674:  175: 104:                 "storage/**",
13649:  9174:  4675:  176: 105:                 "tests/**",               # File test bisa dibuang untuk analisis logika utama
13650:  9175:  4676:  177: 106:                 "public/**",              # Gambar, CSS, Minified JS di sini dibuang saja
13651:  9176:  4677:  178: 107:                 "resources/assets/**",    # Assets mentah
13652:  9177:  4678:  179: 108:                 "*.min.js",
13653:  9178:  4679:  180: 109:                 "*.css",
13654:  9179:  4680:  181: 110:                 "*.scss",
13655:  9180:  4681:  182: 111:                 "*.json",                 # File JSON besar (seperti package-lock) sering ikut terbawa
13656:  9181:  4682:  183: 112:                 "*.lock",
13657:  9182:  4683:  184: 113:                 "*.log"
13658:  9183:  4684:  185: 114:             ]
13659:  9184:  4685:  186: 115:         }
13660:  9185:  4686:  187: 116:     }
13661:  9186:  4687:  188: 117: 
13662:  9187:  4688:  189: 118:     config_path = Path(source_dir) / ".repomix-config.json"
13663:  9188:  4689:  190: 119:     with open(config_path, "w") as f:
13664:  9189:  4690:  191: 120:         json.dump(repomix_config, f, indent=2)
13665:  9190:  4691:  192: 121: 
13666:  9191:  4692:  193: 122:     result = subprocess.run(
13667:  9192:  4693:  194: 123:         ["repomix", "--config", str(config_path), "--output", output_path, source_dir],
13668:  9193:  4694:  195: 124:         capture_output=True, text=True, shell=True, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"
13669:  9194:  4695:  196: 125:     )
13670:  9195:  4696:  197: 126: 
13671:  9196:  4697:  198: 127:     # Cleanup config
13672:  9197:  4698:  199: 128:     config_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
13673:  9198:  4699:  200: 129: 
13674:  9199:  4700:  201: 130:     if result.returncode != 0:
13675:  9200:  4701:  202: 131:         raise RuntimeError(f"repomix failed: {result.stderr}")
13676:  9201:  4702:  203: 132: 
13677:  9202:  4703:  204: 133:     print(f"[Agent 1] ✅ repomix output: {output_path}")
13678:  9203:  4704:  205: 134: 
13679:  9204:  4705:  206: 135: 
13680:  9205:  4706:  207: 136: def run(source: str, output_dir: str = "./output") -> IngestionResult:
13681:  9206:  4707:  208: 137:     """
13682:  9207:  4708:  209: 138:     Main entry point for Agent 1.
13683:  9208:  4709:  210: 139:     
13684:  9209:  4710:  211: 140:     Args:
13685:  9210:  4711:  212: 141:         source: Local directory path OR Git URL
13686:  9211:  4712:  213: 142:         output_dir: Where to save the flat bundle
13687:  9212:  4713:  214: 143:     
13688:  9213:  4714:  215: 144:     Returns:
13689:  9214:  4715:  216: 145:         IngestionResult with flat_file_path pointing to repomix output
13690:  9215:  4716:  217: 146:     """
13691:  9216:  4717:  218: 147:     os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
13692:  9217:  4718:  219: 148:     output_path = str(Path(output_dir) / "flat_codebase.txt")
13693:  9218:  4719:  220: 149:     temp_dir = None
13694:  9219:  4720:  221: 150: 
13695:  9220:  4721:  222: 151:     try:
13696:  9221:  4722:  223: 152:         # Determine source type
13697:  9222:  4723:  224: 153:         if source.startswith("http") or source.startswith("git@"):
13698:  9223:  4724:  225: 154:             source_type = "git"
13699:  9224:  4725:  226: 155:             temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="agent1_repo_")
13700:  9225:  4726:  227: 156:             working_dir = clone_repo(source, temp_dir)
13701:  9226:  4727:  228: 157:         else:
13702:  9227:  4728:  229: 158:             source_type = "local"
13703:  9228:  4729:  230: 159:             working_dir = os.path.abspath(source)
13704:  9229:  4730:  231: 160:             if not os.path.isdir(working_dir):
13705:  9230:  4731:  232: 161:                 raise ValueError(f"Directory not found: {working_dir}")
13706:  9231:  4732:  233: 162: 
13707:  9232:  4733:  234: 163:         # Detect framework
13708:  9233:  4734:  235: 164:         framework, language = detect_framework(working_dir)
13709:  9234:  4735:  236: 165:         print(f"[Agent 1] Detected: {framework} / {language}")
13710:  9235:  4736:  237: 166: 
13711:  9236:  4737:  238: 167:         # Run repomix
13712:  9237:  4738:  239: 168:         run_repomix(working_dir, output_path)
13713:  9238:  4739:  240: 169: 
13714:  9239:  4740:  241: 170:         file_size = Path(output_path).stat().st_size
13715:  9240:  4741:  242: 171: 
13716:  9241:  4742:  243: 172:         return IngestionResult(
13717:  9242:  4743:  244: 173:             success=True,
13718:  9243:  4744:  245: 174:             flat_file_path=output_path,
13719:  9244:  4745:  246: 175:             source_type=source_type,
13720:  9245:  4746:  247: 176:             source_path=source,
13721:  9246:  4747:  248: 177:             file_size_bytes=file_size,
13722:  9247:  4748:  249: 178:             detected_language=language,
13723:  9248:  4749:  250: 179:             detected_framework=framework,
13724:  9249:  4750:  251: 180:         )
13725:  9250:  4751:  252: 181: 
13726:  9251:  4752:  253: 182:     except Exception as e:
13727:  9252:  4753:  254: 183:         return IngestionResult(
13728:  9253:  4754:  255: 184:             success=False,
13729:  9254:  4755:  256: 185:             flat_file_path="",
13730:  9255:  4756:  257: 186:             source_type="unknown",
13731:  9256:  4757:  258: 187:             source_path=source,
13732:  9257:  4758:  259: 188:             file_size_bytes=0,
13733:  9258:  4759:  260: 189:             detected_language="Unknown",
13734:  9259:  4760:  261: 190:             detected_framework="unknown",
13735:  9260:  4761:  262: 191:             error=str(e),
13736:  9261:  4762:  263: 192:         )
13737:  9262:  4763:  264: 193:     finally:
13738:  9263:  4764:  265: 194:         if temp_dir and os.path.exists(temp_dir):
13739:  9264:  4765:  266: 195:             shutil.rmtree(temp_dir, ignore_errors=True)
13740:  9265:  4766:  267: 196: 
13741:  9266:  4767:  268: 197: 
13742:  9267:  4768:  269: 198: if __name__ == "__main__":
13743:  9268:  4769:  270: 199:     source = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
13744:  9269:  4770:  271: 200:     result = run(source)
13745:  9270:  4771:  272: 201:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
13746:  9271:  4772:  273: 
13747:  9272:  4773:  274: ================
13748:  9273:  4774:  275: File: agent2_gemini_identifier.py
13749:  9274:  4775:  276: ================
13750:  9275:  4776:  277:   1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
13751:  9276:  4777:  278:   2: """
13752:  9277:  4778:  279:   3: Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
13753:  9278:  4779:  280:   4: Sends repomix bundle to Gemini AI for transaction analysis.
13754:  9279:  4780:  281:   5: """
13755:  9280:  4781:  282:   6: 
13756:  9281:  4782:  283:   7: import os

13760:  9285:  4786:  287:  11: from pathlib import Path
13761:  9286:  4787:  288:  12: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
13762:  9287:  4788:  289:  13: from typing import Optional

13764:  9289:  4790:  291:  15:

13766:  9291:  4792:  293:  17: 
13767:  9292:  4793:  294:  18: GEMINI_API_KEY = os.getenv("GEMINI_API_KEY")
13768:  9293:  4794:  295:  19: GEMINI_ENDPOINT = (
13769:  9294:  4795:  296:  20:     f"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/"
13770:  9295:  4796:  297:  21:     f"gemini-2.5-flash:generateContent?key={GEMINI_API_KEY}"
13771:  9296:  4797:  298:  22: )
13772:  9297:  4798:  299:  23: 
13773:  9298:  4799:  300:  24: MAX_CONTENT_CHARS = 900_000
13774:  9299:  4800:  301:  25: 
13775:  9300:  4801:  302:  26: 
13776:  9301:  4802:  303:  27: @dataclass
13777:  9302:  4803:  304:  28: class TransactionField:
13778:  9303:  4804:  305:  29:     name: str
13779:  9304:  4805:  306:  30:     type: str
13780:  9305:  4806:  307:  31:     required: bool
13781:  9306:  4807:  308:  32:     description: str
13782:  9307:  4808:  309:  33:     validation_rules: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
13783:  9308:  4809:  310:  34: 
13784:  9309:  4810:  311:  35: 
13785:  9310:  4811:  312:  36: @dataclass
13786:  9311:  4812:  313:  37: class Transaction:
13787:  9312:  4813:  314:  38:     id: str
13788:  9313:  4814:  315:  39:     method: str
13789:  9314:  4815:  316:  40:     endpoint: str
13790:  9315:  4816:  317:  41:     description: str
13791:  9316:  4817:  318:  42:     requires_auth: bool
13792:  9317:  4818:  319:  43:     requires_csrf: bool
13793:  9318:  4819:  320:  44:     csrf_field_name: str
13794:  9319:  4820:  321:  45:     fields: list[TransactionField]
13795:  9320:  4821:  322:  46:     framework: str
13796:  9321:  4822:  323:  47:     tags: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
13797:  9322:  4823:  324:  48: 
13798:  9323:  4824:  325:  49: 
13799:  9324:  4825:  326:  50: @dataclass
13800:  9325:  4826:  327:  51: class IdentificationResult:
13801:  9326:  4827:  328:  52:     success: bool
13802:  9327:  4828:  329:  53:     framework: str
13803:  9328:  4829:  330:  54:     language: str
13804:  9329:  4830:  331:  55:     transactions: list[Transaction]
13805:  9330:  4831:  332:  56:     total_routes: int
13806:  9331:  4832:  333:  57:     post_routes: int
13807:  9332:  4833:  334:  58:     csrf_protected_routes: int
13808:  9333:  4834:  335:  59:     auth_required_routes: int
13809:  9334:  4835:  336:  60:     error: Optional[str] = None
13810:  9335:  4836:  337:  61: 
13811:  9336:  4837:  338:  62: 
13812:  9337:  4838:  339:  63: SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
13813:  9338:  4839:  340:  64: You are an expert code analyzer. You will receive a flat bundle of a web application codebase.
13814:  9339:  4840:  341:  65: 
13815:  9340:  4841:  342:  66: Your task is to analyze ALL routes/endpoints and return a STRICT JSON response.
13816:  9341:  4842:  343:  67: 
13817:  9342:  4843:  344:  68: ## What to extract per endpoint:
13818:  9343:  4844:  345:  69: 1. HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)
13819:  9344:  4845:  346:  70: 2. URL path / route
13820:  9345:  4846:  347:  71: 3. Description of what the endpoint does
13821:  9346:  4847:  348:  72: 4. Whether it requires authentication (JWT, session, Bearer token, etc.)
13822:  9347:  4848:  349:  73: 5. Whether it requires CSRF protection — detect automatically by framework:
13823:  9348:  4849:  350:  74:    - Laravel: look for @csrf, csrf_field(), VerifyCsrfToken middleware, X-CSRF-TOKEN header
13824:  9349:  4850:  351:  75:    - Django: look for {% csrf_token %}, CsrfViewMiddleware, csrf_protect decorator
13825:  9350:  4851:  352:  76:    - Express.js: look for csurf, csrf(), csrfToken()
13826:  9351:  4852:  353:  77:    - Rails: look for authenticity_token, protect_from_forgery
13827:  9352:  4853:  354:  78:    - Spring Boot: look for CsrfToken, .csrf(), SecurityConfig
13828:  9353:  4854:  355:  79:    - FastAPI: look for custom CSRF implementations or fastapi-csrf-protect
13829:  9354:  4855:  356:  80:    - NestJS: look for @nestjs/csrf, CsrfGuard
13830:  9355:  4856:  357:  81:    - Go (Gin/Echo): look for gorilla/csrf, nosurf
13831:  9356:  4857:  358:  82:    - ASP.NET: look for [ValidateAntiForgeryToken], AntiForgeryToken()
13832:  9357:  4858:  359:  83: 6. The exact CSRF field name used (e.g., "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "authenticity_token")
13833:  9358:  4859:  360:  84: 7. ALL form fields/request body fields with: name, type, required status, and any validation rules
13834:  9359:  4860:  361:  85: 8. Return ONLY valid JSON
13835:  9360:  4861:  362:  86: 
13836:  9361:  4862:  363:  87: ## Response format — return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation:
13837:  9362:  4863:  364:  88: 
13838:  9363:  4864:  365:  89: {
13839:  9364:  4865:  366:  90:   "framework": "laravel",
13840:  9365:  4866:  367:  91:   "language": "PHP",
13841:  9366:  4867:  368:  92:   "transactions": [
13842:  9367:  4868:  369:  93:     {
13843:  9368:  4869:  370:  94:       "id": "txn_001",
13844:  9369:  4870:  371:  95:       "method": "POST",
13845:  9370:  4871:  372:  96:       "endpoint": "/api/login",
13846:  9371:  4872:  373:  97:       "description": "User authentication endpoint",
13847:  9372:  4873:  374:  98:       "requires_auth": false,
13848:  9373:  4874:  375:  99:       "requires_csrf": true,
13849:  9374:  4875:  376: 100:       "csrf_field_name": "_token",
13850:  9375:  4876:  377: 101:       "fields": [
13851:  9376:  4877:  378: 102:         {
13852:  9377:  4878:  379: 103:           "name": "email",
13853:  9378:  4879:  380: 104:           "type": "email",
13854:  9379:  4880:  381: 105:           "required": true,
13855:  9380:  4881:  382: 106:           "description": "User email address",
13856:  9381:  4882:  383: 107:           "validation_rules": ["required", "email", "max:255"]
13857:  9382:  4883:  384: 108:         }
13858:  9383:  4884:  385: 109:       ],
13859:  9384:  4885:  386: 110:       "tags": ["auth", "csrf"]
13860:  9385:  4886:  387: 111:     }
13861:  9386:  4887:  388: 112:   ]
13862:  9387:  4888:  389: 113: }
13863:  9388:  4889:  390: 114: """
13864:  9389:  4890:  391: 115: 
13865:  9390:  4891:  392: 116: 
13866:  9391:  4892:  393: 117: def chunk_content(content: str, max_chars: int) -> str:
13867:  9392:  4893:  394: 118:     """Truncate content if too large, prioritizing route/controller files."""
13868:  9393:  4894:  395: 119:     if len(content) <= max_chars:
13869:  9394:  4895:  396: 120:         return content
13870:  9395:  4896:  397: 121: 
13871:  9396:  4897:  398: 122:     lines = content.split("\n")
13872:  9397:  4898:  399: 123:     priority_keywords = [
13873:  9398:  4899:  400: 124:         "route", "controller", "middleware", "csrf", "request",
13874:  9399:  4900:  401: 125:         "form", "validate", "auth", "login", "register", "api",
13875:  9400:  4901:  402: 126:         "POST", "GET", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"
13876:  9401:  4902:  403: 127:     ]
13877:  9402:  4903:  404: 128: 
13878:  9403:  4904:  405: 129:     priority_lines = []
13879:  9404:  4905:  406: 130:     other_lines = []
13880:  9405:  4906:  407: 131: 
13881:  9406:  4907:  408: 132:     for line in lines:
13882:  9407:  4908:  409: 133:         if any(kw.lower() in line.lower() for kw in priority_keywords):
13883:  9408:  4909:  410: 134:             priority_lines.append(line)
13884:  9409:  4910:  411: 135:         else:
13885:  9410:  4911:  412: 136:             other_lines.append(line)
13886:  9411:  4912:  413: 137: 
13887:  9412:  4913:  414: 138:     result = "\n".join(priority_lines)
13888:  9413:  4914:  415: 139:     if len(result) < max_chars:
13889:  9414:  4915:  416: 140:         remaining = max_chars - len(result)
13890:  9415:  4916:  417: 141:         result += "\n" + "\n".join(other_lines)[:remaining]
13891:  9416:  4917:  418: 142: 
13892:  9417:  4918:  419: 143:     return result[:max_chars]
13893:  9418:  4919:  420: 144: 
13894:  9419:  4920:  421: 145: 
13895:  9420:  4921:  422: 146: def call_gemini(content: str) -> dict:
13896:  9421:  4922:  423: 147:     """Call Gemini API with the codebase content."""
13897:  9422:  4923:  424: 148:     print(f"[Agent 2] Sending {len(content)} chars (~{len(content)//4} tokens) to Gemini AI...")
13898:  9423:  4924:  425: 149:     start_time = time.time()
13899:  9424:  4925:  426: 150:     
13900:  9425:  4926:  427: 151:     payload = {
13901:  9426:  4927:  428: 152:         "system_instruction": {
13902:  9427:  4928:  429: 153:             "parts": [{"text": SYSTEM_PROMPT}]
13903:  9428:  4929:  430: 154:         },
13904:  9429:  4930:  431: 155:         "contents": [{
13905:  9430:  4931:  432: 156:             "parts": [{
13906:  9431:  4932:  433: 157:                 "text": f"Analyze this codebase and return the JSON:\n\n{content}"
13907:  9432:  4933:  434: 158:             }]
13908:  9433:  4934:  435: 159:         }],
13909:  9434:  4935:  436: 160:         "generationConfig": {
13910:  9435:  4936:  437: 161:             "temperature": 0.1,
13911:  9436:  4937:  438: 162:             "maxOutputTokens": 8192,
13912:  9437:  4938:  439: 163:             "responseMimeType": "application/json"
13913:  9438:  4939:  440: 164:         }
13914:  9439:  4940:  441: 165:     }
13915:  9440:  4941:  442: 166: 
13916:  9441:  4942:  443: 167:     for attempt in range(5):
13917:  9442:  4943:  444: 168:         try:
13918:  9443:  4944:  445: 169:             response = requests.post(
13919:  9444:  4945:  446: 170:                 GEMINI_ENDPOINT,
13920:  9445:  4946:  447: 171:                 json=payload,
13921:  9446:  4947:  448: 172:                 headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
13922:  9447:  4948:  449: 173:                 timeout=120
13923:  9448:  4949:  450: 174:             )
13924:  9449:  4950:  451: 175: 
13925:  9450:  4951:  452: 176:             # Retry on rate limit (429) or server errors (5xx)
13926:  9451:  4952:  453: 177:             if response.status_code in (429, 500, 502, 503):
13927:  9452:  4953:  454: 178:                 wait_time = 30 * (attempt + 1)
13928:  9453:  4954:  455: 179:                 print(f"[Agent 2] HTTP {response.status_code} on attempt {attempt + 1}/5.")
13929:  9454:  4955:  456: 180:                 print(f"[Agent 2] Response: {response.text}")
13930:  9455:  4956:  457: 181:                 print(f"[Agent 2] Waiting {wait_time}s before retry...")
13931:  9456:  4957:  458: 182:                 time.sleep(wait_time)
13932:  9457:  4958:  459: 183:                 continue
13933:  9458:  4959:  460: 184: 
13934:  9459:  4960:  461: 185:             response.raise_for_status()
13935:  9460:  4961:  462: 186:             data = response.json()
13936:  9461:  4962:  463: 187: 
13937:  9462:  4963:  464: 188:             raw_text = data["candidates"][0]["content"]["parts"][0]["text"]
13938:  9463:  4964:  465: 189:             raw_text = raw_text.strip()
13939:  9464:  4965:  466: 190:             if raw_text.startswith("```"):
13940:  9465:  4966:  467: 191:                 raw_text = "\n".join(raw_text.split("\n")[1:-1])
13941:  9466:  4967:  468: 192: 
13942:  9467:  4968:  469: 193:             elapsed = time.time() - start_time
13943:  9468:  4969:  470: 194:             print(f"[Agent 2] Response received in {elapsed:.1f}s")
13944:  9469:  4970:  471: 195:             return json.loads(raw_text)
13945:  9470:  4971:  472: 196: 
13946:  9471:  4972:  473: 197:         except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
13947:  9472:  4973:  474: 198:             print(f"[Agent 2] Timeout on attempt {attempt + 1}/5, retrying...")
13948:  9473:  4974:  475: 199:             time.sleep(10 * (attempt + 1))
13949:  9474:  4975:  476: 200:         except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
13950:  9475:  4976:  477: 201:             raise ValueError(f"Gemini returned invalid JSON: {e}")
13951:  9476:  4977:  478: 202: 
13952:  9477:  4978:  479: 203:     raise RuntimeError("Gemini API failed after 5 attempts")
13953:  9478:  4979:  480: 204: 
13954:  9479:  4980:  481: 205: 
13955:  9480:  4981:  482: 206: def parse_result(raw: dict, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
13956:  9481:  4982:  483: 207:     """Parse Gemini response into typed IdentificationResult."""
13957:  9482:  4983:  484: 208:     transactions = []
13958:  9483:  4984:  485: 209: 
13959:  9484:  4985:  486: 210:     for t in raw.get("transactions", []):
13960:  9485:  4986:  487: 211:         fields = [
13961:  9486:  4987:  488: 212:             TransactionField(
13962:  9487:  4988:  489: 213:                 name=f["name"],
13963:  9488:  4989:  490: 214:                 type=f.get("type", "string"),
13964:  9489:  4990:  491: 215:                 required=f.get("required", False),
13965:  9490:  4991:  492: 216:                 description=f.get("description", ""),
13966:  9491:  4992:  493: 217:                 validation_rules=f.get("validation_rules", []),
13967:  9492:  4993:  494: 218:             )
13968:  9493:  4994:  495: 219:             for f in t.get("fields", [])
13969:  9494:  4995:  496: 220:         ]
13970:  9495:  4996:  497: 221: 
13971:  9496:  4997:  498: 222:         transactions.append(Transaction(
13972:  9497:  4998:  499: 223:             id=t.get("id", f"txn_{len(transactions):03d}"),
13973:  9498:  4999:  500: 224:             method=t["method"].upper(),
13974:  9499:  5000:  501: 225:             endpoint=t["endpoint"],
13975:  9500:  5001:  502: 226:             description=t.get("description", ""),
13976:  9501:  5002:  503: 227:             requires_auth=t.get("requires_auth", False),
13977:  9502:  5003:  504: 228:             requires_csrf=t.get("requires_csrf", False),
13978:  9503:  5004:  505: 229:             csrf_field_name=t.get("csrf_field_name", ""),
13979:  9504:  5005:  506: 230:             fields=fields,
13980:  9505:  5006:  507: 231:             framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
13981:  9506:  5007:  508: 232:             tags=t.get("tags", []),
13982:  9507:  5008:  509: 233:         ))
13983:  9508:  5009:  510: 234: 
13984:  9509:  5010:  511: 235:     mutating_methods = {"POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"}
13985:  9510:  5011:  512: 236:     return IdentificationResult(
13986:  9511:  5012:  513: 237:         success=True,
13987:  9512:  5013:  514: 238:         framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
13988:  9513:  5014:  515: 239:         language=raw.get("language", "Unknown"),
13989:  9514:  5015:  516: 240:         transactions=transactions,
13990:  9515:  5016:  517: 241:         total_routes=len(transactions),
13991:  9516:  5017:  518: 242:         post_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.method in mutating_methods),
13992:  9517:  5018:  519: 243:         csrf_protected_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_csrf),
13993:  9518:  5019:  520: 244:         auth_required_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_auth),
13994:  9519:  5020:  521: 245:     )
13995:  9520:  5021:  522: 246: 
13996:  9521:  5022:  523: 247: 
13997:  9522:  5023:  524: 248: def run(flat_file_path: str, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
13998:  9523:  5024:  525: 249:     """
13999:  9524:  5025:  526: 250:     Main entry point for Agent 2.
14000:  9525:  5026:  527: 251:     
14001:  9526:  5027:  528: 252:     Args:
14002:  9527:  5028:  529: 253:         flat_file_path: Path to repomix output file
14003:  9528:  5029:  530: 254:         framework_hint: Optional hint from Agent 1
14004:  9529:  5030:  531: 255:     
14005:  9530:  5031:  532: 256:     Returns:
14006:  9531:  5032:  533: 257:         IdentificationResult with all transactions
14007:  9532:  5033:  534: 258:     """
14008:  9533:  5034:  535: 259:     try:
14009:  9534:  5035:  536: 260:         print(f"[Agent 2] Reading: {flat_file_path}")
14010:  9535:  5036:  537: 261:         content = Path(flat_file_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
14011:  9536:  5037:  538: 262:         
14012:  9537:  5038:  539: 263:         print(f"[Agent 2] Preparing context (limit: {MAX_CONTENT_CHARS} chars)...")
14013:  9538:  5039:  540: 264:         content = chunk_content(content, MAX_CONTENT_CHARS)
14014:  9539:  5040:  541: 265: 
14015:  9540:  5041:  542: 266:         raw = call_gemini(content)
14016:  9541:  5042:  543: 267:         print("[Agent 2] Parsing results...")
14017:  9542:  5043:  544: 268:         result = parse_result(raw, framework_hint)
14018:  9543:  5044:  545: 269: 
14019:  9544:  5045:  546: 270:         print(f"[Agent 2] ✅ Found {result.total_routes} routes")
14020:  9545:  5046:  547: 271:         print(f"[Agent 2]    POST/mutating: {result.post_routes}")
14021:  9546:  5047:  548: 272:         print(f"[Agent 2]    CSRF protected: {result.csrf_protected_routes}")
14022:  9547:  5048:  549: 273:         print(f"[Agent 2]    Auth required: {result.auth_required_routes}")
14023:  9548:  5049:  550: 274: 
14024:  9549:  5050:  551: 275:         # Save transactions to file
14025:  9550:  5051:  552: 276:         output_path = Path(flat_file_path).parent / "transactions.json"
14026:  9551:  5052:  553: 277:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
14027:  9552:  5053:  554: 278:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
14028:  9553:  5054:  555: 279:         print(f"[Agent 2] Saved: {output_path}")
14029:  9554:  5055:  556: 280: 
14030:  9555:  5056:  557: 281:         return result
14031:  9556:  5057:  558: 282: 
14032:  9557:  5058:  559: 283:     except Exception as e:
14033:  9558:  5059:  560: 284:         print(f"[Agent 2] ❌ Error: {str(e)}")
14034:  9559:  5060:  561: 285:         return IdentificationResult(
14035:  9560:  5061:  562: 286:             success=False,
14036:  9561:  5062:  563: 287:             framework=framework_hint,
14037:  9562:  5063:  564: 288:             language="Unknown",
14038:  9563:  5064:  565: 289:             transactions=[],
14039:  9564:  5065:  566: 290:             total_routes=0,
14040:  9565:  5066:  567: 291:             post_routes=0,
14041:  9566:  5067:  568: 292:             csrf_protected_routes=0,
14042:  9567:  5068:  569: 293:             auth_required_routes=0,
14043:  9568:  5069:  570: 294:             error=str(e),
14044:  9569:  5070:  571: 295:         )
14045:  9570:  5071:  572: 296: 
14046:  9571:  5072:  573: 297: 
14047:  9572:  5073:  574: 298: if __name__ == "__main__":
14048:  9573:  5074:  575: 299:     import sys
14049:  9574:  5075:  576: 300:     flat_file = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/flat_codebase.txt"
14050:  9575:  5076:  577: 301:     result = run(flat_file)
14051:  9576:  5077:  578: 302:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))

14099:  9624:  5125:  626:  44: class CarbonResult:

14110:  9635:  5136:  637:  55: 
14111:  9636:  5137:  638:  56: 
14112:  9637:  5138:  639:  57: # ─── CSRF Token Extractors ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
14113:  9638:  5139:  640:  58: 
14114:  9639:  5140:  641:  59: def extract_csrf_from_html(html: str, field_name: str) -> Optional[str]:
14115:  9640:  5141:  642:  60:     """Extract CSRF token from HTML hidden input."""
14116:  9641:  5142:  643:  61:     soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "html.parser")
14117:  9642:  5143:  644:  62: 
14118:  9643:  5144:  645:  63:     # Try direct name match
14119:  9644:  5145:  646:  64:     token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": field_name})
14120:  9645:  5146:  647:  65:     if token_input:
14121:  9646:  5147:  648:  66:         return token_input.get("value")
14122:  9647:  5148:  649:  67: 
14123:  9648:  5149:  650:  68:     # Try meta tag (common in SPAs)
14124:  9649:  5150:  651:  69:     meta = soup.find("meta", {"name": field_name})
14125:  9650:  5151:  652:  70:     if meta:
14126:  9651:  5152:  653:  71:         return meta.get("content")
14127:  9652:  5153:  654:  72: 
14128:  9653:  5154:  655:  73:     # Generic CSRF patterns
14129:  9654:  5155:  656:  74:     for pattern in ["csrf", "token", "_token", "xsrf"]:
14130:  9655:  5156:  657:  75:         token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": re.compile(pattern, re.I)})
14131:  9656:  5157:  658:  76:         if token_input:
14132:  9657:  5158:  659:  77:             return token_input.get("value")
14133:  9658:  5159:  660:  78: 
14134:  9659:  5160:  661:  79:     return None
14135:  9660:  5161:  662:  80: 
14136:  9661:  5162:  663:  81: 
14137:  9662:  5163:  664:  82: def get_csrf_token(
14138:  9663:  5164:  665:  83:     session: requests.Session,
14139:  9664:  5165:  666:  84:     transaction_endpoint: str,
14140:  9665:  5166:  667:  85:     csrf_field_name: str,
14141:  9666:  5167:  668:  86:     framework: str
14142:  9667:  5168:  669:  87: ) -> tuple[Optional[str], bool]:
14143:  9668:  5169:  670:  88:     """
14144:  9669:  5170:  671:  89:     Attempt to retrieve CSRF token before a mutating request.
14145:  9670:  5171:  672:  90:     Returns (token_value, success).
14146:  9671:  5172:  673:  91:     """
14147:  9672:  5173:  674:  92:     form_endpoint = transaction_endpoint.replace("/api/", "/")
14148:  9673:  5174:  675:  93:     candidates = [
14149:  9674:  5175:  676:  94:         f"{BASE_URL}{form_endpoint}",
14150:  9675:  5176:  677:  95:         f"{BASE_URL}/",
14151:  9676:  5177:  678:  96:         f"{BASE_URL}/login",
14152:  9677:  5178:  679:  97:         f"{BASE_URL}/home",
14153:  9678:  5179:  680:  98:     ]
14154:  9679:  5180:  681:  99: 
14155:  9680:  5181:  682: 100:     for url in candidates:
14156:  9681:  5182:  683: 101:         try:
14157:  9682:  5183:  684: 102:             r = session.get(url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
14158:  9683:  5184:  685: 103:             if r.status_code == 200:
14159:  9684:  5185:  686: 104:                 # 1. Check HTML for hidden input
14160:  9685:  5186:  687: 105:                 token = extract_csrf_from_html(r.text, csrf_field_name)
14161:  9686:  5187:  688: 106:                 if token:
14162:  9687:  5188:  689: 107:                     return token, True
14163:  9688:  5189:  690: 108: 
14164:  9689:  5190:  691: 109:                 # 2. Check cookies (XSRF-TOKEN style, e.g., Laravel Sanctum)
14165:  9690:  5191:  692: 110:                 for cookie_name in ["XSRF-TOKEN", "csrftoken", "csrf_token"]:
14166:  9691:  5192:  693: 111:                     if cookie_name in session.cookies:
14167:  9692:  5193:  694: 112:                         import urllib.parse
14168:  9693:  5194:  695: 113:                         return urllib.parse.unquote(session.cookies[cookie_name]), True
14169:  9694:  5195:  696: 114: 
14170:  9695:  5196:  697: 115:                 # 3. Check response headers
14171:  9696:  5197:  698: 116:                 for header_name in ["X-CSRF-Token", "X-XSRF-Token", "CSRF-Token"]:
14172:  9697:  5198:  699: 117:                     if header_name in r.headers:
14173:  9698:  5199:  700: 118:                         return r.headers[header_name], True
14174:  9699:  5200:  701: 119: 
14175:  9700:  5201:  702: 120:         except Exception:
14176:  9701:  5202:  703: 121:             continue
14177:  9702:  5203:  704: 122: 
14178:  9703:  5204:  705: 123:     return None, False
14179:  9704:  5205:  706: 124: 
14180:  9705:  5206:  707: 125: 
14181:  9706:  5207:  708: 126: # ─── Dummy Data Generator ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
14182:  9707:  5208:  709: 127: 
14183:  9708:  5209:  710: 128: DUMMY_VALUES: dict[str, Any] = {
14184:  9709:  5210:  711: 129:     "email":    "test@example.com",
14185:  9710:  5211:  712: 130:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
14186:  9711:  5212:  713: 131:     "name":     "Test User",
14187:  9712:  5213:  714: 132:     "username": "testuser",
14188:  9713:  5214:  715: 133:     "phone":    "+1234567890",
14189:  9714:  5215:  716: 134:     "address":  "123 Test Street",
14190:  9715:  5216:  717: 135:     "title":    "Test Title",
14191:  9716:  5217:  718: 136:     "body":     "Test body content for automated testing",
14192:  9717:  5218:  719: 137:     "content":  "Test content",
14193:  9718:  5219:  720: 138:     "message":  "Test message",
14194:  9719:  5220:  721: 139:     "amount":   "100.00",
14195:  9720:  5221:  722: 140:     "price":    "99.99",
14196:  9721:  5222:  723: 141:     "quantity": "1",
14197:  9722:  5223:  724: 142:     "date":     "2024-01-01",
14198:  9723:  5224:  725: 143:     "token":    "dummy_token_for_testing",
14199:  9724:  5225:  726: 144:     "code":     "TEST123",
14200:  9725:  5226:  727: 145:     "url":      "https://example.com",
14201:  9726:  5227:  728: 146:     "file":     None,  # Skip file uploads
14202:  9727:  5228:  729: 147: }
14203:  9728:  5229:  730: 148: 
14204:  9729:  5230:  731: 149: TYPE_DEFAULTS: dict[str, Any] = {
14205:  9730:  5231:  732: 150:     "email":    "test@example.com",
14206:  9731:  5232:  733: 151:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
14207:  9732:  5233:  734: 152:     "string":   "test_value",
14208:  9733:  5234:  735: 153:     "integer":  "1",
14209:  9734:  5235:  736: 154:     "number":   "1",
14210:  9735:  5236:  737: 155:     "boolean":  "true",
14211:  9736:  5237:  738: 156:     "text":     "Test text content",
14212:  9737:  5238:  739: 157:     "file":     None,
14213:  9738:  5239:  740: 158: }
14214:  9739:  5240:  741: 159: 
14215:  9740:  5241:  742: 160: 
14216:  9741:  5242:  743: 161: def generate_dummy_payload(fields: list[dict]) -> dict:
14217:  9742:  5243:  744: 162:     """Generate dummy payload from field definitions."""
14218:  9743:  5244:  745: 163:     payload = {}
14219:  9744:  5245:  746: 164:     for f in fields:
14220:  9745:  5246:  747: 165:         name = f["name"].lower()
14221:  9746:  5247:  748: 166:         ftype = f.get("type", "string").lower()
14222:  9747:  5248:  749: 167: 
14223:  9748:  5249:  750: 168:         if ftype == "file":
14224:  9749:  5250:  751: 169:             continue  # Skip file fields in automated testing
14225:  9750:  5251:  752: 170: 
14226:  9751:  5252:  753: 171:         # Try name match first
14227:  9752:  5253:  754: 172:         value = DUMMY_VALUES.get(name)
14228:  9753:  5254:  755: 173:         if value is None:
14229:  9754:  5255:  756: 174:             # Try partial match
14230:  9755:  5256:  757: 175:             for key, val in DUMMY_VALUES.items():
14231:  9756:  5257:  758: 176:                 if key in name:
14232:  9757:  5258:  759: 177:                     value = val
14233:  9758:  5259:  760: 178:                     break
14234:  9759:  5260:  761: 179: 
14235:  9760:  5261:  762: 180:         # Fallback to type default
14236:  9761:  5262:  763: 181:         if value is None:
14237:  9762:  5263:  764: 182:             value = TYPE_DEFAULTS.get(ftype, "test_value")
14238:  9763:  5264:  765: 183: 
14239:  9764:  5265:  766: 184:         if value is not None:
14240:  9765:  5266:  767: 185:             payload[f["name"]] = value
14241:  9766:  5267:  768: 186: 
14242:  9767:  5268:  769: 187:     return payload
14243:  9768:  5269:  770: 188: 
14244:  9769:  5270:  771: 189: 
14245:  9770:  5271:  772: 190: # ─── Main Runner ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
14246:  9771:  5272:  773: 191: 
14247:  9772:  5273:  774: 192: def run_transaction(
14248:  9773:  5274:  775: 193:     session: requests.Session,
14249:  9774:  5275:  776: 194:     transaction: dict,
14250:  9775:  5276:  777: 195:     framework: str,
14251:  9776:  5277:  778: 196:     tracker: EmissionsTracker
14252:  9777:  5278:  779: 197: ) -> RequestMeasurement:
14253:  9778:  5279:  780: 198:     """Execute a single transaction with carbon tracking."""
14254:  9779:  5280:  781: 199:     method = transaction["method"].upper()
14255:  9780:  5281:  782: 200:     endpoint = transaction["endpoint"]
14256:  9781:  5282:  783: 201:     full_url = f"{BASE_URL}{endpoint}"
14257:  9782:  5283:  784: 202: 
14258:  9783:  5284:  785: 203:     csrf_obtained = False
14259:  9784:  5285:  786: 204:     csrf_token = None
14260:  9785:  5286:  787: 205: 
14261:  9786:  5287:  788: 206:     # Get CSRF token if required
14262:  9787:  5288:  789: 207:     if transaction.get("requires_csrf") and method in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
14263:  9788:  5289:  790: 208:         csrf_field = transaction.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
14264:  9789:  5290:  791: 209:         csrf_token, csrf_obtained = get_csrf_token(session, endpoint, csrf_field, framework)
14265:  9790:  5291:  792: 210: 
14266:  9791:  5292:  793: 211:         if csrf_token:
14267:  9792:  5293:  794: 212:             session.headers.update({
14268:  9793:  5294:  795: 213:                 "X-CSRF-Token": csrf_token,
14269:  9794:  5295:  796: 214:                 "X-XSRF-Token": csrf_token,
14270:  9795:  5296:  797: 215:             })
14271:  9796:  5297:  798: 216: 
14272:  9797:  5298:  799: 217:     # Build payload
14273:  9798:  5299:  800: 218:     payload = generate_dummy_payload(transaction.get("fields", []))
14274:  9799:  5300:  801: 219: 
14275:  9800:  5301:  802: 220:     # Add CSRF to payload if token found
14276:  9801:  5302:  803: 221:     if csrf_token and transaction.get("csrf_field_name"):
14277:  9802:  5303:  804: 222:         payload[transaction["csrf_field_name"]] = csrf_token
14278:  9803:  5304:  805: 223: 
14279:  9804:  5305:  806: 224:     # Track energy for this request
14280:  9805:  5306:  807: 225:     tracker.start_task(transaction["id"])
14281:  9806:  5307:  808: 226:     start_time = time.time()
14282:  9807:  5308:  809: 227: 
14283:  9808:  5309:  810: 228:     try:
14284:  9809:  5310:  811: 229:         if method == "GET":
14285:  9810:  5311:  812: 230:             response = session.get(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
14286:  9811:  5312:  813: 231:         elif method == "POST":
14287:  9812:  5313:  814: 232:             response = session.post(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
14288:  9813:  5314:  815: 233:         elif method == "PUT":
14289:  9814:  5315:  816: 234:             response = session.put(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
14290:  9815:  5316:  817: 235:         elif method == "PATCH":
14291:  9816:  5317:  818: 236:             response = session.patch(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
14292:  9817:  5318:  819: 237:         elif method == "DELETE":
14293:  9818:  5319:  820: 238:             response = session.delete(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
14294:  9819:  5320:  821: 239:         else:
14295:  9820:  5321:  822: 240:             raise ValueError(f"Unsupported method: {method}")
14296:  9821:  5322:  823: 241: 
14297:  9822:  5323:  824: 242:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
14298:  9823:  5324:  825: 243:         emissions_data = tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
14299:  9824:  5325:  826: 244: 
14300:  9825:  5326:  827: 245:         return RequestMeasurement(
14301:  9826:  5327:  828: 246:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
14302:  9827:  5328:  829: 247:             method=method,
14303:  9828:  5329:  830: 248:             endpoint=endpoint,
14304:  9829:  5330:  831: 249:             full_url=full_url,
14305:  9830:  5331:  832: 250:             status_code=response.status_code,
14306:  9831:  5332:  833: 251:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
14307:  9832:  5333:  834: 252:             energy_consumed_kwh=emissions_data.energy_consumed if emissions_data else 0.0,
14308:  9833:  5334:  835: 253:             co2_emissions_kg=emissions_data.emissions if emissions_data else 0.0,
14309:  9834:  5335:  836: 254:             success=200 <= response.status_code < 400,
14310:  9835:  5336:  837: 255:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
14311:  9836:  5337:  838: 256:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
14312:  9837:  5338:  839: 257:             response_preview=response.text[:200],
14313:  9838:  5339:  840: 258:         )
14314:  9839:  5340:  841: 259: 
14315:  9840:  5341:  842: 260:     except Exception as e:
14316:  9841:  5342:  843: 261:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
14317:  9842:  5343:  844: 262:         try:
14318:  9843:  5344:  845: 263:             tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
14319:  9844:  5345:  846: 264:         except Exception:
14320:  9845:  5346:  847: 265:             pass
14321:  9846:  5347:  848: 266: 
14322:  9847:  5348:  849: 267:         return RequestMeasurement(
14323:  9848:  5349:  850: 268:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
14324:  9849:  5350:  851: 269:             method=method,
14325:  9850:  5351:  852: 270:             endpoint=endpoint,
14326:  9851:  5352:  853: 271:             full_url=full_url,
14327:  9852:  5353:  854: 272:             status_code=0,
14328:  9853:  5354:  855: 273:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),
14329:  9854:  5355:  856: 274:             energy_consumed_kwh=0.0,
14330:  9855:  5356:  857: 275:             co2_emissions_kg=0.0,
14331:  9856:  5357:  858: 276:             success=False,
14332:  9857:  5358:  859: 277:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
14333:  9858:  5359:  860: 278:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),
14334:  9859:  5360:  861: 279:             error=str(e),
14335:  9860:  5361:  862: 280:         )
14336:  9861:  5362:  863: 281: 
14337:  9862:  5363:  864: 282: 
14338:  9863:  5364:  865: 283: def run(transactions_path: str) -> CarbonResult:
14339:  9864:  5365:  866: 284:     """
14340:  9865:  5366:  867: 285:     Main entry point for Agent 3.
14341:  9866:  5367:  868: 286:     
14342:  9867:  5368:  869: 287:     Args:
14343:  9868:  5369:  870: 288:         transactions_path: Path to transactions.json from Agent 2
14344:  9869:  5370:  871: 289:     
14345:  9870:  5371:  872: 290:     Returns:
14346:  9871:  5372:  873: 291:         CarbonResult with per-request energy measurements
14347:  9872:  5373:  874: 292:     """
14348:  9873:  5374:  875: 293:     try:
14349:  9874:  5375:  876: 294:         with open(transactions_path) as f:
14350:  9875:  5376:  877: 295:             data = json.load(f)
14351:  9876:  5377:  878: 296: 
14352:  9877:  5378:  879: 297:         transactions = data.get("transactions", [])
14353:  9878:  5379:  880: 298:         framework = data.get("framework", "unknown")
14354:  9879:  5380:  881: 299: 
14355:  9880:  5381:  882: 300:         print(f"[Agent 3] Running {len(transactions)} transactions against {BASE_URL}")
14356:  9881:  5382:  883: 301: 
14357:  9882:  5383:  884: 302:         session = requests.Session()
14358:  9883:  5384:  885: 303:         session.headers.update({
14359:  9884:  5385:  886: 304:             "Accept": "application/json, text/html",
14360:  9885:  5386:  887: 305:             "User-Agent": "CodeCarbonAgent/1.0",
14361:  9886:  5387:  888: 306:         })
14362:  9887:  5388:  889: 307: 
14363:  9888:  5389:  890: 308:         # Initialize CodeCarbon tracker
14364:  9889:  5390:  891: 309:         tracker = EmissionsTracker(
14365:  9890:  5391:  892: 310:             project_name="code_carbon_agent",
14366:  9891:  5392:  893: 311:             output_dir=str(Path(transactions_path).parent),
14367:  9892:  5393:  894: 312:             log_level="warning",
14368:  9893:  5394:  895: 313:             save_to_file=False,
14369:  9894:  5395:  896: 314:             tracking_mode="process",
14370:  9895:  5396:  897: 315:         )
14371:  9896:  5397:  898: 316:         tracker.start()
14372:  9897:  5398:  899: 317: 
14373:  9898:  5399:  900: 318:         measurements = []
14374:  9899:  5400:  901: 319: 
14375:  9900:  5401:  902: 320:         for txn in transactions:
14376:  9901:  5402:  903: 321:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {txn['method']} {txn['endpoint']}")
14377:  9902:  5403:  904: 322:             measurement = run_transaction(session, txn, framework, tracker)
14378:  9903:  5404:  905: 323:             measurements.append(measurement)
14379:  9904:  5405:  906: 324: 
14380:  9905:  5406:  907: 325:             status_icon = "✅" if measurement.success else "❌"
14381:  9906:  5407:  908: 326:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {status_icon} {measurement.status_code} "
14382:  9907:  5408:  909: 327:                   f"({measurement.response_time_ms:.0f}ms, "
14383:  9908:  5409:  910: 328:                   f"{measurement.co2_emissions_kg*1000:.4f}g CO₂)")
14384:  9909:  5410:  911: 329: 
14385:  9910:  5411:  912: 330:             time.sleep(DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS)
14386:  9911:  5412:  913: 331: 
14387:  9912:  5413:  914: 332:         tracker.stop()
14388:  9913:  5414:  915: 333: 
14389:  9914:  5415:  916: 334:         successful = sum(1 for m in measurements if m.success)
14390:  9915:  5416:  917: 335:         total_energy = sum(m.energy_consumed_kwh for m in measurements)
14391:  9916:  5417:  918: 336:         total_co2 = sum(m.co2_emissions_kg for m in measurements)
14392:  9917:  5418:  919: 337:         avg_time = (sum(m.response_time_ms for m in measurements) / len(measurements)
14393:  9918:  5419:  920: 338:                     if measurements else 0)
14394:  9919:  5420:  921: 339: 
14395:  9920:  5421:  922: 340:         result = CarbonResult(
14396:  9921:  5422:  923: 341:             success=True,
14397:  9922:  5423:  924: 342:             base_url=BASE_URL,
14398:  9923:  5424:  925: 343:             total_requests=len(measurements),
14399:  9924:  5425:  926: 344:             successful_requests=successful,
14400:  9925:  5426:  927: 345:             failed_requests=len(measurements) - successful,
14401:  9926:  5427:  928: 346:             total_energy_kwh=round(total_energy, 8),
14402:  9927:  5428:  929: 347:             total_co2_kg=round(total_co2, 8),
14403:  9928:  5429:  930: 348:             avg_response_time_ms=round(avg_time, 2),
14404:  9929:  5430:  931: 349:             measurements=measurements,
14405:  9930:  5431:  932: 350:         )
14406:  9931:  5432:  933: 351: 
14407:  9932:  5433:  934: 352:         # Save carbon report
14408:  9933:  5434:  935: 353:         output_path = Path(transactions_path).parent / "carbon_report.json"
14409:  9934:  5435:  936: 354:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
14410:  9935:  5436:  937: 355:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
14411:  9936:  5437:  938: 356:         print(f"[Agent 3] ✅ Saved: {output_path}")
14412:  9937:  5438:  939: 357: 
14413:  9938:  5439:  940: 358:         return result
14414:  9939:  5440:  941: 359: 
14415:  9940:  5441:  942: 360:     except Exception as e:
14416:  9941:  5442:  943: 361:         return CarbonResult(
14417:  9942:  5443:  944: 362:             success=False,
14418:  9943:  5444:  945: 363:             base_url=BASE_URL,
14419:  9944:  5445:  946: 364:             total_requests=0,
14420:  9945:  5446:  947: 365:             successful_requests=0,

14423:  9948:  5449:  950: 368:             total_co2_kg=0.0,

14425:  9950:  5451:  952: 370:             measurements=[],
14426:  9951:  5452:  953: 371:             error=str(e),
14427:  9952:  5453:  954: 372:         )
14428:  9953:  5454:  955: 373: 
14429:  9954:  5455:  956: 374: 
14430:  9955:  5456:  957: 375: if __name__ == "__main__":
14431:  9956:  5457:  958: 376:     import sys
14432:  9957:  5458:  959: 377:     txn_path = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/transactions.json"
14433:  9958:  5459:  960: 378:     result = run(txn_path)
14434:  9959:  5460:  961: 379:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))

14578: 10103:  5604: 1105: 140:

14612: 10137:  5638: 1139: 174:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):
14613: 10138:  5639: 1140: 175:                 if ftype == "email":

14646: 10171:  5672: 1173: 208:             elif framework in ("express", "nestjs"):

14648: 10173:  5674: 1175: 210:                 csrf_kwarg = ""

14650: 10175:  5676: 1177: 212:             else:

14652: 10177:  5678: 1179: 214:                 csrf_kwarg = ""
14653: 10178:  5679: 1180: 215:                 csrf_header = ""

14866: 10391:  5892: 1393: 428: def run(output_dir: str = "./output") -> str:
14867: 10392:  5893: 1394: 429:     """
14868: 10393:  5894: 1395: 430:     Main entry point for Agent 4.
14869: 10394:  5895: 1396: 431:     
14870: 10395:  5896: 1397: 432:     Args:
14871: 10396:  5897: 1398: 433:         output_dir: Directory containing all agent outputs
14872: 10397:  5898: 1399: 434:     
14873: 10398:  5899: 1400: 435:     Returns:
14874: 10399:  5900: 1401: 436:         Path to the generated report
14875: 10400:  5901: 1402: 437:     """
14876: 10401:  5902: 1403: 438:     os.makedirs(REPORT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
14877: 10402:  5903: 1404: 439:     os.makedirs(f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests", exist_ok=True)
14878: 10403:  5904: 1405: 440: 
14879: 10404:  5905: 1406: 441:     # Load all agent outputs
14880: 10405:  5906: 1407: 442:     with open(f"{output_dir}/transactions.json") as f:
14881: 10406:  5907: 1408: 443:         identification = json.load(f)
14882: 10407:  5908: 1409: 444: 
14883: 10408:  5909: 1410: 445:     with open(f"{output_dir}/carbon_report.json") as f:
14884: 10409:  5910: 1411: 446:         carbon = json.load(f)
14885: 10410:  5911: 1412: 447: 
14886: 10411:  5912: 1413: 448:     # Agent 1 result may or may not exist
14887: 10412:  5913: 1414: 449:     ingestion_path = Path(output_dir) / "ingestion_result.json"
14888: 10413:  5914: 1415: 450:     if ingestion_path.exists():
14889: 10414:  5915: 1416: 451:         with open(ingestion_path) as f:
14890: 10415:  5916: 1417: 452:             ingestion = json.load(f)
14891: 10416:  5917: 1418: 453:     else:
14892: 10417:  5918: 1419: 454:         ingestion = {"source_path": output_dir}
14893: 10418:  5919: 1420: 455: 
14894: 10419:  5920: 1421: 456:     framework = identification.get("framework", "express")
14895: 10420:  5921: 1422: 457: 
14896: 10421:  5922: 1423: 458:     # Generate unit tests
14897: 10422:  5923: 1424: 459:     print("[Agent 4] Generating unit tests...")
14898: 10423:  5924: 1425: 460:     test_content = generate_unit_tests(identification.get("transactions", []), framework)
14899: 10424:  5925: 1426: 461:     test_ext = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])["ext"]

14902: 10427:  5928: 1429: 464:         f.write(test_content)

14904: 10429:  5930: 1431: 466: 
14905: 10430:  5931: 1432: 467:     # Generate markdown report
14906: 10431:  5932: 1433: 468:     print("[Agent 4] Building report...")
14907: 10432:  5933: 1434: 469:     report_md = build_report(ingestion, identification, carbon, REPORT_DIR)
14908: 10433:  5934: 1435: 470:     report_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/code_carbon_report.md"
14909: 10434:  5935: 1436: 471:     with open(report_path, "w") as f:
14910: 10435:  5936: 1437: 472:         f.write(report_md)
14911: 10436:  5937: 1438: 473: 
14912: 10437:  5938: 1439: 474:     print(f"[Agent 4] ✅ Report saved: {report_path}")
14913: 10438:  5939: 1440: 475:     return report_path
