15427: 10952:  6453: 1954: 504:                     </div>
15428: 10953:  6454: 1955: 505:                     <div class="energy-badge">45.27 mWh</div>
15429: 10954:  6455: 1956: 506:                 </div>
15430: 10955:  6456: 1957: 507: 
15431: 10956:  6457: 1958: 508:                 <div class="issue-box">
15432: 10957:  6458: 1959: 509:                     <strong>Diagnosis:</strong> Terdeteksi pengambilan data tanpa paginasi. Pemakaian memori sangat
15433: 10958:  6459: 1960: 510:                     tinggi dan eksekusi query lambat akibat <code>-&gt;get()</code>. Proses loop berlanjut menghasilkan
15434: 10959:  6460: 1961: 511:                     kompleksitas berat O(N*M).
15435: 10960:  6461: 1962: 512:                 </div>
15436: 10961:  6462: 1963: 513: 
15437: 10962:  6463: 1964: 514:                 <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4 my-4">
15438: 10963:  6464: 1965: 515:                     <div class="code-block">
15439: 10964:  6465: 1966: 516:                         <div class="code-label label-orig">Kode Asli</div>
15440: 10965:  6466: 1967: 517:                         <pre>public function grid(Request $request)
15441: 10966:  6467: 1968: 518: {
15442: 10967:  6468: 1969: 519:     $month = $request-&gt;input('month', Carbon::now()-&gt;month);
15443: 10968:  6469: 1970: 520:     $year = $request-&gt;input('year', Carbon::now()-&gt;year);
15444: 10969:  6470: 1971: 521:     
15445: 10970:  6471: 1972: 522:     // Inefficient read
15446: 10971:  6472: 1973: 523:     $agendas = Agenda::whereMonth('tanggal_mulai', $month)
15447: 10972:  6473: 1974: 524:                     -&gt;whereYear('tanggal_mulai', $year)
15448: 10973:  6474: 1975: 525:                     -&gt;orWhere(function($query) use ($month, $year) {
15449: 10974:  6475: 1976: 526:                         $query-&gt;whereMonth('tanggal_deadline', $month)
15450: 10975:  6476: 1977: 527:                               -&gt;whereYear('tanggal_deadline', $year);
15451: 10976:  6477: 1978: 528:                     })-&gt;get();
15452: 10977:  6478: 1979: 529:     
15453: 10978:  6479: 1980: 530:     $calendar = $this-&gt;generateCalendar($month, $year, $agendas);
15454: 10979:  6480: 1981: 531:     return view('pages.reference.agenda.grid', compact('calendar', 'agendas'));
15455: 10980:  6481: 1982: 532: }</pre>
15456: 10981:  6482: 1983: 533:                     </div>
15457: 10982:  6483: 1984: 534:                     <div class="code-block">
15458: 10983:  6484: 1985: 535:                         <div class="code-label label-ref">Saran Optimasi</div>
15459: 10984:  6485: 1986: 536:                         <pre>public function grid(Request $request)
15460: 10985:  6486: 1987: 537: {
15461: 10986:  6487: 1988: 538:     $month = $request-&gt;input('month', Carbon::now()-&gt;month);
15462: 10987:  6488: 1989: 539:     $year = $request-&gt;input('year', Carbon::now()-&gt;year);
15463: 10988:  6489: 1990: 540:     
15464: 10989:  6490: 1991: 541:     $startOfMonth = Carbon::create($year, $month, 1)-&gt;startOfDay();
15465: 10990:  6491: 1992: 542:     $endOfMonth = Carbon::create($year, $month, 1)-&gt;endOfMonth()-&gt;endOfDay();
15466: 10991:  6492: 1993: 543: 
15467: 10992:  6493: 1994: 544:     // Range bounded query
15468: 10993:  6494: 1995: 545:     $agendas = Agenda::where(function($query) use ($startOfMonth, $endOfMonth) {
15469: 10994:  6495: 1996: 546:                         $query-&gt;where('tanggal_mulai', '&lt;=', $endOfMonth)
15470: 10995:  6496: 1997: 547:                               -&gt;where('tanggal_deadline', '&gt;=', $startOfMonth);
15471: 10996:  6497: 1998: 548:                     })-&gt;get();
15472: 10997:  6498: 1999: 549: 
15473: 10998:  6499: 2000: 550:     $agendasGroupedByDay = collect();
15474: 10999:  6500: 2001: 551:     foreach ($agendas as $agenda) {
15475: 11000:  6501: 2002: 552:         // O(1) structure logic
15476: 11001:  6502: 2003: 553:     }
15477: 11002:  6503: 2004: 554:     
15478: 11003:  6504: 2005: 555:     $calendar = $this-&gt;generateCalendar($month, $year, $agendasGroupedByDay);
15479: 11004:  6505: 2006: 556:     return view('pages.reference.agenda.grid', compact('calendar', 'agendas'));
15480: 11005:  6506: 2007: 557: }</pre>
15481: 11006:  6507: 2008: 558:                     </div>
15482: 11007:  6508: 2009: 559:                 </div>
15483: 11008:  6509: 2010: 560: 
15484: 11009:  6510: 2011: 561:                 <div class="bg-slate-50 p-5 rounded border border-slate-200 mt-4 text-sm text-slate-700">
15485: 11010:  6511: 2012: 562:                     <div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 mb-4">
15486: 11011:  6512: 2013: 563:                         <div><strong>Perubahan Logika:</strong> Parameter query dibatasi dan menggunakan penyusunan data
15487: 11012:  6513: 2014: 564:                             tingkat lanjut untuk akses kecepatan O(1).</div>
15488: 11013:  6514: 2015: 565:                         <div><strong>Dampak (Delta):</strong> Penurunan drastis pemakaian siklus CPU dengan mencegah
15489: 11014:  6515: 2016: 566:                             loop berulang pada perenderan tampilan.</div>
15490: 11015:  6516: 2017: 567:                     </div>
15491: 11016:  6517: 2018: 568: 
15492: 11017:  6518: 2019: 569:                     <div class="border-t border-slate-200 pt-3 mt-2">
15493: 11018:  6519: 2020: 570:                         <strong class="block mb-2 text-slate-800">Penjelasan Teknis:</strong>
15494: 11019:  6520: 2021: 571:                         <ol class="list-decimal pl-5 space-y-1 text-slate-600">
15495: 11020:  6521: 2022: 572:                             <li>Mengganti pencocokan tanggal luas dengan perbandingan timestamp yang ketat.</li>
15496: 11021:  6522: 2023: 573:                             <li>Mengaplikasikan memori kelompok (*memory grouping*) untuk mencegah loop berlebih saat
15497: 11022:  6523: 2024: 574:                                 kalender dimuat.</li>
15498: 11023:  6524: 2025: 575:                         </ol>
15499: 11024:  6525: 2026: 576:                     </div>

15752: 11277:  6778: 2279: 12: | [server.py](file:///d:/technofest/server.py) | **Backend Server** — Flask app serving Web UI and streaming pipeline logs |
15753: 11278:  6779: 2280: 13: | [web_ui/index.html](file:///d:/technofest/web_ui/index.html) | **Web Dashboard** — Interactive UI to run pipeline & test transactions |

15757: 11282:  6783: 2284: 17: ## Directory Structure

15759: 11284:  6785: 2286: 19: ```

15777: 11302:  6803: 2304: 37: 
15778: 11303:  6804: 2305: 38: ```bash

15784: 11309:  6810: 2311: 44: 
15785: 11310:  6811: 2312: 45: # 3. Open your browser
15786: 11311:  6812: 2313: 46: # Go to: http://localhost:5000
15787: 11312:  6813: 2314: 47: ```
15788: 11313:  6814: 2315: 48: 
15789: 11314:  6815: 2316: 49: > **How to use the dashboard:**
15790: 11315:  6816: 2317: 50: > 1. Enter your **Repository Path** (e.g., `C:\xampp\htdocs\my-app`) or **Git URL**.
15791: 11316:  6817: 2318: 51: > 2. Enter the **Target Base URL** (e.g., `http://localhost:8000`).
15792: 11317:  6818: 2319: 52: > 3. Click **Run Pipeline**.
15793: 11318:  6819: 2320: 53: > 4. Watch the terminal logs stream in real-time.
15794: 11319:  6820: 2321: 54: > 5. Once finished, scroll down to interact with the detected transactions!
15795: 11320:  6821: 2322: 55: 
15796: 11321:  6822: 2323: 56: ## Alternative: CLI Usage
15797: 11322:  6823: 2324: 57: 
15798: 11323:  6824: 2325: 58: ```bash
15799: 11324:  6825: 2326: 59: # Run full pipeline via terminal
15800: 11325:  6826: 2327: 60: python pipeline.py --source /path/to/your/app --base-url http://localhost:8000
15801: 11326:  6827: 2328: 61: 
15802: 11327:  6828: 2329: 62: # Skip Agent 3
15803: 11328:  6829: 2330: 63: python pipeline.py --source https://github.com/user/repo --skip-carbon
15804: 11329:  6830: 2331: 64: ```
15805: 11330:  6831: 2332: 65: 
15806: 11331:  6832: 2333: 66: > [!IMPORTANT]
15807: 11332:  6833: 2334: 67: > Before running, update `GEMINI_API_KEY` in `.env` with your actual Gemini API key.
15808: 11333:  6834: 2335: 68: 
15809: 11334:  6835: 2336: 69: > [!NOTE]
15810: 11335:  6836: 2337: 70: > All Python dependencies are already installed. `repomix` must be installed globally via `npm install -g repomix` for Agent 1 to work.
15811: 11336:  6837: 2338: 71: 
15812: 11337:  6838: 2339: 72: ## Supported Frameworks
15813: 11338:  6839: 2340: 73: 
15814: 11339:  6840: 2341: 74: Laravel · Django · Express.js · Spring Boot · Rails · FastAPI · NestJS · Go (Gin/Echo) · ASP.NET Core
15815: 11340:  6841: 2342:

15817: 11342:  6843: 2344: File: MULTI_AGENT_CODE_CARBON.md
15818: 11343:  6844: 2345: ================

15820: 11345:  6846: 2347:    2: > **Universal Code Analyzer · Transaction Detector · Carbon Auditor · Refactor Reporter**
15821: 11346:  6847: 2348:    3: 
15822: 11347:  6848: 2349:    4: ---

15841: 11366:  6867: 2368:   23: 
15842: 11367:  6868: 2369:   24: ## System Overview
15843: 11368:  6869: 2370:   25: 
15844: 11369:  6870: 2371:   26: System ini terdiri dari **4 agen yang bekerja secara pipeline** untuk menganalisis codebase dari berbagai framework/bahasa, mendeteksi transaksi, mengukur konsumsi energi (carbon), dan menghasilkan laporan refactoring.
15845: 11370:  6871: 2372:   27: 
15846: 11371:  6872: 2373:   28: ```
15847: 11372:  6873: 2374:   29: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
15848: 11373:  6874: 2375:   30: │                     MULTI-AGENT PIPELINE                        │
15849: 11374:  6875: 2376:   31: │                                                                 │
15850: 11375:  6876: 2377:   32: │  [Repo/Local]  →  [Repomix]  →  [Gemini AI]  →  [Code Carbon] │
15851: 11376:  6877: 2378:   33: │      Agent 1         ↓             Agent 2         Agent 3      │
15852: 11377:  6878: 2379:   34: │                  flat_pack                              ↓        │
15853: 11378:  6879: 2380:   35: │                  .txt file      transactions        energy_data  │
15854: 11379:  6880: 2381:   36: │                                      ↓                  ↓       │
15855: 11380:  6881: 2382:   37: │                               ┌──────────────────────────┐      │
15856: 11381:  6882: 2383:   38: │                               │    Agent 4 — Refactor    │      │
15857: 11382:  6883: 2384:   39: │                               │         Report           │      │
15858: 11383:  6884: 2385:   40: │                               └──────────────────────────┘      │
15859: 11384:  6885: 2386:   41: └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
15860: 11385:  6886: 2387:   42: ```
15861: 11386:  6887: 2388:   43: 
15862: 11387:  6888: 2389:   44: ### Supported Languages / Frameworks
15863: 11388:  6889: 2390:   45: 
15864: 11389:  6890: 2391:   46: | Framework | Language | CSRF Support | Unit Test |
15865: 11390:  6891: 2392:   47: |-----------|----------|--------------|-----------|
15866: 11391:  6892: 2393:   48: | Laravel | PHP | ✅ Auto-detect `@csrf` | PHPUnit |
15867: 11392:  6893: 2394:   49: | Django | Python | ✅ `{% csrf_token %}` | pytest |
15868: 11393:  6894: 2395:   50: | Express.js | JavaScript/TypeScript | ✅ `csurf` middleware | Jest |
15869: 11394:  6895: 2396:   51: | Spring Boot | Java | ✅ `CsrfToken` | JUnit |
15870: 11395:  6896: 2397:   52: | Rails | Ruby | ✅ `authenticity_token` | RSpec |
15871: 11396:  6897: 2398:   53: | FastAPI | Python | ✅ Custom CSRF | pytest |
15872: 11397:  6898: 2399:   54: | NestJS | TypeScript | ✅ `@nestjs/csrf` | Jest |
15873: 11398:  6899: 2400:   55: | Go (Gin/Echo) | Go | ✅ `gorilla/csrf` | go test |
15874: 11399:  6900: 2401:   56: | ASP.NET Core | C# | ✅ `[ValidateAntiForgeryToken]` | xUnit |
15875: 11400:  6901: 2402:   57: 
15876: 11401:  6902: 2403:   58: ---

15879: 11404:  6905: 2406:   61: 
15880: 11405:  6906: 2407:   62: ```
15881: 11406:  6907: 2408:   63:                          ╔══════════════════════╗

15900: 11425:  6926: 2427:   82:                          ║  • Detect CSRF fields║

15906: 11431:  6932: 2433:   88:                                     ▼

15908: 11433:  6934: 2435:   90:                          ║   AGENT 3            ║

15926: 11451:  6952: 2453:  108:                          ╚══════════════════════╝

15934: 11459:  6960: 2461:  116: 
15935: 11460:  6961: 2462:  117: ```bash

15938: 11463:  6964: 2465:  120:

15941: 11466:  6967: 2468:  123:

15944: 11469:  6970: 2471:  126: 
15945: 11470:  6971: 2472:  127: # repomix (Agent 1)

15947: 11472:  6973: 2474:  129:

15964: 11489:  6990: 2491:  146: REPOMIX_OUTPUT_DIR=./output

15967: 11492:  6993: 2494:  149: 
15968: 11493:  6994: 2495:  150: ---
15969: 11494:  6995: 2496:  151: 
15970: 11495:  6996: 2497:  152: ## Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
15971: 11496:  6997: 2498:  153: 
15972: 11497:  6998: 2499:  154: ### Konsep
15973: 11498:  6999: 2500:  155: 
15974: 11499:  7000: 2501:  156: Agent 1 bertanggung jawab untuk **mengkonversi codebase** (baik dari path lokal maupun Git URL) menjadi satu file teks flat menggunakan **repomix**. Format flat ini kemudian dikirim ke Agent 2.
15975: 11500:  7001: 2502:  157: 
15976: 11501:  7002: 2503:  158: > **Kenapa repomix?** Repomix menghasilkan satu file `.txt` yang merepresentasikan seluruh struktur folder + isi file, sehingga Gemini AI dapat memahami konteks penuh codebase tanpa harus dikirim file per file.
15977: 11502:  7003: 2504:  159: 
15978: 11503:  7004: 2505:  160: ### File: `agent1_ingestion.py`
15979: 11504:  7005: 2506:  161: 
15980: 11505:  7006: 2507:  162: ```python
15981: 11506:  7007: 2508:  163: #!/usr/bin/env python3
15982: 11507:  7008: 2509:  164: """
15983: 11508:  7009: 2510:  165: Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion Agent
15984: 11509:  7010: 2511:  166: Converts local path or Git URL to a flat repomix bundle.
15985: 11510:  7011: 2512:  167: """
15986: 11511:  7012: 2513:  168: 
15987: 11512:  7013: 2514:  169: import subprocess
15988: 11513:  7014: 2515:  170: import os
15989: 11514:  7015: 2516:  171: import sys
15990: 11515:  7016: 2517:  172: import shutil
15991: 11516:  7017: 2518:  173: import tempfile
15992: 11517:  7018: 2519:  174: import json
15993: 11518:  7019: 2520:  175: from pathlib import Path
15994: 11519:  7020: 2521:  176: from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
15995: 11520:  7021: 2522:  177: from typing import Optional
15996: 11521:  7022: 2523:  178: 
15997: 11522:  7023: 2524:  179: 
15998: 11523:  7024: 2525:  180: @dataclass
15999: 11524:  7025: 2526:  181: class IngestionResult:
16000: 11525:  7026: 2527:  182:     success: bool
16001: 11526:  7027: 2528:  183:     flat_file_path: str
16002: 11527:  7028: 2529:  184:     source_type: str          # "local" | "git"
16003: 11528:  7029: 2530:  185:     source_path: str
16004: 11529:  7030: 2531:  186:     file_size_bytes: int
16005: 11530:  7031: 2532:  187:     detected_language: str
16006: 11531:  7032: 2533:  188:     detected_framework: str
16007: 11532:  7033: 2534:  189:     error: Optional[str] = None
16008: 11533:  7034: 2535:  190: 
16009: 11534:  7035: 2536:  191: 
16010: 11535:  7036: 2537:  192: FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES = {
16011: 11536:  7037: 2538:  193:     "laravel":     ["artisan", "composer.json", "app/Http/Controllers"],
16012: 11537:  7038: 2539:  194:     "django":      ["manage.py", "settings.py", "wsgi.py"],
16013: 11538:  7039: 2540:  195:     "express":     ["package.json", "app.js", "routes/"],
16014: 11539:  7040: 2541:  196:     "nestjs":      ["nest-cli.json", "src/main.ts"],
16015: 11540:  7041: 2542:  197:     "springboot":  ["pom.xml", "src/main/java", "Application.java"],
16016: 11541:  7042: 2543:  198:     "rails":       ["Gemfile", "config/routes.rb", "app/controllers"],
16017: 11542:  7043: 2544:  199:     "fastapi":     ["main.py", "requirements.txt"],  # + fastapi in requirements
16018: 11543:  7044: 2545:  200:     "gin":         ["go.mod", "main.go"],
16019: 11544:  7045: 2546:  201:     "aspnet":      ["*.csproj", "Program.cs", "Startup.cs"],
16020: 11545:  7046: 2547:  202: }
16021: 11546:  7047: 2548:  203: 
16022: 11547:  7048: 2549:  204: LANGUAGE_MAP = {
16023: 11548:  7049: 2550:  205:     "laravel": "PHP",
16024: 11549:  7050: 2551:  206:     "django": "Python",
16025: 11550:  7051: 2552:  207:     "fastapi": "Python",
16026: 11551:  7052: 2553:  208:     "express": "JavaScript",
16027: 11552:  7053: 2554:  209:     "nestjs": "TypeScript",
16028: 11553:  7054: 2555:  210:     "springboot": "Java",
16029: 11554:  7055: 2556:  211:     "rails": "Ruby",
16030: 11555:  7056: 2557:  212:     "gin": "Go",
16031: 11556:  7057: 2558:  213:     "aspnet": "C#",
16032: 11557:  7058: 2559:  214: }
16033: 11558:  7059: 2560:  215: 
16034: 11559:  7060: 2561:  216: 
16035: 11560:  7061: 2562:  217: def detect_framework(path: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
16036: 11561:  7062: 2563:  218:     """Detect framework and language from directory structure."""
16037: 11562:  7063: 2564:  219:     for framework, signatures in FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES.items():
16038: 11563:  7064: 2565:  220:         for sig in signatures:
16039: 11564:  7065: 2566:  221:             check = Path(path) / sig
16040: 11565:  7066: 2567:  222:             # Check direct file/dir
16041: 11566:  7067: 2568:  223:             if check.exists():
16042: 11567:  7068: 2569:  224:                 return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
16043: 11568:  7069: 2570:  225:             # Glob pattern
16044: 11569:  7070: 2571:  226:             if "*" in sig:
16045: 11570:  7071: 2572:  227:                 matches = list(Path(path).glob(sig))
16046: 11571:  7072: 2573:  228:                 if matches:
16047: 11572:  7073: 2574:  229:                     return framework, LANGUAGE_MAP.get(framework, "Unknown")
16048: 11573:  7074: 2575:  230:     return "unknown", "Unknown"
16049: 11574:  7075: 2576:  231: 
16050: 11575:  7076: 2577:  232: 
16051: 11576:  7077: 2578:  233: def clone_repo(git_url: str, target_dir: str) -> str:
16052: 11577:  7078: 2579:  234:     """Clone a git repository to target_dir."""
16053: 11578:  7079: 2580:  235:     print(f"[Agent 1] Cloning {git_url}...")
16054: 11579:  7080: 2581:  236:     result = subprocess.run(
16055: 11580:  7081: 2582:  237:         ["git", "clone", "--depth=1", git_url, target_dir],
16056: 11581:  7082: 2583:  238:         capture_output=True, text=True
16057: 11582:  7083: 2584:  239:     )
16058: 11583:  7084: 2585:  240:     if result.returncode != 0:
16059: 11584:  7085: 2586:  241:         raise RuntimeError(f"Git clone failed: {result.stderr}")
16060: 11585:  7086: 2587:  242:     return target_dir
16061: 11586:  7087: 2588:  243: 
16062: 11587:  7088: 2589:  244: 
16063: 11588:  7089: 2590:  245: def run_repomix(source_dir: str, output_path: str) -> None:
16064: 11589:  7090: 2591:  246:     """Run repomix to create flat bundle from source_dir."""
16065: 11590:  7091: 2592:  247:     print(f"[Agent 1] Running repomix on {source_dir}...")
16066: 11591:  7092: 2593:  248: 
16067: 11592:  7093: 2594:  249:     # repomix config — exclude common non-essential files
16068: 11593:  7094: 2595:  250:     repomix_config = {
16069: 11594:  7095: 2596:  251:         "output": {
16070: 11595:  7096: 2597:  252:             "filePath": output_path,
16071: 11596:  7097: 2598:  253:             "style": "plain",
16072: 11597:  7098: 2599:  254:             "removeComments": False,
16073: 11598:  7099: 2600:  255:             "removeEmptyLines": False,
16074: 11599:  7100: 2601:  256:             "showLineNumbers": True,
16075: 11600:  7101: 2602:  257:             "copyToClipboard": False,
16076: 11601:  7102: 2603:  258:         },
16077: 11602:  7103: 2604:  259:         "ignore": {
16078: 11603:  7104: 2605:  260:             "useGitignore": True,
16079: 11604:  7105: 2606:  261:             "useDefaultPatterns": True,
16080: 11605:  7106: 2607:  262:             "customPatterns": [
16081: 11606:  7107: 2608:  263:                 "node_modules/**",
16082: 11607:  7108: 2609:  264:                 "vendor/**",
16083: 11608:  7109: 2610:  265:                 ".git/**",
16084: 11609:  7110: 2611:  266:                 "*.lock",
16085: 11610:  7111: 2612:  267:                 "*.log",
16086: 11611:  7112: 2613:  268:                 "dist/**",
16087: 11612:  7113: 2614:  269:                 "build/**",
16088: 11613:  7114: 2615:  270:                 "__pycache__/**",
16089: 11614:  7115: 2616:  271:                 "*.pyc",
16090: 11615:  7116: 2617:  272:                 ".env",
16091: 11616:  7117: 2618:  273:                 "storage/**",
16092: 11617:  7118: 2619:  274:                 "public/storage/**",
16093: 11618:  7119: 2620:  275:             ]
16094: 11619:  7120: 2621:  276:         }
16095: 11620:  7121: 2622:  277:     }
16096: 11621:  7122: 2623:  278: 
16097: 11622:  7123: 2624:  279:     config_path = Path(source_dir) / ".repomix-config.json"
16098: 11623:  7124: 2625:  280:     with open(config_path, "w") as f:
16099: 11624:  7125: 2626:  281:         json.dump(repomix_config, f, indent=2)
16100: 11625:  7126: 2627:  282: 
16101: 11626:  7127: 2628:  283:     result = subprocess.run(
16102: 11627:  7128: 2629:  284:         ["repomix", "--config", str(config_path), "--output", output_path, source_dir],
16103: 11628:  7129: 2630:  285:         capture_output=True, text=True
16104: 11629:  7130: 2631:  286:     )
16105: 11630:  7131: 2632:  287: 
16106: 11631:  7132: 2633:  288:     # Cleanup config
16107: 11632:  7133: 2634:  289:     config_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
16108: 11633:  7134: 2635:  290: 
16109: 11634:  7135: 2636:  291:     if result.returncode != 0:
16110: 11635:  7136: 2637:  292:         raise RuntimeError(f"repomix failed: {result.stderr}")
16111: 11636:  7137: 2638:  293: 
16112: 11637:  7138: 2639:  294:     print(f"[Agent 1] ✅ repomix output: {output_path}")
16113: 11638:  7139: 2640:  295: 
16114: 11639:  7140: 2641:  296: 
16115: 11640:  7141: 2642:  297: def run(source: str, output_dir: str = "./output") -> IngestionResult:
16116: 11641:  7142: 2643:  298:     """
16117: 11642:  7143: 2644:  299:     Main entry point for Agent 1.
16118: 11643:  7144: 2645:  300:     
16119: 11644:  7145: 2646:  301:     Args:
16120: 11645:  7146: 2647:  302:         source: Local directory path OR Git URL
16121: 11646:  7147: 2648:  303:         output_dir: Where to save the flat bundle
16122: 11647:  7148: 2649:  304:     
16123: 11648:  7149: 2650:  305:     Returns:
16124: 11649:  7150: 2651:  306:         IngestionResult with flat_file_path pointing to repomix output
16125: 11650:  7151: 2652:  307:     """
16126: 11651:  7152: 2653:  308:     os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
16127: 11652:  7153: 2654:  309:     output_path = str(Path(output_dir) / "flat_codebase.txt")
16128: 11653:  7154: 2655:  310:     temp_dir = None
16129: 11654:  7155: 2656:  311: 
16130: 11655:  7156: 2657:  312:     try:
16131: 11656:  7157: 2658:  313:         # Determine source type
16132: 11657:  7158: 2659:  314:         if source.startswith("http") or source.startswith("git@"):
16133: 11658:  7159: 2660:  315:             source_type = "git"
16134: 11659:  7160: 2661:  316:             temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="agent1_repo_")
16135: 11660:  7161: 2662:  317:             working_dir = clone_repo(source, temp_dir)
16136: 11661:  7162: 2663:  318:         else:
16137: 11662:  7163: 2664:  319:             source_type = "local"
16138: 11663:  7164: 2665:  320:             working_dir = os.path.abspath(source)
16139: 11664:  7165: 2666:  321:             if not os.path.isdir(working_dir):
16140: 11665:  7166: 2667:  322:                 raise ValueError(f"Directory not found: {working_dir}")
16141: 11666:  7167: 2668:  323: 
16142: 11667:  7168: 2669:  324:         # Detect framework
16143: 11668:  7169: 2670:  325:         framework, language = detect_framework(working_dir)
16144: 11669:  7170: 2671:  326:         print(f"[Agent 1] Detected: {framework} / {language}")
16145: 11670:  7171: 2672:  327: 
16146: 11671:  7172: 2673:  328:         # Run repomix
16147: 11672:  7173: 2674:  329:         run_repomix(working_dir, output_path)
16148: 11673:  7174: 2675:  330: 
16149: 11674:  7175: 2676:  331:         file_size = Path(output_path).stat().st_size
16150: 11675:  7176: 2677:  332: 
16151: 11676:  7177: 2678:  333:         return IngestionResult(
16152: 11677:  7178: 2679:  334:             success=True,
16153: 11678:  7179: 2680:  335:             flat_file_path=output_path,
16154: 11679:  7180: 2681:  336:             source_type=source_type,
16155: 11680:  7181: 2682:  337:             source_path=source,
16156: 11681:  7182: 2683:  338:             file_size_bytes=file_size,
16157: 11682:  7183: 2684:  339:             detected_language=language,
16158: 11683:  7184: 2685:  340:             detected_framework=framework,
16159: 11684:  7185: 2686:  341:         )
16160: 11685:  7186: 2687:  342: 
16161: 11686:  7187: 2688:  343:     except Exception as e:
16162: 11687:  7188: 2689:  344:         return IngestionResult(
16163: 11688:  7189: 2690:  345:             success=False,
16164: 11689:  7190: 2691:  346:             flat_file_path="",
16165: 11690:  7191: 2692:  347:             source_type="unknown",
16166: 11691:  7192: 2693:  348:             source_path=source,
16167: 11692:  7193: 2694:  349:             file_size_bytes=0,
16168: 11693:  7194: 2695:  350:             detected_language="Unknown",
16169: 11694:  7195: 2696:  351:             detected_framework="unknown",
16170: 11695:  7196: 2697:  352:             error=str(e),
16171: 11696:  7197: 2698:  353:         )
16172: 11697:  7198: 2699:  354:     finally:
16173: 11698:  7199: 2700:  355:         if temp_dir and os.path.exists(temp_dir):
16174: 11699:  7200: 2701:  356:             shutil.rmtree(temp_dir, ignore_errors=True)
16175: 11700:  7201: 2702:  357: 
16176: 11701:  7202: 2703:  358: 
16177: 11702:  7203: 2704:  359: if __name__ == "__main__":
16178: 11703:  7204: 2705:  360:     source = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "."
16179: 11704:  7205: 2706:  361:     result = run(source)
16180: 11705:  7206: 2707:  362:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
16181: 11706:  7207: 2708:  363: ```
16182: 11707:  7208: 2709:  364: 
16183: 11708:  7209: 2710:  365: ---
16184: 11709:  7210: 2711:  366: 
16185: 11710:  7211: 2712:  367: ## Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
16186: 11711:  7212: 2713:  368: 
16187: 11712:  7213: 2714:  369: ### Konsep
16188: 11713:  7214: 2715:  370: 
16189: 11714:  7215: 2716:  371: Agent 2 menerima file flat dari Agent 1, lalu mengirimkannya ke **Gemini AI** untuk dianalisis. Gemini akan:
16190: 11715:  7216: 2717:  372: 
16191: 11716:  7217: 2718:  373: - Mendeteksi semua **route/endpoint** (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH)
16192: 11717:  7218: 2719:  374: - Mengidentifikasi **field yang wajib diisi** untuk setiap endpoint
16193: 11718:  7219: 2720:  375: - Mendeteksi kebutuhan **CSRF token** secara otomatis per framework
16194: 11719:  7220: 2721:  376: - Mengidentifikasi endpoint yang membutuhkan **autentikasi**
16195: 11720:  7221: 2722:  377: - Menghasilkan **unit test skeleton** untuk transaksi POST/PUT/DELETE
16196: 11721:  7222: 2723:  378: 
16197: 11722:  7223: 2724:  379: ### File: `agent2_gemini_identifier.py`
16198: 11723:  7224: 2725:  380: 
16199: 11724:  7225: 2726:  381: ```python
16200: 11725:  7226: 2727:  382: #!/usr/bin/env python3
16201: 11726:  7227: 2728:  383: """
16202: 11727:  7228: 2729:  384: Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier Agent
16203: 11728:  7229: 2730:  385: Sends repomix bundle to Gemini AI for transaction analysis.
16204: 11729:  7230: 2731:  386: """
16205: 11730:  7231: 2732:  387: 
16206: 11731:  7232: 2733:  388: import os

16212: 11737:  7238: 2739:  394: from typing import Optional
16213: 11738:  7239: 2740:  395: from dotenv import load_dotenv

16215: 11740:  7241: 2742:  397: load_dotenv()
16216: 11741:  7242: 2743:  398:

16218: 11743:  7244: 2745:  400: GEMINI_ENDPOINT = (
16219: 11744:  7245: 2746:  401:     f"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/"
16220: 11745:  7246: 2747:  402:     f"gemini-1.5-pro:generateContent?key={GEMINI_API_KEY}"
16221: 11746:  7247: 2748:  403: )
16222: 11747:  7248: 2749:  404: 
16223: 11748:  7249: 2750:  405: # Max chars to send to Gemini (stay under token limit)
16224: 11749:  7250: 2751:  406: MAX_CONTENT_CHARS = 800_000
16225: 11750:  7251: 2752:  407: 
16226: 11751:  7252: 2753:  408: 
16227: 11752:  7253: 2754:  409: @dataclass
16228: 11753:  7254: 2755:  410: class TransactionField:
16229: 11754:  7255: 2756:  411:     name: str
16230: 11755:  7256: 2757:  412:     type: str            # "string" | "email" | "password" | "integer" | "boolean" | "file"
16231: 11756:  7257: 2758:  413:     required: bool
16232: 11757:  7258: 2759:  414:     description: str
16233: 11758:  7259: 2760:  415:     validation_rules: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
16234: 11759:  7260: 2761:  416:

16238: 11763:  7264: 2765:  420:     id: str
16239: 11764:  7265: 2766:  421:     method: str          # GET | POST | PUT | PATCH | DELETE
16240: 11765:  7266: 2767:  422:     endpoint: str
16241: 11766:  7267: 2768:  423:     description: str
16242: 11767:  7268: 2769:  424:     requires_auth: bool
16243: 11768:  7269: 2770:  425:     requires_csrf: bool
16244: 11769:  7270: 2771:  426:     csrf_field_name: str  # e.g. "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "X-CSRF-Token"
16245: 11770:  7271: 2772:  427:     fields: list[TransactionField]
16246: 11771:  7272: 2773:  428:     framework: str
16247: 11772:  7273: 2774:  429:     unit_test_skeleton: str = ""
16248: 11773:  7274: 2775:  430:     tags: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
16249: 11774:  7275: 2776:  431: 
16250: 11775:  7276: 2777:  432: 
16251: 11776:  7277: 2778:  433: @dataclass
16252: 11777:  7278: 2779:  434: class IdentificationResult:
16253: 11778:  7279: 2780:  435:     success: bool
16254: 11779:  7280: 2781:  436:     framework: str
16255: 11780:  7281: 2782:  437:     language: str
16256: 11781:  7282: 2783:  438:     transactions: list[Transaction]
16257: 11782:  7283: 2784:  439:     total_routes: int
16258: 11783:  7284: 2785:  440:     post_routes: int
16259: 11784:  7285: 2786:  441:     csrf_protected_routes: int
16260: 11785:  7286: 2787:  442:     auth_required_routes: int
16261: 11786:  7287: 2788:  443:     error: Optional[str] = None
16262: 11787:  7288: 2789:  444: 
16263: 11788:  7289: 2790:  445: 
16264: 11789:  7290: 2791:  446: SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
16265: 11790:  7291: 2792:  447: You are an expert code analyzer. You will receive a flat bundle of a web application codebase.
16266: 11791:  7292: 2793:  448: 
16267: 11792:  7293: 2794:  449: Your task is to analyze ALL routes/endpoints and return a STRICT JSON response.
16268: 11793:  7294: 2795:  450: 
16269: 11794:  7295: 2796:  451: ## What to extract per endpoint:
16270: 11795:  7296: 2797:  452: 1. HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)
16271: 11796:  7297: 2798:  453: 2. URL path / route
16272: 11797:  7298: 2799:  454: 3. Description of what the endpoint does
16273: 11798:  7299: 2800:  455: 4. Whether it requires authentication (JWT, session, Bearer token, etc.)
16274: 11799:  7300: 2801:  456: 5. Whether it requires CSRF protection — detect automatically by framework:
16275: 11800:  7301: 2802:  457:    - Laravel: look for @csrf, csrf_field(), VerifyCsrfToken middleware, X-CSRF-TOKEN header
16276: 11801:  7302: 2803:  458:    - Django: look for {% csrf_token %}, CsrfViewMiddleware, csrf_protect decorator
16277: 11802:  7303: 2804:  459:    - Express.js: look for csurf, csrf(), csrfToken()
16278: 11803:  7304: 2805:  460:    - Rails: look for authenticity_token, protect_from_forgery
16279: 11804:  7305: 2806:  461:    - Spring Boot: look for CsrfToken, .csrf(), SecurityConfig
16280: 11805:  7306: 2807:  462:    - FastAPI: look for custom CSRF implementations or fastapi-csrf-protect
16281: 11806:  7307: 2808:  463:    - NestJS: look for @nestjs/csrf, CsrfGuard
16282: 11807:  7308: 2809:  464:    - Go (Gin/Echo): look for gorilla/csrf, nosurf
16283: 11808:  7309: 2810:  465:    - ASP.NET: look for [ValidateAntiForgeryToken], AntiForgeryToken()
16284: 11809:  7310: 2811:  466: 6. The exact CSRF field name used (e.g., "_token", "csrfmiddlewaretoken", "authenticity_token")
16285: 11810:  7311: 2812:  467: 7. ALL form fields/request body fields with: name, type, required status, and any validation rules
16286: 11811:  7312: 2813:  468: 8. For POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE: generate a unit test skeleton in the framework's native test style
16287: 11812:  7313: 2814:  469: 
16288: 11813:  7314: 2815:  470: ## Response format — return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation:
16289: 11814:  7315: 2816:  471: 
16290: 11815:  7316: 2817:  472: {
16291: 11816:  7317: 2818:  473:   "framework": "laravel",
16292: 11817:  7318: 2819:  474:   "language": "PHP",
16293: 11818:  7319: 2820:  475:   "transactions": [
16294: 11819:  7320: 2821:  476:     {
16295: 11820:  7321: 2822:  477:       "id": "txn_001",
16296: 11821:  7322: 2823:  478:       "method": "POST",
16297: 11822:  7323: 2824:  479:       "endpoint": "/api/login",
16298: 11823:  7324: 2825:  480:       "description": "User authentication endpoint",
16299: 11824:  7325: 2826:  481:       "requires_auth": false,
16300: 11825:  7326: 2827:  482:       "requires_csrf": true,
16301: 11826:  7327: 2828:  483:       "csrf_field_name": "_token",
16302: 11827:  7328: 2829:  484:       "fields": [
16303: 11828:  7329: 2830:  485:         {
16304: 11829:  7330: 2831:  486:           "name": "email",
16305: 11830:  7331: 2832:  487:           "type": "email",
16306: 11831:  7332: 2833:  488:           "required": true,
16307: 11832:  7333: 2834:  489:           "description": "User email address",
16308: 11833:  7334: 2835:  490:           "validation_rules": ["required", "email", "max:255"]
16309: 11834:  7335: 2836:  491:         },
16310: 11835:  7336: 2837:  492:         {
16311: 11836:  7337: 2838:  493:           "name": "password",
16312: 11837:  7338: 2839:  494:           "type": "password",
16313: 11838:  7339: 2840:  495:           "required": true,
16314: 11839:  7340: 2841:  496:           "description": "User password",
16315: 11840:  7341: 2842:  497:           "validation_rules": ["required", "min:8"]
16316: 11841:  7342: 2843:  498:         }
16317: 11842:  7343: 2844:  499:       ],
16318: 11843:  7344: 2845:  500:       "unit_test_skeleton": "/** @test */\\npublic function test_user_can_login()\\n{\\n    $response = $this->post('/api/login', [\\n        'email' => 'test@example.com',\\n        'password' => 'password123',\\n    ]);\\n    $response->assertStatus(200);\\n}",
16319: 11844:  7345: 2846:  501:       "tags": ["auth", "csrf"]
16320: 11845:  7346: 2847:  502:     }
16321: 11846:  7347: 2848:  503:   ]
16322: 11847:  7348: 2849:  504: }
16323: 11848:  7349: 2850:  505: """
16324: 11849:  7350: 2851:  506: 
16325: 11850:  7351: 2852:  507: 
16326: 11851:  7352: 2853:  508: def chunk_content(content: str, max_chars: int) -> str:
16327: 11852:  7353: 2854:  509:     """Truncate content if too large, prioritizing route/controller files."""
16328: 11853:  7354: 2855:  510:     if len(content) <= max_chars:
16329: 11854:  7355: 2856:  511:         return content
16330: 11855:  7356: 2857:  512: 
16331: 11856:  7357: 2858:  513:     # Try to keep the most important parts
16332: 11857:  7358: 2859:  514:     lines = content.split("\n")
16333: 11858:  7359: 2860:  515:     priority_keywords = [
16334: 11859:  7360: 2861:  516:         "route", "controller", "middleware", "csrf", "request",
16335: 11860:  7361: 2862:  517:         "form", "validate", "auth", "login", "register", "api",
16336: 11861:  7362: 2863:  518:         "POST", "GET", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"
16337: 11862:  7363: 2864:  519:     ]
16338: 11863:  7364: 2865:  520: 
16339: 11864:  7365: 2866:  521:     priority_lines = []
16340: 11865:  7366: 2867:  522:     other_lines = []
16341: 11866:  7367: 2868:  523: 
16342: 11867:  7368: 2869:  524:     for line in lines:
16343: 11868:  7369: 2870:  525:         if any(kw.lower() in line.lower() for kw in priority_keywords):
16344: 11869:  7370: 2871:  526:             priority_lines.append(line)
16345: 11870:  7371: 2872:  527:         else:
16346: 11871:  7372: 2873:  528:             other_lines.append(line)
16347: 11872:  7373: 2874:  529: 
16348: 11873:  7374: 2875:  530:     result = "\n".join(priority_lines)
16349: 11874:  7375: 2876:  531:     if len(result) < max_chars:
16350: 11875:  7376: 2877:  532:         remaining = max_chars - len(result)
16351: 11876:  7377: 2878:  533:         result += "\n" + "\n".join(other_lines)[:remaining]
16352: 11877:  7378: 2879:  534: 
16353: 11878:  7379: 2880:  535:     return result[:max_chars]
16354: 11879:  7380: 2881:  536: 
16355: 11880:  7381: 2882:  537: 
16356: 11881:  7382: 2883:  538: def call_gemini(content: str) -> dict:
16357: 11882:  7383: 2884:  539:     """Call Gemini API with the codebase content."""
16358: 11883:  7384: 2885:  540:     print("[Agent 2] Sending codebase to Gemini AI...")
16359: 11884:  7385: 2886:  541: 
16360: 11885:  7386: 2887:  542:     payload = {
16361: 11886:  7387: 2888:  543:         "system_instruction": {
16362: 11887:  7388: 2889:  544:             "parts": [{"text": SYSTEM_PROMPT}]
16363: 11888:  7389: 2890:  545:         },
16364: 11889:  7390: 2891:  546:         "contents": [{
16365: 11890:  7391: 2892:  547:             "parts": [{
16366: 11891:  7392: 2893:  548:                 "text": f"Analyze this codebase and return the JSON:\n\n{content}"
16367: 11892:  7393: 2894:  549:             }]
16368: 11893:  7394: 2895:  550:         }],
16369: 11894:  7395: 2896:  551:         "generationConfig": {
16370: 11895:  7396: 2897:  552:             "temperature": 0.1,
16371: 11896:  7397: 2898:  553:             "maxOutputTokens": 8192,
16372: 11897:  7398: 2899:  554:             "responseMimeType": "application/json"
16373: 11898:  7399: 2900:  555:         }
16374: 11899:  7400: 2901:  556:     }
16375: 11900:  7401: 2902:  557: 
16376: 11901:  7402: 2903:  558:     for attempt in range(3):
16377: 11902:  7403: 2904:  559:         try:
16378: 11903:  7404: 2905:  560:             response = requests.post(
16379: 11904:  7405: 2906:  561:                 GEMINI_ENDPOINT,
16380: 11905:  7406: 2907:  562:                 json=payload,
16381: 11906:  7407: 2908:  563:                 headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
16382: 11907:  7408: 2909:  564:                 timeout=120
16383: 11908:  7409: 2910:  565:             )
16384: 11909:  7410: 2911:  566:             response.raise_for_status()
16385: 11910:  7411: 2912:  567:             data = response.json()
16386: 11911:  7412: 2913:  568: 
16387: 11912:  7413: 2914:  569:             raw_text = data["candidates"][0]["content"]["parts"][0]["text"]
16388: 11913:  7414: 2915:  570:             # Strip possible markdown fences
16389: 11914:  7415: 2916:  571:             raw_text = raw_text.strip()
16390: 11915:  7416: 2917:  572:             if raw_text.startswith("```"):
16391: 11916:  7417: 2918:  573:                 raw_text = "\n".join(raw_text.split("\n")[1:-1])
16392: 11917:  7418: 2919:  574: 
16393: 11918:  7419: 2920:  575:             return json.loads(raw_text)
16394: 11919:  7420: 2921:  576: 
16395: 11920:  7421: 2922:  577:         except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
16396: 11921:  7422: 2923:  578:             print(f"[Agent 2] Timeout on attempt {attempt + 1}, retrying...")
16397: 11922:  7423: 2924:  579:             time.sleep(5 * (attempt + 1))
16398: 11923:  7424: 2925:  580:         except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
16399: 11924:  7425: 2926:  581:             raise ValueError(f"Gemini returned invalid JSON: {e}")
16400: 11925:  7426: 2927:  582: 
16401: 11926:  7427: 2928:  583:     raise RuntimeError("Gemini API failed after 3 attempts")
16402: 11927:  7428: 2929:  584: 
16403: 11928:  7429: 2930:  585: 
16404: 11929:  7430: 2931:  586: def parse_result(raw: dict, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
16405: 11930:  7431: 2932:  587:     """Parse Gemini response into typed IdentificationResult."""
16406: 11931:  7432: 2933:  588:     transactions = []
16407: 11932:  7433: 2934:  589: 
16408: 11933:  7434: 2935:  590:     for t in raw.get("transactions", []):
16409: 11934:  7435: 2936:  591:         fields = [
16410: 11935:  7436: 2937:  592:             TransactionField(
16411: 11936:  7437: 2938:  593:                 name=f["name"],
16412: 11937:  7438: 2939:  594:                 type=f.get("type", "string"),
16413: 11938:  7439: 2940:  595:                 required=f.get("required", False),
16414: 11939:  7440: 2941:  596:                 description=f.get("description", ""),
16415: 11940:  7441: 2942:  597:                 validation_rules=f.get("validation_rules", []),
16416: 11941:  7442: 2943:  598:             )
16417: 11942:  7443: 2944:  599:             for f in t.get("fields", [])
16418: 11943:  7444: 2945:  600:         ]
16419: 11944:  7445: 2946:  601: 
16420: 11945:  7446: 2947:  602:         transactions.append(Transaction(
16421: 11946:  7447: 2948:  603:             id=t.get("id", f"txn_{len(transactions):03d}"),
16422: 11947:  7448: 2949:  604:             method=t["method"].upper(),
16423: 11948:  7449: 2950:  605:             endpoint=t["endpoint"],
16424: 11949:  7450: 2951:  606:             description=t.get("description", ""),
16425: 11950:  7451: 2952:  607:             requires_auth=t.get("requires_auth", False),
16426: 11951:  7452: 2953:  608:             requires_csrf=t.get("requires_csrf", False),
16427: 11952:  7453: 2954:  609:             csrf_field_name=t.get("csrf_field_name", ""),
16428: 11953:  7454: 2955:  610:             fields=fields,
16429: 11954:  7455: 2956:  611:             framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
16430: 11955:  7456: 2957:  612:             unit_test_skeleton=t.get("unit_test_skeleton", ""),
16431: 11956:  7457: 2958:  613:             tags=t.get("tags", []),
16432: 11957:  7458: 2959:  614:         ))
16433: 11958:  7459: 2960:  615: 
16434: 11959:  7460: 2961:  616:     mutating_methods = {"POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"}
16435: 11960:  7461: 2962:  617:     return IdentificationResult(
16436: 11961:  7462: 2963:  618:         success=True,
16437: 11962:  7463: 2964:  619:         framework=raw.get("framework", framework_hint),
16438: 11963:  7464: 2965:  620:         language=raw.get("language", "Unknown"),
16439: 11964:  7465: 2966:  621:         transactions=transactions,
16440: 11965:  7466: 2967:  622:         total_routes=len(transactions),
16441: 11966:  7467: 2968:  623:         post_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.method in mutating_methods),
16442: 11967:  7468: 2969:  624:         csrf_protected_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_csrf),
16443: 11968:  7469: 2970:  625:         auth_required_routes=sum(1 for t in transactions if t.requires_auth),
16444: 11969:  7470: 2971:  626:     )
16445: 11970:  7471: 2972:  627: 
16446: 11971:  7472: 2973:  628: 
16447: 11972:  7473: 2974:  629: def run(flat_file_path: str, framework_hint: str = "") -> IdentificationResult:
16448: 11973:  7474: 2975:  630:     """
16449: 11974:  7475: 2976:  631:     Main entry point for Agent 2.
16450: 11975:  7476: 2977:  632:     
16451: 11976:  7477: 2978:  633:     Args:
16452: 11977:  7478: 2979:  634:         flat_file_path: Path to repomix output file
16453: 11978:  7479: 2980:  635:         framework_hint: Optional hint from Agent 1
16454: 11979:  7480: 2981:  636:     
16455: 11980:  7481: 2982:  637:     Returns:
16456: 11981:  7482: 2983:  638:         IdentificationResult with all transactions
16457: 11982:  7483: 2984:  639:     """
16458: 11983:  7484: 2985:  640:     try:
16459: 11984:  7485: 2986:  641:         content = Path(flat_file_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
16460: 11985:  7486: 2987:  642:         content = chunk_content(content, MAX_CONTENT_CHARS)
16461: 11986:  7487: 2988:  643: 
16462: 11987:  7488: 2989:  644:         raw = call_gemini(content)
16463: 11988:  7489: 2990:  645:         result = parse_result(raw, framework_hint)
16464: 11989:  7490: 2991:  646: 
16465: 11990:  7491: 2992:  647:         print(f"[Agent 2] ✅ Found {result.total_routes} routes")
16466: 11991:  7492: 2993:  648:         print(f"[Agent 2]    POST/mutating: {result.post_routes}")
16467: 11992:  7493: 2994:  649:         print(f"[Agent 2]    CSRF protected: {result.csrf_protected_routes}")
16468: 11993:  7494: 2995:  650:         print(f"[Agent 2]    Auth required: {result.auth_required_routes}")
16469: 11994:  7495: 2996:  651: 
16470: 11995:  7496: 2997:  652:         # Save transactions to file
16471: 11996:  7497: 2998:  653:         output_path = Path(flat_file_path).parent / "transactions.json"
16472: 11997:  7498: 2999:  654:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
16473: 11998:  7499: 3000:  655:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
16474: 11999:  7500: 3001:  656:         print(f"[Agent 2] Saved: {output_path}")
16475: 12000:  7501: 3002:  657: 
16476: 12001:  7502: 3003:  658:         return result
16477: 12002:  7503: 3004:  659: 
16478: 12003:  7504: 3005:  660:     except Exception as e:
16479: 12004:  7505: 3006:  661:         return IdentificationResult(
16480: 12005:  7506: 3007:  662:             success=False,
16481: 12006:  7507: 3008:  663:             framework=framework_hint,
16482: 12007:  7508: 3009:  664:             language="Unknown",
16483: 12008:  7509: 3010:  665:             transactions=[],
16484: 12009:  7510: 3011:  666:             total_routes=0,
16485: 12010:  7511: 3012:  667:             post_routes=0,
16486: 12011:  7512: 3013:  668:             csrf_protected_routes=0,
16487: 12012:  7513: 3014:  669:             auth_required_routes=0,
16488: 12013:  7514: 3015:  670:             error=str(e),
16489: 12014:  7515: 3016:  671:         )
16490: 12015:  7516: 3017:  672: 
16491: 12016:  7517: 3018:  673: 
16492: 12017:  7518: 3019:  674: if __name__ == "__main__":
16493: 12018:  7519: 3020:  675:     import sys
16494: 12019:  7520: 3021:  676:     flat_file = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output/flat_codebase.txt"
16495: 12020:  7521: 3022:  677:     result = run(flat_file)
16496: 12021:  7522: 3023:  678:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
16497: 12022:  7523: 3024:  679: ```
16498: 12023:  7524: 3025:  680: 
16499: 12024:  7525: 3026:  681: ---
16500: 12025:  7526: 3027:  682: 
16501: 12026:  7527: 3028:  683: ## Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent (Live Runner)
16502: 12027:  7528: 3029:  684: 
16503: 12028:  7529: 3030:  685: ### Konsep
16504: 12029:  7530: 3031:  686: 
16505: 12030:  7531: 3032:  687: Agent 3 menerima `transactions.json` dari Agent 2 dan mengeksekusi **HTTP requests nyata** ke aplikasi yang sedang berjalan. Setiap request diukur menggunakan **CodeCarbon** untuk melacak konsumsi energi dan emisi CO₂.
16506: 12031:  7532: 3033:  688: 
16507: 12032:  7533: 3034:  689: Untuk endpoint yang membutuhkan CSRF, agent ini secara otomatis:
16508: 12033:  7534: 3035:  690: 1. Melakukan GET request ke halaman login/form terlebih dahulu
16509: 12034:  7535: 3036:  691: 2. Mengekstrak CSRF token dari response (cookie, header, atau HTML hidden input)
16510: 12035:  7536: 3037:  692: 3. Menyertakan token tersebut di request POST
16511: 12036:  7537: 3038:  693: 
16512: 12037:  7538: 3039:  694: ### File: `agent3_carbon.py`
16513: 12038:  7539: 3040:  695: 
16514: 12039:  7540: 3041:  696: ```python
16515: 12040:  7541: 3042:  697: #!/usr/bin/env python3
16516: 12041:  7542: 3043:  698: """
16517: 12042:  7543: 3044:  699: Agent 3 — Code Carbon Agent
16518: 12043:  7544: 3045:  700: Runs live HTTP requests to the target app and measures CO2 emissions.
16519: 12044:  7545: 3046:  701: """
16520: 12045:  7546: 3047:  702: 
16521: 12046:  7547: 3048:  703: import os
16522: 12047:  7548: 3049:  704: import json
16523: 12048:  7549: 3050:  705: import time
16524: 12049:  7550: 3051:  706: import re
16525: 12050:  7551: 3052:  707: import requests
16526: 12051:  7552: 3053:  708: from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
16527: 12052:  7553: 3054:  709: from codecarbon import EmissionsTracker
16528: 12053:  7554: 3055:  710: from pathlib import Path
16529: 12054:  7555: 3056:  711: from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
16530: 12055:  7556: 3057:  712: from typing import Optional, Any
16531: 12056:  7557: 3058:  713: from dotenv import load_dotenv
16532: 12057:  7558: 3059:  714: 
16533: 12058:  7559: 3060:  715: load_dotenv()
16534: 12059:  7560: 3061:  716: 
16535: 12060:  7561: 3062:  717: BASE_URL = os.getenv("TARGET_BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
16536: 12061:  7562: 3063:  718: REQUEST_TIMEOUT = int(os.getenv("REQUEST_TIMEOUT", "30"))
16537: 12062:  7563: 3064:  719: DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS = float(os.getenv("DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS", "0.5"))
16538: 12063:  7564: 3065:  720: 
16539: 12064:  7565: 3066:  721: 
16540: 12065:  7566: 3067:  722: @dataclass
16541: 12066:  7567: 3068:  723: class RequestMeasurement:
16542: 12067:  7568: 3069:  724:     transaction_id: str
16543: 12068:  7569: 3070:  725:     method: str
16544: 12069:  7570: 3071:  726:     endpoint: str
16545: 12070:  7571: 3072:  727:     full_url: str
16546: 12071:  7572: 3073:  728:     status_code: int
16547: 12072:  7573: 3074:  729:     response_time_ms: float
16548: 12073:  7574: 3075:  730:     energy_consumed_kwh: float
16549: 12074:  7575: 3076:  731:     co2_emissions_kg: float
16550: 12075:  7576: 3077:  732:     success: bool
16551: 12076:  7577: 3078:  733:     csrf_obtained: bool
16552: 12077:  7578: 3079:  734:     fields_sent: list[str]
16553: 12078:  7579: 3080:  735:     error: Optional[str] = None
16554: 12079:  7580: 3081:  736:     response_preview: str = ""
16555: 12080:  7581: 3082:  737: 
16556: 12081:  7582: 3083:  738: 
16557: 12082:  7583: 3084:  739: @dataclass
16558: 12083:  7584: 3085:  740: class CarbonResult:
16559: 12084:  7585: 3086:  741:     success: bool
16560: 12085:  7586: 3087:  742:     base_url: str
16561: 12086:  7587: 3088:  743:     total_requests: int
16562: 12087:  7588: 3089:  744:     successful_requests: int
16563: 12088:  7589: 3090:  745:     failed_requests: int
16564: 12089:  7590: 3091:  746:     total_energy_kwh: float
16565: 12090:  7591: 3092:  747:     total_co2_kg: float
16566: 12091:  7592: 3093:  748:     avg_response_time_ms: float
16567: 12092:  7593: 3094:  749:     measurements: list[RequestMeasurement]
16568: 12093:  7594: 3095:  750:     error: Optional[str] = None
16569: 12094:  7595: 3096:  751: 
16570: 12095:  7596: 3097:  752: 
16571: 12096:  7597: 3098:  753: # ─── CSRF Token Extractors ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
16572: 12097:  7598: 3099:  754: 
16573: 12098:  7599: 3100:  755: def extract_csrf_from_html(html: str, field_name: str) -> Optional[str]:
16574: 12099:  7600: 3101:  756:     """Extract CSRF token from HTML hidden input."""
16575: 12100:  7601: 3102:  757:     soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "html.parser")
16576: 12101:  7602: 3103:  758: 
16577: 12102:  7603: 3104:  759:     # Try direct name match
16578: 12103:  7604: 3105:  760:     token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": field_name})
16579: 12104:  7605: 3106:  761:     if token_input:
16580: 12105:  7606: 3107:  762:         return token_input.get("value")
16581: 12106:  7607: 3108:  763: 
16582: 12107:  7608: 3109:  764:     # Try meta tag (common in SPAs)
16583: 12108:  7609: 3110:  765:     meta = soup.find("meta", {"name": field_name})
16584: 12109:  7610: 3111:  766:     if meta:
16585: 12110:  7611: 3112:  767:         return meta.get("content")
16586: 12111:  7612: 3113:  768: 
16587: 12112:  7613: 3114:  769:     # Generic CSRF patterns
16588: 12113:  7614: 3115:  770:     for pattern in ["csrf", "token", "_token", "xsrf"]:
16589: 12114:  7615: 3116:  771:         token_input = soup.find("input", {"name": re.compile(pattern, re.I)})
16590: 12115:  7616: 3117:  772:         if token_input:
16591: 12116:  7617: 3118:  773:             return token_input.get("value")
16592: 12117:  7618: 3119:  774: 
16593: 12118:  7619: 3120:  775:     return None
16594: 12119:  7620: 3121:  776: 
16595: 12120:  7621: 3122:  777: 
16596: 12121:  7622: 3123:  778: def get_csrf_token(
16597: 12122:  7623: 3124:  779:     session: requests.Session,
16598: 12123:  7624: 3125:  780:     transaction_endpoint: str,
16599: 12124:  7625: 3126:  781:     csrf_field_name: str,
16600: 12125:  7626: 3127:  782:     framework: str
16601: 12126:  7627: 3128:  783: ) -> tuple[Optional[str], bool]:
16602: 12127:  7628: 3129:  784:     """
16603: 12128:  7629: 3130:  785:     Attempt to retrieve CSRF token before a mutating request.
16604: 12129:  7630: 3131:  786:     Returns (token_value, success).
16605: 12130:  7631: 3132:  787:     """
16606: 12131:  7632: 3133:  788:     # Guess the form/GET page that provides the CSRF token
16607: 12132:  7633: 3134:  789:     # Strip /api/ prefix for web form pages
16608: 12133:  7634: 3135:  790:     form_endpoint = transaction_endpoint.replace("/api/", "/")
16609: 12134:  7635: 3136:  791:     candidates = [
16610: 12135:  7636: 3137:  792:         f"{BASE_URL}{form_endpoint}",
16611: 12136:  7637: 3138:  793:         f"{BASE_URL}/",
16612: 12137:  7638: 3139:  794:         f"{BASE_URL}/login",
16613: 12138:  7639: 3140:  795:         f"{BASE_URL}/home",
16614: 12139:  7640: 3141:  796:     ]
16615: 12140:  7641: 3142:  797: 
16616: 12141:  7642: 3143:  798:     for url in candidates:
16617: 12142:  7643: 3144:  799:         try:
16618: 12143:  7644: 3145:  800:             r = session.get(url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
16619: 12144:  7645: 3146:  801:             if r.status_code == 200:
16620: 12145:  7646: 3147:  802:                 # 1. Check HTML for hidden input
16621: 12146:  7647: 3148:  803:                 token = extract_csrf_from_html(r.text, csrf_field_name)
16622: 12147:  7648: 3149:  804:                 if token:
16623: 12148:  7649: 3150:  805:                     return token, True
16624: 12149:  7650: 3151:  806: 
16625: 12150:  7651: 3152:  807:                 # 2. Check cookies (XSRF-TOKEN style, e.g., Laravel Sanctum)
16626: 12151:  7652: 3153:  808:                 for cookie_name in ["XSRF-TOKEN", "csrftoken", "csrf_token"]:
16627: 12152:  7653: 3154:  809:                     if cookie_name in session.cookies:
16628: 12153:  7654: 3155:  810:                         import urllib.parse
16629: 12154:  7655: 3156:  811:                         return urllib.parse.unquote(session.cookies[cookie_name]), True
16630: 12155:  7656: 3157:  812: 
16631: 12156:  7657: 3158:  813:                 # 3. Check response headers
16632: 12157:  7658: 3159:  814:                 for header_name in ["X-CSRF-Token", "X-XSRF-Token", "CSRF-Token"]:
16633: 12158:  7659: 3160:  815:                     if header_name in r.headers:
16634: 12159:  7660: 3161:  816:                         return r.headers[header_name], True
16635: 12160:  7661: 3162:  817: 
16636: 12161:  7662: 3163:  818:         except Exception:
16637: 12162:  7663: 3164:  819:             continue
16638: 12163:  7664: 3165:  820: 
16639: 12164:  7665: 3166:  821:     return None, False
16640: 12165:  7666: 3167:  822: 
16641: 12166:  7667: 3168:  823: 
16642: 12167:  7668: 3169:  824: # ─── Dummy Data Generator ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
16643: 12168:  7669: 3170:  825: 
16644: 12169:  7670: 3171:  826: DUMMY_VALUES: dict[str, Any] = {
16645: 12170:  7671: 3172:  827:     "email":    "test@example.com",
16646: 12171:  7672: 3173:  828:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
16647: 12172:  7673: 3174:  829:     "name":     "Test User",
16648: 12173:  7674: 3175:  830:     "username": "testuser",
16649: 12174:  7675: 3176:  831:     "phone":    "+1234567890",
16650: 12175:  7676: 3177:  832:     "address":  "123 Test Street",
16651: 12176:  7677: 3178:  833:     "title":    "Test Title",
16652: 12177:  7678: 3179:  834:     "body":     "Test body content for automated testing",
16653: 12178:  7679: 3180:  835:     "content":  "Test content",
16654: 12179:  7680: 3181:  836:     "message":  "Test message",
16655: 12180:  7681: 3182:  837:     "amount":   "100.00",
16656: 12181:  7682: 3183:  838:     "price":    "99.99",
16657: 12182:  7683: 3184:  839:     "quantity": "1",
16658: 12183:  7684: 3185:  840:     "date":     "2024-01-01",
16659: 12184:  7685: 3186:  841:     "token":    "dummy_token_for_testing",
16660: 12185:  7686: 3187:  842:     "code":     "TEST123",
16661: 12186:  7687: 3188:  843:     "url":      "https://example.com",
16662: 12187:  7688: 3189:  844:     "file":     None,  # Skip file uploads
16663: 12188:  7689: 3190:  845: }
16664: 12189:  7690: 3191:  846: 
16665: 12190:  7691: 3192:  847: TYPE_DEFAULTS: dict[str, Any] = {
16666: 12191:  7692: 3193:  848:     "email":    "test@example.com",
16667: 12192:  7693: 3194:  849:     "password": "TestPassword123!",
16668: 12193:  7694: 3195:  850:     "string":   "test_value",
16669: 12194:  7695: 3196:  851:     "integer":  "1",
16670: 12195:  7696: 3197:  852:     "number":   "1",
16671: 12196:  7697: 3198:  853:     "boolean":  "true",
16672: 12197:  7698: 3199:  854:     "text":     "Test text content",
16673: 12198:  7699: 3200:  855:     "file":     None,
16674: 12199:  7700: 3201:  856: }
16675: 12200:  7701: 3202:  857: 
16676: 12201:  7702: 3203:  858: 
16677: 12202:  7703: 3204:  859: def generate_dummy_payload(fields: list[dict]) -> dict:
16678: 12203:  7704: 3205:  860:     """Generate dummy payload from field definitions."""
16679: 12204:  7705: 3206:  861:     payload = {}
16680: 12205:  7706: 3207:  862:     for f in fields:
16681: 12206:  7707: 3208:  863:         name = f["name"].lower()
16682: 12207:  7708: 3209:  864:         ftype = f.get("type", "string").lower()
16683: 12208:  7709: 3210:  865: 
16684: 12209:  7710: 3211:  866:         if ftype == "file":
16685: 12210:  7711: 3212:  867:             continue  # Skip file fields in automated testing
16686: 12211:  7712: 3213:  868: 
16687: 12212:  7713: 3214:  869:         # Try name match first
16688: 12213:  7714: 3215:  870:         value = DUMMY_VALUES.get(name)
16689: 12214:  7715: 3216:  871:         if value is None:
16690: 12215:  7716: 3217:  872:             # Try partial match
16691: 12216:  7717: 3218:  873:             for key, val in DUMMY_VALUES.items():
16692: 12217:  7718: 3219:  874:                 if key in name:
16693: 12218:  7719: 3220:  875:                     value = val
16694: 12219:  7720: 3221:  876:                     break
16695: 12220:  7721: 3222:  877: 
16696: 12221:  7722: 3223:  878:         # Fallback to type default
16697: 12222:  7723: 3224:  879:         if value is None:
16698: 12223:  7724: 3225:  880:             value = TYPE_DEFAULTS.get(ftype, "test_value")
16699: 12224:  7725: 3226:  881: 
16700: 12225:  7726: 3227:  882:         if value is not None:
16701: 12226:  7727: 3228:  883:             payload[f["name"]] = value
16702: 12227:  7728: 3229:  884: 
16703: 12228:  7729: 3230:  885:     return payload
16704: 12229:  7730: 3231:  886: 
16705: 12230:  7731: 3232:  887: 
16706: 12231:  7732: 3233:  888: # ─── Main Runner ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
16707: 12232:  7733: 3234:  889: 
16708: 12233:  7734: 3235:  890: def run_transaction(
16709: 12234:  7735: 3236:  891:     session: requests.Session,
16710: 12235:  7736: 3237:  892:     transaction: dict,
16711: 12236:  7737: 3238:  893:     framework: str,
16712: 12237:  7738: 3239:  894:     tracker: EmissionsTracker
16713: 12238:  7739: 3240:  895: ) -> RequestMeasurement:

16715: 12240:  7741: 3242:  897:     method = transaction["method"].upper()
16716: 12241:  7742: 3243:  898:     endpoint = transaction["endpoint"]
16717: 12242:  7743: 3244:  899:     full_url = f"{BASE_URL}{endpoint}"
16718: 12243:  7744: 3245:  900: 
16719: 12244:  7745: 3246:  901:     csrf_obtained = False
16720: 12245:  7746: 3247:  902:     csrf_token = None

16723: 12248:  7749: 3250:  905:     if transaction.get("requires_csrf") and method in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]:
16724: 12249:  7750: 3251:  906:         csrf_field = transaction.get("csrf_field_name", "_token")
16725: 12250:  7751: 3252:  907:         csrf_token, csrf_obtained = get_csrf_token(session, endpoint, csrf_field, framework)
16726: 12251:  7752: 3253:  908:

16729: 12254:  7755: 3256:  911:             session.headers.update({
16730: 12255:  7756: 3257:  912:                 "X-CSRF-Token": csrf_token,
16731: 12256:  7757: 3258:  913:                 "X-XSRF-Token": csrf_token,

16733: 12258:  7759: 3260:  915:

16736: 12261:  7762: 3263:  918:

16738: 12263:  7764: 3265:  920:     if csrf_token and transaction.get("csrf_field_name"):

16740: 12265:  7766: 3267:  922: 
16741: 12266:  7767: 3268:  923:     # Track energy for this request
16742: 12267:  7768: 3269:  924:     tracker.start_task(transaction["id"])
16743: 12268:  7769: 3270:  925:     start_time = time.time()
16744: 12269:  7770: 3271:  926: 
16745: 12270:  7771: 3272:  927:     try:
16746: 12271:  7772: 3273:  928:         if method == "GET":
16747: 12272:  7773: 3274:  929:             response = session.get(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
16748: 12273:  7774: 3275:  930:         elif method == "POST":
16749: 12274:  7775: 3276:  931:             response = session.post(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
16750: 12275:  7776: 3277:  932:         elif method == "PUT":
16751: 12276:  7777: 3278:  933:             response = session.put(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
16752: 12277:  7778: 3279:  934:         elif method == "PATCH":
16753: 12278:  7779: 3280:  935:             response = session.patch(full_url, data=payload, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
16754: 12279:  7780: 3281:  936:         elif method == "DELETE":
16755: 12280:  7781: 3282:  937:             response = session.delete(full_url, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
16756: 12281:  7782: 3283:  938:         else:
16757: 12282:  7783: 3284:  939:             raise ValueError(f"Unsupported method: {method}")
16758: 12283:  7784: 3285:  940: 
16759: 12284:  7785: 3286:  941:         elapsed_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
16760: 12285:  7786: 3287:  942:         emissions_data = tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])
16761: 12286:  7787: 3288:  943: 
16762: 12287:  7788: 3289:  944:         return RequestMeasurement(
16763: 12288:  7789: 3290:  945:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],
16764: 12289:  7790: 3291:  946:             method=method,
16765: 12290:  7791: 3292:  947:             endpoint=endpoint,

16768: 12293:  7794: 3295:  950:             response_time_ms=round(elapsed_ms, 2),

16770: 12295:  7796: 3297:  952:             co2_emissions_kg=emissions_data.emissions if emissions_data else 0.0,
16771: 12296:  7797: 3298:  953:             success=200 <= response.status_code < 400,
16772: 12297:  7798: 3299:  954:             csrf_obtained=csrf_obtained,
16773: 12298:  7799: 3300:  955:             fields_sent=list(payload.keys()),

16779: 12304:  7805: 3306:  961:         try:
16780: 12305:  7806: 3307:  962:             tracker.stop_task(transaction["id"])

16783: 12308:  7809: 3310:  965: 
16784: 12309:  7810: 3311:  966:         return RequestMeasurement(
16785: 12310:  7811: 3312:  967:             transaction_id=transaction["id"],

16787: 12312:  7813: 3314:  969:             endpoint=endpoint,

16797: 12322:  7823: 3324:  979:         )
16798: 12323:  7824: 3325:  980: 
16799: 12324:  7825: 3326:  981: 
16800: 12325:  7826: 3327:  982: def run(transactions_path: str) -> CarbonResult:
16801: 12326:  7827: 3328:  983:     """
16802: 12327:  7828: 3329:  984:     Main entry point for Agent 3.
16803: 12328:  7829: 3330:  985:     
16804: 12329:  7830: 3331:  986:     Args:
16805: 12330:  7831: 3332:  987:         transactions_path: Path to transactions.json from Agent 2
16806: 12331:  7832: 3333:  988:     
16807: 12332:  7833: 3334:  989:     Returns:
16808: 12333:  7834: 3335:  990:         CarbonResult with per-request energy measurements
16809: 12334:  7835: 3336:  991:     """
16810: 12335:  7836: 3337:  992:     try:
16811: 12336:  7837: 3338:  993:         with open(transactions_path) as f:
16812: 12337:  7838: 3339:  994:             data = json.load(f)
16813: 12338:  7839: 3340:  995: 
16814: 12339:  7840: 3341:  996:         transactions = data.get("transactions", [])
16815: 12340:  7841: 3342:  997:         framework = data.get("framework", "unknown")
16816: 12341:  7842: 3343:  998: 
16817: 12342:  7843: 3344:  999:         print(f"[Agent 3] Running {len(transactions)} transactions against {BASE_URL}")
16818: 12343:  7844: 3345: 1000: 
16819: 12344:  7845: 3346: 1001:         session = requests.Session()
16820: 12345:  7846: 3347: 1002:         session.headers.update({
16821: 12346:  7847: 3348: 1003:             "Accept": "application/json, text/html",
16822: 12347:  7848: 3349: 1004:             "User-Agent": "CodeCarbonAgent/1.0",
16823: 12348:  7849: 3350: 1005:         })
16824: 12349:  7850: 3351: 1006: 
16825: 12350:  7851: 3352: 1007:         # Initialize CodeCarbon tracker
16826: 12351:  7852: 3353: 1008:         tracker = EmissionsTracker(
16827: 12352:  7853: 3354: 1009:             project_name="code_carbon_agent",
16828: 12353:  7854: 3355: 1010:             output_dir=str(Path(transactions_path).parent),
16829: 12354:  7855: 3356: 1011:             log_level="warning",
16830: 12355:  7856: 3357: 1012:             save_to_file=False,
16831: 12356:  7857: 3358: 1013:             tracking_mode="process",
16832: 12357:  7858: 3359: 1014:         )
16833: 12358:  7859: 3360: 1015:         tracker.start()
16834: 12359:  7860: 3361: 1016: 
16835: 12360:  7861: 3362: 1017:         measurements = []
16836: 12361:  7862: 3363: 1018: 
16837: 12362:  7863: 3364: 1019:         for txn in transactions:
16838: 12363:  7864: 3365: 1020:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {txn['method']} {txn['endpoint']}")
16839: 12364:  7865: 3366: 1021:             measurement = run_transaction(session, txn, framework, tracker)
16840: 12365:  7866: 3367: 1022:             measurements.append(measurement)
16841: 12366:  7867: 3368: 1023: 
16842: 12367:  7868: 3369: 1024:             status_icon = "✅" if measurement.success else "❌"
16843: 12368:  7869: 3370: 1025:             print(f"[Agent 3]   {status_icon} {measurement.status_code} "
16844: 12369:  7870: 3371: 1026:                   f"({measurement.response_time_ms:.0f}ms, "
16845: 12370:  7871: 3372: 1027:                   f"{measurement.co2_emissions_kg*1000:.4f}g CO₂)")
16846: 12371:  7872: 3373: 1028: 
16847: 12372:  7873: 3374: 1029:             time.sleep(DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS)
16848: 12373:  7874: 3375: 1030: 
16849: 12374:  7875: 3376: 1031:         tracker.stop()
16850: 12375:  7876: 3377: 1032: 
16851: 12376:  7877: 3378: 1033:         successful = sum(1 for m in measurements if m.success)
16852: 12377:  7878: 3379: 1034:         total_energy = sum(m.energy_consumed_kwh for m in measurements)
16853: 12378:  7879: 3380: 1035:         total_co2 = sum(m.co2_emissions_kg for m in measurements)
16854: 12379:  7880: 3381: 1036:         avg_time = (sum(m.response_time_ms for m in measurements) / len(measurements)
16855: 12380:  7881: 3382: 1037:                     if measurements else 0)
16856: 12381:  7882: 3383: 1038: 
16857: 12382:  7883: 3384: 1039:         result = CarbonResult(
16858: 12383:  7884: 3385: 1040:             success=True,
16859: 12384:  7885: 3386: 1041:             base_url=BASE_URL,
16860: 12385:  7886: 3387: 1042:             total_requests=len(measurements),
16861: 12386:  7887: 3388: 1043:             successful_requests=successful,
16862: 12387:  7888: 3389: 1044:             failed_requests=len(measurements) - successful,
16863: 12388:  7889: 3390: 1045:             total_energy_kwh=round(total_energy, 8),
16864: 12389:  7890: 3391: 1046:             total_co2_kg=round(total_co2, 8),
16865: 12390:  7891: 3392: 1047:             avg_response_time_ms=round(avg_time, 2),
16866: 12391:  7892: 3393: 1048:             measurements=measurements,
16867: 12392:  7893: 3394: 1049:         )
16868: 12393:  7894: 3395: 1050: 
16869: 12394:  7895: 3396: 1051:         # Save carbon report
16870: 12395:  7896: 3397: 1052:         output_path = Path(transactions_path).parent / "carbon_report.json"
16871: 12396:  7897: 3398: 1053:         with open(output_path, "w") as f:
16872: 12397:  7898: 3399: 1054:             json.dump(asdict(result), f, indent=2)
16873: 12398:  7899: 3400: 1055:         print(f"[Agent 3] ✅ Saved: {output_path}")
16874: 12399:  7900: 3401: 1056: 
16875: 12400:  7901: 3402: 1057:         return result
16876: 12401:  7902: 3403: 1058: 
16877: 12402:  7903: 3404: 1059:     except Exception as e:
16878: 12403:  7904: 3405: 1060:         return CarbonResult(
16879: 12404:  7905: 3406: 1061:             success=False,
16880: 12405:  7906: 3407: 1062:             base_url=BASE_URL,

16887: 12412:  7913: 3414: 1069:             measurements=[],

16889: 12414:  7915: 3416: 1071:         )
16890: 12415:  7916: 3417: 1072: 
16891: 12416:  7917: 3418: 1073:

16895: 12420:  7921: 3422: 1077:     result = run(txn_path)
16896: 12421:  7922: 3423: 1078:     print(json.dumps(asdict(result), indent=2))
16897: 12422:  7923: 3424: 1079: ```

17286: 12811:  8312: 3813: 1468:         f"## 🔧 Refactoring Recommendations",
17287: 12812:  8313: 3814: 1469:         f"",
17288: 12813:  8314: 3815: 1470:     ]
17289: 12814:  8315: 3816: 1471: 
17290: 12815:  8316: 3817: 1472:     # Auto recommendations
17291: 12816:  8317: 3818: 1473:     recs = []
17292: 12817:  8318: 3819: 1474: 
17293: 12818:  8319: 3820: 1475:     slow_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if m["response_time_ms"] > 1000]
17294: 12819:  8320: 3821: 1476:     if slow_txns:
17295: 12820:  8321: 3822: 1477:         recs.append(f"**⚠️ Slow endpoints detected** ({len(slow_txns)} endpoint > 1000ms):")
17296: 12821:  8322: 3823: 1478:         for m in slow_txns:
17297: 12822:  8323: 3824: 1479:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` ({m['response_time_ms']:.0f}ms) — consider caching or query optimization")
17298: 12823:  8324: 3825: 1480: 
17299: 12824:  8325: 3826: 1481:     failed_txns = [m for m in carbon.get("measurements", []) if not m["success"]]
17300: 12825:  8326: 3827: 1482:     if failed_txns:
17301: 12826:  8327: 3828: 1483:         recs.append(f"**❌ Failed requests** ({len(failed_txns)} endpoints returned error):")
17302: 12827:  8328: 3829: 1484:         for m in failed_txns:
17303: 12828:  8329: 3830: 1485:             recs.append(f"  - `{m['method']} {m['endpoint']}` → HTTP {m['status_code']}")
17304: 12829:  8330: 3831: 1486: 
17305: 12830:  8331: 3832: 1487:     unprotected_mutating = [
17306: 12831:  8332: 3833: 1488:         t for t in transactions
17307: 12832:  8333: 3834: 1489:         if t["method"] in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"]
17308: 12833:  8334: 3835: 1490:         and not t.get("requires_csrf")
17309: 12834:  8335: 3836: 1491:         and not t.get("requires_auth")
17310: 12835:  8336: 3837: 1492:     ]
17311: 12836:  8337: 3838: 1493:     if unprotected_mutating:
17312: 12837:  8338: 3839: 1494:         recs.append(f"**🔓 Unprotected mutating endpoints** — no CSRF or auth:")
17313: 12838:  8339: 3840: 1495:         for t in unprotected_mutating:
17314: 12839:  8340: 3841: 1496:             recs.append(f"  - `{t['method']} {t['endpoint']}`")
17315: 12840:  8341: 3842: 1497: 
17316: 12841:  8342: 3843: 1498:     if not recs:
17317: 12842:  8343: 3844: 1499:         recs.append("✅ No critical issues detected. Code looks clean!")
17318: 12843:  8344: 3845: 1500: 
17319: 12844:  8345: 3846: 1501:     for rec in recs:
17320: 12845:  8346: 3847: 1502:         lines.append(rec)
17321: 12846:  8347: 3848: 1503:         lines.append("")
17322: 12847:  8348: 3849: 1504: 
17323: 12848:  8349: 3850: 1505:     lines += [
17324: 12849:  8350: 3851: 1506:         f"---",
17325: 12850:  8351: 3852: 1507:         f"",
17326: 12851:  8352: 3853: 1508:         f"## 🧪 Generated Unit Tests",
17327: 12852:  8353: 3854: 1509:         f"",
17328: 12853:  8354: 3855: 1510:         f"Unit test files have been saved to `{output_dir}/tests/`",
17329: 12854:  8355: 3856: 1511:         f"",
17330: 12855:  8356: 3857: 1512:         f"| File | Framework | Test Count |",
17331: 12856:  8357: 3858: 1513:         f"|------|-----------|------------|",
17332: 12857:  8358: 3859: 1514:         f"| `GeneratedTransactionTest.{UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES['express'])['ext']}` | `{framework}` | `{identification.get('post_routes', 0)}` |",
17333: 12858:  8359: 3860: 1515:         f"",
17334: 12859:  8360: 3861: 1516:         f"---",
17335: 12860:  8361: 3862: 1517:         f"",
17336: 12861:  8362: 3863: 1518:         f"_Report generated by Multi-Agent Code Carbon System_",
17337: 12862:  8363: 3864: 1519:     ]
17338: 12863:  8364: 3865: 1520: 
17339: 12864:  8365: 3866: 1521:     return "\n".join(lines)
17340: 12865:  8366: 3867: 1522: 
17341: 12866:  8367: 3868: 1523: 
17342: 12867:  8368: 3869: 1524: def run(output_dir: str = "./output") -> str:
17343: 12868:  8369: 3870: 1525:     """
17344: 12869:  8370: 3871: 1526:     Main entry point for Agent 4.
17345: 12870:  8371: 3872: 1527:     
17346: 12871:  8372: 3873: 1528:     Args:
17347: 12872:  8373: 3874: 1529:         output_dir: Directory containing all agent outputs
17348: 12873:  8374: 3875: 1530:     
17349: 12874:  8375: 3876: 1531:     Returns:
17350: 12875:  8376: 3877: 1532:         Path to the generated report
17351: 12876:  8377: 3878: 1533:     """
17352: 12877:  8378: 3879: 1534:     os.makedirs(REPORT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
17353: 12878:  8379: 3880: 1535:     os.makedirs(f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests", exist_ok=True)
17354: 12879:  8380: 3881: 1536: 
17355: 12880:  8381: 3882: 1537:     # Load all agent outputs
17356: 12881:  8382: 3883: 1538:     with open(f"{output_dir}/transactions.json") as f:
17357: 12882:  8383: 3884: 1539:         identification = json.load(f)
17358: 12883:  8384: 3885: 1540: 
17359: 12884:  8385: 3886: 1541:     with open(f"{output_dir}/carbon_report.json") as f:
17360: 12885:  8386: 3887: 1542:         carbon = json.load(f)
17361: 12886:  8387: 3888: 1543: 
17362: 12887:  8388: 3889: 1544:     # Agent 1 result may or may not exist
17363: 12888:  8389: 3890: 1545:     ingestion_path = Path(output_dir) / "ingestion_result.json"
17364: 12889:  8390: 3891: 1546:     if ingestion_path.exists():
17365: 12890:  8391: 3892: 1547:         with open(ingestion_path) as f:
17366: 12891:  8392: 3893: 1548:             ingestion = json.load(f)
17367: 12892:  8393: 3894: 1549:     else:
17368: 12893:  8394: 3895: 1550:         ingestion = {"source_path": output_dir}
17369: 12894:  8395: 3896: 1551: 
17370: 12895:  8396: 3897: 1552:     framework = identification.get("framework", "express")
17371: 12896:  8397: 3898: 1553: 
17372: 12897:  8398: 3899: 1554:     # Generate unit tests
17373: 12898:  8399: 3900: 1555:     print("[Agent 4] Generating unit tests...")
17374: 12899:  8400: 3901: 1556:     test_content = generate_unit_tests(identification.get("transactions", []), framework)
17375: 12900:  8401: 3902: 1557:     test_ext = UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES.get(framework, UNIT_TEST_TEMPLATES["express"])["ext"]
17376: 12901:  8402: 3903: 1558:     test_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/tests/GeneratedTransactionTest.{test_ext}"
17377: 12902:  8403: 3904: 1559:     with open(test_path, "w") as f:
17378: 12903:  8404: 3905: 1560:         f.write(test_content)
17379: 12904:  8405: 3906: 1561:     print(f"[Agent 4] Unit tests saved: {test_path}")
17380: 12905:  8406: 3907: 1562: 
17381: 12906:  8407: 3908: 1563:     # Generate markdown report
17382: 12907:  8408: 3909: 1564:     print("[Agent 4] Building report...")
17383: 12908:  8409: 3910: 1565:     report_md = build_report(ingestion, identification, carbon, REPORT_DIR)
17384: 12909:  8410: 3911: 1566:     report_path = f"{REPORT_DIR}/code_carbon_report.md"
17385: 12910:  8411: 3912: 1567:     with open(report_path, "w") as f:
17386: 12911:  8412: 3913: 1568:         f.write(report_md)
17387: 12912:  8413: 3914: 1569: 
17388: 12913:  8414: 3915: 1570:     print(f"[Agent 4] ✅ Report saved: {report_path}")
17389: 12914:  8415: 3916: 1571:     return report_path
17390: 12915:  8416: 3917: 1572: 
17391: 12916:  8417: 3918: 1573: 
17392: 12917:  8418: 3919: 1574: if __name__ == "__main__":
17393: 12918:  8419: 3920: 1575:     import sys
17394: 12919:  8420: 3921: 1576:     out_dir = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "./output"
17395: 12920:  8421: 3922: 1577:     run(out_dir)
17396: 12921:  8422: 3923: 1578: ```
17397: 12922:  8423: 3924: 1579: 
17398: 12923:  8424: 3925: 1580: ---
17399: 12924:  8425: 3926: 1581: 
17400: 12925:  8426: 3927: 1582: ## Pipeline Orchestrator
17401: 12926:  8427: 3928: 1583: 
17402: 12927:  8428: 3929: 1584: ### File: `pipeline.py`
17403: 12928:  8429: 3930: 1585: 
17404: 12929:  8430: 3931: 1586: ```python
17405: 12930:  8431: 3932: 1587: #!/usr/bin/env python3
17406: 12931:  8432: 3933: 1588: """
17407: 12932:  8433: 3934: 1589: Pipeline Orchestrator
17408: 12933:  8434: 3935: 1590: Runs all 4 agents in sequence.
17409: 12934:  8435: 3936: 1591: """
17410: 12935:  8436: 3937: 1592:

17414: 12939:  8440: 3941: 1596: from dataclasses import asdict
17415: 12940:  8441: 3942: 1597: from pathlib import Path
17416: 12941:  8442: 3943: 1598:

17418: 12943:  8444: 3945: 1600: import agent2_gemini_identifier
