17424: 12949:  8450: 3951: 1606:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
17425: 12950:  8451: 3952: 1607:         description="Multi-Agent Code Carbon Pipeline",
17426: 12951:  8452: 3953: 1608:         formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
17427: 12952:  8453: 3954: 1609:         epilog="""
17428: 12953:  8454: 3955: 1610: Examples:
17429: 12954:  8455: 3956: 1611:   # Local directory
17430: 12955:  8456: 3957: 1612:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-laravel-app
17431: 12956:  8457: 3958: 1613: 
17432: 12957:  8458: 3959: 1614:   # Git repository
17433: 12958:  8459: 3960: 1615:   python pipeline.py --source https://github.com/user/repo
17434: 12959:  8460: 3961: 1616: 
17435: 12960:  8461: 3962: 1617:   # Skip carbon testing (no live app running)
17436: 12961:  8462: 3963: 1618:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --skip-carbon
17437: 12962:  8463: 3964: 1619: 
17438: 12963:  8464: 3965: 1620:   # Specify output directory
17439: 12964:  8465: 3966: 1621:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --output ./my-analysis
17440: 12965:  8466: 3967: 1622:         """
17441: 12966:  8467: 3968: 1623:     )
17442: 12967:  8468: 3969: 1624:     parser.add_argument("--source", required=True, help="Local path or Git URL")
17443: 12968:  8469: 3970: 1625:     parser.add_argument("--output", default="./output", help="Output directory")
17444: 12969:  8470: 3971: 1626:     parser.add_argument("--skip-carbon", action="store_true",
17445: 12970:  8471: 3972: 1627:                         help="Skip Agent 3 (no live app required)")
17446: 12971:  8472: 3973: 1628:     parser.add_argument("--base-url", default=None,
17447: 12972:  8473: 3974: 1629:                         help="Override TARGET_BASE_URL for Agent 3")
17448: 12973:  8474: 3975: 1630: 
17449: 12974:  8475: 3976: 1631:     args = parser.parse_args()
17450: 12975:  8476: 3977: 1632: 
17451: 12976:  8477: 3978: 1633:     if args.base_url:
17452: 12977:  8478: 3979: 1634:         import os
17453: 12978:  8479: 3980: 1635:         os.environ["TARGET_BASE_URL"] = args.base_url
17454: 12979:  8480: 3981: 1636: 
17455: 12980:  8481: 3982: 1637:     print("=" * 60)
17456: 12981:  8482: 3983: 1638:     print("🤖 MULTI-AGENT CODE CARBON PIPELINE")
17457: 12982:  8483: 3984: 1639:     print("=" * 60)
17458: 12983:  8484: 3985: 1640: 
17459: 12984:  8485: 3986: 1641:     # ── Agent 1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
17460: 12985:  8486: 3987: 1642:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion")
17461: 12986:  8487: 3988: 1643:     ingestion = agent1_ingestion.run(args.source, args.output)
17462: 12987:  8488: 3989: 1644:     if not ingestion.success:
17463: 12988:  8489: 3990: 1645:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 1 failed: {ingestion.error}")
17464: 12989:  8490: 3991: 1646:         sys.exit(1)
17465: 12990:  8491: 3992: 1647: 
17466: 12991:  8492: 3993: 1648:     # Save ingestion result
17467: 12992:  8493: 3994: 1649:     with open(f"{args.output}/ingestion_result.json", "w") as f:
17468: 12993:  8494: 3995: 1650:         json.dump(asdict(ingestion), f, indent=2)
17469: 12994:  8495: 3996: 1651: 
17470: 12995:  8496: 3997: 1652:     # ── Agent 2 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
17471: 12996:  8497: 3998: 1653:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier")
17472: 12997:  8498: 3999: 1654:     identification = agent2_gemini_identifier.run(
17473: 12998:  8499: 4000: 1655:         ingestion.flat_file_path,
17474: 12999:  8500: 4001: 1656:         ingestion.detected_framework
17475: 13000:  8501: 4002: 1657:     )
17476: 13001:  8502: 4003: 1658:     if not identification.success:
17477: 13002:  8503: 4004: 1659:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 2 failed: {identification.error}")
17478: 13003:  8504: 4005: 1660:         sys.exit(1)
17479: 13004:  8505: 4006: 1661: 
17480: 13005:  8506: 4007: 1662:     # ── Agent 3 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
17481: 13006:  8507: 4008: 1663:     if args.skip_carbon:
17482: 13007:  8508: 4009: 1664:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ⏭  Agent 3 — Skipped (--skip-carbon)")
17483: 13008:  8509: 4010: 1665:         # Create empty carbon result
17484: 13009:  8510: 4011: 1666:         empty_carbon = {
17485: 13010:  8511: 4012: 1667:             "success": True, "base_url": "", "total_requests": 0,
17486: 13011:  8512: 4013: 1668:             "successful_requests": 0, "failed_requests": 0,
17487: 13012:  8513: 4014: 1669:             "total_energy_kwh": 0.0, "total_co2_kg": 0.0,
17488: 13013:  8514: 4015: 1670:             "avg_response_time_ms": 0.0, "measurements": []
17489: 13014:  8515: 4016: 1671:         }
17490: 13015:  8516: 4017: 1672:         with open(f"{args.output}/carbon_report.json", "w") as f:
17491: 13016:  8517: 4018: 1673:             json.dump(empty_carbon, f, indent=2)
17492: 13017:  8518: 4019: 1674:     else:
17493: 13018:  8519: 4020: 1675:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 3 — Code Carbon")
17494: 13019:  8520: 4021: 1676:         carbon = agent3_carbon.run(f"{args.output}/transactions.json")
17495: 13020:  8521: 4022: 1677:         if not carbon.success:
17496: 13021:  8522: 4023: 1678:             print(f"[PIPELINE] ⚠️  Agent 3 warning: {carbon.error}")
17497: 13022:  8523: 4024: 1679: 
17498: 13023:  8524: 4025: 1680:     # ── Agent 4 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
17499: 13024:  8525: 4026: 1681:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 4 — Refactor Report")
17500: 13025:  8526: 4027: 1682:     report_path = agent4_report.run(args.output)
17501: 13026:  8527: 4028: 1683: 
17502: 13027:  8528: 4029: 1684:     print("\n" + "=" * 60)
17503: 13028:  8529: 4030: 1685:     print("✅ PIPELINE COMPLETE")
17504: 13029:  8530: 4031: 1686:     print(f"📄 Report: {report_path}")
17505: 13030:  8531: 4032: 1687:     print(f"🧪 Tests:  ./reports/tests/")
17506: 13031:  8532: 4033: 1688:     print("=" * 60)
17507: 13032:  8533: 4034: 1689: 
17508: 13033:  8534: 4035: 1690: 
17509: 13034:  8535: 4036: 1691: if __name__ == "__main__":
17510: 13035:  8536: 4037: 1692:     main()
17511: 13036:  8537: 4038: 1693: ```
17512: 13037:  8538: 4039: 1694:

17554: 13079:  8580: 4081: 1736: <body>
17555: 13080:  8581: 4082: 1737:   <h1>🤖 Code Carbon — Transaction Tester</h1>
17556: 13081:  8582: 4083: 1738:   <p>Load <code>transactions.json</code> to auto-generate forms for each endpoint.</p>
17557: 13082:  8583: 4084: 1739: 
17558: 13083:  8584: 4085: 1740:   <input type="file" id="txnFile" accept=".json">
17559: 13084:  8585: 4086: 1741:   <div id="app"></div>
17560: 13085:  8586: 4087: 1742: 
17561: 13086:  8587: 4088: 1743:   <script>
17562: 13087:  8588: 4089: 1744:     const BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:8000';  // Change this!
17563: 13088:  8589: 4090: 1745: 
17564: 13089:  8590: 4091: 1746:     document.getElementById('txnFile').addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
17565: 13090:  8591: 4092: 1747:       const file = e.target.files[0];
17566: 13091:  8592: 4093: 1748:       if (!file) return;
17567: 13092:  8593: 4094: 1749:       const data = JSON.parse(await file.text());
17568: 13093:  8594: 4095: 1750:       renderTransactions(data.transactions || [], data.framework || 'unknown');
17569: 13094:  8595: 4096: 1751:     });
17570: 13095:  8596: 4097: 1752: 
17571: 13096:  8597: 4098: 1753:     function renderTransactions(transactions, framework) {
17572: 13097:  8598: 4099: 1754:       const app = document.getElementById('app');
17573: 13098:  8599: 4100: 1755:       app.innerHTML = '';
17574: 13099:  8600: 4101: 1756: 
17575: 13100:  8601: 4102: 1757:       transactions.forEach((txn, i) => {
17576: 13101:  8602: 4103: 1758:         const card = document.createElement('div');
17577: 13102:  8603: 4104: 1759:         card.className = 'card';
17578: 13103:  8604: 4105: 1760:         card.id = `txn-${txn.id}`;
17579: 13104:  8605: 4106: 1761: 
17580: 13105:  8606: 4107: 1762:         const badges = [
17581: 13106:  8607: 4108: 1763:           `<span class="method-badge ${txn.method}">${txn.method}</span>`,
17582: 13107:  8608: 4109: 1764:           txn.requires_csrf ? '<span class="csrf-badge">🔐 CSRF</span>' : '',
17583: 13108:  8609: 4110: 1765:           txn.requires_auth ? '<span class="auth-badge">🔑 Auth</span>' : '',
17584: 13109:  8610: 4111: 1766:         ].filter(Boolean).join(' ');
17585: 13110:  8611: 4112: 1767: 
17586: 13111:  8612: 4113: 1768:         let fieldsHtml = '';
17587: 13112:  8613: 4114: 1769:         (txn.fields || []).forEach(f => {
17588: 13113:  8614: 4115: 1770:           const inputType = {
17589: 13114:  8615: 4116: 1771:             'email': 'email', 'password': 'password',
17590: 13115:  8616: 4117: 1772:             'integer': 'number', 'number': 'number', 'file': 'file',
17591: 13116:  8617: 4118: 1773:           }[f.type] || 'text';
17592: 13117:  8618: 4119: 1774: 
17593: 13118:  8619: 4120: 1775:           const req = f.required ? '<span class="required-mark">*</span>' : '';
17594: 13119:  8620: 4121: 1776:           const rules = (f.validation_rules || []).join(', ');
17595: 13120:  8621: 4122: 1777:           const placeholder = f.description || f.name;
17596: 13121:  8622: 4123: 1778: 
17597: 13122:  8623: 4124: 1779:           fieldsHtml += `
17598: 13123:  8624: 4125: 1780:             <div class="form-group">
17599: 13124:  8625: 4126: 1781:               <label for="${txn.id}_${f.name}">${f.name} ${req}
17600: 13125:  8626: 4127: 1782:                 <small style="color:#888;">(${f.type}${rules ? ' · ' + rules : ''})</small>
17601: 13126:  8627: 4128: 1783:               </label>
17602: 13127:  8628: 4129: 1784:               <input type="${inputType}"
17603: 13128:  8629: 4130: 1785:                      id="${txn.id}_${f.name}"
17604: 13129:  8630: 4131: 1786:                      name="${f.name}"
17605: 13130:  8631: 4132: 1787:                      placeholder="${placeholder}"
17606: 13131:  8632: 4133: 1788:                      ${f.required ? 'required' : ''}>
17607: 13132:  8633: 4134: 1789:             </div>`;
17608: 13133:  8634: 4135: 1790:         });
17609: 13134:  8635: 4136: 1791: 
17610: 13135:  8636: 4137: 1792:         // CSRF hidden field
17611: 13136:  8637: 4138: 1793:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
17612: 13137:  8638: 4139: 1794:           fieldsHtml += `
17613: 13138:  8639: 4140: 1795:             <div class="form-group" style="opacity:0.5">
17614: 13139:  8640: 4141: 1796:               <label>CSRF Token (auto-fetched: <code>${txn.csrf_field_name}</code>)</label>
17615: 13140:  8641: 4142: 1797:               <input type="text" id="${txn.id}_csrf" name="${txn.csrf_field_name}"
17616: 13141:  8642: 4143: 1798:                      placeholder="Will be fetched automatically" readonly>
17617: 13142:  8643: 4144: 1799:             </div>`;
17618: 13143:  8644: 4145: 1800:         }
17619: 13144:  8645: 4146: 1801: 
17620: 13145:  8646: 4147: 1802:         card.innerHTML = `
17621: 13146:  8647: 4148: 1803:           <h3>${badges} <code>${txn.endpoint}</code></h3>
17622: 13147:  8648: 4149: 1804:           <p style="color:#666;">${txn.description || ''}</p>
17623: 13148:  8649: 4150: 1805:           <form id="form-${txn.id}">
17624: 13149:  8650: 4151: 1806:             ${fieldsHtml}
17625: 13150:  8651: 4152: 1807:             <button type="submit">Send ${txn.method} Request</button>
17626: 13151:  8652: 4153: 1808:           </form>
17627: 13152:  8653: 4154: 1809:           <div id="response-${txn.id}" class="response-box" style="display:none;"></div>
17628: 13153:  8654: 4155: 1810:         `;
17629: 13154:  8655: 4156: 1811: 
17630: 13155:  8656: 4157: 1812:         app.appendChild(card);
17631: 13156:  8657: 4158: 1813: 
17632: 13157:  8658: 4159: 1814:         // Auto-fetch CSRF if needed
17633: 13158:  8659: 4160: 1815:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
17634: 13159:  8660: 4161: 1816:           fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework);
17635: 13160:  8661: 4162: 1817:         }
17636: 13161:  8662: 4163: 1818: 
17637: 13162:  8663: 4164: 1819:         // Form submit
17638: 13163:  8664: 4165: 1820:         document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`).addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
17639: 13164:  8665: 4166: 1821:           e.preventDefault();
17640: 13165:  8666: 4167: 1822:           await submitTransaction(txn);
17641: 13166:  8667: 4168: 1823:         });
17642: 13167:  8668: 4169: 1824:       });
17643: 13168:  8669: 4170: 1825:     }
17644: 13169:  8670: 4171: 1826: 
17645: 13170:  8671: 4172: 1827:     async function fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework) {
17646: 13171:  8672: 4173: 1828:       try {
17647: 13172:  8673: 4174: 1829:         // Try to get CSRF from the same page
17648: 13173:  8674: 4175: 1830:         const endpoints = [txn.endpoint.replace('/api/', '/'), '/', '/login'];
17649: 13174:  8675: 4176: 1831:         for (const ep of endpoints) {
17650: 13175:  8676: 4177: 1832:           const r = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${ep}`, { credentials: 'include' });
17651: 13176:  8677: 4178: 1833:           if (r.ok) {
17652: 13177:  8678: 4179: 1834:             const html = await r.text();
17653: 13178:  8679: 4180: 1835:             const match = html.match(
17654: 13179:  8680: 4181: 1836:               new RegExp(`name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']\\s+value=["']([^"']+)["']`)
17655: 13180:  8681: 4182: 1837:             ) || html.match(
17656: 13181:  8682: 4183: 1838:               new RegExp(`value=["']([^"']+)["']\\s+name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']`)
17657: 13182:  8683: 4184: 1839:             );
17658: 13183:  8684: 4185: 1840:             if (match) {
17659: 13184:  8685: 4186: 1841:               const csrfInput = document.getElementById(`${txn.id}_csrf`);
17660: 13185:  8686: 4187: 1842:               if (csrfInput) csrfInput.value = match[1];
17661: 13186:  8687: 4188: 1843:               return;
17662: 13187:  8688: 4189: 1844:             }
17663: 13188:  8689: 4190: 1845:           }
17664: 13189:  8690: 4191: 1846:         }
17665: 13190:  8691: 4192: 1847:       } catch (e) {
17666: 13191:  8692: 4193: 1848:         console.warn('Could not auto-fetch CSRF:', e.message);
17667: 13192:  8693: 4194: 1849:       }
17668: 13193:  8694: 4195: 1850:     }
17669: 13194:  8695: 4196: 1851: 
17670: 13195:  8696: 4197: 1852:     async function submitTransaction(txn) {
17671: 13196:  8697: 4198: 1853:       const form = document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`);
17672: 13197:  8698: 4199: 1854:       const responseBox = document.getElementById(`response-${txn.id}`);
17673: 13198:  8699: 4200: 1855:       const formData = new FormData(form);
17674: 13199:  8700: 4201: 1856:       const payload = Object.fromEntries(formData);
17675: 13200:  8701: 4202: 1857: 
17676: 13201:  8702: 4203: 1858:       responseBox.style.display = 'block';
17677: 13202:  8703: 4204: 1859:       responseBox.textContent = '⏳ Sending...';
17678: 13203:  8704: 4205: 1860: 
17679: 13204:  8705: 4206: 1861:       try {
17680: 13205:  8706: 4207: 1862:         const options = {
17681: 13206:  8707: 4208: 1863:           method: txn.method,
17682: 13207:  8708: 4209: 1864:           credentials: 'include',
17683: 13208:  8709: 4210: 1865:           headers: {},
17684: 13209:  8710: 4211: 1866:         };
17685: 13210:  8711: 4212: 1867: 
17686: 13211:  8712: 4213: 1868:         if (txn.method !== 'GET') {
17687: 13212:  8713: 4214: 1869:           options.headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
17688: 13213:  8714: 4215: 1870:           options.body = JSON.stringify(payload);
17689: 13214:  8715: 4216: 1871: 
17690: 13215:  8716: 4217: 1872:           if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
17691: 13216:  8717: 4218: 1873:             options.headers['X-CSRF-Token'] = payload[txn.csrf_field_name] || '';
17692: 13217:  8718: 4219: 1874:           }
17693: 13218:  8719: 4220: 1875:         }
17694: 13219:  8720: 4221: 1876: 
17695: 13220:  8721: 4222: 1877:         const start = performance.now();
17696: 13221:  8722: 4223: 1878:         const r = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${txn.endpoint}`, options);
17697: 13222:  8723: 4224: 1879:         const elapsed = (performance.now() - start).toFixed(0);
17698: 13223:  8724: 4225: 1880:         const text = await r.text();
17699: 13224:  8725: 4226: 1881: 
17700: 13225:  8726: 4227: 1882:         let display;
17701: 13226:  8727: 4228: 1883:         try {
17702: 13227:  8728: 4229: 1884:           display = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2);
17703: 13228:  8729: 4230: 1885:         } catch {
17704: 13229:  8730: 4231: 1886:           display = text.substring(0, 1000);
17705: 13230:  8731: 4232: 1887:         }
17706: 13231:  8732: 4233: 1888: 
17707: 13232:  8733: 4234: 1889:         responseBox.textContent =
17708: 13233:  8734: 4235: 1890:           `HTTP ${r.status} (${elapsed}ms)\n\n${display}`;
17709: 13234:  8735: 4236: 1891: 
17710: 13235:  8736: 4237: 1892:       } catch (err) {
17711: 13236:  8737: 4238: 1893:         responseBox.textContent = `❌ Error: ${err.message}`;
17712: 13237:  8738: 4239: 1894:       }
17713: 13238:  8739: 4240: 1895:     }
17714: 13239:  8740: 4241: 1896:   </script>
17715: 13240:  8741: 4242: 1897: </body>
17716: 13241:  8742: 4243: 1898: </html>
17717: 13242:  8743: 4244: 1899: ```
17718: 13243:  8744: 4245: 1900: 
17719: 13244:  8745: 4246: 1901: ---

17837: 13362:  8863: 4364: 2019: 
17838: 13363:  8864: 4365: 2020: ---
17839: 13364:  8865: 4366: 2021: 
17840: 13365:  8866: 4367: 2022: ## Running the Full Pipeline
17841: 13366:  8867: 4368: 2023: 
17842: 13367:  8868: 4369: 2024: ```bash
17843: 13368:  8869: 4370: 2025: # 1. Analyze local Laravel project (app must be running)
17844: 13369:  8870: 4371: 2026: python pipeline.py \
17845: 13370:  8871: 4372: 2027:   --source /path/to/my-laravel-app \
17846: 13371:  8872: 4373: 2028:   --base-url http://localhost:8000
17847: 13372:  8873: 4374: 2029: 
17848: 13373:  8874: 4375: 2030: # 2. Analyze from Git URL, skip live testing
17849: 13374:  8875: 4376: 2031: python pipeline.py \
17850: 13375:  8876: 4377: 2032:   --source https://github.com/user/my-express-api \
17851: 13376:  8877: 4378: 2033:   --skip-carbon
17852: 13377:  8878: 4379: 2034: 
17853: 13378:  8879: 4380: 2035: # 3. Analyze Django app
17854: 13379:  8880: 4381: 2036: python pipeline.py \
17855: 13380:  8881: 4382: 2037:   --source /path/to/my-django-app \
17856: 13381:  8882: 4383: 2038:   --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8000
17857: 13382:  8883: 4384: 2039: 
17858: 13383:  8884: 4385: 2040: # 4. Run only Agent 2 (already have repomix output)
17859: 13384:  8885: 4386: 2041: python agent2_gemini_identifier.py ./output/flat_codebase.txt
17860: 13385:  8886: 4387: 2042: 
17861: 13386:  8887: 4388: 2043: # 5. Open Web UI
17862: 13387:  8888: 4389: 2044: # Open web_ui/index.html in browser
17863: 13388:  8889: 4390: 2045: # Load transactions.json
17864: 13389:  8890: 4391: 2046: # Fill required fields → Send request
17865: 13390:  8891: 4392: 2047: ```
17866: 13391:  8892: 4393: 2048: 
17867: 13392:  8893: 4394: 2049: ---
17868: 13393:  8894: 4395: 2050:

17875: 13400:  8901: 4402: 2057: ├── flat_codebase.txt          ← Agent 1: repomix bundle
17876: 13401:  8902: 4403: 2058: ├── ingestion_result.json      ← Agent 1: metadata
17877: 13402:  8903: 4404: 2059: ├── transactions.json          ← Agent 2: all transactions + fields
17878: 13403:  8904: 4405: 2060: └── carbon_report.json         ← Agent 3: per-request energy data
17879: 13404:  8905: 4406: 2061: 
17880: 13405:  8906: 4407: 2062: reports/

17882: 13407:  8908: 4409: 2064: └── tests/
17883: 13408:  8909: 4410: 2065:     └── GeneratedTransactionTest.php  ← Agent 4: unit tests
17884: 13409:  8910: 4411: 2066: ```
17885: 13410:  8911: 4412: 2067: 
17886: 13411:  8912: 4413: 2068: ### `transactions.json` Sample
17887: 13412:  8913: 4414: 2069: 
17888: 13413:  8914: 4415: 2070: ```json
17889: 13414:  8915: 4416: 2071: {
17890: 13415:  8916: 4417: 2072:   "framework": "laravel",
17891: 13416:  8917: 4418: 2073:   "language": "PHP",
17892: 13417:  8918: 4419: 2074:   "total_routes": 12,
17893: 13418:  8919: 4420: 2075:   "post_routes": 5,

17928: 13453:  8954: 4455: 2110: 
17929: 13454:  8955: 4456: 2111: ## Troubleshooting
17930: 13455:  8956: 4457: 2112: 
17931: 13456:  8957: 4458: 2113: | Problem | Cause | Fix |
17932: 13457:  8958: 4459: 2114: |---------|-------|-----|
17933: 13458:  8959: 4460: 2115: | `repomix: command not found` | Not installed | `npm install -g repomix` |
17934: 13459:  8960: 4461: 2116: | `Gemini API 429 Too Many Requests` | Rate limit hit | Add `GEMINI_DELAY=10` to .env |
17935: 13460:  8961: 4462: 2117: | `Connection refused` in Agent 3 | App not running | Start app or use `--skip-carbon` |
17936: 13461:  8962: 4463: 2118: | `CSRF token mismatch` in Agent 3 | Wrong field name | Gemini will detect correct name; check `transactions.json` |
17937: 13462:  8963: 4464: 2119: | `CodeCarbon ImportError` | Not installed | `pip install codecarbon` |
17938: 13463:  8964: 4465: 2120: | `repomix output too large` | Big codebase | Add exclusions in `FRAMEWORK_SIGNATURES` |
17939: 13464:  8965: 4466: 2121:

18116: 13641:  9142: 4643: 16:     """Serve the generated transactions.json file"""
18117: 13642:  9143: 4644: 17:     output_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), 'output')

18119: 13644:  9145: 4646: 19:     if os.path.exists(tx_file):

18123: 13648:  9149: 4650: 23: 
18124: 13649:  9150: 4651: 24: @app.route('/api/run-pipeline', methods=['POST'])
18125: 13650:  9151: 4652: 25: def run_pipeline():
18126: 13651:  9152: 4653: 26:     """Run the pipeline and stream the output back to the client using SSE"""
18127: 13652:  9153: 4654: 27:     data = request.json
18128: 13653:  9154: 4655: 28:     source = data.get('source')
18129: 13654:  9155: 4656: 29:     base_url = data.get('base_url')
18130: 13655:  9156: 4657: 30:     skip_carbon = data.get('skip_carbon', False)
18131: 13656:  9157: 4658: 31:     
18132: 13657:  9158: 4659: 32:     if not source:
18133: 13658:  9159: 4660: 33:         return jsonify({"error": "Source is required"}), 400
18134: 13659:  9160: 4661: 34:         
18135: 13660:  9161: 4662: 35:     def generate():
18136: 13661:  9162: 4663: 36:         cmd = ['python', 'pipeline.py', '--source', source]
18137: 13662:  9163: 4664: 37:         if base_url:
18138: 13663:  9164: 4665: 38:             cmd.extend(['--base-url', base_url])
18139: 13664:  9165: 4666: 39:         if skip_carbon:
18140: 13665:  9166: 4667: 40:             cmd.append('--skip-carbon')
18141: 13666:  9167: 4668: 41:             
18142: 13667:  9168: 4669: 42:         # Ensure unbuffered output so we get lines immediately
18143: 13668:  9169: 4670: 43:         env = os.environ.copy()
18144: 13669:  9170: 4671: 44:         env['PYTHONUNBUFFERED'] = '1'
18145: 13670:  9171: 4672: 45:         
18146: 13671:  9172: 4673: 46:         process = subprocess.Popen(
18147: 13672:  9173: 4674: 47:             cmd,
18148: 13673:  9174: 4675: 48:             stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
18149: 13674:  9175: 4676: 49:             stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
18150: 13675:  9176: 4677: 50:             text=True,
18151: 13676:  9177: 4678: 51:             bufsize=1,
18152: 13677:  9178: 4679: 52:             env=env,
18153: 13678:  9179: 4680: 53:             cwd=os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
18154: 13679:  9180: 4681: 54:         )
18155: 13680:  9181: 4682: 55:         
18156: 13681:  9182: 4683: 56:         for line in iter(process.stdout.readline, ''):
18157: 13682:  9183: 4684: 57:             if line:
18158: 13683:  9184: 4685: 58:                 # Format as Server-Sent Event
18159: 13684:  9185: 4686: 59:                 yield f"data: {line.strip()}\n\n"
18160: 13685:  9186: 4687: 60:                 
18161: 13686:  9187: 4688: 61:         process.stdout.close()
18162: 13687:  9188: 4689: 62:         return_code = process.wait()
18163: 13688:  9189: 4690: 63:         
18164: 13689:  9190: 4691: 64:         if return_code == 0:
18165: 13690:  9191: 4692: 65:             yield "data: [DONE]\n\n"
18166: 13691:  9192: 4693: 66:         else:
18167: 13692:  9193: 4694: 67:             yield f"data: [ERROR] Pipeline exited with code {return_code}\n\n"
18168: 13693:  9194: 4695: 68:             
18169: 13694:  9195: 4696: 69:     return Response(generate(), mimetype='text/event-stream')

18697: 14222:  9723: 5224: 520:         if (localStorage.getItem('cc_source')) document.getElementById('source').value = localStorage.getItem('cc_source');
18698: 14223:  9724: 5225: 521:         if (localStorage.getItem('cc_base_url')) document.getElementById('base-url').value = localStorage.getItem('cc_base_url');
18699: 14224:  9725: 5226: 522:         if (localStorage.getItem('cc_skip_carbon') === 'true') document.getElementById('skip-carbon').checked = true;
18700: 14225:  9726: 5227: 523: 
18701: 14226:  9727: 5228: 524:         let targetBaseUrl = '';
18702: 14227:  9728: 5229: 525:         let totEnergy = 0;

18704: 14229:  9730: 5231: 527:         let endpointsCount = 0;

18722: 14247:  9748: 5249: 545: 
18723: 14248:  9749: 5250: 546:         function updateStep(stepId, state, msgText) {
18724: 14249:  9750: 5251: 547:             const el = document.getElementById(`step${stepId}`);
18725: 14250:  9751: 5252: 548:             const msgEl = document.getElementById(`s${stepId}-msg`);
18726: 14251:  9752: 5253: 549: 
18727: 14252:  9753: 5254: 550:             if (state === 'active') {
18728: 14253:  9754: 5255: 551:                 el.classList.add('step-active');
18729: 14254:  9755: 5256: 552:                 msgEl.classList.remove('hidden');
18730: 14255:  9756: 5257: 553:                 if (msgText) msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> ${msgText}`;
18731: 14256:  9757: 5258: 554:             } else if (state === 'done') {
18732: 14257:  9758: 5259: 555:                 el.classList.replace('step-active', 'step-done');
18733: 14258:  9759: 5260: 556:                 msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="text-slate-800 font-semibold">Selesai</span>`;
18734: 14259:  9760: 5261: 557:             }
18735: 14260:  9761: 5262: 558:         }
18736: 14261:  9762: 5263: 559: 
18737: 14262:  9763: 5264: 560:         async function runPipeline() {
18738: 14263:  9764: 5265: 561:             const source = document.getElementById('source').value;
18739: 14264:  9765: 5266: 562:             const baseUrl = document.getElementById('base-url').value;
18740: 14265:  9766: 5267: 563:             const skipCarbon = document.getElementById('skip-carbon').checked;
18741: 14266:  9767: 5268: 564:             
18742: 14267:  9768: 5269: 565:             targetBaseUrl = baseUrl;
18743: 14268:  9769: 5270: 566:             localStorage.setItem('cc_source', source);
18744: 14269:  9770: 5271: 567:             localStorage.setItem('cc_base_url', baseUrl);
18745: 14270:  9771: 5272: 568:             localStorage.setItem('cc_skip_carbon', skipCarbon);
18746: 14271:  9772: 5273: 569: 
18747: 14272:  9773: 5274: 570:             runBtn.disabled = true;
18748: 14273:  9774: 5275: 571:             runBtn.innerText = "Sistem Sedang Berjalan...";
18749: 14274:  9775: 5276: 572: 
18750: 14275:  9776: 5277: 573:             executionPanel.classList.remove('opacity-50', 'pointer-events-none');
18751: 14276:  9777: 5278: 574:             pipelineStatus.className = 'px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded text-xs font-semibold';
18752: 14277:  9778: 5279: 575:             pipelineStatus.innerText = 'Aktif';
18753: 14278:  9779: 5280: 576:             reportView.classList.remove('show-view');
18754: 14279:  9780: 5281: 577:             reportView.classList.add('hidden-view');
18755: 14280:  9781: 5282: 578:             document.getElementById('tx-container').style.display = 'none';
18756: 14281:  9782: 5283: 579: 
18757: 14282:  9783: 5284: 580:             // Reset
18758: 14283:  9784: 5285: 581:             for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
18759: 14284:  9785: 5286: 582:                 document.getElementById(`step${i}`).className = 'step-item' + (i === 4 ? ' pb-0' : '');
18760: 14285:  9786: 5287: 583:                 document.getElementById(`s${i}-msg`).classList.add('hidden');
18761: 14286:  9787: 5288: 584:             }
18762: 14287:  9788: 5289: 585:             document.getElementById('s4-action').classList.add('hidden');
18763: 14288:  9789: 5290: 586:             document.getElementById('s3-console').classList.add('hidden');
18764: 14289:  9790: 5291: 587:             document.getElementById('s3-summary').classList.add('hidden');
18765: 14290:  9791: 5292: 588:             
18766: 14291:  9792: 5293: 589:             s3TableBody.innerHTML = '';
18767: 14292:  9793: 5294: 590:             totEnergy = 0;
18768: 14293:  9794: 5295: 591:             totCo2 = 0;
18769: 14294:  9795: 5296: 592:             endpointsCount = 0;
18770: 14295:  9796: 5297: 593: 
18771: 14296:  9797: 5298: 594:             try {
18772: 14297:  9798: 5299: 595:                 const response = await fetch('/api/run-pipeline', {
18773: 14298:  9799: 5300: 596:                     method: 'POST',
18774: 14299:  9800: 5301: 597:                     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
18775: 14300:  9801: 5302: 598:                     body: JSON.stringify({
18776: 14301:  9802: 5303: 599:                         source: source,
18777: 14302:  9803: 5304: 600:                         base_url: baseUrl,

18959: 14484:  9985: 5486: 782:         async function fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework) {
18960: 14485:  9986: 5487: 783:             try {
18961: 14486:  9987: 5488: 784:                 const endpoints = [txn.endpoint.replace('/api/', '/'), '/', '/login'];
18962: 14487:  9988: 5489: 785:                 for (const ep of endpoints) {
18963: 14488:  9989: 5490: 786:                     const r = await fetch(`${targetBaseUrl}${ep}`, { credentials: 'include' });
18964: 14489:  9990: 5491: 787:                     if (r.ok) {
18965: 14490:  9991: 5492: 788:                         const html = await r.text();
18966: 14491:  9992: 5493: 789:                         const match = html.match(new RegExp(`name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']\\s+value=["']([^"']+)["']`)) || html.match(new RegExp(`value=["']([^"']+)["']\\s+name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']`));
18967: 14492:  9993: 5494: 790:                         const metaMatch = html.match(new RegExp(`name=["']csrf-token["']\\s+content=["']([^"']+)["']`));
18968: 14493:  9994: 5495: 791:                         
18969: 14494:  9995: 5496: 792:                         const csrfInput = document.getElementById(`${txn.id}_csrf`);
18970: 14495:  9996: 5497: 793:                         if (match && csrfInput) { csrfInput.value = match[1]; return; } 
18971: 14496:  9997: 5498: 794:                         else if (metaMatch && csrfInput) { csrfInput.value = metaMatch[1]; return; }
18972: 14497:  9998: 5499: 795:                     }
18973: 14498:  9999: 5500: 796:                 }
18974: 14499: 10000: 5501: 797:             } catch (e) {
18975: 14500: 10001: 5502: 798:                 console.warn(`CSRF Fetch Error:`, e.message);
18976: 14501: 10002: 5503: 799:             }
18977: 14502: 10003: 5504: 800:         }
18978: 14503: 10004: 5505: 801: 
18979: 14504: 10005: 5506: 802:         async function submitTransaction(txn) {
18980: 14505: 10006: 5507: 803:             const form = document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`);
18981: 14506: 10007: 5508: 804:             const responseBox = document.getElementById(`response-${txn.id}`);
18982: 14507: 10008: 5509: 805:             const payload = Object.fromEntries(new FormData(form));
18983: 14508: 10009: 5510: 806: 
18984: 14509: 10010: 5511: 807:             responseBox.classList.remove('hidden');
18985: 14510: 10011: 5512: 808:             responseBox.textContent = '⏳ Mengirim request...';
18986: 14511: 10012: 5513: 809:             responseBox.className = 'mt-4 p-3 bg-slate-50 border-l-4 border-slate-300 rounded-r-md font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-600 overflow-y-auto max-h-48 whitespace-pre-wrap';
18987: 14512: 10013: 5514: 810: 
18988: 14513: 10014: 5515: 811:             try {
18989: 14514: 10015: 5516: 812:                 const options = { method: txn.method, credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } };
18990: 14515: 10016: 5517: 813:                 if (txn.method !== 'GET') {
18991: 14516: 10017: 5518: 814:                     options.headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
18992: 14517: 10018: 5519: 815:                     options.body = JSON.stringify(payload);
18993: 14518: 10019: 5520: 816:                     if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
18994: 14519: 10020: 5521: 817:                         const token = payload[txn.csrf_field_name] || '';
18995: 14520: 10021: 5522: 818:                         options.headers['X-CSRF-Token'] = token;
18996: 14521: 10022: 5523: 819:                         options.headers['X-XSRF-Token'] = token;
18997: 14522: 10023: 5524: 820:                     }
18998: 14523: 10024: 5525: 821:                 }
18999: 14524: 10025: 5526: 822: 
19000: 14525: 10026: 5527: 823:                 const start = performance.now();
19001: 14526: 10027: 5528: 824:                 const r = await fetch(`${targetBaseUrl}${txn.endpoint}`, options);
19002: 14527: 10028: 5529: 825:                 const elapsed = (performance.now() - start).toFixed(0);
19003: 14528: 10029: 5530: 826:                 const text = await r.text();
19004: 14529: 10030: 5531: 827: 
19005: 14530: 10031: 5532: 828:                 let display = text;
19006: 14531: 10032: 5533: 829:                 try { display = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2); } catch {}
19007: 14532: 10033: 5534: 830:                 if(display.length > 2000) display = display.substring(0, 2000) + '\n... (truncated)';
19008: 14533: 10034: 5535: 831: 
19009: 14534: 10035: 5536: 832:                 responseBox.textContent = `HTTP ${r.status} ${r.statusText} (${elapsed}ms)\n\n${display}`;
19010: 14535: 10036: 5537: 833:                 
19011: 14536: 10037: 5538: 834:                 if (r.ok) responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-emerald-500');
19012: 14537: 10038: 5539: 835:                 else if (r.status >= 500) responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-red-500');
19013: 14538: 10039: 5540: 836:                 else responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-amber-500');
19014: 14539: 10040: 5541: 837: 
19015: 14540: 10041: 5542: 838:             } catch (err) {
19016: 14541: 10042: 5543: 839:                 responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-red-500');
19017: 14542: 10043: 5544: 840:                 responseBox.textContent = `❌ Network Error: ${err.message}\nPastikan server target menyala dan CORS diizinkan.`;
19018: 14543: 10044: 5545: 841:             }
19019: 14544: 10045: 5546: 842:         }
19020: 14545: 10046: 5547: 843:     </script>
19021: 14546: 10047: 5548: 844: </body>
19022: 14547: 10048: 5549: 845: 
19023: 14548: 10049: 5550: 846: </html>

19303: 14828: 10329: 14: @app.route('/api/transactions')
19304: 14829: 10330: 15: def get_transactions():
19305: 14830: 10331: 16:     """Serve the generated transactions.json file"""
19306: 14831: 10332: 17:     output_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), 'output')
19307: 14832: 10333: 18:     tx_file = os.path.join(output_dir, 'transactions.json')
19308: 14833: 10334: 19:     if os.path.exists(tx_file):
19309: 14834: 10335: 20:         with open(tx_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
19310: 14835: 10336: 21:             return jsonify(json.load(f))
19311: 14836: 10337: 22:     return jsonify({"error": "transactions.json not found. Run the pipeline first."}), 404
19312: 14837: 10338: 23: 
19313: 14838: 10339: 24: @app.route('/api/run-pipeline', methods=['POST'])
19314: 14839: 10340: 25: def run_pipeline():
19315: 14840: 10341: 26:     """Run the pipeline and stream the output back to the client using SSE"""
19316: 14841: 10342: 27:     data = request.json
19317: 14842: 10343: 28:     source = data.get('source')
19318: 14843: 10344: 29:     base_url = data.get('base_url')
19319: 14844: 10345: 30:     skip_carbon = data.get('skip_carbon', False)
19320: 14845: 10346: 31:     
19321: 14846: 10347: 32:     if not source:
19322: 14847: 10348: 33:         return jsonify({"error": "Source is required"}), 400
19323: 14848: 10349: 34:         
19324: 14849: 10350: 35:     def generate():
19325: 14850: 10351: 36:         cmd = ['python', 'pipeline.py', '--source', source]
19326: 14851: 10352: 37:         if base_url:
19327: 14852: 10353: 38:             cmd.extend(['--base-url', base_url])
19328: 14853: 10354: 39:         if skip_carbon:
19329: 14854: 10355: 40:             cmd.append('--skip-carbon')
19330: 14855: 10356: 41:             
19331: 14856: 10357: 42:         # Ensure unbuffered output so we get lines immediately
19332: 14857: 10358: 43:         env = os.environ.copy()
19333: 14858: 10359: 44:         env['PYTHONUNBUFFERED'] = '1'
19334: 14859: 10360: 45:         
19335: 14860: 10361: 46:         process = subprocess.Popen(
19336: 14861: 10362: 47:             cmd,
19337: 14862: 10363: 48:             stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
19338: 14863: 10364: 49:             stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
19339: 14864: 10365: 50:             text=True,
19340: 14865: 10366: 51:             bufsize=1,
19341: 14866: 10367: 52:             env=env,
19342: 14867: 10368: 53:             cwd=os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
19343: 14868: 10369: 54:         )
19344: 14869: 10370: 55:         
19345: 14870: 10371: 56:         for line in iter(process.stdout.readline, ''):
19346: 14871: 10372: 57:             if line:
19347: 14872: 10373: 58:                 # Format as Server-Sent Event
19348: 14873: 10374: 59:                 yield f"data: {line.strip()}\n\n"
19349: 14874: 10375: 60:                 
19350: 14875: 10376: 61:         process.stdout.close()
19351: 14876: 10377: 62:         return_code = process.wait()
19352: 14877: 10378: 63:         
19353: 14878: 10379: 64:         if return_code == 0:
19354: 14879: 10380: 65:             yield "data: [DONE]\n\n"
19355: 14880: 10381: 66:         else:
19356: 14881: 10382: 67:             yield f"data: [ERROR] Pipeline exited with code {return_code}\n\n"
19357: 14882: 10383: 68:             
19358: 14883: 10384: 69:     return Response(generate(), mimetype='text/event-stream')
19359: 14884: 10385: 70: 
19360: 14885: 10386: 71: if __name__ == '__main__':
19361: 14886: 10387: 72:     print("Starting Code Carbon Server at http://localhost:5000")
19362: 14887: 10388: 73:     app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=5000, debug=True)

19912: 15437: 10938: 546:         function updateStep(stepId, state, msgText) {
19913: 15438: 10939: 547:             const el = document.getElementById(`step${stepId}`);
19914: 15439: 10940: 548:             const msgEl = document.getElementById(`s${stepId}-msg`);
19915: 15440: 10941: 549:

19917: 15442: 10943: 551:                 el.classList.add('step-active');
19918: 15443: 10944: 552:                 msgEl.classList.remove('hidden');
19919: 15444: 10945: 553:                 if (msgText) msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> ${msgText}`;
19920: 15445: 10946: 554:             } else if (state === 'done') {
19921: 15446: 10947: 555:                 el.classList.replace('step-active', 'step-done');
19922: 15447: 10948: 556:                 msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="text-slate-800 font-semibold">Selesai</span>`;
19923: 15448: 10949: 557:             }
19924: 15449: 10950: 558:         }
19925: 15450: 10951: 559: 
19926: 15451: 10952: 560:         async function runPipeline() {
19927: 15452: 10953: 561:             const source = document.getElementById('source').value;
19928: 15453: 10954: 562:             const baseUrl = document.getElementById('base-url').value;
19929: 15454: 10955: 563:             const skipCarbon = document.getElementById('skip-carbon').checked;
19930: 15455: 10956: 564:             
19931: 15456: 10957: 565:             targetBaseUrl = baseUrl;
19932: 15457: 10958: 566:             localStorage.setItem('cc_source', source);
19933: 15458: 10959: 567:             localStorage.setItem('cc_base_url', baseUrl);
19934: 15459: 10960: 568:             localStorage.setItem('cc_skip_carbon', skipCarbon);
19935: 15460: 10961: 569: 
19936: 15461: 10962: 570:             runBtn.disabled = true;
19937: 15462: 10963: 571:             runBtn.innerText = "Sistem Sedang Berjalan...";
19938: 15463: 10964: 572: 
19939: 15464: 10965: 573:             executionPanel.classList.remove('opacity-50', 'pointer-events-none');
19940: 15465: 10966: 574:             pipelineStatus.className = 'px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded text-xs font-semibold';
19941: 15466: 10967: 575:             pipelineStatus.innerText = 'Aktif';
19942: 15467: 10968: 576:             reportView.classList.remove('show-view');
19943: 15468: 10969: 577:             reportView.classList.add('hidden-view');
19944: 15469: 10970: 578:             document.getElementById('tx-container').style.display = 'none';
19945: 15470: 10971: 579: 
19946: 15471: 10972: 580:             // Reset
19947: 15472: 10973: 581:             for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
19948: 15473: 10974: 582:                 document.getElementById(`step${i}`).className = 'step-item' + (i === 4 ? ' pb-0' : '');
19949: 15474: 10975: 583:                 document.getElementById(`s${i}-msg`).classList.add('hidden');
19950: 15475: 10976: 584:             }
19951: 15476: 10977: 585:             document.getElementById('s4-action').classList.add('hidden');
19952: 15477: 10978: 586:             document.getElementById('s3-console').classList.add('hidden');
19953: 15478: 10979: 587:             document.getElementById('s3-summary').classList.add('hidden');
19954: 15479: 10980: 588:             
19955: 15480: 10981: 589:             s3TableBody.innerHTML = '';
19956: 15481: 10982: 590:             totEnergy = 0;
19957: 15482: 10983: 591:             totCo2 = 0;
19958: 15483: 10984: 592:             endpointsCount = 0;
19959: 15484: 10985: 593: 
19960: 15485: 10986: 594:             try {
19961: 15486: 10987: 595:                 const response = await fetch('/api/run-pipeline', {
19962: 15487: 10988: 596:                     method: 'POST',
19963: 15488: 10989: 597:                     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
19964: 15489: 10990: 598:                     body: JSON.stringify({
19965: 15490: 10991: 599:                         source: source,
19966: 15491: 10992: 600:                         base_url: baseUrl,
19967: 15492: 10993: 601:                         skip_carbon: skipCarbon
19968: 15493: 10994: 602:                     })
19969: 15494: 10995: 603:                 });
19970: 15495: 10996: 604: 
19971: 15496: 10997: 605:                 if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Server returned ${response.status}`);
19972: 15497: 10998: 606: 
19973: 15498: 10999: 607:                 const reader = response.body.getReader();
19974: 15499: 11000: 608:                 const decoder = new TextDecoder('utf-8');
19975: 15500: 11001: 609: 
19976: 15501: 11002: 610:                 while (true) {
19977: 15502: 11003: 611:                     const { done, value } = await reader.read();
19978: 15503: 11004: 612:                     if (done) break;
19979: 15504: 11005: 613: 
19980: 15505: 11006: 614:                     const chunk = decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
19981: 15506: 11007: 615:                     const lines = chunk.split('\n\n');
19982: 15507: 11008: 616: 
19983: 15508: 11009: 617:                     for (const line of lines) {
19984: 15509: 11010: 618:                         if (line.startsWith('data: ')) {
19985: 15510: 11011: 619:                             const data = line.slice(6);
19986: 15511: 11012: 620:                             
19987: 15512: 11013: 621:                             if (data === '[DONE]') {
19988: 15513: 11014: 622:                                 await handlePipelineComplete();
19989: 15514: 11015: 623:                                 break;
19990: 15515: 11016: 624:                             }
19991: 15516: 11017: 625: 
19992: 15517: 11018: 626:                             // Identify steps
19993: 15518: 11019: 627:                             if (data.includes('Agent 1')) {
19994: 15519: 11020: 628:                                 updateStep(1, 'active', 'Memindai kerangka proyek...');
19995: 15520: 11021: 629:                             } else if (data.includes('Agent 2')) {
19996: 15521: 11022: 630:                                 updateStep(1, 'done');
19997: 15522: 11023: 631:                                 
19998: 15523: 11024: 632:                                 // Parse discovered endpoints to show in UI
19999: 15524: 11025: 633:                                 const txnMatch = data.match(/(GET|POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE)\s+(\/[^\s]*)/);
20000: 15525: 11026: 634:                                 if (txnMatch) {
20001: 15526: 11027: 635:                                     updateStep(2, 'active', `Mendeteksi: ${txnMatch[1]} ${txnMatch[2]}`);
20002: 15527: 11028: 636:                                 } else if (!document.getElementById('s2-msg').innerText.includes('Mendeteksi')) {
20003: 15528: 11029: 637:                                     updateStep(2, 'active', 'Mengirim konteks ke AI...');
20004: 15529: 11030: 638:                                 }
20005: 15530: 11031: 639:                                 
20006: 15531: 11032: 640:                             } else if (data.includes('Agent 3')) {
20007: 15532: 11033: 641:                                 updateStep(2, 'done');
20008: 15533: 11034: 642:                                 updateStep(3, 'active', 'Menguji endpoint...');
20009: 15534: 11035: 643:                                 document.getElementById('s3-console').classList.remove('hidden');
20010: 15535: 11036: 644:                             } else if (data.includes('Agent 4')) {
20011: 15536: 11037: 645:                                 updateStep(3, 'done');
20012: 15537: 11038: 646:                                 updateStep(4, 'active', 'Menyusun laporan akhir...');
20013: 15538: 11039: 647:                                 document.getElementById('s3-summary').classList.remove('hidden');
20014: 15539: 11040: 648:                             }
20015: 15540: 11041: 649: 
20016: 15541: 11042: 650:                             // Match Carbon Row: "✅ [200] GET /api/users - 120ms - 0.00012g CO₂"
20017: 15542: 11043: 651:                             const rowMatch = data.match(/\[(\d+)\]\s+(\w+)\s+(.*?)\s+-\s+(\d+)ms\s+-\s+([\d\.]+)mWh\s+-\s+([\d\.]+)g/);
20018: 15543: 11044: 652:                             if (rowMatch) {
20019: 15544: 11045: 653:                                 const statusVal = rowMatch[1];
20020: 15545: 11046: 654:                                 const method = rowMatch[2];
20021: 15546: 11047: 655:                                 const path = rowMatch[3];
20022: 15547: 11048: 656:                                 const ms = rowMatch[4];
20023: 15548: 11049: 657:                                 const energy = parseFloat(rowMatch[5]);
20024: 15549: 11050: 658:                                 const co2 = parseFloat(rowMatch[6]);
20025: 15550: 11051: 659: 
20026: 15551: 11052: 660:                                 totEnergy += energy;
20027: 15552: 11053: 661:                                 totCo2 += co2;
20028: 15553: 11054: 662:                                 endpointsCount++;
20029: 15554: 11055: 663: 
20030: 15555: 11056: 664:                                 document.getElementById(`s3-msg`).innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> Menguji (${endpointsCount})...`;
20031: 15556: 11057: 665:                                 document.getElementById('s3-tot-energy').innerText = totEnergy.toFixed(4);
20032: 15557: 11058: 666:                                 document.getElementById('s3-tot-co2').innerText = totCo2.toFixed(5);
20033: 15558: 11059: 667: 
20034: 15559: 11060: 668:                                 const statusHtml = `<span class="text-slate-500">[${statusVal}]</span>`;
20035: 15560: 11061: 669:                                 const tr = document.createElement('tr');
20036: 15561: 11062: 670:                                 tr.className = "hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors";
20037: 15562: 11063: 671:                                 tr.innerHTML = `
20038: 15563: 11064: 672:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 whitespace-nowrap font-medium text-slate-700">${method}</td>
20039: 15564: 11065: 673:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 truncate max-w-[150px] text-slate-500">${path}</td>
20040: 15565: 11066: 674:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2">${statusHtml}</td>
20041: 15566: 11067: 675:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-400">${ms}ms</td>
20042: 15567: 11068: 676:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-700 font-medium">${energy.toFixed(4)}</td>
20043: 15568: 11069: 677:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-700 font-medium">${co2.toFixed(5)}</td>
20044: 15569: 11070: 678:                                 `;
20045: 15570: 11071: 679:                                 s3TableBody.appendChild(tr);
20046: 15571: 11072: 680:                                 s3TableContainer.scrollTop = s3TableContainer.scrollHeight;
20047: 15572: 11073: 681:                             }
20048: 15573: 11074: 682:                         }
20049: 15574: 11075: 683:                     }
20050: 15575: 11076: 684:                 }
20051: 15576: 11077: 685:             } catch (err) {
20052: 15577: 11078: 686:                 console.error(err);
20053: 15578: 11079: 687:                 alert("Koneksi gagal: " + err.message);
20054: 15579: 11080: 688:                 runBtn.disabled = false;
20055: 15580: 11081: 689:                 runBtn.innerText = "Jalankan Ulang Audit";
20056: 15581: 11082: 690:             }
20057: 15582: 11083: 691:         }
20058: 15583: 11084: 692: 
20059: 15584: 11085: 693:         async function handlePipelineComplete() {
20060: 15585: 11086: 694:             updateStep(4, 'done');
20061: 15586: 11087: 695:             document.getElementById('s4-action').classList.remove('hidden');
20062: 15587: 11088: 696:             pipelineStatus.className = 'px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-100 border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 rounded text-xs font-medium';
20063: 15588: 11089: 697:             pipelineStatus.innerText = 'Selesai';
20064: 15589: 11090: 698:             runBtn.disabled = false;
20065: 15590: 11091: 699:             runBtn.innerText = "Jalankan Ulang Audit";
20066: 15591: 11092: 700: 
20067: 15592: 11093: 701:             // Show report view
20068: 15593: 11094: 702:             setTimeout(() => {
20069: 15594: 11095: 703:                 reportView.classList.remove('hidden-view');
20070: 15595: 11096: 704:                 reportView.classList.add('show-view');
20071: 15596: 11097: 705:                 reportView.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
20072: 15597: 11098: 706:             }, 500);
20073: 15598: 11099: 707: 
20074: 15599: 11100: 708:             // Fetch dynamic transactions generated by backend
20075: 15600: 11101: 709:             try {
20076: 15601: 11102: 710:                 const res = await fetch('/api/transactions');
20077: 15602: 11103: 711:                 if (res.ok) {
20078: 15603: 11104: 712:                     const data = await res.json();
20079: 15604: 11105: 713:                     document.getElementById('rep-endpoints').innerText = data.total_routes || endpointsCount || 0;
20080: 15605: 11106: 714:                     document.getElementById('framework-info').textContent = `${data.framework || 'Unknown'} / ${data.language || 'Unknown'}`;
20081: 15606: 11107: 715:                     renderTransactions(data.transactions || [], data.framework || 'unknown');
20082: 15607: 11108: 716:                     document.getElementById('tx-container').style.display = 'block';
20083: 15608: 11109: 717:                 }
20084: 15609: 11110: 718:             } catch (err) {
20085: 15610: 11111: 719:                 console.error("Gagal memuat file transaksi:", err);

20089: 15614: 11115: 723:         function renderTransactions(transactions, framework) {

20091: 15616: 11117: 725:             app.innerHTML = '';
20092: 15617: 11118: 726: 
20093: 15618: 11119: 727:             transactions.forEach((txn) => {
20094: 15619: 11120: 728:                 const card = document.createElement('div');
20095: 15620: 11121: 729:                 card.className = 'bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm';

20097: 15622: 11123: 731:

20100: 15625: 11126: 734:                 if(txn.method === 'DELETE') methodColor = 'bg-red-500 text-white';

20102: 15627: 11128: 736:

20104: 15629: 11130: 738:                     `<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide mr-2 ${methodColor}">${txn.method}</span>`,
20105: 15630: 11131: 739:                     txn.requires_csrf ? '<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold text-amber-700 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 mr-2">🔐 CSRF Protected</span>' : '',
20106: 15631: 11132: 740:                     txn.requires_auth ? '<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold text-blue-700 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 mr-2">🔑 Auth Required</span>' : '',
20107: 15632: 11133: 741:                 ].filter(Boolean).join('');
20108: 15633: 11134: 742:

20112: 15637: 11138: 746:                     const req = f.required ? '<span class="text-red-500">*</span>' : '';

20114: 15639: 11140: 748:

20116: 15641: 11142: 750:                         <div class="mb-3">
20117: 15642: 11143: 751:                             <label class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-1" for="${txn.id}_${f.name}">
20118: 15643: 11144: 752:                                 ${f.name} ${req} <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400 ml-1">(${f.type}${rules ? ' - ' + rules : ''})</span>
20119: 15644: 11145: 753:                             </label>

20121: 15646: 11147: 755:                         </div>`;
20122: 15647: 11148: 756:                 });
20123: 15648: 11149: 757: 
20124: 15649: 11150: 758:                 if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
20125: 15650: 11151: 759:                     fieldsHtml += `
20126: 15651: 11152: 760:                         <div class="mb-3 p-3 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 border-dashed rounded-lg opacity-80">
20127: 15652: 11153: 761:                             <label class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-1">CSRF Token <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400 ml-1">(Auto-fetched: ${txn.csrf_field_name})</span></label>
20128: 15653: 11154: 762:                             <input type="text" id="${txn.id}_csrf" name="${txn.csrf_field_name}" class="input-field bg-slate-100" placeholder="Fetching..." readonly>

20139: 15664: 11165: 773:                     </form>

20141: 15666: 11167: 775:                 `;

20144: 15669: 11170: 778: 
20145: 15670: 11171: 779:                 if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {

20147: 15672: 11173: 781:                 }

20152: 15677: 11178: 786:                 });

20154: 15679: 11180: 788:         }
20155: 15680: 11181: 789: 
20156: 15681: 11182: 790:         async function fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework) {
20157: 15682: 11183: 791:             try {
20158: 15683: 11184: 792:                 const endpoints = [txn.endpoint.replace('/api/', '/'), '/', '/login'];
20159: 15684: 11185: 793:                 for (const ep of endpoints) {
20160: 15685: 11186: 794:                     const r = await fetch(`${targetBaseUrl}${ep}`, { credentials: 'include' });
20161: 15686: 11187: 795:                     if (r.ok) {
20162: 15687: 11188: 796:                         const html = await r.text();
20163: 15688: 11189: 797:                         const match = html.match(new RegExp(`name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']\\s+value=["']([^"']+)["']`)) || html.match(new RegExp(`value=["']([^"']+)["']\\s+name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']`));
20164: 15689: 11190: 798:                         const metaMatch = html.match(new RegExp(`name=["']csrf-token["']\\s+content=["']([^"']+)["']`));
20165: 15690: 11191: 799:                         
20166: 15691: 11192: 800:                         const csrfInput = document.getElementById(`${txn.id}_csrf`);
20167: 15692: 11193: 801:                         if (match && csrfInput) { csrfInput.value = match[1]; return; } 
20168: 15693: 11194: 802:                         else if (metaMatch && csrfInput) { csrfInput.value = metaMatch[1]; return; }
20169: 15694: 11195: 803:                     }
20170: 15695: 11196: 804:                 }
20171: 15696: 11197: 805:             } catch (e) {
20172: 15697: 11198: 806:                 console.warn(`CSRF Fetch Error:`, e.message);
20173: 15698: 11199: 807:             }
20174: 15699: 11200: 808:         }
20175: 15700: 11201: 809: 
20176: 15701: 11202: 810:         async function submitTransaction(txn) {
20177: 15702: 11203: 811:             const form = document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`);
20178: 15703: 11204: 812:             const responseBox = document.getElementById(`response-${txn.id}`);
20179: 15704: 11205: 813:             const payload = Object.fromEntries(new FormData(form));
20180: 15705: 11206: 814: 
20181: 15706: 11207: 815:             responseBox.classList.remove('hidden');
20182: 15707: 11208: 816:             responseBox.textContent = '⏳ Mengirim request...';
20183: 15708: 11209: 817:             responseBox.className = 'mt-4 p-3 bg-slate-50 border-l-4 border-slate-300 rounded-r-md font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-600 overflow-y-auto max-h-48 whitespace-pre-wrap';
20184: 15709: 11210: 818: 
20185: 15710: 11211: 819:             try {
20186: 15711: 11212: 820:                 const options = { method: txn.method, credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } };
20187: 15712: 11213: 821:                 if (txn.method !== 'GET') {
20188: 15713: 11214: 822:                     options.headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
20189: 15714: 11215: 823:                     options.body = JSON.stringify(payload);
20190: 15715: 11216: 824:                     if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
20191: 15716: 11217: 825:                         const token = payload[txn.csrf_field_name] || '';
20192: 15717: 11218: 826:                         options.headers['X-CSRF-Token'] = token;
20193: 15718: 11219: 827:                         options.headers['X-XSRF-Token'] = token;
20194: 15719: 11220: 828:                     }
20195: 15720: 11221: 829:                 }
20196: 15721: 11222: 830: 
20197: 15722: 11223: 831:                 const start = performance.now();
20198: 15723: 11224: 832:                 const r = await fetch(`${targetBaseUrl}${txn.endpoint}`, options);
20199: 15724: 11225: 833:                 const elapsed = (performance.now() - start).toFixed(0);
20200: 15725: 11226: 834:                 const text = await r.text();
20201: 15726: 11227: 835: 
20202: 15727: 11228: 836:                 let display = text;
20203: 15728: 11229: 837:                 try { display = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2); } catch {}
20204: 15729: 11230: 838:                 if(display.length > 2000) display = display.substring(0, 2000) + '\n... (truncated)';
20205: 15730: 11231: 839: 
20206: 15731: 11232: 840:                 responseBox.textContent = `HTTP ${r.status} ${r.statusText} (${elapsed}ms)\n\n${display}`;
20207: 15732: 11233: 841:                 
20208: 15733: 11234: 842:                 if (r.ok) responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-emerald-500');
20209: 15734: 11235: 843:                 else if (r.status >= 500) responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-red-500');
20210: 15735: 11236: 844:                 else responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-amber-500');
20211: 15736: 11237: 845: 
20212: 15737: 11238: 846:             } catch (err) {
20213: 15738: 11239: 847:                 responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-red-500');
20214: 15739: 11240: 848:                 responseBox.textContent = `❌ Network Error: ${err.message}\nPastikan server target menyala dan CORS diizinkan.`;
20215: 15740: 11241: 849:             }
20216: 15741: 11242: 850:         }
20217: 15742: 11243: 851:     </script>
20218: 15743: 11244: 852: </body>
20219: 15744: 11245: 853:

20364: 15889:  32:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-laravel-app

20485: 16010: File: server.py
20486: 16011: ================
20487: 16012:  1: import os
20488: 16013:  2: import json
20489: 16014:  3: import subprocess
20490: 16015:  4: from flask import Flask, request, jsonify, Response, send_from_directory
20491: 16016:  5: from flask_cors import CORS
20492: 16017:  6: 
20493: 16018:  7: app = Flask(__name__, static_folder='web_ui', static_url_path='')
20494: 16019:  8: CORS(app)
20495: 16020:  9: 
20496: 16021: 10: @app.route('/')
20497: 16022: 11: def index():
20498: 16023: 12:     return send_from_directory('web_ui', 'index.html')
20499: 16024: 13: 
20500: 16025: 14: @app.route('/api/transactions')
20501: 16026: 15: def get_transactions():
20502: 16027: 16:     """Serve the generated transactions.json file"""
20503: 16028: 17:     output_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), 'output')
20504: 16029: 18:     tx_file = os.path.join(output_dir, 'transactions.json')
20505: 16030: 19:     if os.path.exists(tx_file):
20506: 16031: 20:         with open(tx_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
20507: 16032: 21:             return jsonify(json.load(f))
20508: 16033: 22:     return jsonify({"error": "transactions.json not found. Run the pipeline first."}), 404
20509: 16034: 23: 
20510: 16035: 24: @app.route('/api/run-pipeline', methods=['POST'])
20511: 16036: 25: def run_pipeline():
20512: 16037: 26:     """Run the pipeline and stream the output back to the client using SSE"""
20513: 16038: 27:     data = request.json
20514: 16039: 28:     source = data.get('source')
20515: 16040: 29:     base_url = data.get('base_url')
20516: 16041: 30:     skip_carbon = data.get('skip_carbon', False)
20517: 16042: 31:     
20518: 16043: 32:     if not source:
20519: 16044: 33:         return jsonify({"error": "Source is required"}), 400
20520: 16045: 34:         
20521: 16046: 35:     def generate():
20522: 16047: 36:         cmd = ['python', 'pipeline.py', '--source', source]
20523: 16048: 37:         if base_url:
20524: 16049: 38:             cmd.extend(['--base-url', base_url])
20525: 16050: 39:         if skip_carbon:
20526: 16051: 40:             cmd.append('--skip-carbon')
20527: 16052: 41:             
20528: 16053: 42:         # Ensure unbuffered output so we get lines immediately
20529: 16054: 43:         env = os.environ.copy()
20530: 16055: 44:         env['PYTHONUNBUFFERED'] = '1'
20531: 16056: 45:         
20532: 16057: 46:         process = subprocess.Popen(
20533: 16058: 47:             cmd,
20534: 16059: 48:             stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
20535: 16060: 49:             stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
20536: 16061: 50:             text=True,
20537: 16062: 51:             bufsize=1,
20538: 16063: 52:             env=env,
20539: 16064: 53:             cwd=os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
20540: 16065: 54:         )
20541: 16066: 55:         
20542: 16067: 56:         for line in iter(process.stdout.readline, ''):
20543: 16068: 57:             if line:
20544: 16069: 58:                 # Format as Server-Sent Event
20545: 16070: 59:                 yield f"data: {line.strip()}\n\n"
20546: 16071: 60:                 
20547: 16072: 61:         process.stdout.close()
20548: 16073: 62:         return_code = process.wait()
20549: 16074: 63:         
20550: 16075: 64:         if return_code == 0:
20551: 16076: 65:             yield "data: [DONE]\n\n"
20552: 16077: 66:         else:
20553: 16078: 67:             yield f"data: [ERROR] Pipeline exited with code {return_code}\n\n"
20554: 16079: 68:             
20555: 16080: 69:     return Response(generate(), mimetype='text/event-stream')
20556: 16081: 70: 
20557: 16082: 71: if __name__ == '__main__':
20558: 16083: 72:     print("Starting Code Carbon Server at http://localhost:5000")
20559: 16084: 73:     app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=5000, debug=True)

21074: 16599: 511:     <script>
21075: 16600: 512:         const executionPanel = document.getElementById('executionPanel');
21076: 16601: 513:         const pipelineStatus = document.getElementById('pipelineStatus');
21077: 16602: 514:         const runBtn = document.getElementById('runBtn');
21078: 16603: 515:         const reportView = document.getElementById('reportView');
21079: 16604: 516:         const s3TableBody = document.getElementById('s3-table-body');
21080: 16605: 517:         const s3TableContainer = document.getElementById('s3-table-container');
21081: 16606: 518: 
21082: 16607: 519:         // Load local storage states
21083: 16608: 520:         if (localStorage.getItem('cc_source')) document.getElementById('source').value = localStorage.getItem('cc_source');
21084: 16609: 521:         if (localStorage.getItem('cc_base_url')) document.getElementById('base-url').value = localStorage.getItem('cc_base_url');
21085: 16610: 522:         if (localStorage.getItem('cc_skip_carbon') === 'true') document.getElementById('skip-carbon').checked = true;
21086: 16611: 523: 
21087: 16612: 524:         let targetBaseUrl = '';
21088: 16613: 525:         let totEnergy = 0;
21089: 16614: 526:         let totCo2 = 0;
21090: 16615: 527:         let endpointsCount = 0;
21091: 16616: 528: 
21092: 16617: 529:         // Lock the left card's height to the right card's initial height
21093: 16618: 530:         window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
21094: 16619: 531:             setTimeout(() => {
21095: 16620: 532:                 const configCard = document.getElementById('configCard');
21096: 16621: 533:                 const execPanel = document.getElementById('executionPanel');
21097: 16622: 534:                 if (configCard && execPanel) {
21098: 16623: 535:                     configCard.style.height = 'auto';
21099: 16624: 536:                     execPanel.style.minHeight = 'auto';
21100: 16625: 537:                     
21101: 16626: 538:                     const maxHeight = Math.max(configCard.offsetHeight, execPanel.offsetHeight);
21102: 16627: 539:                     
21103: 16628: 540:                     configCard.style.height = maxHeight + 'px';
21104: 16629: 541:                     execPanel.style.minHeight = maxHeight + 'px';
21105: 16630: 542:                 }
21106: 16631: 543:             }, 100);
21107: 16632: 544:         });
21108: 16633: 545: 
21109: 16634: 546:         function updateStep(stepId, state, msgText) {
21110: 16635: 547:             const el = document.getElementById(`step${stepId}`);
21111: 16636: 548:             const msgEl = document.getElementById(`s${stepId}-msg`);
21112: 16637: 549: 
21113: 16638: 550:             if (state === 'active') {
21114: 16639: 551:                 el.classList.add('step-active');
21115: 16640: 552:                 msgEl.classList.remove('hidden');
21116: 16641: 553:                 if (msgText) msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> ${msgText}`;
21117: 16642: 554:             } else if (state === 'done') {
21118: 16643: 555:                 el.classList.replace('step-active', 'step-done');
21119: 16644: 556:                 msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="text-slate-800 font-semibold">Selesai</span>`;
21120: 16645: 557:             }
21121: 16646: 558:         }
21122: 16647: 559: 
21123: 16648: 560:         async function runPipeline() {
21124: 16649: 561:             const source = document.getElementById('source').value;
21125: 16650: 562:             const baseUrl = document.getElementById('base-url').value;
21126: 16651: 563:             const skipCarbon = document.getElementById('skip-carbon').checked;
21127: 16652: 564:             
21128: 16653: 565:             targetBaseUrl = baseUrl;
21129: 16654: 566:             localStorage.setItem('cc_source', source);
21130: 16655: 567:             localStorage.setItem('cc_base_url', baseUrl);
21131: 16656: 568:             localStorage.setItem('cc_skip_carbon', skipCarbon);
21132: 16657: 569: 
21133: 16658: 570:             runBtn.disabled = true;
21134: 16659: 571:             runBtn.innerText = "Sistem Sedang Berjalan...";
21135: 16660: 572: 
21136: 16661: 573:             executionPanel.classList.remove('opacity-50', 'pointer-events-none');
21137: 16662: 574:             pipelineStatus.className = 'px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded text-xs font-semibold';
21138: 16663: 575:             pipelineStatus.innerText = 'Aktif';
21139: 16664: 576:             reportView.classList.remove('show-view');
21140: 16665: 577:             reportView.classList.add('hidden-view');
21141: 16666: 578:             document.getElementById('tx-container').style.display = 'none';
21142: 16667: 579: 
21143: 16668: 580:             // Reset
21144: 16669: 581:             for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
21145: 16670: 582:                 document.getElementById(`step${i}`).className = 'step-item' + (i === 4 ? ' pb-0' : '');
21146: 16671: 583:                 document.getElementById(`s${i}-msg`).classList.add('hidden');
21147: 16672: 584:             }
21148: 16673: 585:             document.getElementById('s4-action').classList.add('hidden');
21149: 16674: 586:             document.getElementById('s3-console').classList.add('hidden');
21150: 16675: 587:             document.getElementById('s3-summary').classList.add('hidden');
21151: 16676: 588:             
21152: 16677: 589:             s3TableBody.innerHTML = '';
21153: 16678: 590:             totEnergy = 0;
21154: 16679: 591:             totCo2 = 0;
21155: 16680: 592:             endpointsCount = 0;
21156: 16681: 593: 
21157: 16682: 594:             try {
21158: 16683: 595:                 const response = await fetch('/api/run-pipeline', {
21159: 16684: 596:                     method: 'POST',
21160: 16685: 597:                     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
21161: 16686: 598:                     body: JSON.stringify({
21162: 16687: 599:                         source: source,
21163: 16688: 600:                         base_url: baseUrl,
21164: 16689: 601:                         skip_carbon: skipCarbon
21165: 16690: 602:                     })
21166: 16691: 603:                 });
21167: 16692: 604: 
21168: 16693: 605:                 if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Server returned ${response.status}`);
21169: 16694: 606: 
21170: 16695: 607:                 const reader = response.body.getReader();
21171: 16696: 608:                 const decoder = new TextDecoder('utf-8');
21172: 16697: 609: 
21173: 16698: 610:                 while (true) {
21174: 16699: 611:                     const { done, value } = await reader.read();
21175: 16700: 612:                     if (done) break;
21176: 16701: 613: 
21177: 16702: 614:                     const chunk = decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
21178: 16703: 615:                     const lines = chunk.split('\n\n');
21179: 16704: 616: 
21180: 16705: 617:                     for (const line of lines) {
21181: 16706: 618:                         if (line.startsWith('data: ')) {
21182: 16707: 619:                             const data = line.slice(6);
21183: 16708: 620:                             
21184: 16709: 621:                             if (data === '[DONE]') {
21185: 16710: 622:                                 await handlePipelineComplete();
21186: 16711: 623:                                 break;
21187: 16712: 624:                             }
21188: 16713: 625: 
21189: 16714: 626:                             // Identify steps
21190: 16715: 627:                             if (data.includes('Agent 1')) {
21191: 16716: 628:                                 updateStep(1, 'active', 'Memindai kerangka proyek...');
21192: 16717: 629:                             } else if (data.includes('Agent 2')) {
21193: 16718: 630:                                 updateStep(1, 'done');
21194: 16719: 631:                                 
21195: 16720: 632:                                 // Parse discovered endpoints to show in UI
21196: 16721: 633:                                 const txnMatch = data.match(/(GET|POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE)\s+(\/[^\s]*)/);
21197: 16722: 634:                                 if (txnMatch) {
21198: 16723: 635:                                     updateStep(2, 'active', `Mendeteksi: ${txnMatch[1]} ${txnMatch[2]}`);
21199: 16724: 636:                                 } else if (!document.getElementById('s2-msg').innerText.includes('Mendeteksi')) {
21200: 16725: 637:                                     updateStep(2, 'active', 'Mengirim konteks ke AI...');
21201: 16726: 638:                                 }
21202: 16727: 639:                                 
21203: 16728: 640:                             } else if (data.includes('Agent 3')) {
21204: 16729: 641:                                 updateStep(2, 'done');
21205: 16730: 642:                                 updateStep(3, 'active', 'Menguji endpoint...');
21206: 16731: 643:                                 document.getElementById('s3-console').classList.remove('hidden');
21207: 16732: 644:                             } else if (data.includes('Agent 4')) {
21208: 16733: 645:                                 updateStep(3, 'done');
21209: 16734: 646:                                 updateStep(4, 'active', 'Menyusun laporan akhir...');
21210: 16735: 647:                                 document.getElementById('s3-summary').classList.remove('hidden');
21211: 16736: 648:                             }
21212: 16737: 649: 
21213: 16738: 650:                             // Match Carbon Row: "✅ [200] GET /api/users - 120ms - 0.00012g CO₂"
21214: 16739: 651:                             const rowMatch = data.match(/\[(\d+)\]\s+(\w+)\s+(.*?)\s+-\s+(\d+)ms\s+-\s+([\d\.]+)mWh\s+-\s+([\d\.]+)g/);
21215: 16740: 652:                             if (rowMatch) {
21216: 16741: 653:                                 const statusVal = rowMatch[1];
21217: 16742: 654:                                 const method = rowMatch[2];
21218: 16743: 655:                                 const path = rowMatch[3];
21219: 16744: 656:                                 const ms = rowMatch[4];
21220: 16745: 657:                                 const energy = parseFloat(rowMatch[5]);
21221: 16746: 658:                                 const co2 = parseFloat(rowMatch[6]);
21222: 16747: 659: 
21223: 16748: 660:                                 totEnergy += energy;
21224: 16749: 661:                                 totCo2 += co2;
21225: 16750: 662:                                 endpointsCount++;
21226: 16751: 663: 
21227: 16752: 664:                                 document.getElementById(`s3-msg`).innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> Menguji (${endpointsCount})...`;
21228: 16753: 665:                                 document.getElementById('s3-tot-energy').innerText = totEnergy.toFixed(4);
21229: 16754: 666:                                 document.getElementById('s3-tot-co2').innerText = totCo2.toFixed(5);
21230: 16755: 667: 
21231: 16756: 668:                                 const statusHtml = `<span class="text-slate-500">[${statusVal}]</span>`;
21232: 16757: 669:                                 const tr = document.createElement('tr');
21233: 16758: 670:                                 tr.className = "hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors";
21234: 16759: 671:                                 tr.innerHTML = `

21246: 16771: 683:                     }

21277: 16802: 714:                     document.getElementById('framework-info').textContent = `${data.framework || 'Unknown'} / ${data.language || 'Unknown'}`;
21278: 16803: 715:                     renderTransactions(data.transactions || [], data.framework || 'unknown');
21279: 16804: 716:                     document.getElementById('tx-container').style.display = 'block';
21280: 16805: 717:                 }

21283: 16808: 720:             }
