21285: 16810: 722: 
21286: 16811: 723:         function renderTransactions(transactions, framework) {
21287: 16812: 724:             const app = document.getElementById('app');
21288: 16813: 725:             app.innerHTML = '';
21289: 16814: 726: 
21290: 16815: 727:             transactions.forEach((txn) => {
21291: 16816: 728:                 const card = document.createElement('div');
21292: 16817: 729:                 card.className = 'bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm';
21293: 16818: 730:                 card.id = `txn-${txn.id}`;
21294: 16819: 731: 
21295: 16820: 732:                 let methodColor = 'bg-slate-800 text-white';
21296: 16821: 733:                 if(txn.method === 'POST') methodColor = 'bg-emerald-600 text-white';
21297: 16822: 734:                 if(txn.method === 'DELETE') methodColor = 'bg-red-500 text-white';
21298: 16823: 735:                 if(txn.method === 'PUT') methodColor = 'bg-amber-500 text-slate-900';
21299: 16824: 736: 
21300: 16825: 737:                 const badgesHtml = [
21301: 16826: 738:                     `<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide mr-2 ${methodColor}">${txn.method}</span>`,
21302: 16827: 739:                     txn.requires_csrf ? '<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold text-amber-700 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 mr-2">🔐 CSRF Protected</span>' : '',
21303: 16828: 740:                     txn.requires_auth ? '<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold text-blue-700 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 mr-2">🔑 Auth Required</span>' : '',
21304: 16829: 741:                 ].filter(Boolean).join('');
21305: 16830: 742: 
21306: 16831: 743:                 let fieldsHtml = '';
21307: 16832: 744:                 (txn.fields || []).forEach(f => {
21308: 16833: 745:                     const inputType = { 'email': 'email', 'password': 'password', 'integer': 'number', 'number': 'number' }[f.type] || 'text';
21309: 16834: 746:                     const req = f.required ? '<span class="text-red-500">*</span>' : '';
21310: 16835: 747:                     const rules = (f.validation_rules || []).join(', ');
21311: 16836: 748:                     
21312: 16837: 749:                     fieldsHtml += `
21313: 16838: 750:                         <div class="mb-3">
21314: 16839: 751:                             <label class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-1" for="${txn.id}_${f.name}">
21315: 16840: 752:                                 ${f.name} ${req} <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400 ml-1">(${f.type}${rules ? ' - ' + rules : ''})</span>
21316: 16841: 753:                             </label>
21317: 16842: 754:                             <input type="${inputType}" id="${txn.id}_${f.name}" name="${f.name}" class="input-field" placeholder="${f.description || f.name}" ${f.required ? 'required' : ''}>
21318: 16843: 755:                         </div>`;
21319: 16844: 756:                 });
21320: 16845: 757: 
21321: 16846: 758:                 if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
21322: 16847: 759:                     fieldsHtml += `
21323: 16848: 760:                         <div class="mb-3 p-3 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 border-dashed rounded-lg opacity-80">
21324: 16849: 761:                             <label class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-1">CSRF Token <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400 ml-1">(Auto-fetched: ${txn.csrf_field_name})</span></label>
21325: 16850: 762:                             <input type="text" id="${txn.id}_csrf" name="${txn.csrf_field_name}" class="input-field bg-slate-100" placeholder="Fetching..." readonly>
21326: 16851: 763:                         </div>`;
21327: 16852: 764:                 }
21328: 16853: 765: 
21329: 16854: 766:                 card.innerHTML = `
21330: 16855: 767:                     <div class="flex items-center mb-3">${badgesHtml}</div>
21331: 16856: 768:                     <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-800 font-mono mb-1 break-all">${txn.endpoint}</h3>
21332: 16857: 769:                     <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 mb-5">${txn.description || 'No description available.'}</p>
21333: 16858: 770:                     <form id="form-${txn.id}">
21334: 16859: 771:                         ${fieldsHtml}
21335: 16860: 772:                         <button type="submit" class="w-full mt-2 py-2 px-4 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-md text-xs font-semibold transition-colors">Test ${txn.method} Request</button>
21336: 16861: 773:                     </form>
21337: 16862: 774:                     <div id="response-${txn.id}" class="mt-4 p-3 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-md font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-600 overflow-y-auto max-h-48 whitespace-pre-wrap hidden"></div>
21338: 16863: 775:                 `;
21339: 16864: 776: 
21340: 16865: 777:                 app.appendChild(card);
21341: 16866: 778: 
21342: 16867: 779:                 if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
21343: 16868: 780:                     fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework);
21344: 16869: 781:                 }
21345: 16870: 782: 
21346: 16871: 783:                 document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`).addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
21347: 16872: 784:                     e.preventDefault();
21348: 16873: 785:                     await submitTransaction(txn);
21349: 16874: 786:                 });
21350: 16875: 787:             });
21351: 16876: 788:         }
21352: 16877: 789: 
21353: 16878: 790:         async function fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework) {
21354: 16879: 791:             try {
21355: 16880: 792:                 const endpoints = [txn.endpoint.replace('/api/', '/'), '/', '/login'];
21356: 16881: 793:                 for (const ep of endpoints) {
21357: 16882: 794:                     const r = await fetch(`${targetBaseUrl}${ep}`, { credentials: 'include' });
21358: 16883: 795:                     if (r.ok) {
21359: 16884: 796:                         const html = await r.text();
21360: 16885: 797:                         const match = html.match(new RegExp(`name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']\\s+value=["']([^"']+)["']`)) || html.match(new RegExp(`value=["']([^"']+)["']\\s+name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']`));
21361: 16886: 798:                         const metaMatch = html.match(new RegExp(`name=["']csrf-token["']\\s+content=["']([^"']+)["']`));
21362: 16887: 799:                         
21363: 16888: 800:                         const csrfInput = document.getElementById(`${txn.id}_csrf`);
21364: 16889: 801:                         if (match && csrfInput) { csrfInput.value = match[1]; return; } 
21365: 16890: 802:                         else if (metaMatch && csrfInput) { csrfInput.value = metaMatch[1]; return; }
21366: 16891: 803:                     }
21367: 16892: 804:                 }
21368: 16893: 805:             } catch (e) {
21369: 16894: 806:                 console.warn(`CSRF Fetch Error:`, e.message);
21370: 16895: 807:             }
21371: 16896: 808:         }
21372: 16897: 809: 
21373: 16898: 810:         async function submitTransaction(txn) {
21374: 16899: 811:             const form = document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`);
21375: 16900: 812:             const responseBox = document.getElementById(`response-${txn.id}`);
21376: 16901: 813:             const payload = Object.fromEntries(new FormData(form));
21377: 16902: 814: 
21378: 16903: 815:             responseBox.classList.remove('hidden');
21379: 16904: 816:             responseBox.textContent = '⏳ Mengirim request...';
21380: 16905: 817:             responseBox.className = 'mt-4 p-3 bg-slate-50 border-l-4 border-slate-300 rounded-r-md font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-600 overflow-y-auto max-h-48 whitespace-pre-wrap';
21381: 16906: 818: 
21382: 16907: 819:             try {
21383: 16908: 820:                 const options = { method: txn.method, credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } };
21384: 16909: 821:                 if (txn.method !== 'GET') {
21385: 16910: 822:                     options.headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
21386: 16911: 823:                     options.body = JSON.stringify(payload);
21387: 16912: 824:                     if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
21388: 16913: 825:                         const token = payload[txn.csrf_field_name] || '';
21389: 16914: 826:                         options.headers['X-CSRF-Token'] = token;
21390: 16915: 827:                         options.headers['X-XSRF-Token'] = token;
21391: 16916: 828:                     }
21392: 16917: 829:                 }
21393: 16918: 830: 
21394: 16919: 831:                 const start = performance.now();
21395: 16920: 832:                 const r = await fetch(`${targetBaseUrl}${txn.endpoint}`, options);
21396: 16921: 833:                 const elapsed = (performance.now() - start).toFixed(0);
21397: 16922: 834:                 const text = await r.text();
21398: 16923: 835: 
21399: 16924: 836:                 let display = text;
21400: 16925: 837:                 try { display = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2); } catch {}
21401: 16926: 838:                 if(display.length > 2000) display = display.substring(0, 2000) + '\n... (truncated)';
21402: 16927: 839: 
21403: 16928: 840:                 responseBox.textContent = `HTTP ${r.status} ${r.statusText} (${elapsed}ms)\n\n${display}`;
21404: 16929: 841:                 
21405: 16930: 842:                 if (r.ok) responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-emerald-500');
21406: 16931: 843:                 else if (r.status >= 500) responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-red-500');
21407: 16932: 844:                 else responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-amber-500');
21408: 16933: 845: 
21409: 16934: 846:             } catch (err) {
21410: 16935: 847:                 responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-red-500');
21411: 16936: 848:                 responseBox.textContent = `❌ Network Error: ${err.message}\nPastikan server target menyala dan CORS diizinkan.`;
21412: 16937: 849:             }
21413: 16938: 850:         }
21414: 16939: 851:     </script>
21415: 16940: 852: </body>
21416: 16941: 853: 
21417: 16942: 854: </html>
21418: 16943: 
21419: 16944: 
21420: 16945:

21530:   1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
21531:   2: """
21532:   3: Pipeline Orchestrator
21533:   4: Runs all 4 agents in sequence.
21534:   5: """
21535:   6: 
21536:   7: import sys
21537:   8: import os
21538:   9: import json
21539:  10: import argparse
21540:  11: from dataclasses import asdict
21541:  12: from pathlib import Path
21542:  13: 
21543:  14: # Fix Windows console Unicode encoding
21544:  15: if sys.platform == "win32":
21545:  16:     sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace", line_buffering=True)
21546:  17:     sys.stderr.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace", line_buffering=True)
21547:  18: 
21548:  19: import agent1_ingestion
21549:  20: import agent2_gemini_identifier
21550:  21: import agent3_carbon
21551:  22: import agent4_report
21552:  23: 
21553:  24: 
21554:  25: def main():
21555:  26:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
21556:  27:         description="Multi-Agent Code Carbon Pipeline",
21557:  28:         formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
21558:  29:         epilog="""
21559:  30: Examples:
21560:  31:   # Local directory
21561:  32:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-laravel-app
21562:  33: 
21563:  34:   # Git repository
21564:  35:   python pipeline.py --source https://github.com/user/repo
21565:  36: 
21566:  37:   # Skip carbon testing (no live app running)
21567:  38:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --skip-carbon
21568:  39: 
21569:  40:   # Specify output directory
21570:  41:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --output ./my-analysis
21571:  42:         """
21572:  43:     )
21573:  44:     parser.add_argument("--source", required=True, help="Local path or Git URL")
21574:  45:     parser.add_argument("--output", default="./output", help="Output directory")
21575:  46:     parser.add_argument("--skip-carbon", action="store_true",
21576:  47:                         help="Skip Agent 3 (no live app required)")
21577:  48:     parser.add_argument("--base-url", default=None,
21578:  49:                         help="Override TARGET_BASE_URL for Agent 3")
21579:  50: 
21580:  51:     args = parser.parse_args()
21581:  52: 
21582:  53:     if args.base_url:
21583:  54:         import os
21584:  55:         os.environ["TARGET_BASE_URL"] = args.base_url
21585:  56: 
21586:  57:     print("=" * 60)
21587:  58:     print("🤖 MULTI-AGENT CODE CARBON PIPELINE")
21588:  59:     print("=" * 60)
21589:  60: 
21590:  61:     # ── Agent 1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
21591:  62:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion")
21592:  63:     ingestion = agent1_ingestion.run(args.source, args.output)
21593:  64:     if not ingestion.success:
21594:  65:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 1 failed: {ingestion.error}")
21595:  66:         sys.exit(1)
21596:  67: 
21597:  68:     # Save ingestion result
21598:  69:     with open(f"{args.output}/ingestion_result.json", "w") as f:
21599:  70:         json.dump(asdict(ingestion), f, indent=2)
21600:  71: 
21601:  72:     # ── Agent 2 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
21602:  73:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier")
21603:  74:     identification = agent2_gemini_identifier.run(
21604:  75:         ingestion.flat_file_path,
21605:  76:         ingestion.detected_framework
21606:  77:     )
21607:  78:     if not identification.success:
21608:  79:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 2 failed: {identification.error}")
21609:  80:         sys.exit(1)
21610:  81: 
21611:  82:     # ── Agent 3 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
21612:  83:     if args.skip_carbon:
21613:  84:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ⏭  Agent 3 — Skipped (--skip-carbon)")
21614:  85:         # Create empty carbon result
21615:  86:         empty_carbon = {
21616:  87:             "success": True, "base_url": "", "total_requests": 0,
21617:  88:             "successful_requests": 0, "failed_requests": 0,
21618:  89:             "total_energy_kwh": 0.0, "total_co2_kg": 0.0,
21619:  90:             "avg_response_time_ms": 0.0, "measurements": []
21620:  91:         }
21621:  92:         with open(f"{args.output}/carbon_report.json", "w") as f:
21622:  93:             json.dump(empty_carbon, f, indent=2)
21623:  94:     else:
21624:  95:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 3 — Code Carbon")
21625:  96:         carbon = agent3_carbon.run(f"{args.output}/transactions.json")
21626:  97:         if not carbon.success:
21627:  98:             print(f"[PIPELINE] ⚠️  Agent 3 warning: {carbon.error}")
21628:  99: 
21629: 100:     # ── Agent 4 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
21630: 101:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 4 — Refactor Report")
21631: 102:     report_path = agent4_report.run(args.output)
21632: 103: 
21633: 104:     print("\n" + "=" * 60)
21634: 105:     print("✅ PIPELINE COMPLETE")
21635: 106:     print(f"📄 Report: {report_path}")

21681: ================
21682: File: server.py
21683: ================
21684:  1: import os
21685:  2: import json
21686:  3: import subprocess
21687:  4: from flask import Flask, request, jsonify, Response, send_from_directory
21688:  5: from flask_cors import CORS
21689:  6: 
21690:  7: app = Flask(__name__, static_folder='web_ui', static_url_path='')
21691:  8: CORS(app)
21692:  9: 
21693: 10: @app.route('/')
21694: 11: def index():
21695: 12:     return send_from_directory('web_ui', 'index.html')
21696: 13: 
21697: 14: @app.route('/api/transactions')
21698: 15: def get_transactions():
21699: 16:     """Serve the generated transactions.json file"""
21700: 17:     output_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), 'output')
21701: 18:     tx_file = os.path.join(output_dir, 'transactions.json')
21702: 19:     if os.path.exists(tx_file):
21703: 20:         with open(tx_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
21704: 21:             return jsonify(json.load(f))
21705: 22:     return jsonify({"error": "transactions.json not found. Run the pipeline first."}), 404
21706: 23: 
21707: 24: @app.route('/api/run-pipeline', methods=['POST'])
21708: 25: def run_pipeline():
21709: 26:     """Run the pipeline and stream the output back to the client using SSE"""
21710: 27:     data = request.json
21711: 28:     source = data.get('source')
21712: 29:     base_url = data.get('base_url')
21713: 30:     skip_carbon = data.get('skip_carbon', False)
21714: 31:     
21715: 32:     if not source:
21716: 33:         return jsonify({"error": "Source is required"}), 400
21717: 34:         
21718: 35:     def generate():
21719: 36:         cmd = ['python', 'pipeline.py', '--source', source]
21720: 37:         if base_url:
21721: 38:             cmd.extend(['--base-url', base_url])
21722: 39:         if skip_carbon:
21723: 40:             cmd.append('--skip-carbon')
21724: 41:             
21725: 42:         # Ensure unbuffered output so we get lines immediately
21726: 43:         env = os.environ.copy()
21727: 44:         env['PYTHONUNBUFFERED'] = '1'
21728: 45:         
21729: 46:         process = subprocess.Popen(
21730: 47:             cmd,
21731: 48:             stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
21732: 49:             stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
21733: 50:             text=True,
21734: 51:             bufsize=1,
21735: 52:             env=env,
21736: 53:             cwd=os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
21737: 54:         )
21738: 55:         
21739: 56:         for line in iter(process.stdout.readline, ''):
21740: 57:             if line:
21741: 58:                 # Format as Server-Sent Event
21742: 59:                 yield f"data: {line.strip()}\n\n"
21743: 60:                 
21744: 61:         process.stdout.close()
21745: 62:         return_code = process.wait()
21746: 63:         
21747: 64:         if return_code == 0:
21748: 65:             yield "data: [DONE]\n\n"
21749: 66:         else:
21750: 67:             yield f"data: [ERROR] Pipeline exited with code {return_code}\n\n"
21751: 68:             
21752: 69:     return Response(generate(), mimetype='text/event-stream')
21753: 70: 
21754: 71: if __name__ == '__main__':
21755: 72:     print("Starting Code Carbon Server at http://localhost:5000")
21756: 73:     app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=5000, debug=True)
21757:

22271: 511:     <script>
22272: 512:         const executionPanel = document.getElementById('executionPanel');
22273: 513:         const pipelineStatus = document.getElementById('pipelineStatus');
22274: 514:         const runBtn = document.getElementById('runBtn');
22275: 515:         const reportView = document.getElementById('reportView');
22276: 516:         const s3TableBody = document.getElementById('s3-table-body');
22277: 517:         const s3TableContainer = document.getElementById('s3-table-container');
22278: 518: 
22279: 519:         // Load local storage states
22280: 520:         if (localStorage.getItem('cc_source')) document.getElementById('source').value = localStorage.getItem('cc_source');
22281: 521:         if (localStorage.getItem('cc_base_url')) document.getElementById('base-url').value = localStorage.getItem('cc_base_url');
22282: 522:         if (localStorage.getItem('cc_skip_carbon') === 'true') document.getElementById('skip-carbon').checked = true;
22283: 523: 
22284: 524:         let targetBaseUrl = '';
22285: 525:         let totEnergy = 0;
22286: 526:         let totCo2 = 0;
22287: 527:         let endpointsCount = 0;
22288: 528: 
22289: 529:         // Lock the left card's height to the right card's initial height
22290: 530:         window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
22291: 531:             setTimeout(() => {
22292: 532:                 const configCard = document.getElementById('configCard');
22293: 533:                 const execPanel = document.getElementById('executionPanel');
22294: 534:                 if (configCard && execPanel) {
22295: 535:                     configCard.style.height = 'auto';
22296: 536:                     execPanel.style.minHeight = 'auto';
22297: 537:                     
22298: 538:                     const maxHeight = Math.max(configCard.offsetHeight, execPanel.offsetHeight);
22299: 539:                     
22300: 540:                     configCard.style.height = maxHeight + 'px';
22301: 541:                     execPanel.style.minHeight = maxHeight + 'px';
22302: 542:                 }
22303: 543:             }, 100);
22304: 544:         });
22305: 545: 
22306: 546:         function updateStep(stepId, state, msgText) {
22307: 547:             const el = document.getElementById(`step${stepId}`);
22308: 548:             const msgEl = document.getElementById(`s${stepId}-msg`);
22309: 549: 
22310: 550:             if (state === 'active') {
22311: 551:                 el.classList.add('step-active');
22312: 552:                 msgEl.classList.remove('hidden');
22313: 553:                 if (msgText) msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> ${msgText}`;
22314: 554:             } else if (state === 'done') {
22315: 555:                 el.classList.replace('step-active', 'step-done');
22316: 556:                 msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="text-slate-800 font-semibold">Selesai</span>`;
22317: 557:             }
22318: 558:         }
22319: 559: 
22320: 560:         async function runPipeline() {
22321: 561:             const source = document.getElementById('source').value;
22322: 562:             const baseUrl = document.getElementById('base-url').value;
22323: 563:             const skipCarbon = document.getElementById('skip-carbon').checked;
22324: 564:             
22325: 565:             targetBaseUrl = baseUrl;
22326: 566:             localStorage.setItem('cc_source', source);
22327: 567:             localStorage.setItem('cc_base_url', baseUrl);
22328: 568:             localStorage.setItem('cc_skip_carbon', skipCarbon);
22329: 569: 
22330: 570:             runBtn.disabled = true;
22331: 571:             runBtn.innerText = "Sistem Sedang Berjalan...";
22332: 572: 
22333: 573:             executionPanel.classList.remove('opacity-50', 'pointer-events-none');
22334: 574:             pipelineStatus.className = 'px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded text-xs font-semibold';
22335: 575:             pipelineStatus.innerText = 'Aktif';
22336: 576:             reportView.classList.remove('show-view');
22337: 577:             reportView.classList.add('hidden-view');
22338: 578:             document.getElementById('tx-container').style.display = 'none';
22339: 579: 
22340: 580:             // Reset
22341: 581:             for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
22342: 582:                 document.getElementById(`step${i}`).className = 'step-item' + (i === 4 ? ' pb-0' : '');
22343: 583:                 document.getElementById(`s${i}-msg`).classList.add('hidden');
22344: 584:             }
22345: 585:             document.getElementById('s4-action').classList.add('hidden');
22346: 586:             document.getElementById('s3-console').classList.add('hidden');
22347: 587:             document.getElementById('s3-summary').classList.add('hidden');
22348: 588:             
22349: 589:             s3TableBody.innerHTML = '';
22350: 590:             totEnergy = 0;
22351: 591:             totCo2 = 0;
22352: 592:             endpointsCount = 0;
22353: 593: 
22354: 594:             try {
22355: 595:                 const response = await fetch('/api/run-pipeline', {
22356: 596:                     method: 'POST',
22357: 597:                     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
22358: 598:                     body: JSON.stringify({
22359: 599:                         source: source,
22360: 600:                         base_url: baseUrl,
22361: 601:                         skip_carbon: skipCarbon
22362: 602:                     })
22363: 603:                 });
22364: 604: 
22365: 605:                 if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Server returned ${response.status}`);
22366: 606: 
22367: 607:                 const reader = response.body.getReader();
22368: 608:                 const decoder = new TextDecoder('utf-8');
22369: 609: 
22370: 610:                 while (true) {
22371: 611:                     const { done, value } = await reader.read();
22372: 612:                     if (done) break;
22373: 613: 
22374: 614:                     const chunk = decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
22375: 615:                     const lines = chunk.split('\n\n');
22376: 616: 
22377: 617:                     for (const line of lines) {
22378: 618:                         if (line.startsWith('data: ')) {
22379: 619:                             const data = line.slice(6);
22380: 620:                             
22381: 621:                             if (data === '[DONE]') {
22382: 622:                                 await handlePipelineComplete();
22383: 623:                                 break;
22384: 624:                             }
22385: 625: 
22386: 626:                             // Identify steps
22387: 627:                             if (data.includes('Agent 1')) {
22388: 628:                                 updateStep(1, 'active', 'Memindai kerangka proyek...');
22389: 629:                             } else if (data.includes('Agent 2')) {
22390: 630:                                 updateStep(1, 'done');
22391: 631:                                 
22392: 632:                                 // Parse discovered endpoints to show in UI
22393: 633:                                 const txnMatch = data.match(/(GET|POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE)\s+(\/[^\s]*)/);
22394: 634:                                 if (txnMatch) {
22395: 635:                                     updateStep(2, 'active', `Mendeteksi: ${txnMatch[1]} ${txnMatch[2]}`);
22396: 636:                                 } else if (!document.getElementById('s2-msg').innerText.includes('Mendeteksi')) {
22397: 637:                                     updateStep(2, 'active', 'Mengirim konteks ke AI...');
22398: 638:                                 }
22399: 639:                                 
22400: 640:                             } else if (data.includes('Agent 3')) {
22401: 641:                                 updateStep(2, 'done');
22402: 642:                                 updateStep(3, 'active', 'Menguji endpoint...');
22403: 643:                                 document.getElementById('s3-console').classList.remove('hidden');
22404: 644:                             } else if (data.includes('Agent 4')) {
22405: 645:                                 updateStep(3, 'done');
22406: 646:                                 updateStep(4, 'active', 'Menyusun laporan akhir...');
22407: 647:                                 document.getElementById('s3-summary').classList.remove('hidden');
22408: 648:                             }
22409: 649: 
22410: 650:                             // Match Carbon Row: "✅ [200] GET /api/users - 120ms - 0.00012g CO₂"
22411: 651:                             const rowMatch = data.match(/\[(\d+)\]\s+(\w+)\s+(.*?)\s+-\s+(\d+)ms\s+-\s+([\d\.]+)mWh\s+-\s+([\d\.]+)g/);
22412: 652:                             if (rowMatch) {
22413: 653:                                 const statusVal = rowMatch[1];
22414: 654:                                 const method = rowMatch[2];
22415: 655:                                 const path = rowMatch[3];
22416: 656:                                 const ms = rowMatch[4];
22417: 657:                                 const energy = parseFloat(rowMatch[5]);
22418: 658:                                 const co2 = parseFloat(rowMatch[6]);
22419: 659: 
22420: 660:                                 totEnergy += energy;
22421: 661:                                 totCo2 += co2;
22422: 662:                                 endpointsCount++;
22423: 663: 
22424: 664:                                 document.getElementById(`s3-msg`).innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> Menguji (${endpointsCount})...`;
22425: 665:                                 document.getElementById('s3-tot-energy').innerText = totEnergy.toFixed(4);
22426: 666:                                 document.getElementById('s3-tot-co2').innerText = totCo2.toFixed(5);
22427: 667: 
22428: 668:                                 const statusHtml = `<span class="text-slate-500">[${statusVal}]</span>`;
22429: 669:                                 const tr = document.createElement('tr');
22430: 670:                                 tr.className = "hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors";
22431: 671:                                 tr.innerHTML = `
22432: 672:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 whitespace-nowrap font-medium text-slate-700">${method}</td>
22433: 673:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 truncate max-w-[150px] text-slate-500">${path}</td>
22434: 674:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2">${statusHtml}</td>
22435: 675:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-400">${ms}ms</td>
22436: 676:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-700 font-medium">${energy.toFixed(4)}</td>
22437: 677:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-700 font-medium">${co2.toFixed(5)}</td>
22438: 678:                                 `;
22439: 679:                                 s3TableBody.appendChild(tr);
22440: 680:                                 s3TableContainer.scrollTop = s3TableContainer.scrollHeight;
22441: 681:                             }
22442: 682:                         }
22443: 683:                     }
22444: 684:                 }
22445: 685:             } catch (err) {
22446: 686:                 console.error(err);
22447: 687:                 alert("Koneksi gagal: " + err.message);
22448: 688:                 runBtn.disabled = false;
22449: 689:                 runBtn.innerText = "Jalankan Ulang Audit";
22450: 690:             }
22451: 691:         }
22452: 692: 
22453: 693:         async function handlePipelineComplete() {
22454: 694:             updateStep(4, 'done');
22455: 695:             document.getElementById('s4-action').classList.remove('hidden');
22456: 696:             pipelineStatus.className = 'px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-100 border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 rounded text-xs font-medium';
22457: 697:             pipelineStatus.innerText = 'Selesai';
22458: 698:             runBtn.disabled = false;
22459: 699:             runBtn.innerText = "Jalankan Ulang Audit";
22460: 700: 
22461: 701:             // Show report view
22462: 702:             setTimeout(() => {
22463: 703:                 reportView.classList.remove('hidden-view');
22464: 704:                 reportView.classList.add('show-view');
22465: 705:                 reportView.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
22466: 706:             }, 500);
22467: 707: 
22468: 708:             // Fetch dynamic transactions generated by backend
22469: 709:             try {
22470: 710:                 const res = await fetch('/api/transactions');
22471: 711:                 if (res.ok) {
22472: 712:                     const data = await res.json();
22473: 713:                     document.getElementById('rep-endpoints').innerText = data.total_routes || endpointsCount || 0;
22474: 714:                     document.getElementById('framework-info').textContent = `${data.framework || 'Unknown'} / ${data.language || 'Unknown'}`;
22475: 715:                     renderTransactions(data.transactions || [], data.framework || 'unknown');
22476: 716:                     document.getElementById('tx-container').style.display = 'block';
22477: 717:                 }
22478: 718:             } catch (err) {
22479: 719:                 console.error("Gagal memuat file transaksi:", err);
22480: 720:             }
22481: 721:         }
22482: 722: 
22483: 723:         function renderTransactions(transactions, framework) {
22484: 724:             const app = document.getElementById('app');
22485: 725:             app.innerHTML = '';
22486: 726: 
22487: 727:             transactions.forEach((txn) => {
22488: 728:                 const card = document.createElement('div');
22489: 729:                 card.className = 'bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm';
22490: 730:                 card.id = `txn-${txn.id}`;
22491: 731: 
22492: 732:                 let methodColor = 'bg-slate-800 text-white';
22493: 733:                 if(txn.method === 'POST') methodColor = 'bg-emerald-600 text-white';
22494: 734:                 if(txn.method === 'DELETE') methodColor = 'bg-red-500 text-white';
22495: 735:                 if(txn.method === 'PUT') methodColor = 'bg-amber-500 text-slate-900';
22496: 736: 
22497: 737:                 const badgesHtml = [
22498: 738:                     `<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide mr-2 ${methodColor}">${txn.method}</span>`,
22499: 739:                     txn.requires_csrf ? '<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold text-amber-700 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 mr-2">🔐 CSRF Protected</span>' : '',
22500: 740:                     txn.requires_auth ? '<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold text-blue-700 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 mr-2">🔑 Auth Required</span>' : '',
22501: 741:                 ].filter(Boolean).join('');
22502: 742: 
22503: 743:                 let fieldsHtml = '';
22504: 744:                 (txn.fields || []).forEach(f => {
22505: 745:                     const inputType = { 'email': 'email', 'password': 'password', 'integer': 'number', 'number': 'number' }[f.type] || 'text';
22506: 746:                     const req = f.required ? '<span class="text-red-500">*</span>' : '';
22507: 747:                     const rules = (f.validation_rules || []).join(', ');
22508: 748:                     
22509: 749:                     fieldsHtml += `
22510: 750:                         <div class="mb-3">
22511: 751:                             <label class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-1" for="${txn.id}_${f.name}">
22512: 752:                                 ${f.name} ${req} <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400 ml-1">(${f.type}${rules ? ' - ' + rules : ''})</span>
22513: 753:                             </label>
22514: 754:                             <input type="${inputType}" id="${txn.id}_${f.name}" name="${f.name}" class="input-field" placeholder="${f.description || f.name}" ${f.required ? 'required' : ''}>
22515: 755:                         </div>`;
22516: 756:                 });
22517: 757: 
22518: 758:                 if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
22519: 759:                     fieldsHtml += `
22520: 760:                         <div class="mb-3 p-3 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 border-dashed rounded-lg opacity-80">
22521: 761:                             <label class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-1">CSRF Token <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400 ml-1">(Auto-fetched: ${txn.csrf_field_name})</span></label>
22522: 762:                             <input type="text" id="${txn.id}_csrf" name="${txn.csrf_field_name}" class="input-field bg-slate-100" placeholder="Fetching..." readonly>
22523: 763:                         </div>`;
22524: 764:                 }
22525: 765: 
22526: 766:                 card.innerHTML = `
22527: 767:                     <div class="flex items-center mb-3">${badgesHtml}</div>
22528: 768:                     <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-800 font-mono mb-1 break-all">${txn.endpoint}</h3>
22529: 769:                     <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 mb-5">${txn.description || 'No description available.'}</p>
22530: 770:                     <form id="form-${txn.id}">
22531: 771:                         ${fieldsHtml}
22532: 772:                         <button type="submit" class="w-full mt-2 py-2 px-4 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-md text-xs font-semibold transition-colors">Test ${txn.method} Request</button>
22533: 773:                     </form>
22534: 774:                     <div id="response-${txn.id}" class="mt-4 p-3 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-md font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-600 overflow-y-auto max-h-48 whitespace-pre-wrap hidden"></div>
22535: 775:                 `;
22536: 776: 
22537: 777:                 app.appendChild(card);
22538: 778: 
22539: 779:                 if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
22540: 780:                     fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework);
22541: 781:                 }
22542: 782: 
22543: 783:                 document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`).addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
22544: 784:                     e.preventDefault();
22545: 785:                     await submitTransaction(txn);
22546: 786:                 });
22547: 787:             });
22548: 788:         }
22549: 789: 
22550: 790:         async function fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework) {
22551: 791:             try {
22552: 792:                 const endpoints = [txn.endpoint.replace('/api/', '/'), '/', '/login'];
22553: 793:                 for (const ep of endpoints) {
22554: 794:                     const r = await fetch(`${targetBaseUrl}${ep}`, { credentials: 'include' });
22555: 795:                     if (r.ok) {
22556: 796:                         const html = await r.text();
22557: 797:                         const match = html.match(new RegExp(`name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']\\s+value=["']([^"']+)["']`)) || html.match(new RegExp(`value=["']([^"']+)["']\\s+name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']`));
22558: 798:                         const metaMatch = html.match(new RegExp(`name=["']csrf-token["']\\s+content=["']([^"']+)["']`));
22559: 799:                         
22560: 800:                         const csrfInput = document.getElementById(`${txn.id}_csrf`);
22561: 801:                         if (match && csrfInput) { csrfInput.value = match[1]; return; } 
22562: 802:                         else if (metaMatch && csrfInput) { csrfInput.value = metaMatch[1]; return; }
22563: 803:                     }
22564: 804:                 }
22565: 805:             } catch (e) {
22566: 806:                 console.warn(`CSRF Fetch Error:`, e.message);
22567: 807:             }
22568: 808:         }
22569: 809: 
22570: 810:         async function submitTransaction(txn) {
22571: 811:             const form = document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`);
22572: 812:             const responseBox = document.getElementById(`response-${txn.id}`);
22573: 813:             const payload = Object.fromEntries(new FormData(form));
22574: 814: 
22575: 815:             responseBox.classList.remove('hidden');
22576: 816:             responseBox.textContent = '⏳ Mengirim request...';
22577: 817:             responseBox.className = 'mt-4 p-3 bg-slate-50 border-l-4 border-slate-300 rounded-r-md font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-600 overflow-y-auto max-h-48 whitespace-pre-wrap';
22578: 818: 
22579: 819:             try {
22580: 820:                 const options = { method: txn.method, credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } };
22581: 821:                 if (txn.method !== 'GET') {
22582: 822:                     options.headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
22583: 823:                     options.body = JSON.stringify(payload);
22584: 824:                     if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
22585: 825:                         const token = payload[txn.csrf_field_name] || '';
22586: 826:                         options.headers['X-CSRF-Token'] = token;
22587: 827:                         options.headers['X-XSRF-Token'] = token;
22588: 828:                     }
22589: 829:                 }
22590: 830: 
22591: 831:                 const start = performance.now();
22592: 832:                 const r = await fetch(`${targetBaseUrl}${txn.endpoint}`, options);
22593: 833:                 const elapsed = (performance.now() - start).toFixed(0);
22594: 834:                 const text = await r.text();
22595: 835: 
22596: 836:                 let display = text;
22597: 837:                 try { display = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2); } catch {}
22598: 838:                 if(display.length > 2000) display = display.substring(0, 2000) + '\n... (truncated)';
22599: 839: 
22600: 840:                 responseBox.textContent = `HTTP ${r.status} ${r.statusText} (${elapsed}ms)\n\n${display}`;
22601: 841:                 
22602: 842:                 if (r.ok) responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-emerald-500');
22603: 843:                 else if (r.status >= 500) responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-red-500');
22604: 844:                 else responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-amber-500');
22605: 845: 
22606: 846:             } catch (err) {
22607: 847:                 responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-red-500');
22608: 848:                 responseBox.textContent = `❌ Network Error: ${err.message}\nPastikan server target menyala dan CORS diizinkan.`;
22609: 849:             }
22610: 850:         }
22611: 851:     </script>
22612: 852: </body>
22613: 853: 
22614: 854: </html>
22615: 
22616: 
22617: 
22618: 
22619: 
22620: ================================================================
22621: End of Codebase
22622: ================================================================

================
File: pipeline.py
================
  1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
  2: """
  3: Pipeline Orchestrator
  4: Runs all 4 agents in sequence.
  5: """
  6: 
  7: import sys
  8: import os
  9: import json
 10: import argparse
 11: from dataclasses import asdict
 12: from pathlib import Path
 13: 
 14: # Fix Windows console Unicode encoding
 15: if sys.platform == "win32":
 16:     sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace", line_buffering=True)
 17:     sys.stderr.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace", line_buffering=True)
 18: 
 19: import agent1_ingestion
 20: import agent2_gemini_identifier
 21: import agent3_carbon
 22: import agent4_report
 23: 
 24: 
 25: def main():
 26:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
 27:         description="Multi-Agent Code Carbon Pipeline",
 28:         formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
 29:         epilog="""
 30: Examples:
 31:   # Local directory
 32:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-laravel-app
 33: 
 34:   # Git repository
 35:   python pipeline.py --source https://github.com/user/repo
 36: 
 37:   # Skip carbon testing (no live app running)
 38:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --skip-carbon
 39: 
 40:   # Specify output directory
 41:   python pipeline.py --source ./my-app --output ./my-analysis
 42:         """
 43:     )
 44:     parser.add_argument("--source", required=True, help="Local path or Git URL")
 45:     parser.add_argument("--output", default="./output", help="Output directory")
 46:     parser.add_argument("--skip-carbon", action="store_true",
 47:                         help="Skip Agent 3 (no live app required)")
 48:     parser.add_argument("--base-url", default=None,
 49:                         help="Override TARGET_BASE_URL for Agent 3")
 50: 
 51:     args = parser.parse_args()
 52: 
 53:     if args.base_url:
 54:         import os
 55:         os.environ["TARGET_BASE_URL"] = args.base_url
 56: 
 57:     print("=" * 60)
 58:     print("🤖 MULTI-AGENT CODE CARBON PIPELINE")
 59:     print("=" * 60)
 60: 
 61:     # ── Agent 1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 62:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 1 — Repository Ingestion")
 63:     ingestion = agent1_ingestion.run(args.source, args.output)
 64:     if not ingestion.success:
 65:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 1 failed: {ingestion.error}")
 66:         sys.exit(1)
 67: 
 68:     # Save ingestion result
 69:     with open(f"{args.output}/ingestion_result.json", "w") as f:
 70:         json.dump(asdict(ingestion), f, indent=2)
 71: 
 72:     # ── Agent 2 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 73:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 2 — Gemini Transaction Identifier")
 74:     identification = agent2_gemini_identifier.run(
 75:         ingestion.flat_file_path,
 76:         ingestion.detected_framework
 77:     )
 78:     if not identification.success:
 79:         print(f"[PIPELINE] ❌ Agent 2 failed: {identification.error}")
 80:         sys.exit(1)
 81: 
 82:     # ── Agent 3 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 83:     if args.skip_carbon:
 84:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ⏭  Agent 3 — Skipped (--skip-carbon)")
 85:         # Create empty carbon result
 86:         empty_carbon = {
 87:             "success": True, "base_url": "", "total_requests": 0,
 88:             "successful_requests": 0, "failed_requests": 0,
 89:             "total_energy_kwh": 0.0, "total_co2_kg": 0.0,
 90:             "avg_response_time_ms": 0.0, "measurements": []
 91:         }
 92:         with open(f"{args.output}/carbon_report.json", "w") as f:
 93:             json.dump(empty_carbon, f, indent=2)
 94:     else:
 95:         print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 3 — Code Carbon")
 96:         carbon = agent3_carbon.run(f"{args.output}/transactions.json")
 97:         if not carbon.success:
 98:             print(f"[PIPELINE] ⚠️  Agent 3 warning: {carbon.error}")
 99: 
100:     # ── Agent 4 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
101:     print("\n[PIPELINE] ▶ Agent 4 — Refactor Report")
102:     report_path = agent4_report.run(args.output)
103: 
104:     print("\n" + "=" * 60)
105:     print("✅ PIPELINE COMPLETE")
106:     print(f"📄 Report: {report_path}")
107:     print(f"🧪 Tests:  ./reports/tests/")
108:     print("=" * 60)
109: 
110: 
111: if __name__ == "__main__":
112:     main()

================
File: server.py
================
 1: import os
 2: import json
 3: import subprocess
 4: from flask import Flask, request, jsonify, Response, send_from_directory
 5: from flask_cors import CORS
 6: 
 7: app = Flask(__name__, static_folder='web_ui', static_url_path='')
 8: CORS(app)
 9: 
10: @app.route('/')
11: def index():
12:     return send_from_directory('web_ui', 'index.html')
13: 
14: @app.route('/api/transactions')
15: def get_transactions():
16:     """Serve the generated transactions.json file"""
17:     output_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), 'output')
18:     tx_file = os.path.join(output_dir, 'transactions.json')
19:     if os.path.exists(tx_file):
20:         with open(tx_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
21:             return jsonify(json.load(f))
22:     return jsonify({"error": "transactions.json not found. Run the pipeline first."}), 404
23: 
24: @app.route('/api/run-pipeline', methods=['POST'])
25: def run_pipeline():
26:     """Run the pipeline and stream the output back to the client using SSE"""
27:     data = request.json
28:     source = data.get('source')
29:     base_url = data.get('base_url')
30:     skip_carbon = data.get('skip_carbon', False)
31:     
32:     if not source:
33:         return jsonify({"error": "Source is required"}), 400
34:         
35:     def generate():
36:         cmd = ['python', 'pipeline.py', '--source', source]
37:         if base_url:
38:             cmd.extend(['--base-url', base_url])
39:         if skip_carbon:
40:             cmd.append('--skip-carbon')
41:             
42:         # Ensure unbuffered output so we get lines immediately
43:         env = os.environ.copy()
44:         env['PYTHONUNBUFFERED'] = '1'
45:         
46:         process = subprocess.Popen(
47:             cmd,
48:             stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
49:             stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
50:             text=True,
51:             bufsize=1,
52:             env=env,
53:             cwd=os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
54:         )
55:         
56:         for line in iter(process.stdout.readline, ''):
57:             if line:
58:                 # Format as Server-Sent Event
59:                 yield f"data: {line.strip()}\n\n"
60:                 
61:         process.stdout.close()
62:         return_code = process.wait()
63:         
64:         if return_code == 0:
65:             yield "data: [DONE]\n\n"
66:         else:
67:             yield f"data: [ERROR] Pipeline exited with code {return_code}\n\n"
68:             
69:     return Response(generate(), mimetype='text/event-stream')
70: 
71: if __name__ == '__main__':
72:     print("Starting Code Carbon Server at http://localhost:5000")
73:     app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=5000, debug=True)

554:   <script>
555:     const executionPanel = document.getElementById('executionPanel');
556:     const pipelineStatus = document.getElementById('pipelineStatus');
557:     const runBtn = document.getElementById('runBtn');
558:     const reportView = document.getElementById('reportView');
559: 
560:     // Agent 2 table refs
561:     const s2TableBody = document.getElementById('s2-table-body');
562:     const s2TableContainer = document.getElementById('s2-table-container');
563: 
564:     // Agent 3 table refs
565:     const s3TableBody = document.getElementById('s3-table-body');
566:     const s3TableContainer = document.getElementById('s3-table-container');
567: 
568:     // Load local storage states
569:     if (localStorage.getItem('cc_source')) document.getElementById('source').value = localStorage.getItem('cc_source');
570:     if (localStorage.getItem('cc_base_url')) document.getElementById('base-url').value = localStorage.getItem('cc_base_url');
571:     if (localStorage.getItem('cc_skip_carbon') === 'true') document.getElementById('skip-carbon').checked = true;
572: 
573:     let targetBaseUrl = '';
574: 
575:     // Agent 2 counters
576:     let s2TxCount = 0;
577:     let s2MutCount = 0;
578:     let s2ProtCount = 0;
579: 
580:     // Agent 3 counters
581:     let totEnergy = 0;
582:     let totCo2 = 0;
583:     let endpointsCount = 0;
584: 
585:     // Lock the left card's height to the right card's initial height
586:     window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
587:       setTimeout(() => {
588:         const configCard = document.getElementById('configCard');
589:         const execPanel = document.getElementById('executionPanel');
590:         if (configCard && execPanel) {
591:           configCard.style.height = 'auto';
592:           execPanel.style.minHeight = 'auto';
593: 
594:           const maxHeight = Math.max(configCard.offsetHeight, execPanel.offsetHeight);
595: 
596:           configCard.style.height = maxHeight + 'px';
597:           execPanel.style.minHeight = maxHeight + 'px';
598:         }
599:       }, 100);
600:     });
601: 
602:     function updateStep(stepId, state, msgText) {
603:       const el = document.getElementById(`step${stepId}`);
604:       const msgEl = document.getElementById(`s${stepId}-msg`);
605: 
606:       if (state === 'active') {
607:         el.classList.add('step-active');
608:         msgEl.classList.remove('hidden');
609:         if (msgText) msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> ${msgText}`;
610:       } else if (state === 'done') {
611:         el.classList.replace('step-active', 'step-done');
612:         msgEl.innerHTML = `<span class="text-slate-800 font-semibold">Selesai</span>`;
613:       }
614:     }
615: 
616:     async function runPipeline() {
617:       const source = document.getElementById('source').value;
618:       const baseUrl = document.getElementById('base-url').value;
619:       const skipCarbon = document.getElementById('skip-carbon').checked;
620: 
621:       targetBaseUrl = baseUrl;
622:       localStorage.setItem('cc_source', source);
623:       localStorage.setItem('cc_base_url', baseUrl);
624:       localStorage.setItem('cc_skip_carbon', skipCarbon);
625: 
626:       runBtn.disabled = true;
627:       runBtn.innerText = "Sistem Sedang Berjalan...";
628: 
629:       executionPanel.classList.remove('opacity-50', 'pointer-events-none');
630:       pipelineStatus.className = 'px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded text-xs font-semibold';
631:       pipelineStatus.innerText = 'Aktif';
632:       reportView.classList.remove('show-view');
633:       reportView.classList.add('hidden-view');
634:       document.getElementById('tx-container').style.display = 'none';
635: 
636:       // Reset
637:       for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
638:         document.getElementById(`step${i}`).className = 'step-item' + (i === 4 ? ' pb-0' : '');
639:         document.getElementById(`s${i}-msg`).classList.add('hidden');
640:       }
641:       document.getElementById('s4-action').classList.add('hidden');
642: 
643:       // Reset Agent 2
644:       document.getElementById('s2-console').classList.add('hidden');
645:       document.getElementById('s2-summary').classList.add('hidden');
646:       s2TableBody.innerHTML = '';
647:       s2TxCount = 0;
648:       s2MutCount = 0;
649:       s2ProtCount = 0;
650: 
651:       // Reset Agent 3
652:       document.getElementById('s3-console').classList.add('hidden');
653:       document.getElementById('s3-summary').classList.add('hidden');
654:       s3TableBody.innerHTML = '';
655:       totEnergy = 0;
656:       totCo2 = 0;
657:       endpointsCount = 0;
658: 
659:       try {
660:         const response = await fetch('/api/run-pipeline', {
661:           method: 'POST',
662:           headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
663:           body: JSON.stringify({
664:             source: source,
665:             base_url: baseUrl,
666:             skip_carbon: skipCarbon
667:           })
668:         });
669: 
670:         if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Server returned ${response.status}`);
671: 
672:         const reader = response.body.getReader();
673:         const decoder = new TextDecoder('utf-8');
674: 
675:         while (true) {
676:           const { done, value } = await reader.read();
677:           if (done) break;
678: 
679:           const chunk = decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
680:           const lines = chunk.split('\n\n');
681: 
682:           for (const line of lines) {
683:             if (line.startsWith('data: ')) {
684:               const data = line.slice(6);
685: 
686:               if (data === '[DONE]') {
687:                 await handlePipelineComplete();
688:                 break;
689:               }
690: 
691:               // Identify steps
692:               if (data.includes('Agent 1')) {
693:                 updateStep(1, 'active', 'Memindai kerangka proyek...');
694:               } else if (data.includes('Agent 2')) {
695:                 updateStep(1, 'done');
696:                 updateStep(2, 'active', 'Mengirim konteks ke AI...');
697:                 document.getElementById('s2-console').classList.remove('hidden');
698:               } else if (data.includes('Agent 3')) {
699:                 updateStep(2, 'done');
700:                 updateStep(3, 'active', 'Menguji endpoint...');
701:                 document.getElementById('s3-console').classList.remove('hidden');
702:                 document.getElementById('s2-summary').classList.remove('hidden');
703:               } else if (data.includes('Agent 4')) {
704:                 updateStep(3, 'done');
705:                 updateStep(4, 'active', 'Menyusun laporan akhir...');
706:                 document.getElementById('s3-summary').classList.remove('hidden');
707:               }
708: 
709:               // Match Agent 2 Transaction Row
710:               // Format: [AGENT2-TX] METHOD | endpoint | csrf:yes/no | auth:yes/no | fields:N
711:               const tx2Match = data.match(/\[AGENT2-TX\]\s+(\w+)\s+\|\s+(.*?)\s+\|\s+csrf:(\w+)\s+\|\s+auth:(\w+)\s+\|\s+fields:(\d+)/);
712:               if (tx2Match) {
713:                 const method = tx2Match[1];
714:                 const path = tx2Match[2];
715:                 const csrf = tx2Match[3];
716:                 const auth = tx2Match[4];
717:                 const fields = tx2Match[5];
718: 
719:                 s2TxCount++;
720:                 if (['POST', 'PUT', 'PATCH', 'DELETE'].includes(method)) s2MutCount++;
721:                 if (csrf === 'yes') s2ProtCount++;
722: 
723:                 document.getElementById('s2-msg').innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> Mendeteksi endpoint (${s2TxCount})...`;
724:                 document.getElementById('s2-tot-count').innerText = s2TxCount;
725:                 document.getElementById('s2-tot-mut').innerText = s2MutCount;
726:                 document.getElementById('s2-tot-prot').innerText = s2ProtCount;
727: 
728:                 // Method color
729:                 let methodClass = 'text-slate-700';
730:                 if (method === 'POST') methodClass = 'text-emerald-600';
731:                 if (method === 'DELETE') methodClass = 'text-red-500';
732:                 if (method === 'PUT' || method === 'PATCH') methodClass = 'text-amber-600';
733: 
734:                 const csrfIcon = csrf === 'yes'
735:                   ? '<span class="text-amber-600">🔐</span>'
736:                   : '<span class="text-slate-300">—</span>';
737:                 const authIcon = auth === 'yes'
738:                   ? '<span class="text-blue-600">🔑</span>'
739:                   : '<span class="text-slate-300">—</span>';
740: 
741:                 const tr = document.createElement('tr');
742:                 tr.className = "hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors";
743:                 tr.innerHTML = `
744:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 whitespace-nowrap font-bold ${methodClass}">${method}</td>
745:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 truncate max-w-[250px] text-slate-700">${path}</td>
746:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-center">${csrfIcon}</td>
747:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-center">${authIcon}</td>
748:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-700 font-medium">${fields}</td>
749:                                 `;
750:                 s2TableBody.appendChild(tr);
751:                 s2TableContainer.scrollTop = s2TableContainer.scrollHeight;
752:                 continue;
753:               }
754: 
755:               // Match Carbon Row: "✅ [200] GET /api/users - 120ms - 0.00012mWh - 0.0000g"
756:               const rowMatch = data.match(/\[(\d+)\]\s+(\w+)\s+(.*?)\s+-\s+(\d+)ms\s+-\s+([\d\.]+)mWh\s+-\s+([\d\.]+)g/);
757:               if (rowMatch) {
758:                 const statusVal = rowMatch[1];
759:                 const method = rowMatch[2];
760:                 const path = rowMatch[3];
761:                 const ms = rowMatch[4];
762:                 const energy = parseFloat(rowMatch[5]);
763:                 const co2 = parseFloat(rowMatch[6]);
764: 
765:                 totEnergy += energy;
766:                 totCo2 += co2;
767:                 endpointsCount++;
768: 
769:                 document.getElementById(`s3-msg`).innerHTML = `<span class="spinner"></span> Menguji (${endpointsCount})...`;
770:                 document.getElementById('s3-tot-energy').innerText = totEnergy.toFixed(4);
771:                 document.getElementById('s3-tot-co2').innerText = totCo2.toFixed(5);
772: 
773:                 const statusHtml = `<span class="text-slate-500">[${statusVal}]</span>`;
774:                 const tr = document.createElement('tr');
775:                 tr.className = "hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors";
776:                 tr.innerHTML = `
777:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 whitespace-nowrap font-medium text-slate-700">${method}</td>
778:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 truncate max-w-[150px] text-slate-500">${path}</td>
779:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2">${statusHtml}</td>
780:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-400">${ms}ms</td>
781:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-700 font-medium">${energy.toFixed(4)}</td>
782:                                     <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right text-slate-700 font-medium">${co2.toFixed(5)}</td>
783:                                 `;
784:                 s3TableBody.appendChild(tr);
785:                 s3TableContainer.scrollTop = s3TableContainer.scrollHeight;
786:               }
787:             }
788:           }
789:         }
790:       } catch (err) {
791:         console.error(err);
792:         alert("Koneksi gagal: " + err.message);
793:         runBtn.disabled = false;
794:         runBtn.innerText = "Jalankan Ulang Audit";
795:       }
796:     }
797: 
798:     async function handlePipelineComplete() {
799:       updateStep(4, 'done');
800:       document.getElementById('s4-action').classList.remove('hidden');
801:       pipelineStatus.className = 'px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-100 border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 rounded text-xs font-medium';
802:       pipelineStatus.innerText = 'Selesai';
803:       runBtn.disabled = false;
804:       runBtn.innerText = "Jalankan Ulang Audit";
805: 
806:       // Show report view
807:       setTimeout(() => {
808:         reportView.classList.remove('hidden-view');
809:         reportView.classList.add('show-view');
810:         reportView.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
811:       }, 500);
812: 
813:       // Fetch dynamic transactions generated by backend
814:       try {
815:         const res = await fetch('/api/transactions');
816:         if (res.ok) {
817:           const data = await res.json();
818:           document.getElementById('rep-endpoints').innerText = data.total_routes || endpointsCount || 0;
819:           document.getElementById('framework-info').textContent = `${data.framework || 'Unknown'} / ${data.language || 'Unknown'}`;
820:           renderTransactions(data.transactions || [], data.framework || 'unknown');
821:           document.getElementById('tx-container').style.display = 'block';
822:         }
823:       } catch (err) {
824:         console.error("Gagal memuat file transaksi:", err);
825:       }
826:     }
827: 
828:     function renderTransactions(transactions, framework) {
829:       const app = document.getElementById('app');
830:       app.innerHTML = '';
831: 
832:       transactions.forEach((txn) => {
833:         const card = document.createElement('div');
834:         card.className = 'bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm';
835:         card.id = `txn-${txn.id}`;
836: 
837:         let methodColor = 'bg-slate-800 text-white';
838:         if (txn.method === 'POST') methodColor = 'bg-emerald-600 text-white';
839:         if (txn.method === 'DELETE') methodColor = 'bg-red-500 text-white';
840:         if (txn.method === 'PUT') methodColor = 'bg-amber-500 text-slate-900';
841: 
842:         const badgesHtml = [
843:           `<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide mr-2 ${methodColor}">${txn.method}</span>`,
844:           txn.requires_csrf ? '<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold text-amber-700 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 mr-2">🔐 CSRF Protected</span>' : '',
845:           txn.requires_auth ? '<span class="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold text-blue-700 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 mr-2">🔑 Auth Required</span>' : '',
846:         ].filter(Boolean).join('');
847: 
848:         let fieldsHtml = '';
849:         (txn.fields || []).forEach(f => {
850:           const inputType = { 'email': 'email', 'password': 'password', 'integer': 'number', 'number': 'number' }[f.type] || 'text';
851:           const req = f.required ? '<span class="text-red-500">*</span>' : '';
852:           const rules = (f.validation_rules || []).join(', ');
853: 
854:           fieldsHtml += `
855:                         <div class="mb-3">
856:                             <label class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-1" for="${txn.id}_${f.name}">
857:                                 ${f.name} ${req} <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400 ml-1">(${f.type}${rules ? ' - ' + rules : ''})</span>
858:                             </label>
859:                             <input type="${inputType}" id="${txn.id}_${f.name}" name="${f.name}" class="input-field" placeholder="${f.description || f.name}" ${f.required ? 'required' : ''}>
860:                         </div>`;
861:         });
862: 
863:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
864:           fieldsHtml += `
865:                         <div class="mb-3 p-3 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 border-dashed rounded-lg opacity-80">
866:                             <label class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-1">CSRF Token <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400 ml-1">(Auto-fetched: ${txn.csrf_field_name})</span></label>
867:                             <input type="text" id="${txn.id}_csrf" name="${txn.csrf_field_name}" class="input-field bg-slate-100" placeholder="Fetching..." readonly>
868:                         </div>`;
869:         }
870: 
871:         card.innerHTML = `
872:                     <div class="flex items-center mb-3">${badgesHtml}</div>
873:                     <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-800 font-mono mb-1 break-all">${txn.endpoint}</h3>
874:                     <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 mb-5">${txn.description || 'No description available.'}</p>
875:                     <form id="form-${txn.id}">
876:                         ${fieldsHtml}
877:                         <button type="submit" class="w-full mt-2 py-2 px-4 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-md text-xs font-semibold transition-colors">Test ${txn.method} Request</button>
878:                     </form>
879:                     <div id="response-${txn.id}" class="mt-4 p-3 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-md font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-600 overflow-y-auto max-h-48 whitespace-pre-wrap hidden"></div>
880:                 `;
881: 
882:         app.appendChild(card);
883: 
884:         if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
885:           fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework);
886:         }
887: 
888:         document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`).addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
889:           e.preventDefault();
890:           await submitTransaction(txn);
891:         });
892:       });
893:     }
894: 
895:     async function fetchCsrfToken(txn, framework) {
896:       try {
897:         const endpoints = [txn.endpoint.replace('/api/', '/'), '/', '/login'];
898:         for (const ep of endpoints) {
899:           const r = await fetch(`${targetBaseUrl}${ep}`, { credentials: 'include' });
900:           if (r.ok) {
901:             const html = await r.text();
902:             const match = html.match(new RegExp(`name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']\\s+value=["']([^"']+)["']`)) || html.match(new RegExp(`value=["']([^"']+)["']\\s+name=["']${txn.csrf_field_name}["']`));
903:             const metaMatch = html.match(new RegExp(`name=["']csrf-token["']\\s+content=["']([^"']+)["']`));
904: 
905:             const csrfInput = document.getElementById(`${txn.id}_csrf`);
906:             if (match && csrfInput) { csrfInput.value = match[1]; return; }
907:             else if (metaMatch && csrfInput) { csrfInput.value = metaMatch[1]; return; }
908:           }
909:         }
910:       } catch (e) {
911:         console.warn(`CSRF Fetch Error:`, e.message);
912:       }
913:     }
914: 
915:     async function submitTransaction(txn) {
916:       const form = document.getElementById(`form-${txn.id}`);
917:       const responseBox = document.getElementById(`response-${txn.id}`);
918:       const payload = Object.fromEntries(new FormData(form));
919: 
920:       responseBox.classList.remove('hidden');
921:       responseBox.textContent = '⏳ Mengirim request...';
922:       responseBox.className = 'mt-4 p-3 bg-slate-50 border-l-4 border-slate-300 rounded-r-md font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-600 overflow-y-auto max-h-48 whitespace-pre-wrap';
923: 
924:       try {
925:         const options = { method: txn.method, credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } };
926:         if (txn.method !== 'GET') {
927:           options.headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
928:           options.body = JSON.stringify(payload);
929:           if (txn.requires_csrf && txn.csrf_field_name) {
930:             const token = payload[txn.csrf_field_name] || '';
931:             options.headers['X-CSRF-Token'] = token;
932:             options.headers['X-XSRF-Token'] = token;
933:           }
934:         }
935: 
936:         const start = performance.now();
937:         const r = await fetch(`${targetBaseUrl}${txn.endpoint}`, options);
938:         const elapsed = (performance.now() - start).toFixed(0);
939:         const text = await r.text();
940: 
941:         let display = text;
942:         try { display = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2); } catch { }
943:         if (display.length > 2000) display = display.substring(0, 2000) + '\n... (truncated)';
944: 
945:         responseBox.textContent = `HTTP ${r.status} ${r.statusText} (${elapsed}ms)\n\n${display}`;
946: 
947:         if (r.ok) responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-emerald-500');
948:         else if (r.status >= 500) responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-red-500');
949:         else responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-amber-500');
950: 
951:       } catch (err) {
952:         responseBox.classList.replace('border-slate-300', 'border-red-500');
953:         responseBox.textContent = `❌ Network Error: ${err.message}\nPastikan server target menyala dan CORS diizinkan.`;
954:       }
955:     }
956:   </script>
957: </body>
958: 
959: </html>
